chapters.title: Chapter 184 - Blocking And Suppressing Will Lead To Backlash
chapters.body:
Chapter 184 - Blocking And Suppressing Will Lead To Backlash

…

Unlike the serene atmosphere in the manor, a storm was brewing on the internet…

First, there was a huge reversal in public opinion. Things like Xiang Yi was a player, this objectification of women had been thrown out the window by netizens. The marketing accounts and paid haters received so much backlash they were beginning to doubt their own lives.

Then, the sudden shutdown of the stream caused strong dissatisfaction among fans as complaints and hate surfacing everywhere on the internet.

——[What kind of technical error is this hard to fix? How come we still can't see the stream after such a long time?]

——[Here's a theory, I think the issue in the stream was not a technical failure at all, but the work of someone else's evil! Everyone, let's think back: on the first day "Two Under One Roof" aired, the stream bugged out several times, right? And it's not a matter of what's 'too popular'. Next door, "Heartbeat" was also very popular, yet their connection was perfectly stable and problem free?]

——[Hehe. This is obviously the work of Muyao TV no matter how you see it. What kind of sly tricks have they NOT tried before? Making up negative comments, exposing dirt, fanning the flames, buying out navies; last time, they even plagiarized a small internet variety show and refused to admit it. Refusing to admit their faults, the director even posted on Weibo to ask for help from netizens, but he was instantly buried in complaints. Use your judgment, guys.]

——[F*ck! I was wondering why there were so many posts hating on Xiang Yi. I understand that the girl's business abilities come up a bit short, but it's not enough to earn the spite of everyone on the internet! It turns out someone was deliberately behind it!]

…

These remarks caused another uproar.

Some fans even approached Muyao TV's official blog and left a message for them asking for an explanation.

The operations department contacted the PR department, and after a long discussion, their solution was to——

Delete the comments.

Ban the users.

Remove Weibo's trending searches.

The PR department had long gotten used to such tactics. After all, netizen emotions come and go. How long can their support last? And how long can they really hate them for?

However…

Something nobody expected had happened…

The marketing page's attitude of disregarding the netizens actually angered a large group of people!

——[No way, no way? It's angry, don't provoke it!]

——[Deleting comments now? Can you delete them all? If you don't know, then you can't change anything!]

——[Lmao, if you're not guilty, why not just give a generous statement? Acting like such a coward means you're guilty for sure!!]

Love and hate might not last long on the internet.

But anger will.

It's better to divert things rather than blocking them, and it's even better to address than to divert.

The overwhelming comments swarmed Muyao TV's official page, as some people even dug out that "Delicious Three Meals"—which was airing tomorrow—was directed by Chen Mian. The netizens had found a place to vent their frustrations. Chen Mian's personal Weibo and the "Delicious Three Meals" promotional page instantly became victim to their anger.

…

Meanwhile, at the company dinner, Chen Mian valiantly enjoyed a toast from the crowd. During the period, someone peeked at their phone and began to whisper to the people surrounding him.

Within a few minutes, everyone turned to Chen Mian with strange expressions.

"Drink! Why aren't you guys drinking??! Am I not good enough for you?" Chen Mian said in a drunken drawl. Suddenly, his phone rang, the caller ID unsurprisingly being from his immediate supervisor.

Once he answered, his boss was brief and to the point: "Xiao Chen, the project "Delicious Three Meals" has been assigned to someone else. You should take a good rest over the next few days."

Chen Mian suddenly sobered up in an instant, his face turning pale as a ghost.

"Boss, you can't just let go of me…"

The phone hung up.

"No——" He wailed.

chapters.title: Chapter 185 - Go Home To Bully A Little Bunny
chapters.body:
Chapter 185 - Go Home To Bully A Little Bunny

…

At the same time.

An anonymous scientific research institute.

The stars sparkled above the outdoor terrace.

"Ahh, brother Li, I finally succeeded! My experiment perfectly extracted the GHE-3 enzyme!" The chubby man looked toward Xiang Li as he threw himself at him excitedly, wanting to give him a big hug.

Xiang Li indifferently took a step to the side, faster than the flash function in a video game, making the chubby guy hug the air.

The tall man with long legs leaned against the railing with a cigarette in his mouth. Nonchalantly, he replied, "Congrats."

"What's wrong with a hug…" The chubby man complained. "Everyone is saying you don't like girls anyway."

Xiang Li lifted his thin monolid, revealing a faint red mole under his lower lid. It was only visible upon closer inspection. "Even if the rumor that I like men is true, what does that have to do with liking you? Do you think I don't look at appearances…or that I don't care about intellect?"

The chubby man: "…"

Thanks, you've successfully hurt me. 🙂

"Brother Li, I heard you took the day off tomorrow. Are you visiting your relatives?"

There were several madmen who worked at the research institute. When they were busy with a project, they could go for months without contacting the outside world.

Xiang Li was the most severe. He hadn't left the institute for a whole year.

"Mhm." At the mention of his family, Xiang Li became visibly relaxed. His lips curved into a smile, although it was a menacing one. "Going back home to bully a little bunny."

The chubby man: ???

What kind of evil-doing was this?!!

The next day.

Xiang Yi slept peacefully through the night. She glanced at the alarm clock by her bedside upon waking up. It was 6:53 AM.

As she washed up, the girl suddenly realized something.

…Wait a minute. Wasn't she watching a movie last night?

How come she woke up on her bed?

She rinsed her mouth with mouthwash and sighed.

After returning from her transmigration journey, her vigilance was getting worse and worse.

"Meooww…" Xiao Naofu, who had been resting on the pillow, opened its eyes to look at her, groaning from being woken up.

It had a cat bed but refused to use it. Instead, it would sleep next to Xiang Yi on her pillow. She had no choice but to allow him.

"You can sleep a bit longer. I'll make you chicken and pumpkin rice later." Xiang Yi habitually kissed the cat on the forehead, but Xiao Naofu had suddenly tensed up.

Yesterday, that stinky man kissed me right there too! Ahh! It couldn't even lick the fur there. How infuriating!

The cat painfully clawed at Xiang Yi's lips and sadly meowed.

You stupid woman, you're no longer chaste, just like this Huhu!

…

After her morning exercises, Xiang Yi began to make breakfast for the staff.

It was then the doorbell rang. She rose up to open the door.

he fog from the morning hadn't cleared yet, and a damp and watery haze lingered everywhere.

Wang Shunli from Little Rabbit Farm greeted Xiang Yi with a warm smile. "Miss Yi, I'm here to bring you some vegetables."

After learning that Xiang Yi was on a live stream, he had personally delivered ingredients almost every day, always choosing the highest quality and freshest picks from their farm.

"Thanks, Uncle Wang, sorry to trouble you so much." Xiang Yi received the basket from him. "Please stay for breakfast."

Wang Shunli: "It's okay, there's a lot to do at the farm today. Oh right, someone from the research institute is coming today. I received a notice that the experiment fields would be inspected or something."

"I see." Xiang Yi nodded. "Thank you for your cooperation."

As they spoke, the sound of a car horn resonated from the front gate.

Three rhythmic honks—no more, no less, as usual.

Xiang Yi felt her heart suddenly pound violently. She looked from the distance to see two inconspicuous black cars. A muscular bodyguard stepped out first and respectfully opened the door for the people in the back seat…

——

chapters.title: Chapter 186 - Second Brother Arrives
chapters.body:
Chapter 186 - Second Brother Arrives

Sunlight pierced through the clouds and mist, washing over that person.

He wore a clean, white linen shirt paired with black trousers with the top buttons loose, revealing a clear Adam's apple.

He nudged at his glasses with a finger, revealing wrists that were pale with vessels looming from underneath transparent skin. He was slender, but he did not appear weak.

A pair of silver-frame glasses rested on a tall nose bridge, making the entire person seem gentle and elegant.

The bodyguard opened the wrought-iron gate for him as the man slowly strode toward the manor.

Xiang Yi stepped forward but hesitated, unsure whether to proceed.

It was her second brother.

Xiang Li.

Was his hand…better now?

The man's strides were long, and in a blink of an eye, he appeared in front of Xiang Yi.

But——

His gaze transcended Xiang Yi and fell on Wang Shunli. "Sir, are you in charge of Little Rabbit Farm?"

"Yes, yes, that's me. You must be…from the research institute?"

Xiang Li tightened his jaws and fixed his elegant posture, as if he was a young master, fresh as jade from an ancient acolyte family.

Xiang Yi's face was pale as she tightly clutched the edge of her shirt.

Her brother had treated her…like air…

It turns out, ignorance was more ruthless than indifference.

Wang Shunli politely answered, "Aye, I'm a rough person, I don't know how to say nice things. Thank you for coming; have you had breakfast yet? Our Yi mei's cooking is top-notch…"

"Uncle Wang, why don't you take him to eat at Little Rabbit Farm?" Xiang Yi interrupted. She glanced at Xiang Li's right hand and, upon closer inspection, saw there was a light-colored brace wrapped around it. After seeing this, she bit her lower lip, unable to bring herself to meet Xiang Li's eyes.

And even more afraid of…her second brother treating her like a stranger.

As for breakfast, Xiang Li had taken on the attitudes of her third and fourth brother, hating her to the extreme. How could he possibly eat her food?

He would probably get annoyed even speaking to her.

Xiang Yi ran away for the first time, fleeing in haste.

"Eh? Miss Yi?" Wang Shunli shook his head, confused.

What's wrong with Miss Yi today?

She had never been one to lack propriety, so her behavior today was very abnormal.

Xiang Li narrowed his thin eyes as a darkness flashed through them.

He was just testing the waters and had gotten his answer.

Evidently, she wasn't 'that' girl anymore.

Xiang Yi had shut herself away until five minutes before the stream when she left her room.

Hearing the movement, Shi Sui turned his face and fixed his gaze on the girl.

Although she was only wearing some light makeup, Xiang Yi's appearance still overwhelmed him at first glance.

She couldn't hide her distress.

"No fever today?" Shi Sui asked.

Xiang Yi responded absent-mindedly, accidentally glancing in the direction of the staircase where Li Jianyu and Xiang Li had been chatting about something, arms flailing about in excitement.

Her eyes widened.

"Yi mei, come, come; let me introduce you to a big master!" Li Jianyu waved at her. "He helped me a lot!"

Xiang Yi looked stiff, unwilling to approach at all.

Suddenly, Shi Sui's gentle voice suddenly appeared in her ear. "Let's go together? Hm?"

Xiang Yi gratefully whispered, "Thank you…"

Shi Sui patted her head and felt a sharp light flash from the silver-rimmed glasses in the distance.

Li Jianyu was laughing like a fool. "This is Doctor Xiang, a researcher who is visiting Little Rabbit Farm on business. He heard of our stream being hacked and helped us write a new firewall program. These researchers nowadays are so helpful…Oh right, your last names are both Xiang, how quaint! Maybe your ancestors were from the same family!"

chapters.title: Chapter 187 - Clever And Smart Yiyi
chapters.body:
Chapter 187 - Clever And Smart Yiyi

"…" Xiang Yi's cherry-colored lips opened slightly, making out a 'oo' sound, but she did not answer.

Xiang Li looked at her with a fake smile and stretched out a slender hand. "Hello."

For a moment, Xiang Yi thought that her brother had forgiven her.

But…there's no way, right?

Her second brother's right hand was totally useless…

Thinking of the information she had gained, she couldn't help but feel the anger welling up.

A year ago, the person inhabiting her body had taken her second brother rock climbing. She was not a professional at all and refused to wear any protection, insisting that she climb alone. In the end, she fell from the climbing wall.

Her second brother had saved her.

Because of her, he had hurt his right wrist down to the bone. It had compressed a nerve. Although it didn't affect his regular lifestyle, he would never be able to perform those precise and high skill level experiments again.

Afterward, that "Xiang Yi" still refused to take the responsibility, lying that Xiang Li had hurt himself, and it had nothing to do with her. She had utterly broken Xiang Li's heart.

After this incident, everyone in the family became extremely disappointed in her, hence why nobody had asked or cared about her after she entered the entertainment industry.

Xiang Yi suddenly snapped back to reality, wiping her hand on her skirt and shaking hands with the man with a trembling voice. "…Hello."

Xiang Li shook her hand for an instant before letting it go. He had been polite and portly, with no noticeable issue.

But his eyebrows formed into a frown.

Why was his sister's hand so cold?

Because of his frown, Xiang Yi felt as if her heart had been pierced by a needle. Her eyes drooped as her long, feathery lashes cast a shadow on her pale skin.

In the end, it seems he still hated her…

Li Jianyu was still prattling thoughtlessly, "Doctor Xiang also promised to be our special guest in this episode to spread his knowledge of scientific agriculture!"

He suddenly felt that his variety show had become much more scholarly and bespoke.

If her brother was going to be a guest, wouldn't she be able to see him for the whole day?

But soon she realized that maybe her brother didn't want to see her.

Two minutes later.

"Everyone, please get ready, the stream is about to begin ——"

The staff members began to move about.

Xiang Yi also cheered herself up and faced the camera.

Today's stream was going to start as usual with breakfast on the table.

Steamed buns, soy milk, bean paste pancakes, boiled tea eggs… A few simple home-cooked dishes had become incredibly appetizing to everyone present after undergoing Xiang Yi's skillful hands.

She had made two kinds of bun stuffing. The meat buns had been made from three-parts fat and seven-parts lean pork meat. They had been minced with a processor and combined with green onion, ginger, fennel, and other spices to increase the flavor. The vegetable buns had been made with mushrooms and winter bamboo shoots, with a few drops of sesame oil so the taste would be extra delicious.

The soy milk had been made with soybeans, rice, peanuts, and red dates ground in a stone mill in the small kitchen, then heated. The fragrance was delicious. The remaining bean paste had been mixed with a small amount of flour and egg to make bean paste pancakes, which were crisp and crunchy in texture.

Marinating overnight, the tea eggs were so soaked with flavor that pierced the yolk, accompanied by boiled greens and a few plates of pickled veggies, with its nourishing richness and warm colors reaching the audience viewing the stream…

——[Ahh as soon as I open the stream, it's another punch in the face of delicious food!]

——[Crying, I just had breakfast but I'm hungry again!]

——[Genius Yiyi! The most beautiful chef, Yiyi!]

——[I support "Two Under One Roof"! I support Shi Yingdi! I support Yi mei!]

With the support of the public opinion last night, the atmosphere of the livestream became harmonious and sweet.

chapters.title: Chapter 188 - The Absurdity Of Magical Realism
chapters.body:
Chapter 188 - The Absurdity Of Magical Realism

After Xiang Li entered the scene, Li Jianyu became a narrator as he introduced him briefly.

The comments on the live stream:

——[A 26-year-old with a doctorate? What kind of top-student brother is this Q_Q]

——[He looks so refreshing, as if he's radiating a gentle and elegant demeanor alongside that small red mole. He's soooo my type]

——[Gege is not a DOCTOR, he's a heart sniper!!]

——[Which 'Xiang' is it? 相?向?项? Hahaha, if it's 'Xiang Li', maybe he's Yi mei's older brother again~]

——[Lmao, do you think everyone with the Xiang last name is her brother? What kind of daydream are you having?]

——[Wtf does that have to do with you? How much did Muyao TV pay you? You don't want to be a human and chose to be a dog instead?]

Even if there were one or two haters, they would be refuted immediately.

Everyone's aspirations were aligned. Right now, Muyao TV was everyone's public enemy at the moment. Of course they would protect Xiang Yi.

At the dining table.

But surprisingly…

He ate it.

His expression remained neutral. He didn't reveal any of his dislikes and even exaggerated a praise of "not bad".

Xiang Yi thought that her brother had only said so out of etiquette.

Faced with the person who had ruined his hand, her brother still acted so gentle. He really was…

Too kind.

She didn't know that Xiang Li was purely saying so because his little sister's cooking was too good.

It was a delicacy he had missed for a long time 🙂

He slowly peeled a tea egg and handed it to Xiang Yi. "Here, for you."

Xiang Yi raised her head, eyes full of disbelief.

Seeing that she wasn't taking it, Xiang Li placed the egg in a dish in front of her, and then peeled another one and gave it to Shi Sui.

Shi Sui: "…Thanks."

Xiang Li smiled. "No problem."

The live stream comments exploded.

——[Does anyone ship the doctor and Yi mei?!]

——[Wait, is the doctor and Shi Sui not a better combo???]

——[The Doctor Gege is so gentle Q_Q I have no resistance toward such gentle men]

Xiang Yi's eyes were full of surprise. Carefully, she ate her tea egg, thinking that it tasted much better because her brother had peeled it for her.

Even if she knew that her brother's personality made him naturally want to take care of others, the girl's lips couldn't help forming a smile.

At this moment, someone suddenly commented in the live stream:

——[Holy f*ck, did you guys see the new drama regarding Xiang Yi on Weibo? I'm shocked; her reputation is done for!]

At first, people mocked this comment: [Ah, the navy again? Please get lost]

Yet, more and more people soon posted similar comments, which aroused the curiosity of several people as they opened the Weibo post.

The so-called drama had been posted by a blogger named "Noob and Bald PHD"…

[Noob and Bald PHD]: Anyone who is an old fan of mine should know that I'm a die-hard fan of Dr. X. As a legendary figure in biomedicine, he has been involved in several specializations, particularly medicine.

But he had withdrawn from the world's most cutting-edge research project a year ago and chose to pursue a theory route. I was very puzzled until recently, when I learned that Dr. X had a right-hand injury that damaged his nerves. This was why he was forced to stop his scientific research!

But what surprised me even more was that it wasn't an accident! It had been hurt by @XiangYiV! I have video proof!

A bright star in the science circle has thus fallen, while this so-called 'star' in the entertainment industry is rising. This is the absurdity of magical realism!

chapters.title: Chapter 189 - I Trust Her
chapters.body:
Chapter 189 - I Trust Her

This blogger usually had a humorous style and even opened up an anonymous mailbox. He would often post some complaints submitted by fans about campus life, such as strange profs or weird classmates, etc., He had a large fanbase.

So when this Weibo was posted, it was immediately trending.

Fans of "Two Under Roof" or Xiang Yi did not believe it at first, but once they viewed the video, the comments went silent.

The video was taken at an outdoor rock climbing facility. It was easy to tell Xiang Yi wasn't wearing any safety gear and had been climbing recklessly with her b.a.r.e hands. She didn't get very far before running out of energy. Seeing she was about to fall, Xiang Li quickly climbed after her to rescue her.

But she was either scared or nervous, because once they landed she bumped into Xiang Li!

Xiang Li's hand had been badly hurt from the fall as blood began to stream down his pale and translucent fingertips. It was a shocking scene…

Not only this, Xiang Yi did not bother to ask if Xiang Li was okay but had instead begun to cry and w.h.i.n.e about the skin on her hand being cut. She sobbed and cried for the emergency doctor on site to treat her first…

Even if it were a regular person, the netizens would have been extremely angry, what more with a famous medical scholar!

——[Did she push him on purpose? Dr. X is a national treasure in the science field; how could she be so heartless! Is she a foreign spy?]

——[I'm so disgusted by her asking the doctor to treat her first. How can someone be so selfish?!]

——[Oh my f*cking god, let me save the 10,000 word rant. I just want to ask @XiangYiV, why are you still trying to fake a f*cking gentle and intellectual personality? Why are you such a b*tch??!]

The PR Department at Muyao TV were overjoyed, slapping their t.h.i.g.hs in happiness when they saw this post. This basically just fell into their laps!

The PR Department immediately bought out all the trending searches regarding this topic.

One stone stirs up a thousand ripples, and this wave was so big it could have swept across the sky!

The video was hard evidence. All the fans were stunned. Most of them were debating if they still wanted to remain Xiang Yi's fan, much less defend her!

Twenty minutes later, the Noob and Bald PHD user made another post. He had taken a screenshot of a scene from "Two Under One Roof" and wrote below it lines from a famous poem by Tagore: [The world has kissed my soul with its pain, asking for its return in songs.]

The photo was of Xiang Li smiling as he handed Xiang Yi a peeled egg.

——[So Xiang Li is Dr. X. Oh my god, how can he still smile in the face of his enemy!]

——[Doctor, you have such a kind heart! But she's not worthy of sharing a dinner table with you! Even if she knelt in front of you, she can't compensate for what she did. How can she have the shame to pretend as if nothing has happened!]

——[A person who can mistreat the person who had saved her life, a person whose skin is so thick that she's trying to still sell herself as the 'victim', with all due respect, is straight garbage! One hundred percent garbage!!]

In reality, at a high-end c.o.n.d.o.minium.

Qin Wanyan scrolled through her phone, her face aching from smiling.

Remembering the time Xiang Yi had outshined her on the red carpet, Qin Wanyan was full of spite. That stupid woman had no idea how much dirt she had just left in her hands. She sneered.

You want to be famous? In your dreams!

You're only worthy of being my stepping stone!

She opened her chatbox with Yan Nai and, insincerely, wrote out: [ Ah Nai, I didn't think Xiang Yi could do this kind of thing. I feel like I don't even know her anymore…]

It was a reply from Yan Nai, whose short words made his stance all the more firm:

[I trust her.]

chapters.title: Chapter 190 - This Is My Last Time Calling You Sister Wanyan
chapters.body:
Chapter 190 - This Is My Last Time Calling You Sister Wanyan

"…" Qin Wanyan was speechless for a while. If it wasn't for the fact that Director Yan had a big blockbuster movie in the works, she wouldn't have bothered maintaining contact with Yan Nai at all.

Yan Nai used to listen to everything she said before, but after one short trip to film at the manor, his attitude toward Xiang Yi had seen a 180-degree change!

Qin Wanyan clenched her teeth as she typed out: [But there is video evidence…]

Yan Nai: [Mhm.]

Qin Wanyan: [Moreover, IT specialists have analyzed the video and say that it's real and did not undergo any post processing]

After the incident, she was the first one to save the video. Qin Wanyan knew better than anyone regarding the authenticity of the video!

Yan Nai: [Oh.]

Qin Wanyan: ???

'She's already spilled all the information, yet why is this idiot still so indifferent?!'

Yan Nai: [I trust my own eyes, and I trust sister Xiang Yi's character. Even if she did make a mistake, everyone else can criticize or condemn her, but as her friend, we shouldn't talk about her behind her back.

Sister Wanyan, this is my last time calling you sister Wanyan. I'm the kind of person who will side with relatives over facts. If you want to scold me, then go for it. But I know that if you did something wrong, sister Xiang Yi definitely wouldn't come to me like you are and speak ill of you.]

Qin Wanyan was dumbfounded.

How… how did it end up like this?

Yan Nai would rather speak for the 'perpetrator' Xiang Yi instead of siding with her?!

At the manor…

The guest that was originally planned to attend today had arrived late due to a delayed flight.

Today, the guest was also related to Shi Sui. He had gone to greet him at the door. Li Jianyu gestured at Xiang Yi's cameraman to leave and signaled Xiang Yi to turn off her mic.

"Yi mei, did you really have something to do with Doctor Xiang's wrist injury?" Li Jianyu was really conflicted. He peeked at Xiang Li. The young doctor was looking through the books on the shelf, a serious and focused expression on his face.

Although it hadn't been her soul's doing, there was no way to explain this kind of thing.

Li Jianyu was extremely shocked. He took a moment, then sighed, tapping Xiang Yi's shoulder. "I'm a few years older than you, so I should have the right to nag you a little. Yi mei, it seems like Dr. Xiang does not want to bicker with you, but… have you properly apologized?"

Xiang Yi smiled bitterly. "I… I haven't seen him in a long time."

Li Jianyu became stern. "If you made a mistake, the least you must do is apologize."

"Thanks, I… I will go apologize, and I'll make up for it as well."

"It's good you're thinking that." Li Jianyu sighed. "Learning from your mistakes… You're still a good child."

At this time, Shi Sui arrived with the guests. Before they entered the door, they could hear a hearty and clear laughter. "Aye, this place is not bad, the birds are singing and the flowers are fragrant, plus the air is great! Lao Sheng, I told you we came to the right place!"

'Lao Sheng' said helplessly, "Honey, slow down."

"You take your time, I want to go to the kitchen and see if there are any leftovers from Little Xiang Yi's cooking!"

A middle-aged woman led the way into the living room. She had a pair of naturally smiling eyes, and when she saw Xiang Yi, the woman warmly greeted her, "Hello, Little Xiang Yi."

Xiang Yi stared at the woman in front of her, rubbing her eyes in disbelief.

It was her childhood goddess, Yin Jiangxue!

"Hello, mentor Yin…" Xiang Yi greeted politely. Suddenly, she saw Yi Jiangxue wave at Shi Sui: "Son, go see if there's any food left for your mom."

chapters.title: Chapter 191 - Beaten Back Into The Mud
chapters.body:
Chapter 191 - Beaten Back Into The Mud

It was said that Mrs. Shi had been overseas taking care of her health, so Xiang Yi had never met her. She was stunned for a moment.

Mentor Yin…is Shi Sui's mother? That can't be right??

Shi Sui helplessly addressed her, "Mama Yin, are you here to film a show or to eat?"

Yin Jiangxue sternly responded, "Of course, I came to eat!"

Shi Sui: "Then let's calculate your food costs shall we, ma'am?"

Eh…

Many netizens laughed at the interactions between these two. Soon, the live stream comments returned to normal.

——[Wow! So this episode is Mama Yin!]

——[I cry every time I watch "Letter for a Distant You", Mentor Yin is a master no less; her acting skills is so high above that of any young actor nowadays]

——[What the hell? Shi Yingdi brought his real mother?? How bold?!!]

——[Hahahaha to the previous one, Yin Mama and Shisui have collaborated in a movie before where they played mother and son]

——[Yin Jiangxue? She's nothing but an auntie with two failed marriages, what's to watch? Can't the crew invite someone I actually know? /nosepick /nosepick]

——[I'm slowly raising a question mark. When she was young, Mrs. Yin not only won the domestic title of film queen, she'd also won several international awards. Her ability is first class, and even now her appearance and figure are on point. What year is it to still be judging women based on their marriage history?]

Seeing their interaction, Xiang Yi finally got the gist.

They probably only collaborated together.

The girl quietly brought breakfast over. Yin Jiangxue happily dragged her husband over to eat. She tasted a veggie bun first and was immediately taken aback!

"Little Xiang Yi, your cooking is amazing!" Yin Jiangxue was exceptionally good at praising people. "This bun should only be found in the heavens, as humanity can rarely get a whiff! This is so good, I'm not leaving this place!"

Yin Jiangxue's husband, Sheng Guang, was a famous calligraphy artist. His character was usually reserved and elegant, radiating with a gentle aura. However, when he tasted Xiang Yi's steamed buns and bean paste pancake, he couldn't help but also praise her work between mouthfuls. "You've made home-style dishes taste like elevated delicacies."

Xiang Yi smiled. "You guys flatter me."

After breakfast, Shi Sui took Yin Jiangxue around the garden. Sheng Guang, being a scholar, naturally headed for the bookshelf. It so happened that Xiang Li was holding onto a historical scripture and, in no time, the like-minded pair had found topics of conversation among themselves.

Xiang Yi turned to the kitchen to prepare some pumpkin chicken rice for Xiao Naofu.

The scene of her standing alone seemed particularly miserable to the livestream viewers.

——[Seeing that b*tch Xiang being left aside makes me rest assured]

——[ I'm overjoyed! Don't call her pitiful, this is called you get what you deserve! ]

——[Cooking is b*tch Xiang's only worth. Can the production crew stop filming her and just let her be a maid/caretaker?]

A flood of negative comments took over the stream.

In a daze, Li Jianyu felt as if he'd returned to the scene of their first live broadcast.

At that time, Xiang Yi had been despised by the entire internet. After finally turning her reputation around, it felt as if they'd been beaten back into the mud.

He felt his head throbbing. Even if he was personally eccentric and liked Xiang Yi, he could only temporarily reduce her screen time and overall presence in the show.

When the netizens realized this, the mockery became even more intense.

——[It seems like the production crew had given up on her too]

——[Why aren't the fans of that Xiang woman dancing now? And those Untimely CP fans, why aren't you guys squabbling today hahaha]

——[Can I ask quickly, does it count as a crime if she had intentionally harmed someone? If she had broken the law, she needed to accept the consequences and the sanctions of the law!]

chapters.title: Chapter 192 - Nostalgia
chapters.body:
Chapter 192 - Nostalgia

…

The Xiang Yi from last year had left too many bad impressions on the public. People had already formed a lasting impression of her.

The name Xiang Yi has long been equated with the words vase, crybaby, poser, poor business ability, etc.

In the last few days, Xiang Yi had indeed gained some fans from "Two Under One Roof" and the Tomato Entertainment red carpet, but in the face of conclusive evidence, even her fans were powerless.

Not to mention the haters who entered the stream afterwards with their vile profanities.

At the same time.

"Delicious Three Meals" barely managed to air on time after the temporary shift in management.

At Muyao TV's HQ, the senior managers and directors gathered.

"Heartbeat" had started off high but continued to drop. Even if the guests themselves brought their own traffic, it was still difficult to overcome the decline in viewers. After all, the rate of new viewers was becoming lower and lower.

So now, Muyao TV has put all their eggs in one basket, which was "Delicious Three Meals".

"Hello everyone, I am Zhuo Yi." Zhuo Yi was over forty-years old, though his tight and muscular figure showed no signs of weight gain; it was evident he exercised regularly. He had wheat-colored skin and handsome features, and his smile could immediately draw people into the most glorious era of martial arts film.

"Hello, I'm Jiang Yun'er~" said the woman leaning close next to him. She was his wife and had a very unique and clear voice that sounded refreshing and full of stories. Instantly, people were reminded of her hottest pop hits back in the day.

Zhuo Yi raised a hand and brushed the leaves from her hair. The couple's gaze met, Zhuo Yi smiling genuinely while Jiang Yun'er bent her eyebrows in response.

The live comments livened up immediately:

——[Ahhh these two were my childhood!]

——[The couple had maintained their physical appearances very well! They're really not exaggerating when they say celebrities look ten or twenty years younger than people of the same age]

——[Who would have imagined that the iron-blooded tough man would become a derpy hunk~ Goddess Jiang is even more beautiful than before, obviously a woman kept young by the power of love!]

The nostalgia tactic worked.

Seeing the four million viewers in the top right corner, the executives were ecstatic.

It was only nine in the morning! It wasn't even the time of day when online traffic was at its peak!

They've done it!

They've bet correctly this time!!

Someone suddenly asked: "What about 'Two Under One Roof'?"

The two programs were similar in content, and both streamed on both days of the weekend. Naturally, they would be the subject of comparison.

The staff immediately called to see the statistics of "Two Under One Roof" and suddenly fell into a dead silence.

It was also airing at nine o'clock in the morning, but the number of views for "Two Under One Roof" had exceeded six million!

It was even higher than the number of viewers at peak hour yesterday!

It almost matched the numbers from the day of the premiere.

Generally, the popularity of variety shows only spiked at the beginning and would gradually decline. This was evidently reflected in "Heartbeat".

But "Two Under One Roof" was defying logic?!

"We've performed some analysis on 'Two Under One Roof'…" The marketing manager with rich experience spoke, brief and to the point. "First, last night's gossip brought great popularity to the show; second, the injury incident that broke out today made angry netizens naturally curious about the show. Lastly, now that both the perpetrator and the victim are in the same environment, it has stimulated a sense of curiosity in the viewers to anticipate upcoming episodes. This seems to be much more effective than a carefully written script in making people look forward to future updates!"

"Everyone can interpret it as a TV drama that has reached the climax of the plot but was suddenly paused. Who wouldn't want to finish watching it?"

chapters.title: Chapter 193 - If We'D Known It Would Come To This, Why Did We Bother
chapters.body:
Chapter 193 - If We'D Known It Would Come To This, Why Did We Bother

Everyone understood the logic behind it, but it was hard to accept nonetheless.

The executives watched patiently for half an hour. Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun'er had performed very well. Plus, they were very well known in the industry, so the viewer count remained stable.

But…

Muyao TV didn't want stability! They wanted explosive fame!

These numbers were far from satisfactory when compared with those of "Two Under One Roof"!

Moreover, Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun'er had taken tens of millions in payment too! They had spent so much money but did not gain the d.e.s.i.r.ed explosive effect. The executives were quite disappointed.

If they had known this ahead of time, they would have just invited cheaper guests; there might have even been more viewers.

"Change the stream to 'Two Under One Roof', I want to see what about this show is attracting so many viewers!" The director commanded.

The deputy director chuckled coldly. "If we knew this was going to be the result, then why did we bother in the first place."

She was dressed in a capable black and white suit and skirt in delicate makeup and a powerful aura, the typical image of a strong independent businesswoman.

From the start, she was opposed to the practice of plagiarizing ideas from other programs. But no matter how insistent she was, her connections were average. Recently, she had been involved in a few factional conflicts and lost most of her right to decision making.

Before, when Li Jianyu had been forced to leave, she was the first one to try and help him. After being refused, she still continued to mention Li Jianyu a lot.

Now that "Two Under One Roof" was getting more popular, she was quite glad to be honest.

Unfortunately…

They were now in an era where dirty money can suppress good money, and interests were paramount above all else.

At the manor.

The guests were divided into two groups. Yin Jiangxue followed after Xiang Yi, learning how to pickle vegetables, while Sheng Guang, Xiang Li, and Shi Sui went off to pick fruits in preparation to make jam later.

"Don't use unfiltered water or oil when you're making pickled veggies, it has to be distilled and cooled water…" Xiang Yi explained the steps of making the pickle brine in a warm voice. She even wrote a sweet little note on a piece of paper and stuck it in a noticeable place. That way, it could serve as a reminder and avoid mishaps.

Because of her appearances, Yin Jiangxue had fallen in love with the girl from first glance. Before arriving, she'd read several posts of rumors and scandals regarding Xiang Yi, though she did not believe them at all. She was even more assured when she met her in person.

She had worked too hard making films in her younger years which developed a permanent illness. The doctors diagnosed that it would be difficult for her to get pregnant, which was why her previous husband had left her.

Fortunately, she'd met Sheng Guang. The two were very compatible and affectionate toward each other, but several netizens would still make a fuss about her not being able to bear children.

She didn't understand why people would say such vicious and ugly things from behind the screen.

Yin Jiangxue was emotional. "If I had not gone off to film movies and just got married earlier, my daughter would be your age now, Xiang Yi."

Xiang Yi's eyelashes fluttered, her eyes clear as a lake. "Mentor Yin, do you regret it?"

"Several people have asked me that question, but my answer will always be…no." As soon as she spoke, a blank gaze appeared in Yin Jiangxue's eyes. "But in the future, I am not sure…"

She was actually very scared that one day, in the future, she would regret her choice.

"Who can be sure of the future? The only constant in this world is change itself."

Yin Jiangxue was deep in thought. "That makes sense."

"Logic is logic, but humans aren't rational creatures. So…mentor Yin, may I take the liberty to ask, can I hug you?"

The girl's eyebrows curved up. Under the warm sunlight, her eyes were bright and soft.

Yin Jiangxue was stunned for a moment and took the initiative to hug the girl. She felt her nose scrunch up.

Perhaps all she needed was a gentle hug.

chapters.title: Chapter 194 - Don'T Reachapter Too Far, Or Risk Being Caught 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 194 - Don'T Reachapter Too Far, Or Risk Being Caught 1

In front of the screen, hearts were touched unexpectedly.

A short and simple hug.

It had an explicable healing quality to it.

——[I don't know why I'm so touched ]

——[I'm crying… Mama Yin is so good at making people feel empathy Q_Q]

——[Although I know people will scold me, I still want to say this. Xiang Yi screwed up, but in this moment, I think she has a very high emotional intelligence…and is a very warm person too.]

——[Yin Jiangxue has not had it easy these last few years. She gave up her career to get married only to have her ex-husband abuse her physically because she couldn't have kids. Being able to pursue her career and love with a brave front, she is really strong!]

No matter how strong a person is, perhaps deep down in their hearts there will be a soft spot…

On the other side.

The three manly men filled several baskets of fruits in no time.

"Mr. Sheng, do you want to go fishing later? The fish in the ponds here are quite fat." Shi Sui warmly asked Sheng Guang.

Sheng Guang was quite interested in the idea and responded, "Sure, but where can we find fishing poles?"

"We have them. Fly rods, handheld rods, and even lure rods." Xiang Li responded nonchalantly.

In the past, their grandfather would come here frequently. The old man loved to fish, so the collection of fishing gear at home was quite complete.

Sheng Guang thought Xiang Li had only seen the place where the rods were kept and did not think too much. Eagerly, he said, "Then why don't the three of us have a competition?"

As he talked, Xiang Li suddenly dropped the bamboo basket around his arm. The peaches inside rolled to the ground.

His expression did not change as he calmly switched both baskets to hang off the wrist of his left hand.

Shi Sui looked toward Xiang Li's right hand, hesitating for a moment before remaining quiet. Silently, he took the second basket from Xiang Li's hands.

Xiang Li was dismissive, even managing to joke about it. "Thankfully, I'm left-handed."

However, the netizens in the stream were very uncomfortable watching.

——[My heart aches for him, the PhD Gege's hands are much more precious than those of a surgical doctor!]

——[Can't even hold a bamboo basket, sigh, I'm crying. But thinking about how he will never be able to perform precise experiments again…]

——[@XiangB*tch, when are you going to come out and apologize? Even if you bow down and kowtow, it won't be enough to subdue the damage! Why are you still pretending to be dead!!!]

At Muyao TV.

Yet, the number of viewers continued to rise. When "Delicious Three Meals" had stabilized at four million viewers or so, "Two Under One Roof" had exceeded eight million!

It was about to break the ten million figure.

Ten million was a dividing number.

Xingchen streaming was famous for refusing to buy views, so their audience was the real thing.

From the most popular sales streams to video game streams, they only had one consumer host with views over ten million; and it had only happened during peak traffic times on the day of the annual shopping event.

"No, we can't let them continue like this." The executives were anxious and were willing to try anything.

For example, they had suggested arranging a script for Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun'er, making them quarrel and even threaten to break up just to attract attention.

But this idea was immediately turned down.

It wasn't enough.

"How about…I contact that hacker again?" The PR representative cautiously said. "His skills are solid, but his fee is quite expensive…"

The deputy director had a strong air of opposition to him. "Stop messing around! Humans must have a bottom line. If we have to resort to indiscriminate means, what is the difference between us and true shameless people? Absolutely no way…"

"Contact him." The director suddenly said, interrupting her. His gaze was cruel and void of emotion.

chapters.title: Chapter 195 - Don'T Reachapter Too Far, Or Risk Being Caught 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 195 - Don'T Reachapter Too Far, Or Risk Being Caught 2

The deputy director looked at him in disbelief.

She originally believed that Muyao TV was only rotten on the surface, not rotten to its roots!

Meanwhile, the PR representative immediately took action and began to contact the mysterious hacker, Chu San.

It was said this organization was ranked top 1% in the world on the famous hacker forum, 'innocence'.

Chu San wore his hair that has now gone three days unwashed as he got out of bed sleepily. Hazily, he squinted his eyes as he began to type in lines of code.

Hacking a stream seemed difficult to others, but to a hacker who was ranked top 1% in the world, it was nothing but a matter of time.

"Click ——"

The crisp sound of the last Enter key being hit.

The finished code began to attack Xingchen streaming app, locking down the channel for "Two Under One Roof".

Lines and lines of code flashed across the screen like a river, the white text on black background constituting the most beautiful language in the world.

Chu San yawned, ready to go back to bed.

Suddenly ——

A big red 'Warning' window popped out.

Eh?

Someone had coded a new firewall?

Where did Xingchen streaming find such a coding master?!

This code…exceeded his knowledge!

Being suppressed at his best field, Chu San gritted his teeth as he became more desperate. But no matter how hard he worked, the firewall was like a large mountain that was forever unsurpassable!

His typing speed became faster and faster, then gradually slowed down.

In the end, he gave up on the struggle.

"Beep beep beep ——"

"You have been locked down!"

Chu San's face went pale. He had locked "Two Under One Roof'"s channel only for the lock to be reversed!

Sh*t!

He immediately began to pack his things, stuffing a few harddrives and motherboards into his suitcase. He didn't even bother grabbing any clothes or shoes as he opened the door to flee ——

Outside, several policemen stood sternly as they showed their credentials, the shine of silver handcuffs glistening at their hip.

"…" F*ck.

This was the first thought that popped into Chu San's mind.

At the manor.

Li Jianyu hung up the call and spoke into the microphone. "I've just received notice that just now a hacker attempted to attack our stream. Fortunately, this said hacker has now been brought to justice, and our official explanation will be released in a detailed statement shortly."

What?

Hacker??

The netizens watching the stream were dumbfounded. After all, this kind of term only appeared in TV dramas; it was far too distant from real life.

A few minutes later, the official Weibo for "Two Under One Roof" was updated.

[Two Under One Roof V]: Since our stream premiered, we've been the target of a hacking ploy under several occasions. This is why our stream is constantly being interrupted. Thank you, Doctor Xiang Li, for writing a new firewall security program for us. It not only prevented another attack, but he was able to track the attacker's IP address! Thank you @SafetyNanCheng for successfully arresting the culprit on short notice; thank you for your hard work!

Lastly, we'd just like to say: Don't reach too far, or else you will be caught. To our opposition, please come out into the open and admit your wrongdoings~ /doge /doge

Once the post was up, netizens from all around were surprised.

Firstly, because it turns out, this was the result of malicious competition!

Secondly, it was because Doctor Xiang Li is too incredible!

More and more people flooded into the stream.

Muyao TV.

The executives watched with eyes wide open as the number of viewers for "Two Under One Roof" steadily jumped at an alarming speed to 9.57 million viewers!

chapters.title: Chapter 196 - Bad Acting, Thick Skin
chapters.body:
Chapter 196 - Bad Acting, Thick Skin

There was no stopping it!

The results were unstoppable!

Everyone in the room looked as if they'd swallowed a fly.

Particularly the representative from the PR Department as she read aloud the Weibo post from "Two Under One Roof." Suddenly ——

"What the hell happened?"

"Didn't you say top 1% of hackers? He couldn't even take one attack?!"

"Do you think he's going to throw us under the bus…"

This was a shared concern.

Seeing everyone's ugly face, the deputy director sneered. She felt as if everything she'd given to Muyao TV had gone to feed dogs at that instant.

The director: "What are you panicking for? Whoever hired him should be the one responsible. What does he have to do with the rest of us? And what does he have to do with our TV network?!"

The PR representative's face instantly changed.

She realized…she had been thrown under the bus!

When the other members of the executive team heard this, they all let out a sigh of relief. Not only did nobody try to comfort her, they even seemed to be gloating.

It was the look of people who had just found a scapegoat.

The PR representative felt ashamed, finally understanding the cruelty of her workplace.

"Dang dang, our pickled veggies are done!" Yin Jiangxue said to the camera with a beaming smile, her tone full of accomplishment.

The pickle brine was mixed with peppercorn, star anise, bay leaf, cinnamon, ginger, rock sugar and other spices that were cooled before mixing with small chilies and sorghum wine. Afterwards, the vegetables were placed in to soak it up.

After sealing the mouth of the pickle jar with water, they would patiently wait for the deliciousness to marinate with time.

Xiang Yi smiled gently next to her. "Mentor Yin, if you really like it, you can take a few jars home."

"I'll take your word for it!" Yin Jiangxue was more and more satisfied as she looked at Xiang Yi. The girl had a great temper, was patient, and spoke so sweetly! She was so likable!

Yin Jiangxue hated cooking the most, but today she had been happy throughout the entire pickling process.

"What are you stewing in the kitchen? I smell some herbs brewing."

"It's…a medicinal blend for Dr.Xiang." Xiang Yi bit her lip. The girl who had been beaming like a sunflower suddenly seemed to lose her light, unable to overcome the sullen energy that had taken over her.

Yin Jiangxue didn't know of her relationship to Xiang Li but felt very sorry for the girl. She patted the girl's head pitifully. "Don't be down, you look the prettiest when you smile."

The livestream comments began to fill up with displeased netizens:

——[She's so fake what's she pretending to be now. Her acting skills are so bad, but her skin is thick]

——[Please no, our PhD gege doesn't dare drink your medicine]

——[Who's going to bear the responsibility if something happens to him? TCM is unreliable to begin with, not to mention Dr. X and that Xiang b*tch have previous grievances]

——[Maybe she wants something to happen to Dr. Xiang, so when the ambulance comes, she could make the doctor attend to her skin wounds from a year ago first~]

As they bickered, Shi Sui and the others returned with a basket full of fish.

Xiang Yi's eyes met her brothers but shied away immediately. She didn't dare look at him at all.

Xiang Li twisted his eyebrows. Although he was well-versed in medical knowledge, he really couldn't guess what was happening inside a girl's heart.

Especially his sister's.

She was obviously back, so why was she hiding from him?

"Hubby, you've caught such a big fish! Is this a carp or a crucian…" Yin Jiangxue pointed at the fish basket and asked. Her gaze shifted to a few blurry figures and exclaimed in surprise. "Who are they? They can't be thieves, right??"

chapters.title: Chapter 197 - Skipped A Beat
chapters.body:
Chapter 197 - Skipped A Beat

"They do look like thieves…" Sheng Guang said hesitantly, but what happened next confirmed his and Yin Jiangxue's guess.

The figures had come out of the chicken coop holding several eggs in their hands. One of them was even carrying a chicken in one arm that was still chirping desperately.

Good.

They were thieves for sure.

Li Jianyu said in a hurry: "Everyone please be careful, do not approach in case they are carrying weapons, I'm going to call 11*…"

Before he could input the 0, the slender pale girl from not far away suddenly ran over as if she were stepping on the wind.

Li Jianyu's eyes widened, complaining to himself. Yi mei, you say you don't know kung fu! But if this was not water-walking, then what was it!

The netizens: ???

——[Everything else aside, the Xiang woman is running a bit too fast…]

——[So what if she's fast? She's just one person; can she fight several thieves at once?]

——[But speaking of which, these thieves are quite confident to be stealing chickens in broad daylight… This chicken looks so fragrant… I mean, so fat!]

Yin Jiangxue panicked as she shouted, "Little Xiang Yi, stay put! Don't be rash! There are too many of them!"

The next second, she snatched the fishing rod out of her husband's hands and charged after Xiang Yi.

Sheng Guang: "…"

'I expected no less of my wife.'

He reluctantly followed after her, not forgetting to grab a fishing rod on his way.

A gentleman only used words and never violence.

But that didn't mean they couldn't use weapons. 🙂

The audience: ???

'The couples are bracing battle together?'

Shi Sui and Xiang Li also strode forward.

The scene was in chaos as the cameramen and lighting assistants followed after. The other staff members picked up sticks and shovels as well, with one person managing to find some rope.

But once they arrived…

There were four thieves lying on the ground, with one being casually blocked at the door by Xiang Yi in a deadlocked stance.

"…"

Inexplicably, they all felt as if they were not needed…

Xiang Yi's expression was cold. "Why are you stealing?"

Facing her was a teenager about twelve or thirteen in age. His hair was trimmed short, and there were several scars, old and new, on his forehead. He seemed to be a hard thorn to discipline as his mouth opened into a wide arc. "I just want to, why do I need a reason? Whatever, I'll just return it to you."

The teens lying on the floor happily fumbled out the eggs from their pockets and smashed them on the ground.

"Crack."

"Crack."

"Crack."

The eggs fell apart when colliding with the cobblestone ground, scattering egg white and yolk all over the floor.

"…" There was nothing but the wind to be heard.

——[What the hell? They must be street rats, right]

——[Judging by their attire, they don't look like poor kids. Ruining food on purpose is so infuriating!]

——[Sry, I'm on a tangent, but that boy who's their leader is kind of handsome…The rebellious teen in every schoolyard drama suddenly has an assigned face]

Xiang Yi frowned as her eyes fell on the boy. Slowly, she pulled out the tie around his neck that was hidden in his jacket and pulled tightly at it with force. The boy was forced to lean forward as the distance between them drew closer.

The teen felt his heart skip a beat.

Closer than ever was a very beautiful face with skin white as porcelain and eyes as cold as stars.

"Gulp…"

The teen gulped but then managed to utter in a fierce and arrogant tone, "Let me f*cking go!"

Xiang Yi raised a brow. "Little boy, let go of my chicken first."

Under everyone's gaze, the girl calmly snatched her chubby chicken from his hands and placed it back in the coop.

"Now we can settle this properly."

*Translator's Note: 110 is the equivalent of 911 in China.

chapters.title: Chapter 198 - Rascals
chapters.body:
Chapter 198 - Rascals

The air seemed still for a moment.

The rebellious teen said casually, "I can't afford it; have no money."

The other boys also expressed they were penniless.

Yin Jiangxue spoke on behalf of them being young as she felt it was too cruel. "Why don't we just forget it? Either way, eggs aren't worth that much anyway…"

"I can't let this go." Xiang Yi pulled out her phone without lifting her head. "What's your guardian's phone number?"

The live comments immediately began to mock her.

——[Is it worth getting so riled up over some eggs?]

——[The kids are still young; why must you be so strict?]

——[Heh, she acts like a Baifumei every day; would a real Baifumei care about so little money?]

——[Guess you have to be cheap to get rich. This Xiang b*tch is something else]

——[Wait, I know this kid; he's my boss's son. Why is he out here stealing? I gotta let my boss know right away]

The hardheaded teen evidently went stiff at the sound of this but responded firmly, "Don't remember."

"Your teacher's number?"

"Dropped out."

Xiang Yi raised her head and stared at him for a while.

The teenager squirmed at her gaze, even feeling slightly guilty, as if those eyes that were as serene as a lake's surface had long seen through his plans.

Xiang Yi retracted her phone. "Then you can stay and work for me; pay off your debt with labor."

The teen paused, stunned. "This is illegal child labor!"

"You guys have illegally trespassed onto someone else's property, damaged their belongings, and caused huge losses." Xiang Yi said calmly. The benefits of having a lawyer for a big brother revealed itself in this moment as she could casually pull out legal terms out of her mind at will.

"…" The teen was speechless. "What kind of huge loss is a few eggs…"

Why won't this woman call the police?!

"Did you forget about that chicken? That counts as harming livestock."

The boys were speechless from Xiang Yi's reasoning that they responded without protest to help clean the chicken coop.

The girl dodged out of the camera's view and gestured to Li Jianyu.

Stepping to the side, the two people conversed.

"Can you find some people to talk to them? I suspect these kids have an ulterior motive."

"Heh? Aren't they just a group of rascal kids?"

Xiang Yi shook her head. "It's just a gut feeling. It seems they want me to call the police, but if I do call the police, they will leave a record."

Breaking and entering was illegal.

Li Jianyu was stunned. "This means they want to take a day-trip to the police station?"

Were all kids these days this bold?

If it really were to leave a record, it would be a stain for the rest of their life!

"I'll tell Lao Li and Lao Wang to go, they're very practiced; they should have no issue dealing with a few brats."

At the spring pavilion.

The guests were in the middle of making jam together.

Shi Sui was responsible for washing and prepping the fruits, while Sheng Guang and Xiang Li peeled and pitted the fruits. Yi Jiangxue was in charge of making the brine, while Xiang Yi manned the stovetop.

Yin Jiangxue smiled. "Does this count as 'Two Under One Roof''s jam production line? Natural and organic, hand-made, and if you want to purchase it, do it quickly! Come, click the link provided by the director below in 5, 4, 3, 2, 1…"

Li Jianyu protested from behind the camera. "Mentor Yin, stop trolling me! Where am I going to find you a link at this time!"

Laughter rang throughout the harmonious atmosphere.

Even the netizens praised Yin Jiangxue for being very humorous even though she was a senior.

At this moment, there was an array of car horns that sounded from the front entrance.

"Beep beep beep——"

"A mysterious guest?" Yin Jiangxue asked suspiciously.

The program staff were puzzled.

They hadn't invited any other guests…

Click-clacking high heels approached, echoing against the cobblestone as a woman dressed in a prestigious outfit appeared.

chapters.title: Chapter 199 - Taking Something Without The Intent To Return It
chapters.body:
Chapter 199 - Taking Something Without The Intent To Return It

Her makeup was neat and she wore a simple black dress made from a high-quality textile. Her silk shawl composed her entire look together as she looked around the manor, saying in a very arrogant manner, "You're filming a TV show? I'm ordering you now, you cannot air any shots of me, or accept the consequences at your own risk!"

When she arrived, she only knew her son was at Little Rabbit Farm; she had no idea there was a stream occurring.

The crew: ???

Ma'am, who are you?

The viewers in the stream were much more direct.

——[Blehh, so c.o.c.ky]

——[Does she not know this is a live stream?]

——[Wow, the entitlement. She probably does this a lot normally]

Xiang Yi stood up. "Ma'am, what is it you need? This is my home; it is quite inappropriate of you to burst in without giving notice, isn't it?"

"Sorry, please find someone who is actually qualified then come talk to me." The rich lady interrupted her unceremoniously.

Xiang Yi raised her brow and crossed her arms, debating if she should call the security guards to toss these people out.

Li Jianyu gestured at the cameraman to shift the camera away and politely said, "Ma'am, this is a str…"

"You're the director? Then you must have the most authority here. Perfect, I don't like dealing with those petty actors anyways."

The atmosphere on set suddenly became tense.

Li Jianyu raised a brow. "Ma'am, please watch your words. Performers are professionals too! Everyone is created equal."

The rich lady rolled her eyes in disdain, as if she was already over this topic. She got to the point. "Where's my son? I need to see him!"

At this time, the rowdy boys had finished cleaning up the chicken coop and were being dragged out by Lao Wang from the planning department.

He had just gotten through to them it seems, but things were much more serious than he'd thought. This wasn't going to be an easy problem to solve.

The rich lady saw her son immediately and exclaimed, "Rong Rong, how did you get that cut on your face?!"

Seeing her, the rebellious teen suddenly changed his expression. He turned his head to leave but heard his mother screaming behind him, "He only took a few of your eggs, do you know who my husband is? You even dare hit my son!"

Xiang Yi responded quietly. "Let me correct you. First, we didn't cause his injury; two, I don't care at all who your husband is. Third, taking someone else's property without intending to return it is not called taking, it's called stealing."

The girl's logic was clearly well founded and very convincing.

On the other end, the rich lady spoke like a shrewd. "Stealing and not stealing, it's all the same. They're just kids, under too much pressure from school! How about this, I'll give you money to allow them to come here and relieve their stress regularly. Give me a price!"

She had heard this trick from her circle of rich ladies. If their kids were under too much pressure from school and wanted to steal something, all they had to do was pay the stationary store or convenience store some money and everything would be resolved.

The owners even welcomed these children to come.

Xiang Yi's ethics felt heavily violated though. She retorted, "Ma'am, are you saying you are going to pay for these kids to come steal things?"

"I already told you it's de-stressing! Do you not speak human words? Steal, steal, steal is all you say; why are you so vile!"

The boy looked at his mother coldly.

The other boys were expressionless, as if they were long used to this.

Their family had used this method as well to resolve issues.

Unable to endure it, Yin Jiangxue opened her mouth and spoke angrily, "As a mother, why don't you think about educating your children properly instead of using this kind of petty method to resolve problems?"

The rich lady glanced over. She'd seen her films and recognized Yin Jiangxue. She sneered. "Ah, who else could it be but a hen that can't lay eggs. What right do you have to be lecturing others?"

chapters.title: Chapter 200 - Where Did This Shrew Come From
chapters.body:
Chapter 200 - Where Did This Shrew Come From

Upon hearing the words "hen who can't lay eggs", Yin Jiangxue went pale.

As the saying goes, when one hits people, never go for the face, and when one is cursing people, never expose their shortcomings.

Her statement had prodded at the most s.e.n.s.i.t.i.v.e spot in Yin Jiangxue's heart.

The viewers in the stream were furious.

——[Where did this shrew come from? I want to slap her in the face!]

——[Yin Jiangxue is involuntarily infertile, which is already painful enough, and this person is here adding salt to her wound. I'm furious!!!]

——[Mama Yin loves kids so much, she even loves and cares for Shi Sui like a son, just to be mocked by a woman like that. How awful]

Sheng Guang immediately hugged Yin Jiangxue and calmed her in a low voice.

Yin Jiangxue's eyes were red.

The rich lady did not seem to be ashamed of her words, but, on the contrary, felt more entitled. "You're just envious of people who have children because you can't birth kids yourself, right? My son can do whatever he likes, and it still wouldn't be your place to lecture him!"

"That's enough!" The hardheaded boy suddenly cried out and looked toward Xiang Yi. Coldly, he spoke, "What did you say just now? Illegally trespassing onto someone's property? She's committing a crime now right, why aren't you calling the police?"

The rich lady was dumbstruck.

"Rong Rong, what are you saying? I'm your mother! You're telling strangers to call the cops on your mother?!"

Rong Huai's jawline tightened, turning away to avoid her.

Xiang Yi frowned deeply, the strange feeling in her heart getting more and more prominent.

Lao Wang from the planning department approached and spoke to her of the situation in a low whisper.

Xiang Yi was deep in thought for a few seconds, then spoke. "Fine, it's just a few eggs anyways, I don't care. Plus, you've already cleaned the coop as punishment. Off you go, I won't be seeing you off."

The crew: ???

The netizens expressed their dissatisfaction once again: The Xiang woman is a typical kind who bullies the weak and fears the strong; she's probably scared of this rich lady because she has a lot of money, and therefore doesn't want to face her!]

"But…" Abruptly, the girl changed her tone. "Are you from the nearby Ming Xi Boys High School? Today is homecoming, I'll take you back to school, and you can each write a self critique in front of your head teacher."

The rich lady exclaimed, "Didn't you just say you don't care? Why do you need a self critique!"

However, the boys were excited.

Rong Huai gulped and restrained his emotions, pretending to be indifferent. "Sure, take us to school."

Xiang Yi: "I'll go drive."

"There's so many of us, your car won't fit."

"Don't worry we'll fit; it's a convertible."

Rong Huai thought to himself, could it be a convertible sports car?

Everyone watched as Xiang Yi pulled up in Little Rabbit Farm's convertible…tractor. Everyone fell into a bewildered silence.

Rong Huai's lips twitched. How can such a pretty big sister drive a…tractor?

"What are you all standing there for? Hop in, I have a tractor license." Xiang Yi said calmly.

Rong Huai stepped into the car with a blank expression.

The other boys followed.

"Rong Rong, get down! How could you ride in a car like this!" The rich lady demanded.

Rong Huai responded indifferently. "Because I want to. Aren't you busy? There're teachers at school anyway; you can leave now."

Upon hearing this, the lady hesitated.

She did have an afternoon tea salon to attend…

Arriving at this thought, she pulled out her phone and transferred Rong Hua some more allowance money.

"Rong Rong, you have to listen to your teachers at school, okay? Mommy has something to do, so I'm going to leave now. Text me when you get back to school."

Seeing her disappearing silhouette, the corners of Rong Huai's lips curved up in irony.

chapters.title: Chapter 201 - Got It, Going To Buy A Tractor Now
chapters.body:
Chapter 201 - Got It, Going To Buy A Tractor Now

To her, this son will never take priority in her heart.

Xiang Yi was prepared to set out when a tall figure suddenly overshadowed her. The man's voice was low and sultry. "Together."

She turned her head to see Shi Sui casually sitting to her left.

The driver seat on the tractor was quite spacious, so it was fine for the two of them to sit together.

Only the girl felt something was strange.

Before she could think too much of it, another gentle and transparent voice said, "I want to go too."

Xiang Li nonchalantly stepped in and sat to his sister's right side.

Eh? Big brother is coming too?

Two people in the driver seat were okay, but three might have just made it too crowded.

The staff on site: ???

Viewers in the stream: ???

——[What is this? Do handsome men on tractors become more attractive?]

——[This is too funny. Is this a lifestyle show or an entertainment variety show?!]

——[One, two, three, four, five, six; as long as you own a tractor, you might have the chance to possess up to six men. I've learned something today, time to place an order for a tractor!]

The production team got in another car to continue filming.

Li Jianyu joked, "Does this count as out on location here? All my true fans, type 666 if you agree…"

Since this passage was too full of entertainment value, the comments mocking Xiang Yi became less frequent.

At first, Rong Huai and the others were nervous, afraid they were going to be shaken up by the tractor ride.

The tractor glided across the road.

Soon, they arrived at Ming Xi boy's high school.

Xiang Yi had heard of this school before. It was a very strict private high school and was rumored that those who went to the school could be reformed even more effectively than going on X-Changei*. There were several upper-middle class people in Nancheng who preferred to send their kids here to exercise their discipline.

Apparently, the kids who graduate from here were all very talented and self-disciplined, as if they were the pride of heaven.

"It's here, right?" Xiang Yi turned to ask.

The boys were all silent. After a while, Rong Huai gritted his teeth and grunted. "Mhmm."

To sharpen his acting skills, Shi Sui had previously studied micro-expressions. He keenly noticed the strange air hanging about the teenagers, then turned to look at Xiang Li. The two reached a consensus through the silent interaction.

There was something off about this school.

Seeing the vehicle pull up outside the school, a security guard immediately stepped out of the booth with an electric rod and shouted, "Are you parents of the students? Didn't we already say cars cannot drive in here, the students must enter through Boxue road!"

"Wait, why do you guys have cameras…" The security guard saw the film equipment in the car behind them as the muscles on his face jerked. "Turn it off! Turn it off now! Otherwise, I'll smash it! This is illegal filming!"

Li Jianyu stepped out of the car and negotiated in a friendly manner. "You guys…no, we are a variety show, can we please go in and record? We won't disrupt you for too long."

The security guard objected fiercely. "No way! You must leave immediately. Or else I will call the police!"

Before his words fell, a thin and tall silhouette appeared at the ledge of the roof, trembling so hard it was almost frightening.

*Translator's Note: X-Change, or translated directly meaning ''metamorphosis' is a reality show in China where generally very rich and/or very spoiled and entitled children get sent to rural parts of China to 'reform' themselves in exchange for rural children coming to live in the city for a period of time.

chapters.title: Chapter 202 - Little Brats Are So Annoying
chapters.body:
Chapter 202 - Little Brats Are So Annoying

Pleas

Li Jianyu lept in shock. "Th-th-there's a kid up there!"

The netizens watching the stream were shocked as well.

——[Is he about to jump?]

——[This is terrifying! Hurry up and help him!]

——[Oh my god, how can something like this happen? I always thought this kind of event would be very distant from my life…]

The security guard turned his head and glanced up. As if he was long used to this, he said in a nonchalant tone, "Oh pfft, that's just students playing around, you guys better get going!"

Li Jianyu felt his anger well up inside him. He was usually a coward, but even cowards had a bottom line. Furiously, he exclaimed, "Are you even human! Playing around? Do you think suicide is something to joke around about?!"

"Our school will deal with it! We don't need randoms like you to tell us what to do!" The security guard threatened. "I said no filming!"

He waved his electric rod around, ready to smash the camera.

The audience's screens began to shake violently.

——[Ahh this is too surreal, I'm starting to feel nervous]

——[The director is right to protest, how can you joke about someone's life!]

——[Ming Xi Boys High? I've heard of this school before… It's very strict… And students are often overwhelmed]

On the other side, Xiang Yi had already called the police, briefed them on the situation, and requested that a negotiator come over immediately.

The security guard was furious. "Are you bored with your life? What does this have to do with you! It's just one life…"

Xiang Yi sneered from anger.

She stepped forward with a crushing aura.

The guard subconsciously tried to attack her, but the girl easily grabbed the rod with her hand and snatched it away.

"Just one life, huh? Don't you have even a shred of reverence for one life?"

The security guard was stunned and immediately began backing away.

From behind her, Rong Huai spoke. "Probably because he's gotten used to this kind of thing."

"Hey, don't you speak nonsense! Get in the school now, don't hang around these odd people!"

"So what? I am just that rebellious, I don't want to listen to you." Rong Huai licked the corner of his mouth and said in a scornful manner, "Big sister, he's so mean, I'm so scared."

The boy tugged on Xiang Yi's shirt and tattled on the guard with a confident air.

The other boys also realized that Xiang Yi could be relied on and stood behind her like baby chicks behind an eagle.

It felt like a group of bear cubs had just found their mountain to lean on.

Shi Sui squinted.

Xiang Li was similarly displeased.

Soon, the negotiator arrived at the fastest speed with the police leading the way. This time, the security guard didn't dare to block them.

Xiang Yi and the others followed after them into the school.

In a rush, the principal rushed out of his office and squealed, "This-This is a misunderstanding, it's like this, our school held an art exhibition some time ago, this student is just imitating performance arts…"

He was used to brainwashing the parents of these students with this line, and believed the entire world would believe him.

Unfortunately, nobody acknowledged him.

"Are you guys journalists? Which company are you from?" The principal began to sweat. "Why not turn off your devices first, you must register before you can interview us…"

Rong Huai stuck half his face out from behind Xiang Yi and glared straight at the principal as if provoking him. Indifferently, he said:

"It's not an interview, this is a live stream~"

"The kind where millions of people are watching~"

chapters.title: Chapter 203 - Don'T Want Your Arm Anymore?
chapters.body:
Chapter 203 - Don'T Want Your Arm Anymore?

Whoosh ——

As if struck by lightning, the principal was shocked as his whole body stood petrified. Once he finally reacted, he angrily attempted to block the camera with his hands.

"How can you stream this?! Shut it off! Shut it off immediately!"

But it was too late.

The netizens were already on him like a pack of hungry wolves.

——[Performance arts? This is treating a human life like waste!]

——[There must be something going on that this school is hiding, it must be investigated thoroughly!]

——[That Rong Rong kid just said something very terrifying! Does this kind of thing happen often?!]

With the help of the negotiators and de-escalators, the child on the rooftop was safely persuaded.

His face was pale, and he looked extremely weak, but at least his mental state seemed to have mellowed out.

Yet, at the sight of the principal, his entire body began to shudder uncontrollably like a flower petal in a storm.

It was a fear that came from the depths of his soul.

Rong Huai watched the scenes with a cold stare, as if indifferent to the whole situation. But the hand hanging by his side slowly clenched into a fist.

"Big sister~" He beckoned Xiang Yi in a mischievous tone. "Do a lot of people watch your stream? Are there 100,000 viewers?"

Xiang Yi: "I don't know, probably?"

She had never paid attention to the viewer statistics for "Two Under One Roof" and had no idea of the traction their show had.

"Wow~ it must be very influential." Rong Huai arrogantly rested an elbow on Xiang Yi's shoulder but had enough propriety not to put his entire weight on her.

Only the action looked…

Very ruffian.

Without hesitation, two annoyed male voices rang out at the same time.

"Move your arm!"

"You don't want your arm anymore?"

The two men looked oppressive as they gave off menacing auras. Rong Huai might be effective in dealing with brats his own age, but it was quite dangerous to pit himself against these two.

Instinctively, he retracted his hand angrily and lowered his voice to ask: "Big sister, do you have two boyfriends? If so, do you mind one more?"

Xiang Yi: "Little boy, you are in need of a good beating."

Rong Huai: "Big sister, can't I dream about it at least?"

Xiang Yi raised her eyebrows slightly, her gaze so cold that Rong Huai felt his little heart palpitate.

Thinking of her neatly extending her graceful hand to beat him, the boy's throat rolled with a gulp.

"Big sister, I'll be good, I'll stop thinking about that."

"Don't you guys think it's a bit weird?" Li Jianyu scratched his head. "Something unexplainable…"

Xiang Li looked around him and slowly said to himself: "Noise."

Li Jianyu's eyes lit up.

That's right!

Noise!

Today was the first day back to school, so there should be large crowds at the school. Aside from Rong Huai and the others, however, the school yard was empty.

And when such a big commotion happened, there wasn't a single student peeping out from the hallways or the windows!

Even the boys who had gone to steal eggs with Rong Huai did not display a hint of surprise, expressions numb and soulless throughout the whole ordeal.

Rong Huai paced toward the camera with an extremely photogenic face and smiled warmly at the camera with a frivolous attractiveness.

"Because if someone makes a sound, they will be locked in the small, dark room."

The principal was outraged. "Shut up! Don't speak nonsense! This kid is mentally ill, don't believe what he says!"

Rong Huai tilted his head as the bruises on his face crinkled. His smile faded a little bit as he turned into a twisted and sick young boy.

"What about it?"

"I think… I quite like being a psycho."

chapters.title: Chapter 204 - Kids, Are You Hungry?
chapters.body:
Chapter 204 - Kids, Are You Hungry?

The live comments surged like a wave.

——[Ah ah ah, Didi's five features have determined all my morals!]

——[I love psychos; this Didi is adorable!]

——[Is it just me, or is Rong Rong really brave? This principal definitely has problems, and I'm quite envious of people like this who are willing to resist. I was the kind of kid who got cut but didn't dare to fight Q_Q]

Several comments took over the live comments.

Meanwhile, at Muyao Network.

Everyone watched as the number of viewers for "Two Under One Roof" continued to rise.

Nine million seven hundred and thirty thousand!

Nine million eight hundred and fifty thousand!

Nine million nine hundred and ninety thousand!

The numbers continued to jump ——

Until the first number turned into a "1"!

The viewer count for "Two Under One Roof" officially broke ten million!

A new network record was formed!

Several people took a screenshot of the fateful moment!

Countless people also began paying attention to Mingxi Boys school!

Thus, the investigation began.

Rong Huai took the police to the 'small, dark room'.
