Chapter 225 - 225: Go Ahead If You Can Do It

With the emotional exclamation, all the netizens in the livestream room were dumbstruck!

So the first prescription that drew flak wasn't prescribed by Vase Fairy!?

The one that Vase Fairy prescribed was the second prescription, which the elders had sung praises about!?!

Even the senior executives of Muyao TV were about to vomit blood.

The number of viewers on the live broadcast of "Two Under One Roof" had already soared to 10 million yuan!

The senior executives also received news that several local brands had started contacting the production team of "Two Under One Roof" in a bid to clinch a sponsorship deal.

In the beginning, no one had bothered to pay attention to the program but now, many brands were vying to become an official sponsor, with the highest offer being 50 million yuan!

Besides, it was possible for a variety show to have several sponsors…

On the contrary, the program "Delicious Three Meals", which they had spent hundreds of millions of yuan for the appearance of the Kung Fu movie star Zhuo Yi and pop music songstress Jiang Yun'er, only had four to five million viewers!

When Li Jianyu put forward the idea of the "Two Under One Roof" program in the beginning, he was forced to leave…

The director's face was gloomy and cold as ice as he stared at a certain figure seated by the conference table.

That person was the senior executive who had defended Chen Mian back then and forced Li Jianyu to leave!

If Li Jianyu had stayed, the success of "Two Under One Roof" would have been the pride and glory of Muyao TV!

The station manager was furious and told the executive to get out right on the spot!

He slammed the folder in his hand and questioned, "With the budget of 100 million yuan, you actually decided to have Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun'er on the show? Why couldn't you have found an artist like Xiang Yi? Isn't it just about culinary skills? Isn't it just about music and Traditional Chinese Medicine?"

The deputy station manager sneered. "Tell me how I can find an all-rounded artist like Xiang Yi then. Her skills can't be learned in a day or two. There may be many artists who can cook well, but those who can play music well too are rare. Besides, Xiang Yi is also proficient in Traditional Chinese Medicine. Wouldn't it be difficult to find someone like her?"

"Even if we do find someone like that, will she meet all the conditions? Will her family have a divine land like Xiang family's manor? Will her family own high-tech farms like Little Rabbit Farm that create employment opportunities for farmers?"

"Okay, let's say she meets all the conditions, but who else can invite a famous director, a gaming prodigy, a designer who has won the MUSE Design award, a popular male idol group, a nationally-renowned doctor, and a medical prodigy at the same time?!"

"If you can find someone like that, do it!"

After the series of questions, everyone at the scene fell silent.

'God… is this woman out of her mind?'

"You're just a woman, and I'm being kind enough to give you the position of deputy station manager, which is far beyond you. Yet, you still don't know any better!" The station manager was enraged. However, considering the fact that she was competent at work, he couldn't fire her directly, so he had no choice but to order mercilessly, "You are now suspended. Go and reflect on your mistakes, and you're not allowed to come to work without my notice!"

The deputy station manager, Yuan Qing, snorted with laughter and casually ripped off the nameplate that she had cherished for many years.

She tossed it onto the table suavely and hollered, "Screw you! I quit!"

…

…

At this moment, in the living room of the manor.

Seeing that his two old friends couldn't stop praising, he had no choice but to say, "Miss Yin, don't worry, you just have to follow this prescription and recuperate well. The possibility of conception… Forget it, I'd better be conservative…"

He paused before saying loudly, "There's a 99% chance of conception!"

Yin Jiangxue was overwhelmed with joy.

chapters.title: Chapter 226 - 226: About To Fight
chapters.body:
Chapter 226 - 226: About To Fight

Sheng Guang was also a bit moved as he raised his arm to embrace her. "Darling, that's great, you can finally achieve your heart's d.e.s.i.r.e."

Looking at the loving couple, the audience rejoiced for the two of them from the bottom of their hearts.

In the livestream:

——[I'm not having it, I don't believe it, I don't believe it]

——[I… Damn it? Is Vase Fairy so proficient in medicine?]

——[She should be very competent… After all, these are the giants of the field of Traditional Chinese Medicine. I'm really curious about how the production team managed to invite them to the show.]

Li Jianyu happened to catch a glimpse of the comment and he thought to himself…

'I didn't invite these bigwigs to the show, they agreed to come willingly! They declined to accept an appearance fee, too!'

'It turns out there can be godsend benefits that come one after another…'

'I get to invite Dr. Xiang and the Traditional Chinese Medicine bigwigs… all for free.'

He grinned gleefully.

…

The three elders made some slight modifications to Xiang Yi's prescription.

Xiang Yi had discussed with them the follow-up food therapy and recuperation plans. She was extremely competent but remained modest and humble.

The three teachers and the avid learner discussed fervently. In the blink of an eye, more than half an hour passed.

"By the way, Masters, since you're all here, why don't you help take Dr. Xiang's pulse?" Li Jianyu suggested.

He thought that with these few people here, a joint consultation might make Dr. Xiang's hand heal faster!

The three of them naturally had no opinion.

Xiang Li cooperated as well.

They were done taking his pulse.

Elder Jing was the first to speak. "If I were to treat him, I will choose to combat poison with poison to stimulate your injury. Although it will ensure that you regain some sensation in your hand, I'm afraid there'll be other after-effects too."

Elder Yun said, "I am the opposite of him. The method that I've thought of is rather neutral, but it's going to take a long time. As research scientists, your time is too precious, I can't afford to waste your time."

Elder Fang pondered for a long time before he stroked his beard and spoke up.

"The world belongs to the youngsters after all. We old folks wouldn't have thought of this set of acupuncture techniques, and even if we have, we won't dare to use it."

"I've heard others mentioning before that the descendant of a local acupuncture expert has also envisaged the use of acupuncture techniques for his treatment, but he is already old and is afraid that his hands might be shaky. His juniors are too inexperienced and dared not step up to the task either. He has been delaying the treatment for a long time."

Elder Fang spoke at an unhurried pace, like a kindly, old grandfather telling a story to the crowd who were listening attentively.

However, he suddenly changed his tone.

"Today, it seems to be a good thing instead because my apprentice's acupuncture techniques are much more impressive, and they work wonders! They cure the root of the ailment and are very effective!"

Everyone was dumbfounded.

'What? Elder Fang, did you get paid to advertise!?!'

Elder Yun and Elder Jing were speechless!

'I thought you were the most noble, but I didn't expect you to be the most shameless!'

Elder Yun said furiously, "Since when did Little Xiang Yi become your apprentice? She's clearly my apprentice!"

Elder Jing snapped straight away, "Stop being shameless all of you! She's my apprentice! I'm telling you, don't think of vying with me!"

Xiang Yi was speechless.

'I'm quite confused.'

The netizens in the livestream were not only dumbfounded, they were simply stunned!

Someone guessed: [Are these three masters here specifically to accept Xiang Yi as their apprentice?]

chapters.title: Chapter 227 - 227. Plot Twist (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 227 - 227. Plot Twist (1)

Someone confused: [I thought men would only fight and get jealous because of that female celebrity Miss Xiang. I never thought that men would one day vie to take her in as their apprentice…]

Someone gossiping: [Damn! The Traditional Chinese Medicine Association announced that there are still more than ten Traditional Chinese medicine masters who are a step too late because they couldn't buy their plane tickets or train tickets in time! All of these masters are eager to take Xiang Yi in as their apprentice! Some of them even openly said that Elder Fang and his peers have gotten a huge advantage because they're from Nancheng!]

The netizens were dumbfounded.

They never thought that there would be such a twist!

The Vase Fairy whom they had despised was the one whom several Traditional Chinese medicine experts are vying for!

She wasn't begging for them to take her in but the other way around!?!

Incredible!

The netizens, who had been hopping onto the bandwagon of hating on Xiang Yi, had completely sobered up too.

Think about it carefully, did Xiang Yi really do something unforgivable?

No.

During the Tomato Entertainment Annual Event, she had played the electric guitar to get the boys out of a predicament…

She had cooked a heart-warming meal for the devastated children at Mingxi Boys High School and even got rid of the cage that symbolized the source of sin…

She had performed acupuncture treatment on Xiang Li, had given Yin Jiangxue a medical prescription and was so exhausted that her forehead was drenched in sweat…

She seemed to have…not only not done anything heinous, she seemed to be a good girl too.

However, there were some people who couldn't forgive her, especially an internet user who went by the moniker of "Noob and Bald PHD".

[@XiangYi did you apologize to Dr. Xiang today? No. :)]

Since he had a lot of fans, he was rather influential and as soon as he posted that statement. He sparked an outrage as many flocked to the livestream room.

——[Oh wow, she cleared her name just like that?]

——[Isn't it her duty to cure Dr. Xiang? After all, if it wasn't for her, Dr. Xiang wouldn't have been injured.]

——[Hah, didn't you hear that the masters know her grandfather? Her grandfather is a Chinese medicine expert. Who knows if they're just here to show her grandfather support?]

…

There were lesser responses as compared to in the beginning.

——[How do you guys know that she hadn't apologized to him?]

——[Isn't it a traditional virtue since ancient times to learn from one's mistakes?]

——[We are willing to admit that Xiang Yi has made mistakes, but why don't you guys dare to acknowledge her brilliance?!]

——[Everyone, touch your hearts and ask yourselves, who hasn't made mistakes before? Why do you guys have to hold Xiang Yi to the standards of a saint, but hold yourself to the standards of a sc.u.m?]

…

Just as the two sides were having a heated argument, Shi Sui suddenly spoke up.

"Seniors, may I request that you check Xiang Yi's pulse?"

The three elderly men, who had already started rolling up their sleeves, immediately looked at Xiang Yi.

"Little apprentice, what's causing you to feel unwell!?!"

"Apprentice, reach your hand out to me. Don't panic, I can cure your illness!"

Xiang Yi looked at Shi Sui in confusion, clueless as to why he did that.

Elder Yun and Elder Fang managed to snatch one of Xiang Yi's wrists each. Elder Jing who was a step too late, paused in his tracks and pounded his c.h.e.s.t, wishing he could release a poisonous centipede or scorpion or something to bite the other two old men!

At this moment, Shi Sui said coldly, "Xiang Yi has been suffering from amnesia in the past year, and she has only recovered recently. I'm worried that there might be some after-effects."

As soon as he said that, the entire livestream room was in an uproar!

They wondered, the Vase Fairy had once suffered from amnesia!?!

chapters.title: Chapter 228 - 228. Plot Twist (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 228 - 228. Plot Twist (2)

——[Oh my, art is really derived from reality.]

——[Crap! Damn it! It all makes sense now! She was acting foolishly last year because of her amnesia, and she's now behaving normally because she has recovered her memories!]

——[I've always liked how pure and pretty Xiang Yi looks. I've watched all the dramas and variety shows she's been in, so I once guessed that she suffered from identity dissociation disorder *covers face* *covers face*. After all, her personality was really different.]

…

There were also many who refused to believe it.

——[You can actually bring yourself to come up with such an excuse like amnesia? Shi Sui, you're really something.]

——[He deserves the acting award he won. Look how natural his acting is, he trumps all the fresh, young hunks.]

——[Hey, what a coincidence. You were diagnosed with amnesia, but it was selective and you can even recover from it, wow! Next time, why don't you just say that a soul has passed through your body?]

…

Elder Yun and Elder Fang were extremely conscientious and attentive when taking her pulse.

A long time passed.

Elder Fang said, "Based on your pulse, your body is indeed still a little weak. Try to avoid overexertion during your daily life…"

Before he could finish his words, Elder Yun butted in, "Apprentice, you have to take good care of your body and nourish it! Why don't you go back to the medical school with me and nourish your body with tonics for a few years? I guarantee all your illnesses will disappear!"

Everyone was dumbfounded.

'You sounded so natural when you addressed her as your apprentice!'

Elder Jing was displeased. "Who are you looking down on? We are short of everything except excellent tonics for girls! My beloved apprentice, come with me. I have more than enough tonics like ginseng and bird's nest for you!"

Elder Fang stroked his beard, looking immortal and extraordinary. However, his words were extremely shameless.

"Apprentice, since Elder Jing and Elder Yun are so enthusiastic, you should go to their home for tonics at every meal before coming back to me to learn medicine. If you can bring some hundred-year-old ginseng to me, that'd be even better."

Elder Jing was confused.

Elder Yun was speechless.

'Screw you!'

'Why don't I order takeout for you too!?!'

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She had put her body through a lot, but she was at most suffering from malnutrition, which could be cured easily within a few months by getting enough rest and food therapy.

The netizens:

——[Can I abduct Xiang Yi remotely with tonics?]

——[Hahahaha, I really like watching these few old men bicker with each other. They're probably the best frenemies.]

——[I suddenly realized that the choice lies in Xiang Yi's hands… There are so many Traditional Chinese Medicine experts for her to choose from, I'm so salty.]

——[Hah, a weak body is not proof of amnesia. No matter how amazing, Traditional Chinese medicine is, it can't be used to turn back the clock and check if Xiang Yi has lost her memory in the past or not!]

…

At this moment, Xiang Li pulled out a black-covered notebook from his backpack.

The netizens in the livestream room were very curious. [Huh? Is Dr. Xiang's notebook full of scientific research secrets?]

He asked politely, "This is Bunny's medical history, can it be used as a reference?"

The netizens were dumbfounded.

Why would a marvelous research scientist carry around the medical records of a female celebrity?

As he moved, an ID photo fell out of the notebook.

The camera happened to capture the photo…

It was a photo of a young, barefaced girl with pigtails who was smiling sweetly and gently.

'Damn!'

'Why does this girl look identical to Xiang Yi!?!'

chapters.title: Chapter 229 - 229. Best Sister
chapters.body:
Chapter 229 - 229. Best Sister

…

Apart from Shi Sui, no one else present noticed that incident.

Xiang Li picked up the ID silently and placed it back inside his notebook.

The netizens who were gossiping and enjoying the show on the livestream platform were extremely excited.

——[Does Dr. Xiang carry a torch for Xiang Yi!?!]

——[The way Dr. Xiang looks at Xiang Yi doesn't seem romantic but rather, he looks as if he's gazing at his younger sister.]

——[Speaking of which, I, a fan who sh.i.p.s Shi Sui and Xiang Yi, would like to say something. Today, Shi Sui has been gawking at her nonstop!]

…

The three masters studied Xiang Yi's medical history.

"Amnesia is a condition that arises due to trauma caused to the brain, which disrupts the normal integration of consciousness, memory, identity and one's environment." Elder Fang frowned and continued, "At present, there is no clear treatment for amnesia, and acupuncture treatment is not very advanced yet."

Elder Fang added, "But since she can recover, it means that her condition is improving, so pay more attention in the future and let her recuperate slowly."

With the medical records as evidence, coupled with Elder Fang's statement, the opinion of the viewers of the livestream changed completely!

——[So it was because of her amnesia!]

——[Ah, it's been hard on Xiang Yi, she had to take the blame after being wronged.]

——[No wonder her personality changed so drastically. When she was suffering from amnesia previously, she was really obnoxious; but now that she has recovered her memory, she's quite adorable.]

Many netizens had accepted the fact that Xiang Yi had suffered from amnesia for a year.

However, some people couldn't accept it.

——[They got so many people involved just to clear Vase Fairy.]

——[She might have suffered from amnesia, but she's still the same person. That just goes to show that she's pretending to be gentle all the time, but she actually has a horrible personality.]

——[Tsk, tsk, can a murderer ask to be spared from taking responsibility for his crime by claiming that he had amnesia?]

…

In the manor.

Xiang Li naturally put his arm around Xiang Yi's shoulders and thanked Elder Fang and the others, "Thank you so much, Seniors."

Xiang Yi craned her neck stiffly, looking at him in great disbelief.

'Huh? Why is Brother apologizing to me?'

"My incompetency is the reason that you got misunderstood by others. If… If I had been a little more competent, I wouldn't have hurt my hand."

Xiang Yi panicked. "No, it's because…"

She was suddenly at a loss for words for an explanation.

Xiang Li gave her an out.

"After you got diagnosed with amnesia, you had the mental age of a child. If I hadn't saved you, the consequences would have been unimaginable."

"You were terribly frightened at that time, so I didn't take to heart what you said out of panic."

"I have never regretted going over to save you, it was all out of my rational choice. I hope you won't blame yourself for it."

"My hand is not as important as your life."

Xiang Yi's eyes were reddened and filled with tears.

'Is Second Brother… going to put all the blame on himself?'

The netizens watching the livestream were dumbfounded.

[Seriously? Is Dr. Xiang so rational?]

In the next second…

"Don't cry," Xiang Li said helplessly in a gentle tone. Grazing his finger against the corner of her watery eyes, he continued, "Coaxing you is so much harder than solving questions."

"Others might think that you have many flaws, but to me…"

"You're the best sister in the world."

chapters.title: Chapter 230 - 230. This Is Wedding Candy
chapters.body:
Chapter 230 - 230. This Is Wedding Candy

After a few seconds of silence, there were several pop-up comments in the livestream room again.

——[Brother? Is he her biological brother!?!]

——[!!! This has got to be the most dramatic moment of the year!]

——[I knew it, like I said, they're biological siblings!]

——[Exactly, their names are Xiang Yi and Xiang Li, they do seem to belong to the same family!]

——[Stop acting like you already knew! You were the ones who scolded her the most maliciously just now. You people are so pretentious!]

…

…

The clamoring seemed to have paused for a moment.

Xiang Yi raised her tiny face and looked at Xiang Li in shock.

Her eyes were full of tears, but she desperately tried to hold them back. However, the moment he coaxed her, she burst into tears.

Actually, she really wasn't that strong emotionally.

In front of outsiders, she could still stay calm even if she suffered a lot of grievances.

However, in front of her brother, she would break down at the slightest mistreatment.

Xiang Li instantly got fl.u.s.tered when she started crying.

Indeed, coaxing girls wasn't his forte, and all he knew to do was to pat her back clumsily to soothe her patiently and gently.

Shi Sui remained silent and turned to the side to block the camera for her. However, he didn't disturb her and Xiang Li.

"Would you like to have some candy?" Xiang Li asked as he fumbled in his pocket and found a milk candy.

Shi Sui was speechless.

Looking at the familiar brand of milk candy, his forehead throbbed.

'Is giving out candy a customary coaxing method practiced by your family?'

Xiang Yi sobbed and said, "I… I just want to cry…"

She sounded so aggrieved and meek that her fans who were watching the livestream felt like their hearts were going to melt.

——[I declare that I'm a motherly fan now!]

——[Xiang Yi is so meek towards her brother! I like her so much!]

——[I can empathize with Xiang Yi. I work in the advertising industry and I get scolded by clients every day, but I can still put on a smile all the time. However, when my mom calls to ask if I've had my meals, I'll start bawling.]

…

On the other hand…

The user with the moniker "Noob and Bald PHD" immediately deleted several long messages that consisted of malicious remarks directed at Xiang Yi.

He was extremely guilty.

He wasn't a fan of Dr. Xiang at all, but he pretended to be one and hopped on the bandwagon, all for the sake of generating more traffic.

The statements that he had posted previously allowed him to gain a few hundred thousand fans on Weibo, which was far more than the number of fans he had gained in the past few years of meticulous account management!

In this era where traffic can generate monetary revenue, it meant that he would be able to make even more money on Weibo by receiving more promotions.

He originally felt that he was quite smart, and the feeling of standing on the moral high ground and judging others was just too pleasing to him.

Who would have thought that Xiang Yi was actually Dr. X's biological sister!?!

'But… Dr. X and Xiang Yi are so busy, they probably won't hold it against me, right?'

At the thought of this, he secretly felt relieved and set up another account.

Since hating on fans would bring him so many views and clicks, there was no point in him being a campus blogger.

…

…

Ten minutes later…

The breeze at dusk was cool, and everyone was cooling off in the gazebo.

Xiang Yi had already gotten a grip on her emotions. After getting over it, she felt a little embarrassed instead.

She actually cried in front of so many people…

Someone suddenly shoved a piece of watermelon into her hand and she looked up, only to exchange glances with Shi Sui's peach blossom eyes.

With his thin lips curled into a smile, he said, "Have some watermelon for hydration."

She said coyly, "Thank you."

Holding the watermelon slice, she nibbled on it.

The fans who shipped the two of them were extremely excited when they saw that in the livestream…

——[Ahhhh, Shi Sui gave Xiang Yi a slice of the middle section of the watermelon, which is the sweetest part! I want some wedding candy!]

chapters.title: Chapter 231 - 231. The Ace Of Hardcore Fans
chapters.body:
Chapter 231 - 231. The Ace Of Hardcore Fans

——[Mama mia, I'm a huge fan!]

——[Xiang Yi looks like a little bunny when she's eating the watermelon obediently!]

——[Shi Sui blocked the camera for Xiang Yi! When Xiang Yi was being devastated previously, Shi Sui had also shielded her from the camera! This man is so meticulous and considerate!]

——[What? Are you trying to make me laugh so hard to the point of dying so that you can take over my stickers!?!]

…

…

At this moment, the hardcore fans stepped out and were bent on capturing every sweet detail of Xiang Yi and Shi Sui's interaction!

Although there are still occasional haters, their voices were quickly drowned out.

…

Elder Fang and the other two elders took a tour around the estate. They were initially ready to leave, but the aroma of rice began wafting up to their noses from the kitchen…

Elder Yun was proficient in food therapy. He could identify the herbs after spelling it. "Since my beloved apprentice is making herbal cuisine, I shall do her a favor and stay for dinner."

The netizens were dumbfounded.

'Sorry, Grandpa, you don't seem to be doing a favor, you seem to be very pleased with it!'

Elder Jing sneered, "She's my apprentice!"

Seeing that the two of them were about to argue again, Elder Fang suddenly suggested, "Why don't we both take her as our apprentice? Wouldn't that be the best of both worlds?"

After a few seconds of silence, Elder Yun said, "I'll think about it."

The netizens in the livestream room, however, did not think so. They thought that Elder Yun and Elder Jing did not refute, merely because they didn't want to embarrass Elder Fang.

…

…

As the dishes that Xiang Yi had prepared were served, the number of viewers of the livestream room of "Two Under One Roof" increased.

Here comes the foodie army!

Countless people prepared their meals or ordered takeout, pairing their food and snacks with some drinks. Staring at the screen, they swallowed their saliva.

Braised pork…

Fragrant, tender and fatty pork ribs with mashed garlic…

Fresh fish head and tofu soup…

There were two other herbal dishes, one of which was a dish called American ginseng lean pork soup, which was from Elder Yun's book of herbal recipes. The other dish was claypot stew, a unique dish that was Xiang Yi's original creation.

Elder Fang and Elder Jing dug in and they both paused in unison after taking the first bite.

"!"

'It turns out that our apprentice's culinary skills are so superb!'

On the other hand, Elder Yun eagerly tried the two medicinal dishes.

The American Ginseng lean pork soup was cooked according to his recipe, with some slight improvements that made it taste even better.

The claypot stew was vibrant and full of flavor after being seasoned carefully and cooked well. She had truly incorporated medicine into food marvelously!

Although medicine is usually known to be bitter, Xiang Yi managed to make it delicious!

Elder Yun even drank two bowls of soup in a row. He suddenly put down the bowl with a stern expression.

Elder Yun flew into a rage and exclaimed, "Who are you calling Grandpa Yun? Call me master!"

Elder Jing retorted, "Old fogey, you're really annoying!"

However, Elder Yun said earnestly, "Beloved apprentice, he's your second master."

Elder Jing was confused.

Elder Yun turned his head and exchanged glances with Elder Fang.

Elder Fang suddenly had an ominous hunch.

As expected, Elder Yun gestured, "That's your third master."

In the livestream:

——[Is Elder Yun out of his mind? That's not the way to take in a disciple!]

——[Hah, Elder Yun is probably deceiving others again. Elder Jing and Elder Fang are such proud people, especially Elder Jing. He's so hot-tempered, he'd definitely refute!]

In the next second…

Elder Jing, who was sharp-tongued and had a foul mouth, finally couldn't tolerate it anymore after holding it in for a long time.

"Old fogey, you're really likable…"

The netizens were dumbfounded.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 232 - 232. The Meeting Gifts From The Grandpas
chapters.body:
Chapter 232 - 232. The Meeting Gifts From The Grandpas

Using his chopsticks, Elder Fang picked up a piece of braised pork belly which was coated in sweet and sticky sauce that seeped entirely into the meat.

He squinted while savoring the meat for a moment before saying slowly, "In terms of age, I am the oldest, so I should be addressed as Master. You two, call me your Senior."

The netizens were dumbfounded. '

why?

why??

why?!

Why had even Elder Fang, who was the president of the Traditional Chinese Medicine Association of China, fallen for it too!?!

Xiang Yi, who suddenly had three masters, was dumbfounded.

Laughing incessantly, she said, "Grandpa Fang, Grandpa Yun, Grandpa Jing, I may be very interested in medicine, but I'm afraid I don't have time to study recently…"

Since she promised to star in "Two Under One Roof", she had to keep to her word.

Otherwise, it would make things difficult for Shi Sui, Li Jianyu, and the others.

Elder Jing looked around and said after some pondering, "This place has beautiful scenery, and the air is fresh and pleasant. I can stay and teach you all about medical skills, my beloved apprentice."

Elder Yun said, "Yes, this is a serene place that is suitable for meditation."

Elder Fang said, "Little apprentice, you won't mind us being here, right? Ah, well, it's normal that people would dislike us three old fogies…"

Xiang Yi said, "I don't mean that, Grandpas, you may stay for as long as you wish, I'm just afraid that I'll be too incompetent and end up letting you guys down…"

Elder Fang was just waiting for her to say those words. He winked at the people following him and soon, someone immediately carried a brocade box over and stood still in front of Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi opened the box to see that there was a superior-grade ginseng inside.

"Grandpa Fang, I can't take this…" Xiang Yi wanted to decline politely, but Elder Fang said calmly, "This is a meeting gift from me. Take it as a snack and munch on it, it isn't that valuable."

The netizens were appalled.

——[Treating ginseng like a snack?]

——[I take my hats off to the big shots. Some people might mistake that ginseng to be a carrot.]

——[Previously, I saw a ginseng of similar size being sold for a six-figure amount…]

Elder Yun also sent someone to bring his gift over, which was a box of Tianshan snow lotus.

Before Xiang Yi could speak, he said calmly, "Don't stand on ceremony with me. Soak this lotus in water to brew floral tea for reducing the dampness in your body. It comes with beautifying effects."

The netizens were appalled.

——[Snow lotus… Floral tea… Forget it, I'll mute my mic.]

'Ah, these two scheming old men! How could they secretly prepare gifts for her behind my back!?'

'I've never tried to cozy up to anyone all my life, nor do I know how to communicate well with others. How could I have thought of bringing a gift for my good apprentice!?'

Seeing how surprised and flattered Xiang Yi was when she looked at the ginseng and snow lotus, Elder Jing was heartbroken!

'How good can this thing be? What's the point of these little gifts?'

He humphed and pulled out a card from the pocket of his Traditional Chinese garb. "There you go, come to our store and use this card to get whatever you'd like to eat!"

What he pulled out was clearly the card that was exclusive only to insiders, which could be used in all medicine hall branches under Jishi Tang Medicinal Hall!

The netizens commented: [Elder Jing is just like the domineering grandfather of the overbearing CEOs in novels!]

Elder Fang was dumbfounded.

Elder Yun was speechless.

'Crap, he has outshone us!'

With his hands in his pocket, Elder Jing glared at Elder Fang and Elder Yun menacingly before turning to look at Xiang Yi with a childish but happy grin.

chapters.title: Chapter 233 - 233. Incompetent And Livid
chapters.body:
Chapter 233 - 233. Incompetent And Livid

Not wanting to be a spoilsport, Xiang Yi had no choice but to accept the greeting gifts from the grandpas… or rather, her masters.

She thought to herself that she would give them some gifts in return some time later.

Seeing that Xiang Yi had accepted the gifts, the three masters heaved a sigh of relief because that meant that she had already acknowledged them as her masters.

The atmosphere at the dining table was getting more and more harmonious.

All of a sudden…

A strange sound came from the depths of the garden. Xiang Yi was about to go take a look, but she was sharp enough to notice several figures emerging from the shadows.

The nature of Xiang Li's profession was special, and Elder Fang and the others were prestigious masters in the field of Traditional Chinese medicine. In short, the manor was full of bodyguards who protected the big shots…

Soon, more than ten disheveled boys were carried over like baby chickens.

"Reporting! Those people had been sneaking around and trying to climb over the wall to barge in!" A person exclaimed sternly.

One of the boys retorted, "Who's being sneaky!?! Don't frame us!"

"Why didn't you go by the main door then? I have a valid reason to suspect you! Speak up, what exactly is your agenda?"

Xiang Yi stood up and said, "I know them."

Rong Huai and the others were finally released.

"What's going on? You're treating us like prisoners, huh?" Rong Huai muttered softly. Looking at Xiang Yi, he immediately felt guilty and muttered softly, "Sister, we don't mean any harm, we just want to come and see you before we leave…"

After a few hours of engineering work, the boys of Mingxi Boys High School were exhausted.

However, there were also some kids like Rong Huai who did not want to go home but had nowhere else to go.

They had some inexplicable feelings for Xiang Yi, perhaps because they were reliant on someone older.

They felt like they could draw a sense of security from her.

Folding her arms, Xiang Yi asked, "It's already so late. Are you planning to stay out tonight? All of you, be good and wait here while I go arrange a car to take you home."

"No need for that! We can hail a cab!" Rong Huai retorted. He was rather aggressive when he decided to be fierce and at first glance, he did seem intimidating.

In the next second…

Rong Huai's stomach began growling.

"…"

"…"

Xiang Yi c.o.c.ked her head away, and after trying to hold it in for a few seconds, she couldn't help but burst into laughter.

As soon as she smiled, even the "underlings" Rong Huai brought over began mocking him mercilessly.

Rong Huai's ears turned red, and he gritted his teeth. "What's so funny!?! It's not funny at all!"

Little did he know that all the netizens in the livestream were laughing hysterically.

——[Hahahaha, incompetent but livid.]

——[Brother, you must be shy, huh? I want to see Xiang Yi bully him!]

——[Although I really like it when Xiang Yi is being all meek and gentle in front of her brother, I like it even more when she's assertive toward a younger boy!]

…

Xiang Yi finally adjusted her expression and asked, "Ahem, have you guys not had your dinner yet?"

Someone among the crowd said coyly, "It's too remote here, and there are no eateries nearby either…"

Hearing his words, Xiang Yi said helplessly, "Leave after having dinner. Go to the utility room and get a stool each."

Rong Huai was reminded of the fact that her arms had gotten all sore from cooking in the afternoon and immediately refuted, "Who wants to eat what you cook!?! I don't want to eat it at all!"

Someone behind him mocked, "But you ate eight of the buns that sister made in the afternoon… you even finished the seaweed and egg drop soup to the very last drop…"

Rong Huai exclaimed, "Ah, shut up!!"

…

chapters.title: Chapter 234 - 234. Let Bunny Marry Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 234 - 234. Let Bunny Marry Me

After making eye contact with Xiang Yi, Rong Huai tugged his pants and said in an arrogant but softer voice, "It's not that I ate many, but the buns you made are too small…"

'I could finish one in two bites, what's wrong with having eight of them!?!'

Xiang Yi's gaze was clear, and it seemed to be emitting moonlight. She smiled and said, "It's alright to eat more. You need more food to grow taller."

Hearing her say so, Rong Huai quietly straightened his back.

Since there were so many people, the food that had been prepared for dinner would definitely not be enough. It would be more time-consuming to make more food too. Xiang Yi thought about it and asked, "Is barbecue fine by you? I'll prepare the ingredients, and you guys can grill it yourselves. How does that sound?"

The kids, of course, had no problem with it.

Xiang Yi brought over a few plates of sliced meat, while Rong Huai and the others brought the barbecue rack and stools from the utility room.

After the smokeless charcoal was lit, and the grill was brushed with oil, it was time to grill.

The marbled pork, mutton, and beef were cut into thin slices and thus, were cooked quickly. They then coated the sliced meat with Xiang Yi's handmade barbecue sauce. Those who preferred their meat spicy would add some chili powder before eating it…

'This tastes awesome!'

…

Watching the young and bubbly teenagers savoring the meat with p.l.e.a.s.u.r.e, the easy-going Yin Jiangxue felt a little the urge to tear up. Leaning on her husband's shoulder, she said softly, "That's great. Kids need to eat properly."

Sheng Guang held onto her hand, silently giving her some warmth and tenderness.

Shi Sui and Xiang Li were seated next to each other.

"Xiang Yi is so nice," Shi Sui said.

Xiang Li humphed softly and said, "My little bunny has a great personality in the first place."

"Care to have a drink?"

For example, Xiang Li seemed to be intelligent and perfect on the surface, but actually…

He had a penchant for drinking.

However, due to the nature of his profession, he couldn't drink often. Hence, although he disliked Shi Sui, he nevertheless… had a drink with him.

Shi Sui looked down and drank some wine with a smirk on his lips and a smug gaze. He switched off the microphone and deliberately lowered his voice, which thus sounded even more alluring. "Since we've already had a drink together, when do you think is a good time for me to ask for Xiang Yi's hand in marriage?"

Xiang Li was dumbfounded.

"You want to marry Xiang Yi?" Xiang Li switched off the microphone as well and sneered, "Do you take me for a dead person!?!"

Shi Sui looked him in the eyes, the corners of his peach blossom eyes upturned, making him look particularly devoted. He totally looked innocent and pure. "You can let Xiang Yi marry me."

Xiang Li was dumbfounded.

'Screw you!'

'Have you got any shame!?!'

'I have never seen such a brazen and shameless person!'

In fact, Shi Sui knew he couldn't hide it from Xiang Li and had thus decided to reveal his intentions.

Xiang Qi and Xiang Yu could tell that Shi Sui was interested in Xiang Yi.

As for Xiang Feng…

Given Xiang Feng's IQ, he probably would not be able to see it until the day of the baby shower.

A slender figure appeared next to him. It was Xiang Yi who had just returned with the food ingredients. The two of them turned the microphone on again without any change in expression.

Shi Sui smiled and said, "Thank you."

"It's nothing much, I just sliced some meat. They washed the vegetables."

Xiang Li suddenly stood up and patted Shi Sui on his shoulder. "Switch places with me."

'Dog, don't harbor designs on my sister!'

Shi Sui was nice enough to switch seats with him, but he soon heard Xiang Li duping his sister.

"That kid you were just talking to is quite handsome."

Xiang Yi said, "He's so-so. Brother, you're the most handsome!"

Xiang Li smiled.

He asked again, "Between me and Shi Sui, who's more handsome?"

Xiang Yi was speechless.

chapters.title: Chapter 235 - 235. The Fresh Fragrance Of Green Tea
chapters.body:
Chapter 235 - 235. The Fresh Fragrance Of Green Tea

Xiang Yi obviously hesitated.

When she slightly moved her cherry lips and wanted to speak, Xiang Li snorted. "Must you hesitate about such a thing!?!"

'Since she's my younger sister, shouldn't she immediately answer that the most handsome person in the world is me, her older brother?'

"I just think that the two of you are handsome in different ways…" Afraid of being reprimanded, Xiang Yi hurriedly added, "However, I think you're the most handsome!"

Shi Sui, who had already changed seats, happened to be opposite Xiang Yi. Thus, he could see all her expressions.

Hearing her words, he raised his brows.

Xiang Yi c.o.c.ked her head toward the side and sneaked a glance at Shi Sui, only to meet his gaze…

"!"

That was awkward.

She exclaimed, "Shi Sui, you're very handsome, too!"

"Hah." Xiang Li laughed mirthlessly.

Hearing their conversation, the viewers of the livestream burst into laughter.

——[Hahaha, Xiang Yi looks so cute when she's stuck in a dilemma!]

——[Dr. Xiang actually has such a childish side? I don't believe it!]

——[Indeed, men are forever childish. It's been hard on Xiang Yi, she has been babysitting them kids for an entire day.]

…

After being conflicted for a while, Xiang Yi weakly said, "Brother, do you think Shi Sui is handsome then?"

Xiang Li gibed, "He's hideous."

Shi Sui's expression did not change.

Xiang Yi said seriously, "Brother, you're being biased. It's not right to praise one and criticize the other…"

Xiang Li's heart shattered into pieces.

'Are you… defending that dog?' he thought.

"You're lying through your teeth. Brother Shi Sui is actually very good-looking."

Xiang Li's heart was completely broken.

Furious, he picked up the glass of liquor and downed it in one go.

Feeling a little nervous, Xiang Yi asked, "Brother, are you angry?"

Being all pretentious, Shi Sui said, "Xiang Yi, it's all my fault for ruining Xiang Li's mood. It's alright, just let him criticize me, I won't mind."

Xiang Yi subconsciously said, "How can I blame you for this?"

Xiang Li got even angrier.

…

Being old and in need of more rest, Elder Fang and his peers were brought to the guest room to rest by Xiang Yi after a post-dinner chit-chat session.

The teenagers were still barbecuing, but Yin Jiangxue was chatting with Rong Huai nonstop.

After she said something, Rong Huai suddenly looked at Shi Sui and stared at him for a few seconds before quickly turning his face away.

"Rong Huai, your face is made for the big screen. You should really consider entering the entertainment industry," Yin Jiangxue said with a huge grin, finding Rong Huai to be particularly pleasing to the eye. "I heard that you're not doing well in your cultural subject, but if you start preparing for the arts exam now, you can still make it in time."

Rong Huai pursed his lips and said nonchalantly, "Thank you, I will consider it seriously."

He was a little roguish, but he could still tell right from wrong.

He could sense Yin Jiangxue's goodwill.

"Let's add each other on WeChat. You may ask me for help if there's anything you don't understand."

After adding each other on WeChat, Rong Huai suddenly asked, "Auntie Yin, can I become as impressive as him?"

He refused to say Shi Sui's name, but his eyes were glued onto Shi Sui.

Yin Jiangxue touched his head and said, "Anything is possible, but… are you interested in acting? I can recommend a few schools for you…"

Rong Huai didn't answer her, but he already had the answer in his heart.

He just wanted to be able to get a little bit closer to someone, just a little bit closer.

He wanted to be on par with her someday.

chapters.title: Chapter 236 - This Dynasty Belongs To Youth
chapters.body:
Chapter 236 - This Dynasty Belongs To Youth

Night fell upon the manor.

Xiang Yi left the villa and found the lighting in the villa too dim, lit only by a few street lamps and the crew's equipment.

She headed into the toolshed and dug out the lanterns her and her brothers had made before.

Rong Huai and the others gathered as well.

"Wow, candle lit lanterns still exist?"

"Big Sister, are we hanging these? Should we bring the ladder?"

Xiang Yi: "It's alright, just hand it to me."

"Heh? Can you reach it though…"

Before he finished his sentence, the girl began proficiently embarking up the tree in a motion that was as smooth and fast as an action movie.

The teens: ???

The viewers in the stream: ???

——[Heh? Yiyi, your goddess reputation is lost, you know that!]

——[F*ck! I thought Simao bro and Sanmao bro were fast at climbing, but I didn't think Yi mei would be the fastest!]

——[I just remembered the PhD gege was injured because he went rock climbing with his little sister…]

——[Men will go silent, and women will cry at the sight… The Xiang family actually has such a unique passed down skill… If you don't repost this, you aren't Chinese!]

Calmly, Xiang Yi said: "Pass me the lantern."

Rong Huai, the tallest out of all of them, handed her a lantern, still in a daze.

She hung it, lit it, and then…

Xiang Yi climbed toward another tree…

After hanging them up, the courtyard lit up significantly and felt even slightly warmer.

The warm light of the lanterns dissipated faintly as some moths gathered around it, bumping into each other without hesitation.

Xiang Li was in a rare mood of indulgence tonight. He leaned back in his recliner lazily as he had drunk too much. The top two buttons of his shirt were open, revealing pale white skin and thin collarbones. The red mole at the edge of his eye seemed extra appealing.

Xiang Yi had drunk a decent amount as well to accompany him and felt dizzy. However, her consciousness was inexplicably clear.

Yin Jiangxue picked up a ukulele. It had been a long time since she touched an instrument, which felt foreign to her hands. Slowly, she stumbled and paused as she tried to play a children's song.

"I must practice hard, so I can play for our baby!" Her voice was full of anticipation.

Supportive of her, Sheng Guang clapped in accompaniment for her at the side. His eyes were full of happiness. She had been the only one for him from beginning to end.

Lights flickered in the gentle wind.

It was a beautiful night.

And with it, people felt their heart soften.

Yin Jiangxue finished her tune and was about to put the ukulele away when Xiang Yi received it.

She strummed it a few times and adjusted the strings.

Rong Huai and the others felt their eyes light up.

The hoard of rascals ditched their meat and compliantly surrounded the summer pavilion.

Li Jianyu didn't know whether to smile or cry. "Hey, hey, you're blocking Yi mei from the camera!"

In the stream.

——[Ahhhh Yi mei is going to sing?]

——[QQ these kids are completely different from earlier today, they're smiling!]

——[They must really love Yi mei. Afraid to block the camera, but standing on their tiptoes trying to look closer. I want to cry again Q_Q]

A simple and pleasant prelude rang out. The ukulele had a clear sound that might not have been impactful at first, but it became more harmonious as it blended into the warm night.

The red sun rises, and brightens the way,

The river flows, into the ocean and down

Lazily, the girl began to sing. Her voice instantly caught everyone's ear.

Lowering her brows, she was a tiny being, half-absorbed by the shadows in the corner. Yet, her dazzling existence among the crowd could be noticed in an instant.

Standing like mountains and rivers

Daring to contest the sun and moon

Xiang Yi raised her gaze and looked at the teeangers standing outside the summer pavilion. Softly, she smiled. Then humming as if she were coaxing a child, she began to sing with shocking power:

My heart is like a scorching sun

Unable to stop me going forward

This dynasty belongs to us youth*

The last chord rang out.

All around her was silence, so quiet that rustling wind and falling petals could be heard.

*Translator's Note: The song she sings here is called 'Shao Nian Zhong Guo Shuo', based on the late Qing Dynasty poem "On The Young China" by Liang Qichao. I couldn't find a decent translation of the song lyrics, so above is my interpretation. (It's a very eloquent poem as well if you can find a translated version!)

chapters.title: Chapter 237 - Candy 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 237 - Candy 1

Even the amount of live comments in the stream was drastically reduced.

The scene was silent.

Then, the comments section exploded!

——[I'm crying like a baby, I don't know why, but I really want to cry]

——[I'm starting to understand the Xiang celebrity… No, her name is Xiang Yi!]

——[I stan Yi mei! She's beautiful and her voice is sweet, plus she's so caring. No wonder Rong Huai and the others are willing to visit her, she's so healing!]

In the courtyard.

Rong Huai stared at the girl not far away, his heart pounding rapidly.

This was the first time he had undoubtedly felt the tangible presence of his existence.

Behind him, the s.e.n.s.i.t.i.v.e boys were already beginning to cry, and those who weren't had reddened eyes.

She had sung the passionate and fast paced song differently, yet her gentle approach was still able to touch people's hearts.

It turns out, they weren't…children abandoned by the world.

It turns out, they had…a small light at the end of the tunnel, a small sliver of hope, small dreams.

Even Li Jianyu couldn't help but wipe away tears.

In the beginning, he'd been hesitant to invite Xiang Yi to "Two Under One Roof".

But now he understood. "Two Under One Roof" did not make Xiang Yi! Xiang Yi made "Two Under One Roof!"

The stream ended for the day.

Rong Huai and the others safely departed in the car as well.

Before they left, they'd cleaned up the courtyard to be spotless, even taking away the garbage.

They refused to allow even the slightest trace of filth in Big Sister's house.

Everyone returned to their respectives homes.

Xiang Li really drank too much as his steps wobbled. Shi Sui continued to quarrel with him but still regarded him as a friend deep down and carefully helped him into his room.

Something was off.

The man frowned and approached in large strides to firmly lift the blanket. When he saw the person beneath it, he gave a sudden pause.

It was Xiang Yi.

The girl was curled up in a ball, sleeping soundly.

Shi Sui: "…"

He ruffled his hair indiscriminately, feeling a little helpless. Still, he found the situation funny as he chuckled softly.

"Makes sense. The big drunkard is out, how could the small drunkard not be?"

She'd probably been drunk since the singing performance.

No wonder she smiled so sweetly at everyone, especially that little rascal named Rong Rong…

His eyes fell on the girl's delicate face. She was hugging a pillow and breathing softly, her hair softly scattered around her cheeks. Shi Sui raised a hand to brush her hair out of the way.

"You trust me a bit too much, hey?" Shi Sui chuckled in a low voice. "Running into my room and climbing into my bed…"

Unafraid of him becoming inhuman.

"Oh you…"

Shi Sui sighed. He stared at Xiang Yi in a deep trance for a few seconds, eyes full of emotions as his vision blurred. Then he lightly tapped the girl's shoulders: "Wake up, go sleep in your room."

The girl, who was already in a deep sleep, g.r.o.a.n.e.d and angrily turned over.

With her movement, her shirt rolled up, revealing the creamy and soft skin of her lower back.

Dazzling.

Shi Sui gulped. He blinked his eyes and covered the girl with the blanket before he set out to find a guest room to make do for the night.

He'd just reached the door.

"Locking your door so don't even dream of trying to seduce my little sister!"

Shi Sui: "…"

Following right after was a messy array of footsteps as Xiang Yi slumped over, falling into something on his way down to the carpet.

He could still vaguely makeout his babbling: "I have to protect my little sister…"

Shi Sui: "…"

chapters.title: Chapter 238 - Candy 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 238 - Candy 2

Ah, this made one…

Conflicted. 🙂

The man pressed between his eyebrows and chuckled.

'Alright.'

'It is what it is.'

'Just let it be, everything is already the best possible arrangement,' he told himself a few words of chicken soup for the soul and turned around, standing by the bed for a few seconds.

Some 'inhuman' thoughts flashed through his mind.

Finally, he turned off the lights and picked up the script sitting on his bedside table. He sat down on the armchair next to the floor to ceiling windows and began flipping through the pages with distinct fingers using a small night light.

Shi Sui was still debating if he wanted to take this film or not.

The script was wonderful, describing a holy and pure church that had a blooming flower of evil embedded within it, while the dark and damp mental asylum contained the only shining point in the entire movie.

The plot was based on a criminal deduction story that interlocked as the supporting cast all had high intelligence levels.

Romance budded in the rivalry between the high IQ priest that was a criminal, and the young psychiatrist. It began with a cat-and-mouse chase and ended with regret and tragedy, oozing with drama.

In all fairness, Shi Sui wanted to take the role.

But he couldn't do romance scenes.

It wasn't an issue with his acting skills.

More like a psychological problem.

His rejection of contact with females had become a psychological barrier.

Director Yan had tried several methods to help him, but everytime Shi Sui began to film, he would vomit as soon as the camera started rolling. There was no effect at all, and he could only give up in the end.

Previous scripts he'd received were okay, but if they were to remove the role of the young doctor from this film, or scenes involving the young doctor, the entire film would lose its balance. It would also fail to meet the requirements for this director's artistic expression.

So, he either had to overcome the psychological barrier of acting in a romantic role, or he would have to pass up the job altogether.

Shi Sui felt a headache approaching when the girl on the bed rolled over, overheated, and kicked off the blanket.

"…" So mischievous.

Shi Sui shook his head. He put down the script and stood up to cover her up.

Drunkenly, she called out: "Xiao Naofu… Tong Tong…"

Shi Sui's hand.

Her pale fingers tentatively rubbed at the texture a few times. Then realizing it was not right, she opened her eyes.

The sky spun before her eyes as she desperately tried to focus her vision. Finally, she recognized the man in front of her.

"It's you?"

Shi Sui raised an eyebrow, allowing her act of 'violation'. "Who am I?"

"Cub."

"…什么?"

"…What?"

"Zaizai." Xiang Yi's eyes did not waver. "Why are you here? This is where Xiao Naofu sleeps."

Shi Sui licked his lips. "Then tell me, where should I be sleeping?"

It was too difficult to ask a drunk person to perform radical analysis.

Xiang Yi felt her head throb as she blurted out: "You…the cat bed."

Shi Sui sneered. "Is there a cat bed this big?"

With confidence, the girl boasted: "I'll get my third brother to make you one!"

Shi Sui: "Sure, I'll wait for him. You keep sleeping."

He leaned over to pick up the blanket as the girl hung off the edge of the bed. Cheeks pressed against the black bedsheets, her skin seemed extraordinarily pale.

The drunk girl spoke slowly, in a much warmer tone than normal. "You, you look good…"

"Hm?" Shi Sui positioned himself on the ground and crossed his legs. Curiously, he looked at her. "Between me and your brother, who looks better?"

chapters.title: Chapter 239 - Candy 3
chapters.body:
Chapter 239 - Candy 3

She retracted, avoiding his gaze. "I…I'm sleepy…"

Shi Sui held onto the pillow she had been cradling. The girl was drunk and powerless and, for a moment, they were frozen in place.

The two entered a silent stalemate.

Like this, they held on for ten seconds.

The girl finally sighed helplessly. "Okay, then, I will only tell you and nobody else…"

"Mhm."

"Then you can't tell anyone else."

"Okay."

The man met her eyes with an indulgent and gentle gaze.

Xiang Yi whispered: "You and my brothers are all very handsome, but I think you are the most handsome… Because I like you…"

Whoosh.

An air of flirtation uncontrollably began to ferment in the air as the temperature in the room felt as if it had risen, adding another layer of entanglement.

Shi Sui raised his hand and rubbed the back of the girl's neck. In a deceptive manner, he coaxed: "Say that again."

Xiang Yi mumbled in a drunken manner. Softly, she managed: "I'm really sleepy…"

"You said you liked me." The man paused. Then his peach blossom eyes smiled playfully. "And you said you want me to be your boyfriend."

Xiang Yi rejected meekly: "I didn't say that, I said I like your face…"

The man covered her mouth with his hand as her soft lips pressed against his warm palm. The girl blinked her long eyelashes in surprise.

"Let me think about it first before I give you an answer." Shi Sui said, as if he was very troubled. "Sigh, you don't know how sought after this gege is."

Something…Something was off.

But Xiang Yi was too tired. Her eyelids drooped as she mumbled a few indistinct words and fell into a deep sleep.

Shi Sui's eyes were filled with conflicting emotions. His throat trembled visibly as his gaze remained on the girl's soft lips for a few seconds. Then, he gently grazed her lip with his fingertips and immediately began to laugh.

"What should I do? Gege really doesn't want to be a decent person right now."

Twilight approached as stars sparsely scattered the night sky.

She sat up and out of habit reached over to pet Xiao Naofu on the pillow next to her.

It wasn't the usual warm and fuzzy texture.

Instead…

Xiang Yi's eyes widened, suddenly feeling fully awake.

How could it be Shi Sui?!

Guiltily, she tried to withdraw her hand quietly, only to feel a firm grasp on her wrist.

Shi Sui slowly opened his eyes and squinted at her lazily.

No worries, just a little understanding.

…Uh, yeah right!

But Xiang Yi has travelled through many worlds and seen many things. Everything else aside, her emotional tolerance was still very outstanding. Calmly, she spoke: "Good morning."

She was sure, as long as she remained calm, Shi Sui would be the one who would be panicking.

However…

The man's voice was raspy and dull, sultry and light; it felt like a feather tickling her heart. "Good morning. What is Yi mei doing in my bedroom? And on my bed?"

"…" Xiang Yi inexplicably felt like she was a player who had just violated the other party and refused to take responsibility.

"Uhmm… If I said I came to tuck you in, would you believe me?"

Shi Sui raised his eyebrow.

Xiang Yi's guilty conscience was once again activated.

A while later.

Shi Sui let go of her wrist, as if he believed her explanation. "Is that so."

'I am such a witty little genius!'

Xiang Yi smiled. "You rest well, I won't disrupt you."

She leapt off the bed and hurried out, not bothering to put on her slippers as her b.a.r.e feet touched the wooden floor.

Shi Sui cupped his cheek in one hand as he stared at her with a smile.

Xiang Yi turned the doorknob…

It didn't budge.

She froze. Behind her, the slightly fl.u.s.tered voice of a man rang out:

"Heh? Did you have to lock the door just to tuck me in?"

"Yi mei…What were you planning to do to me?"

chapters.title: Chapter 240 - Can You Act Like A Human
chapters.body:
Chapter 240 - Can You Act Like A Human

Xiang Yi was floored.

Thinking of her little Uncle Xiang Feng scaling a tree while singing in a drunken stupor, the girl's eyes flashed with horror.

Did she go crazy as well when drunk?

Do something along the lines of breaking into Shi Sui's room, and while he was sleeping…

Ahhhhhhhhhh what in the world did she do last night?!!

"If you like Gege, you can just say it." Shi Sui sat up straight and slowly put on his glasses. "There's no need to be so…schemingly obvious."

Xiang Yi: …!!

She turned away to see Shi Sui's pajamas in a bundled mess. Her whole body felt limp and aggrieved with helplessness.

Xiang Yi paused for a few seconds then silently stepped forward and put the blanket on Shi Sui.

Shi Sui raised a brow. "Heh?"

"Why don't you go take a shower?" Xiang Yi recalled the romance novels she had read with Xiao Naofu when she was bored. "Although you are no longer pure, please don't cry, okay? I, I will take responsibility for you. Let me think for a moment."

This trajectory of development was not within Shi Sui's calculations.

He lowered his eyes to cover the smile forming on his face and responded. "Okay then, I'll go shower."

In the living room.

He felt around for his glasses before realizing he was in his own room.

Last night, he had fallen over; it was the bodyguard who had assisted him back to his room.

Thinking of his wonderfully planned door lock, Xiang Li's mouth twitched.

As expected of me.

The next second, his phone vibrated next to his bed.

He picked it up to find a message from his little sister.

[Bunbun]: Big brother!!!

[Bunbun]: Big brother, I did something bad what do I do /cry /cry

Xiang Li frowned and typed with one hand.

[L]: Don't cry, talk slowly.

[Bunbun]: I drank too much last night and went into the wrong room /sob /sob

Seeing this, Xiang Li suddenly felt uneasy.

[L]: Where are you?

Bzz ——

[Bunbun]: I'm in brother Shi Sui's room…

Xiang Li: ????

He threw off his blanket and darted toward Shi Sui's bedroom.

The door was still locked. He didn't have time to find the key. Calling his bodyguard over, they broke in with force.

Xiang Yi jumped at the sudden movement, almost dropping her phone.

Just then, the door to the bathroom opened…

Shi Sui only wore a pair of black sweatpants. His figure was very well proportioned with wide shoulders, a narrow waist, and well-defined abdominal lines that disappeared into the waist of his pants…

As he dried his hair with a towel, the smooth muscles on his forearms became more and more obvious. The man blinked his peach blossom eyes and said in a melodious tone: "Yi mei, I'm done showering, have you thought it through?"

Xiang Li hollered: "Put on your clothes properly! Do you not have a shred of propriety!!"

Shi Sui slowly picked up the thin sweater set on the shelf and stared at Xiang Yi with a pitiful and innocent gaze.

Xiang Yi: "…Second brother, don't be so mean, you'll scare him."

Xiang Li was fuming, on the brink of vomiting blood. "You're still protecting this dog of a man!!"

Shi Sui leaned on the door frame as he slipped on the knit sweater. His collarbones peaked out, his Adam's apple distinct. He blinked innocently. "Heh? Did Yi mei not lock the door? Sigh, I don't know who could do such a thing…"

Xiang Li: "…"

Of course he couldn't admit he was the one who did it. Or else, wouldn't his image in his sister's eyes fall from genius big brother to idiot big brother??

Xiang Yi tugged at his sleeve and whispered, "Big brother, I don't know who locked the door, but I think I violated him…"

Xiang Li: ???

Xiang Yi was pitiful. "How can I take responsibility for him in a way that is the most sincere?"

Xiang Li: ???

You dare troll my Bunbun?!

Shi Sui, you motherf*cker are you a human!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 241 - Scandal 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 241 - Scandal 1

…

Xiang Yi was shoved out of the room by her big brother.

Immediately after, the door was slammed shut. Before the door closed, Xiang Yi could see her brother rolling up his shirtsleeves…

'Are they going to fight?'

She wanted to go back in but heard her brother shout through the closed door: "Get the hell back to your room!"

Immediately afterwards, Shi Sui's easy going voice sounded: "Don't worry, I will have a good chat with your brother~"

Xiang Yi scratched her head and decided to trust them.

She headed back to her room, her hungover brain reacting slower than usual. So much that she didn't notice that outside the floor-to-ceiling windows, someone was secretly taking photos of her coming out of Shi Sui's room…

In the kitchen, porridge gurgled in a casserole pot as the fragrance of rice drifted out of the room.

Xiang Yi wanted to compensate for her wrongdoings, cooking an extravagant breakfast consisting of Shi Sui's favorite foods.

After spending such a long time with him, Xiang Yi had figured out his preference in taste. He liked light foods, was basically a carnivore, and particularly loved fish and crustaceans. In this aspect, he was very much like Xiao Naofu.

She made shumai, shrimp dumplings, egg pancakes, and several other Chinese pastries. There was also bacon, sausage, omelets, and potato cakes. She fried a small fish for Xiao Naofu as well.

Xiao Naofu nestled in the luxurious cat tree, gnawing angrily at its paws.

It had seen Xiang Yi come out of Shi Sui's room!

QQ the stupid woman has changed, this Huhu was no longer her most beloved. This Huhu will never acknowledge her existence again!!

However, when Xiang Yi approached it with the grilled fish, Xiao Naofu's nose shriveled as it began to drool.

"Xiao Naofu…time to eat." Xiang Yi coaxed softly.

No! This Huhu cannot forgive her that easily!

"Xiao Naofu…" Xiang Yi scratched the back of the cat's neck. "Don't be angry at me anymore, okay?"

Xiang Yi cooed. "Baby Tong Tong, if you don't eat, the grilled fish will be cold."

Three times… Hmph. Fine, I guess I can forgive her!

Xiao Naofu rolled over and waved an outstretched paw at Xiang Yi: "Meow~"

Xiang Yi's eyes curved as she hugged the cat, picking it up from the hammock. Patiently, she tore the fish into smaller pieces and fed them to the cat one at a time.

Xiao Noafu ate until its stomach was round. Content, it rolled over.

Xiang Yi tossed a ball and stood up to complete her morning exercises.

Behind the small kitchen, there was another house where the crew and staff members lived.

Xiao Liang was the camera assistant. He had just graduated and was constantly in a very anxious state.

His salary was considered high among his peers. But living in this luxurious manor everyday, he saw celebrities come and go and inevitably felt a little uneasy.

The scent of the rice grew stronger as it wafted in from afar. Xiao Liang was upset. This female artist named Xiang Yi was so vain. She would only occasionally cook for them. Most of the time, they had to order take out or cook to take care of themselves!

If she was already in the kitchen, why couldn't she cook a bit more food?

They were all humans, so why was their treatment so different?

It did not occur to him that it might be difficult for Xiang Yi to cook for dozens of people on her own.

Gritting his teeth, he opened the contact of a paparazzi member and typed:

"I have a video of Shi Yingdi and Xiang Yi, how much are you willing to pay for it?"

During morning rush hour, one scandalous video broke the news and instantly attracted everyone's attention.

chapters.title: Chapter 242 - Scandal 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 242 - Scandal 2

The blogger who broke the news had a notoriously sour reputation. However, netizens were keen on gossip, and every time something new was posted, it was greeted with scolding and traction from melon eaters.

[First Line of Gossip V]: Shocking! At the filming set of a popular variety show, a certain female artist got possessed by loneliness as she broke into the room of her male co-star in the middle of the night, not coming out until morning. When her older brother found out, he was furious and deeply embarrassed for having such a shameless sister…

Attached was a ten-second video that clearly outlined a slender girl leaving the room with the silhouettes of two men hovering behind her.

This blogger knew the rules well. He did not name anyone and had even blurred out everyone's faces!

But the more one tried to cover up, the more curiosity it would arouse!

The comment section was bustling.

——[Let me squat as I await this disgusting female artists' name]

——[Oh my gawd, that outfit…I think I know who it is]

——[Hey hey, the two men in the back are kind of hot, maybe this unspeakable wretch of an actress was getting in the way of their romance?]

——[Oh my god, don't fool yourself, you're making my eyes rot.]

——[Let me solve this case, the variety show in question is "Two Under One Roof", the female guest is the recently trending Xiang Yi, and the male guest is the film star Shi Sui. The big brother is a PhD graduate named Xiang Li, the very badass kind]

——[No way?? Yesterday, while watching the stream, I had a good impression from Xiang Yi, but there's this drama all of a sudden? She keeps seducing men which is making me lose all respect for her]

The revelation caught everyone off guard, but Shi Sui's company, Xing Chen Entertainment, immediately issued a PR statement to clear up the situation.

Meanwhile, Xiang Yi's company, Tomato Entertainment, continued to remain silent, which made people even more doubtful.

Everyone knew that Tomato Entertainment saw any exposure as good exposure. As long as they were popular, they could still milk the newcomers. Why would you not take the chance to make more money?

Besides, Xiang Yi was already the subject of so much mockery, what's another scandal?

Yin Jiangxue and Sheng Guang finished breakfast and exchanged contact information with Xiang Yi, reluctant to bid farewell.

The three masters wanted to stay for more lessons, but they were helplessly overloaded with errands and could only schedule another time.

Only Xiang Yi, Shi Sui, and Xiang Li remained at the dining table.

"Brother Shi Sui, try this siumai."

"Brother Shi Sui, these crystal dumplings are also delicious. I adjusted it according to your taste and put less salt."

"Brother Shi Sui, do you want another bowl of congee? I'll go get some for you…"

Xiang Li grinded his teeth. "He has hands!"

Shi Sui responded in an understanding manner. "Yi mei, you don't have to be so nice to me, either way…I'm used to it. Your second brother is in a bad mood, you should take care of him."

Xiang Li: "…"

If he hadn't learned that Shi Sui had decided to act like a human last night and nothing happened between the two, he would have told his bodyguard to break this guy's leg!

A burst of intelligence hit him suddenly as a dark tint glazed over Xiang Li's eyes. "Bunbun went into your room, did you not feel anything?"

Hearing this, Xiang Yi felt something was off.

Shi Sui…He wasn't playing with her, right?

"I drank a lot last night as well." Shi Sui said nonchalantly.

This much was true, but he was nowhere near drunk. 🙂

However, this sentence was enough to mislead Xiang Yi.

She might have questioned it if it were anyone else, but she had a natural sense of trust when it came to Shi Sui.

After all, Shi Sui had always been a reliable big brother and a gentleman in her memory.

Only, she didn't know the gentleman like manner was just a facade…his fox tail had already begun wagging long ago.

chapters.title: Chapter 243 - She'S Worth It
chapters.body:
Chapter 243 - She'S Worth It

"Daddy Shi, something's wrong, someone's posted a scandal about you and Yi mei." Li Jianyu was furiously sweating as he handed his phone to Shi Sui.

Xiang Yi c.o.c.ked her head, eager to see the news, but was blocked by Li Jianyu.

"It was probably leaked by a member of the staff in our crew. I'm investigating it right now. Yi mei, don't worry, I will give you a proper explanation!"

Xiang Yi instantly understood. "Someone is mocking me?"

Li Jianyu felt helpless. "Mhmm…"

Soon, Shi Sui's manager, Si Chuanbai called as he stepped onto the balcony to answer the phone.

Si Chuanbai was clear and concise. "The statement has been issued, but I need to confirm with you; are you two dating? If you are, are you planning to go public? Let me know so I can prepare a response."

Shi Sui glanced at Xiang Yi. "Not yet."

"You… Are you for real?" Si Chuanbai felt himself suffocate a little. "Let me ask you bluntly; is she worth it?"

"She is." Shi Sui responded without hesitation.

Si Chuanbai went silent for a moment. "Okay, I understand. Since this is your decision, then I will respect it and cooperate."

"Then you…" A lazy laughter sounded through the receiver. "Are you not planning to wish me a happy marriage in advance?"

The serious atmosphere was instantly shattered by Shi Sui's flirty demeanor.

Si Chuanbai took a deep breath and mocked: "You're not even dating yet and thinking of marriage already? Haha, why not just find a master to prepare you some baby names?"

"Okay, remember to find a good master. The more expensive, the better, thanks."

Meanwhile, Xiang Yi had received Ah Nan's video call as well.

On the screen, Ah Nan cried while sporting his sparsely colorful hair. "Wahhh sweetie, they are so mean, they won't issue a public statement for you and even told some of the newbies to ride the wave of your popularity! Garbage company, why are they not bankrupt yet…"

Xiang Yi didn't take these things too seriously. To her, the most important task at hand was deciding what to make for lunch.

"Okay, don't cry." Xiang Yi comforted him. "If they really went bankrupt, you would have no job."

Ah Nan sniffed. "Then when the time comes, I'll become a Mr. Tony* and take care of you using my wash blow and style skills."

Xiang Yi couldn't help but picture the scene. Inexplicably, she felt the role was very suitable to Ah Nan.

"How can you still laugh… When the Sea7 boys heard of this, they were on the verge of tears."

"Tell them I'll find a way to deal with it."

"Really?"

"Mhm. Do you want to come for lunch? I made your favorite marinated pork hock?"

"Gulp…" Ah Nan gulped loudly across the video chat. "O…Okay. See you at lunch."

They hung up.

Xiang Yi met her brother's gaze.

Xiang Li frowned as he tapped on the tabletop with his left hand, each interval between taps exactly the same as the last.

"How do you plan to solve this?"

"No idea." Xiang Yi said honestly.

Xiang Li's eyebrows twitched. "How can you still say it so confidently then?"

The girl beamed as shallow dimples formed around her cheeks. "Because I have you."

If this was during her transmigration, she would have been desperate to die and be reborn.

But now, she just wanted to, even for a little bit… Rely on her big brother.

"Heh, dumbass. You can't even solve this?" He said as his eyes beamed with happiness. Clearing his throat, he spoke: "You want my help? Beg me."

Xiang Yi clasped her hands together and coyly said: "Big brother, please, please, can you help me, please?"

"Wait." Xiang Li interrupted. With familiar ease, he began to film on his phone and said strictly: "Go again, I didn't catch it on film last time."

*Translator's Note: "Tony Laoshi" or Mr. Tony is a popular internet term used to describe a certain type of hair stylists who are very extra and tacky but do an awful job with your hair.

chapters.title: Chapter 244 - Yiyi Of The Xiang Family Is Open For Business
chapters.body:
Chapter 244 - Yiyi Of The Xiang Family Is Open For Business

What else could you do but spoil your own brother?

Yiyi of the Xiang family was open for business.

“Big brother, please…”

“Pause, does your brother not even deserve a title and description?”

“The most handsome and genius big brother in the world, please help me.”

“That’s all? Where’s your sincerity? I can’t feel it at all.”

“…Big brother, you’re the best, what do you want to eat? I will make it for you! Does your hand hurt? I’ll massage it for you!”

It took a solid ten minutes for Xiang Li to be satisfied with his footage as he sent them out one by one.

TO: Unwise number four

TO: Not too silly three

TO: Decently smart big brother

TO: Little uncle destined for smartness

It didn’t take long for Xiang Li to receive a response.

[Unwise number four]: Ahhhhh little sis is so cute!!

[Not too silly three]: What, but two days ago, she said I was the best brother! /sob /sob

[Little uncle destined for smartness]: You’re bullying little Xiang Yi again!

[Decently smart big brother]: ?

[Decently smart big brother]: She’s back.

Xiang Chen’s words were certain.

Xiang Li smiled and responded: “Mhmm.”

[Decently smart big brother]: To confirm…That person won’t show up again, right?

Seeing this, Xiang Li frowned slightly. Thinking of the entity that had possessed his sister over this last year, he suddenly felt extremely sick to the stomach.

From the start, Xiang Chen had noticed something was wrong. That was why he was willing to sign that contract to restrict ‘Xiang Yi’s’ demonic behavior.

After interacting with Xiang Yi, Xiang Li guessed as much.

Xiang Qi was doubtful, but he couldn’t be sure.

Xiang Yu vaguely felt the abnormalities in his sister’s behavior.

As for Xiang Feng…There is no need to mention him. 🙂

In the manor.

All the filming for weekdays was done in the evenings, so the staff had plenty of free time during the day.

Xiao Liang looked at the balance he’d just received on his phone and became extremely excited.

Who knew one scandal could sell for so much!

Having tasted the sweetness, he could only think about how to film an even more revealing video.

If he sent out a few more, wouldn’t he be able to make a small fortune?

Seeing the girl amid the sea of flowers holding a watering can, Xiao Liang’s eyes filled with greed.

If…If he put a few pinhole cameras in her bedroom, or shower room, maybe he could get a video worth a heavenly rate…

Or he could blackmail her.

Thinking of a Baifumei kneeling at his feet and begging him, Xiao Liang was overjoyed!

Just as he was searching for camera equipment on the internet.

“Bang!”

The door was kicked open.

Looking at the burly bodyguards at the door, Xiao Liang was instantly frightened, his voice trembling. “This is my room, h-how c-could you c-casually disrespect me by barging in like this!”

These bodyguards watch after Xiang Li year round and have long ago gained the habit of obeying orders. They didn’t spare a word with him as they dragged him directly into the yard.

“Hey, what’s the meaning of this! Let me go!” Xiao Liang exclaimed. “I’m the assistant cameraman, do you guys even care about our production crew?”

All the staff gathered upon seeing the commotion.

“What’s going on?”

“Hey, why are you getting violent!”

“Director Li —— Director Li, look at them! They’ve gone too far!”

Li Jianyu’s expression was frosty. “Be quiet.”

He was usually a jolly man, and most of his staff were young so nobody was afraid of him.

But when Li Jianyu became serious, the entire scene went silent.

“Today’s Weibo scandal was the fault of our production crew. Here, besides apologizing to mentor Xiang Yi, I must…”

“Fairly advocate for Mentor Xiang Yi.”

chapters.title: Chapter 245 - What’S More Terrifying Than Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 245 - What’S More Terrifying Than Death

Li Jianyu’s sharp gaze pierced through Xiao Liang.

His face turned pale as his forehead began to precipitate. Still, he refused to budge. “Are you doubting me? How could I do such a thing!”

Li Jianyu said coldly: “If you admit it, I won’t pursue legal action.”

He wanted to give Xiao Liang one last chance.

But Xiao Liang thought he was bluffing. It was just a short video, right? How could this possibly involve legal investigation?

Besides, he had cleared his chat history, and the bank account he used to accept the money belonged to a distant relative. To him, he had flawlessly finished the task with no trace!

“I didn’t do it! I swear! Otherwise, let me get hit by a car on the way out!” Xiao Liang cursed.

Several members of the staff who were close to him spoke on his behalf.

“Director Li, maybe there’s a misunderstanding…”

“Xiao Liang is a pretty nice kid, he wouldn’t do such a thing.”

Li Jianyu’s face was grim. “Since you won’t take my olive branch, then don’t blame me for being merciless.”

He proceeded to show the evidence.

“The video was recorded at five o’clock this morning and was posted to the gossip forum at seven o’clock. At that time, most of the crew were still asleep. Dr. Xiang has coded a small program that captures signals of the equipment using the wireless network in the area.”

“It came from your phone.”
