Xiao Liang’s expression instantly changed. He had habitually connected to the Wi-Fi; he couldn’t have imagined this could be used as proof!

Quickly, he retorted: “I, I just woke up early and played on my phone for a while! That’s it! Someone else could have sent the video!”

Li Jianyu: “How long are you going to be stubborn for! Dr. Xiang has traced the source of the video which was sent directly from your device!”

“Then, then someone else could have taken my phone and sent it from there…”

Xiao Liang’s words were full of loopholes, and the staff who had just spoken on his behalf felt a chill in their chest.

Seeing this, Xiao Liang finally caved. “So what if I did it! Why aren’t you blaming Xiang Yi for trying to seduce Shi Sui? Why are you blaming me?”

Li Jianyu was furious he wanted to vomit blood. “You think you’re in the right for infringing upon other people’s privacy?!”

“If she kept her private life private, I wouldn’t have caught the film, right?!” Xiao Liang said plausibly. “Overall, it’s her fault to begin with…”

The next second ——

A certain sis-con PhD graduate had grabbed onto his collar with one hand and glaring at him with dark eyes and murderous intent.

Xiao Liang wailed. “He’s hitting me, he’s hitting me, he’s going to kill me! Help!”

Li Jianyu was speechless. He had never seen a thief shouting to catch a thief!

Xiang Li smiled briefly. “What do you think is more terrifying than death?”

Xiao Liang felt his heart cease to beat.

“To live craving for death.” Xiang Li raised his eyebrows. “You want to try it?”

“…” Xiao Liang’s eyes dilated as fear overcame him.

He subconsciously began to look for Xiang Yi’s figure.

She was gentle and easy to talk to. As long as he pleaded with her, she would definitely forgive him…

Not far away, the calm girl continued to water her flowers with no intention of stopping. It was as if she didn’t take these things to heart.

“Mentor Xiang Yi! I was wrong, I’ve learned from my mistakes! Can I apologize to you? I’m still young and naïve, please, I am not worth your time…”

“Cheh.”

A chuckle escaped from the handsome man standing next to the girl. Shi Sui was smiling, but his peach blossom eyes were frosted with a layer of ice. There was not a hint of warmth in his words.

“You? Are you worthy of calling her name?”

chapters.title: Chapter 246 - Big Brother Will Protect You
chapters.body:
Chapter 246 - Big Brother Will Protect You

The man’s aura was too strong as it crushed down on Xiao Liang. Their eyes met, and within a few seconds, he was so scared his legs began to tremble.

With a “thump”, he fell to the ground. His phone slipped out of his pocket, the screen still on, displaying his search terms for ‘pinhole camera, bedroom, bathroom, sneaking photos’ etc.

Shi Sui instantly narrowed his eyes as his whole body took on a menacing demeanor.

Xiao Liang was on the brink of tears and his arrogant attitude was completely flipped. “I…I didn’t install these, what, is it illegal to think about it…”

Shi Sui’s appearance was grim.

How could this garbage human think about hurting the young girl, the young girl he himself treasured so much he didn’t dare mess around?!

“Xiang Li, take your sister inside.” Shi Sui said in a low voice.

“I can handle my sister’s problems on my own!” Xiang Li responded, displeased.

“Then when she starts crying, are you going to coax her?”

Xiang Li gritted his teeth, then grabbed Xiang Yi by the wrist and took her inside.

Xiang Yi’s focus was completely diverted. “I’m not scared, I haven’t finished watering my flowers yet…”

Xiang Li was strict. “No, you’re scared.”

Xiang Yi: “…Okay, I’m scared.”

Xiang Li was satisfied with this. “Mhmm, big brother will protect you.”

Ah Nan drove his small, broken car into the manor early in the morning.

When he arrived, the small groups of staff that hadn’t dispersed stood around, whispering about something.

“My god, Shi Yingdi looks so handsome when he’s angry…”

“He looked so good when he was speaking and taking off his glasses!”

“I heard his temper is so good. When his assistant had betrayed him before, he barely caused a commotion. I didn’t think he would be for real this time around…”

“Xiao Liang is really too much. After this, he won’t be able to hack it in the entertainment industry from now on…”

Ah Nan listened to the gossip for a while before prancing into the manor.

“Darling! I’m here!”

Xiang Yi was grooming Xiao Naofu in front of the floor-to-ceiling windows. Xiao Naofu had its paws facing air, asleep and snoring happily.

Ah Nani: …A cat’s life is better than a human’s!

Xiang Yi smiled lightly. “The pork hocks are braising, do you want to eat anything else?”

“I’ll eat anything you make!” Ah Nan smiled. He took out his phone to show Xiang Yi. “It’s so strange, our company’s flipped completely, they actually helped you issue a PR statement…”

On the screen was a statement issued by Tomato Entertainment. In addition to condemning candid photos taken without permission, the marketing account also posted a lawyer’s statement.

The netizens in the comment section were stunned.

——[Truly you see everything the longer you live. Tomato Entertainment actually has a PR Department?]

——[Mother of god, when Sea7’s solo fans and group hands were butting heads, Tomato Entertainment was nowhere to be seen. Yet, they’re actually willing to speak up for the Vase Fairy this time!]

——[Uh oh, this Ling Chen law firm is top-notch in all of China. How are they willing to take on such a small case regarding a celebrity’s reputation?]

Some fans still criticized the move.

——[The PR account is taking things out of context, how could one video prove? Shi Yingdi hates women, don’t you know? There’s no way he likes Xiang Yi]

——[To be perfectly honest, our Yi mei can be spicy or sweet, she’s rich and talented, and has a bunch of god-tier older brothers. Please stop fueling the fire, our Yi mei just wants to beautifully flourish on her own!]

However, there was even more commotion from the CP fans:

——[We could use some more trending searches like this!!]

——[In the same room! Sisters, let’s shout together, ahhhhhhhhhhhh!!!]

——[In two days, they are going to be shooting a collaborative magazine issue. I don’t care, I don’t care, this is progress! This is clearly a honey! Moon!!!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 247 - I Ship Myself
chapters.body:
Chapter 247 - I Ship Myself

“I know about the magazine cover…” She knew that this had been a resource brought about by her third brother. “But what is the meaning of a honeymoon? And what does this, ‘Untimely CP is real’ —what does this mean?”

Xiang Yi cupped her cheeks in her hands, confused.

Was it because she hadn’t surfed the internet in too long?

She didn’t understand any of the comments she was seeing.

Ah Nan’s jaw dropped. “No way, no way? You don’t know that you and Shi Yingdi already have CP fans??!”

Xiang Yi: ???

“You’ve gotten a little popular lately, so you guys are no longer an arctic CP. I even followed it for a bit, and I must say that everyone really does put girls under a microscope…” Ah Nan sighed and searched for some queries related to [ Untimely CP ].

With practiced proficiency, he entered into the comment section and clocked in his daily commenting/forwarding/liking and banning. Then he found the CP posts made by the smooth ladies to show Xiang Yi.

A few minutes later.

Xiang Yi was stunned.

It was…kind of sweet?

‘Is this the legendary tale of…I ship myself?’

“What are you guys looking at?” Xiang Li poured himself a cup of water and sat down beside them.

Ah Nan said with ease: “Trending topics, bro. Do you want to read it too? It’s so sweet! A must have to reduce stress!”

“Really?”

Thinking of having more in common with his sister, Xiang Li politely glanced at the screen…

[Untimely CP is super sweet]: Shisui and Yi mei’s first love cut (edit!)! Sweeter than your first love!

[CP scientist begins shipping]: I drew a set of chibi emotes for Shisui and Yi mei, bunny pajamas x big gray wolf pajamas are a match made in heaven~

[Has Untimely CP been made official yet]: I saw them once and was trapped. ❤ Screenshots below↓

One minute passed.

Two minutes.

Xiang Li maintained his posture, unmoved.

Only his expression became more and more stiff.

The unknowing Ah Nan asked wholeheartedly: “Bro, how is it? Isn’t it so juicy!”

Xiang Li put down his glass and rubbed his forehead, turning his stiff handsome face toward Xiang Yi.

“You come here.”

“Huh?”

Xiang Yi followed him to the balcony with a befuddled expression.

Xiang Li’s opening remarks were very cold. “Recite article number sixteen of the house rules.”

Xiang Yi recalled for a moment. “The hazards of premature dating are as follows, one, it’s easy to be deceived by scumbag men, two…”

The daylight brushed on a tall, slender silhouette. Xiang Li’s expression did not change as he waited for his sister to recite the entire clause before saying leisurely: “So that’s why you cannot date prematurely.”

Xiang Yi: ???

Softly, she responded: “Big brother, I’m twenty this year…”

“So what if you’re twenty! Am I no longer your brother if you’re twenty years old?!”

Xiang Yi had always been very obedient when it came to her brothers. “Oh…I got it.”

Xiang Yi patted her head. “Good girl.”

He raised his eyebrow at Shi Sui who was sitting not far away, blatantly provocative.

Shi Sui snorted quietly and mouthed:

Immature.

Xiang Li didn’t take him serious, but once Shi Sui walked away, he suddenly asked:

“Tell me, where have you been this last year.”

Xiang Yi’s eyes widened.

“Why are you so surprised? Do you think I’m as dumb as your uncle to not even notice?” Xiang Li smiled lightly like a sly old fox. “Bunbun, are you insulting your brother’s intelligence?”

Time rewind.

Xiang Yi briefly summarized her experiences from last year.

Xiang Li listened intently, tapping on the railing again and again, the rhythm between each tap synchronized precisely.

“Did you think the catalyst was that car accident?”

Xiang Yi froze. “Is that not right?”

Xiang Li’s voice was solemn. “That’s the problem. There’s a chance that person might return.”

chapters.title: Chapter 248 - How About You Cry For Five Minutes First
chapters.body:
Chapter 248 - How About You Cry For Five Minutes First

A gray hue plastered the sky as rain season was here. From time to time, a strong shower would occur.

Thunder sounded from afar, approaching them as the dull roar grew louder.

“Eh?” Xiang Yi was taken aback, unable to believe it. Finally snapping back to reality, she said: “Brother… you mean, that person’s appearance wasn’t an accident?”

“Behind all coincidences exists an inevitability. According to the rules of this ‘system’ you mentioned, only souls on the verge of life and death can be selected. But you technically do not conform to this rule. Because you were injured, but it wasn’t serious.”

A year ago, Xiang Yi was in a car accident and passed out on the spot. A couple hours later, she awoke with only minor external wounds.

Xiang Yi frowned, trying to follow her second brother’s train of thought. “So you’re saying I might not be the person that was originally chosen to transmigrate…”

“That’s right. Or maybe you unconsciously became someone else’s scapegoat. Thinking back, not every universe you travelled through was safe, right? Body injury is a small matter, but if your soul was wiped out, you will disappear forever.”

“I see where you’re coming from. If it was just a vocational transmigration around the world, then the trip was a reward. But if it was full of life threatening tasks, somebody might not have been willing to accept it.”

A gust of wind blew over, and Xiang Yi suddenly felt a slight chill.

Xiang Li stopped mid-sentence for a few seconds, then took off his jacket and placed it over his sister’s shoulders.

“This is just my analysis, but there is no proof. Take it with a grain of salt.”

The girl’s eyes fell on her brother’s right hand and held her breath.

If her brother’s deductions were right, maybe that person will occupy her body again…

What if her brother gets hurt again?!

Suddenly she felt a light tap on her back as her brother’s gentle voice sounded in her ears. “Don’t hold your breath, what if you knock yourself out?”

Xiang Yi felt her nose crinkle. He even remembers her little habits…

“Big brother, let’s make a secret signal. If one day I can’t answer, then you must not trust anything that ‘Xiang Yi’ says, and do not make any sacrifices for her.”

Xiang Yi tried hard to force a smile, but it was uglier than crying.

The family members she loved so much had been trampled on by such a feverish individual…

And this might not be an accident but a trap.

“If you can’t smile, then don’t.” Xiang Li pinched her cheeks and mumbled. “Why don’t you cry for a bit? No rush, your brother has time. You can cry all you like.”

He was trying really, really hard to console her.

“How about you cry for five minute?”

“I’ll watch the time for you?”

Xiang Yi couldn’t help but smile at his attempts. As she laughed, her eyes turned red. “Big brother, you’re still awful at coddling people.”

“Then our secret signal can be the words ‘five minutes’?”

“Okay.”

Once the siblings talked everything through, Xiang Yi felt more at ease.

It was as if she had been floating in a void all this time, but finally found a foothold.

Steadily, it supported her. She would never have to worry about having nowhere to retreat to.

“Oh right, how did elder brother realize something was wrong?” Xiang Yi remembered the contract that her oldest brother had forced ‘that person’ to sign. The matter was dealt with in fine detail. Although it seemed immature, he was able to restrict the nonsense ‘that person’ had tried to cause.

To put it simply, they could get away with a misdemeanor, but anything that was a big deal was prevented.

Xiang Li shook his head. “I’m not sure, but something very, very bad must have happened…”

chapters.title: Chapter 249 - Chapter 249
chapters.body:
Chapter 249 - Chapter 249

Xiang Yi felt a headache coming on.

What did that person occupying her body do to her eldest brother…

“He knows you’re back, so you should go explain to him.” Their elder brother’s intellect had always been top-notch. This, Xiang Li was sure of.

Pitifully, Xiang Yi said: “I’m afraid…”

Since she was a child, she had always been scared of their eldest brother.

Xiang Li didn’t respond.

He wasn’t going to admit he was afraid of their eldest brother as well…

Xiang Chen.

The devil himself.

His mouth was stern, and his heart was even more frigid.

The whole family called him —— the man without a heart. 🙂

“Big brother, once eldest brother comes back, can you come with me to see him?” Xiang Yi said as she carefully tugged on his shirtsleeve.

“Little sister, you must learn to be brave, got it?” As he spoke words of encouragement, Xiang Li’s pale, slender fingers began to reach for his sister’s fingers…

And pried them off.

Xiang Yi: “…”

A second ago he had been so emotional; now he was as fragile as a piece of plastic.

They were related, that’s for sure.

Xiang Li coughed. “I suggest you take your little uncle with you, he can shoulder most of the heat for you. With him, eldest brother probably won’t flame you.”

Feng Feng of the Xiang family came with his own hate magnet. If he were in a game, he would be a sturdy tank, one who sheds blood but sheds no tears!

Xiang Yi lit up. “Big brother, you really are a genius, that makes so much sense!”

Xiang Yi returned to the living room still wearing her brother’s jacket. Shi Sui, who had been teasing Xiao Naofu, briefly paused his actions for a moment and slipped a glance at her.

“Mr. Si is here?” Xiang Yi noticed Si Chuanbai standing to the side.

As a reputable agent, Si Chuanbai always wore a crisp suit. Xiang Yi felt he was even more of a domineering boss than her little uncle.

Si Chuanbai respectfully greeted: “Miss Xiang.”

He was visiting to pass on Shi Sui’s work.

Ah Nan gazed at Si Chuanbai with large eyes for a long time before shuffling over and asking in a small voice: “Are these bling-bling cuff links of yours made out of black obsidian?”

His envious gaze was that of a child who had just bought a five-cent popsicle watching another child from his class eating a five-dollar ice cream cone.

Si Chuanbai: “…”

He smiled politely. “Mhm.”

Ah Nan immediately sighed with genuine admiration. “Wow~~”

They were both agents, yet Si Chuanbai looked like an elite, while he…

He was at most a freeloader to society Q_Q

Si Chuanbai thought Xiang Yi’s manager was way out of line as well.

With his color-splattered hair and goofy grin…

And the way he interacted with Xiang Yi confused Si Chuanbai even more.

They did not seem like business partners but two close girlfriends.

Ah Nan was already hungry before it was meal time, and Xiang Yi even made him a bowl of green onion noodles.

Seeing Ah Nan gobble up the food, Si Chuanbai frowned.

Does it really taste that good?

He’s not acting, is he?

But once lunch was brought to the table —

Braised pork hock, braised chicken feet, braised duck neck, braised tofu, braised shiitake…

The fragrant aroma overwhelmed his senses. The ingredients had been stewed softly and wrapped in a thick and shiny marinade, with some sesame seeds sprinkled on top as garnish.

This marinated platter immediately grabbed Si Chuanbai’s attention.

Maintaining his composure, Si Chuanbai picked up his chopsticks and took a piece of stir-fried vegetable nearest to him when someone stuffed a large tender pork hock into his hands.

“Just bite it off, bite it! Don’t be timid! This is the biggest one!” Ah Nan mustered between mouthfuls of chicken feet.

Si Chuanbai: “…”

Is this a joke!

Would such a strict, tidy, sophisticated man gnaw on a pork hock so barbarically like this feather duster?!

But…

But…

Why does this damned pig hock have to smell so good?!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 250 - Fertility Clinic
chapters.body:
Chapter 250 - Fertility Clinic

Si Chuanbai sternly stared at the pork hock in his hand. After several hours of braising in marinade, the meat was a delicious shade of shining red. Still hot in his hand, the smell continued to waft and dominate his sense of smell.

Soon, he began to salivate involuntarily.

He’ll just…just have one bite.

With the mentality of trying one bite, he elegantly tore off a piece of meat and tasted it.

The moment the tip of his tongue touched the pork hock…

Rich with collagen, the pork’s hock was extremely tender and juicy. When chewed, it was fatty but not greasy, and the slight elasticity gave it a pleasant texture.

The fragrance of the marinade soaked through every inch of the meat, even braising the bones in flavor. It was fragrant, sweet, salty, fresh, nd spicy all at once. The oppressive taste instantly took over Si Chuanbai’s taste buds!

How…

How could…

How could this damned pork hock be so delicious!

Si Chuanbai’s hands began to tremble slightly as he was no longer able to satisfy his stomach just by tearing the meat with his hands!

Cursing under his breath, Si Chuanbai raised the pork hock and took a large bite!

The satisfaction brought about by this action was something smaller bites could never satisfy!

A renowned agent known for his meticulousness and strict demeanor, Si Chuanbai’s reputation was instantly changed at this moment as he happily gnawed on a pork hock from his hands!

When Ah Nan saw this scene…

Has Mr. Si never eaten good food? The speed of his fervent actions were a bit too exaggerated…

Ah! He must be too busy normally to sit down and have a good meal.

Thinking of this, Ah Nan looked at him sympathetically.

And so, Si Chuanbai consumed the entire pork hock. In front of him were more braised chicken feet, eggs, dried tofu, lotus root…

Ah Nan, the instigator, who still did not realize it was he who had destroyed Si Chuanbai’s reputation, turned to Si Chuanbai and grinned stupidly.

Si Chuanbai paused his chewing slightly. “…”

…This feather duster is actually pretty easy on the eyes after looking at him for a while.

After the meal.

Si Chuanbai wiped his hands and the corners of his mouth with a wet napkin and restored his elite stature.

He turned to Shi Sui and said in a low voice: “I have to talk to you.”

Shi Sui: “Heh?”

Shi Sui assumed his agent wanted to speak to him about business matters, but Si Chuanbai earnestly blurted out instead:

“Would you like me to check out some wedding venues for you?”

“How about a fertility clinic as well?”

“On the subject of children, there doesn’t seem to be any good schools in the districts of the properties you own.” Si Chuanbai sounded almost irritated. “If you continue to be like this, how can I allow Miss Xiang Yi to marry you!”

A question mark hovered over Shi Sui’s head.

Heh? Whose agent are you??

Si Chuanbai shook his head. “No, no, you cannot be like this. It seems like I must find some other jobs for you besides “Two Under One Roof”. How else will you make money to pay for baby formula?”

Shi Sui: “…Do I seem like someone who can’t afford to take care of their wife and kids?”

“It’s okay to live a little rough when you’re alone, but can you bear seeing Miss Xiang Yi suffer alongside you? Are you planning to become a gigolo?!”

Shi Sui raised a brow. “That’s not a bad suggestion you have there.”

Si Chuanbai sneered then instantly rebelled, like the lead antifan at a controversial event:

“Cheh. You think you can be one just because you want to? Miss Xiang Yi is so popular, and she is beautiful AND an amazing chef. There are hoards of young fresh meat lining up to date her. Where does an old man like you, who is about to hit thirty, stand in that line?”

Shi Sui: ???

chapters.title: Chapter 251 - Scene Of The Crime, The Cat Is Guilty
chapters.body:
Chapter 251 - Scene Of The Crime, The Cat Is Guilty

Your ability to contract amnesia on the spot is truly incredible. 🙂

After being betrayed ruthlessly by his own manager, Shi Sui rubbed his eyebrows and said helplessly: “During the time of one meal, you’ve converted to the in-laws’ side already?”

“If I were Miss Xiang Yi’s real family…” Si Chuanbai paused for a moment and smiled. “You wouldn’t stand a chance of courting her at all.”

Shi Sui: “…”

Habitually, he searched for Xiang Yi’s figure, scanning the area…

Xiang Li was tidying up the dishes. Most of the men of the Xiang family have always been very conscious when it came to chores and housework.

Ah Nan continued to study Si Chuanbai’s leather briefcase. Even if he had Si Chuanbai’s permission, he still didn’t dare to touch it.

Finally, Shi Sui spotted Xiang Yi on the tatami floors next to the French windows.

The girl was coaxing Xiao Naofu, trying to get the cat to eat hairball medication that the cat was refusing.

“Xiao Naofu, if you don’t eat this your tummy will grow hairballs.” Xiang Yi coaxed softly.

Xiao Naofu, who was reluctant and knew her temper, angrily turned away like a gremlin, smacking the hairball medication onto the ground.

Xiang Yi didn’t know what to do with it. Just when she felt helpless, Shi Sui suddenly appeared next to her and picked up the cat by the nape of its neck.

Seeing who it was, the cream-colored cat retracted in fear and began to struggle, waving its paws in the air. “Meow meow! Meow meow meow!”

—— Stupid woman, come save me now!

“Take a photo.” Shi Sui said lightly as one hand pressed down on Xiao Naofu while the other pointed to the hairball pellets on the ground. “This is the crime scene, and the cat is guilty.”

Xiang Yi batted her eyes and went along, snapping a photo.

Xiao Naofu: “Meow meow meow!!!”

—— This huhu is not a cat!

Shi Sui: “The criminal Xiao Naofu has been sentenced to three days in jail and deprived of dried fish for a week.”

Xiao Naofu seemed to have suffered a huge blow, the watery pupils on the cat’s round face growing larger as it cried out its grievances. “Meow~meow meow~”

When he began his acting, Xiang Yi’s heart immediately melted. “Forget it, it’s Xiao Naofu’s first offense, let’s give it a chance.”

Shi Sui pondered for a moment. “If it behaves, we can postpone the execution.” He raised the cat to meet his eyes and slightly raised his eyebrows. “Listen to Yi mei, hm?”

He deliberately picked a spot where Xiang Yi couldn’t see his lips move, then motioned: “Or else, I’ll take you to get neutered.”

Xiao Naofu curled its tail in fright, tightly protecting its ‘delicate parts’.

When he returned the cat to Xiang Yi, the cat was so well behaved it not only ate the hairball medication but even took the initiative to reach its paws out to Xiang Yi so she could cut its nails.

Xiang Yi was pleasantly taken back. “I think you’re going to be great with kids in the future.”

Shi Sui smiled. “Is that so?”

“Mhm. But I’ll be different; I think I’ll become the kind of parent who spoils their babies.”

Shi Sui responded swiftly. “In a family, one person who can discipline the kids is enough.”

His voice was soft like a feather, so soft that Xiang Yi didn’t hear him at all. She turned around. “Hmm? What did you say?”

Shi Sui’s thin lips twitched slightly and lovingly patted Xiao Naofu on the head. “It’s nothing, I just suddenly feel like Xiao Naofu is kind of cute.”

Xiao Naofu felt its hair stand on end. How dare you f*cking touch me!

Meanwhile.

Ah Nan excitedly grabbed Si Chuanbai’s arm. “Sugar! This is sugar! Look at them, don’t they look like a family of three?!!”

Si Chuanbai remained indifferent. “Heh.”

Ah Nan was beyond excited. “And they’re going abroad soon to shoot a magazine cover; it’s like a trip for newlyweds!”

Speaking of which, Si Chuanbai suddenly remembered something. “Were you the one responsible for booking the flights?”

“Huh? You mean you didn’t book them?” Ah Nan was dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 252 - Wife Fans 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 252 - Wife Fans 1

Their eyes met for a few seconds.

Something was off.

Si Chuanbai’s expression was sour. Shi Sui’s assistant should have been responsible for these kinds of tasks, but that person had been fired for betraying Shi Sui. Then when Shi Sui came to “Two Under One Roof”, the task of finding a replacement was forgotten.

He had more than just Shi Sui as a client and was very busy regularly. If he hadn’t come today, he wouldn’t have thought about booking the plane ticket at all.

Although Si Chuanbai didn’t say much, Ah Nan began to blame himself. “S-Sorry, I have been busy dealing with my darling’s endorsements, and I thought you already booked… I’ll go book them right now!”

He opened the ticketing software only to see that all the flights from Nan Cheng to France in the next two days were completely sold out!

“What… What do we do now?” Ah Nan started to panic. “If they don’t make it, won’t the duo magazine cover be cancelled?”

Si Chuanbai: “Don’t panic, let’s see if there are any flights from neighboring cities.”

Ah Nan: “Oh right, right! I’ll check those now!”

Unfortunately, all the flights to France from the neighboring towns were sold out as well.

The nearest city with available flights outgoing was a four- to five-hour drive, and the first class and business class seats were all sold out.

The flight to France was a long one, and flying economy would be exhausting. In addition to a high intensity photoshoot that followed…

Si Chuanbai frowned so deeply his wrinkles could have killed a fly.

Ah Nan was about to cry.

“Book the economy flights first, I’ll deal with the rest.”

Later that night, “Two Under One Roof” went live.

The two managers had taken their leave after lunch. Xiang Li had received an emergency call and was heading back to the research institute for the time being.

Cozy and simple, the scene managed to attract countless netizens.

There was only two people and a cat at the dining table, which sparked the netizens’ lighthearted comments:

——[Real · Two Under One Roof]

——[Look what I discovered! Today, Shi Yingdi and Yi mei are both wearing white, and Xiao Naofu is white as well. This is basically wearing matching family outfits in public!]

——[Hahaha wtf parent-child outfits, Xiao Naofu says he’s been violated!]

——[Wait wtf? Shisui is picking up food for the Vase Fairy?!]

In the eyes of the public, the man on screen was calmly serving dishes and pouring soup for Xiang Yi. He was perfect husband material.

“You should rest early, I can clean up here and give Xiao Naofu a bath on the way.”

The netizens who had seen the viral video were dumbfounded.

How… How did things progress so fast?!

The comment section suddenly became heated.

——[Don’t you think the Shi Yingdi who is serving food, cleaning dishes, and taking care of kids resembles a great father?]

——[???? What kind of sham marketing account is this? How can you say the Vase Fairy is seducing Shi Yingdi? Clearly, Shi Yingdi is trying to please the Vase Fairy, okay!]

——[Ah ah ah the way Shi Yingdi looks at Yi mei is so different. If you don’t believe me, you can go and compare it with the way he looks at female actresses in his films!]

——[Hey CP fans, can you get more annoying? This is obviously scripted, what kind of variety show doesn’t have a script these days?]

——[My god, there’s a longtime fan of Shi Yingdi called “All is Well Year Round” who is claiming to leave the fanbase, can’t keep up with this gossip!]

——[ F*ck, this rich woman is really famous in Shi Sui’s fanclub, she’s one of his wife fans! Is she going to rip the Xiang woman a new one? /rubs hands excitedly]

Although it was a Monday, the traffic for the show had already peaked in the evening. Netizens alerted all their gossip-chasing friends as they quickly flooded “All is Well Year Round”‘s public Weibo account.

Half an hour ago, she had posted a long, angry rant full of indignation.

chapters.title: Chapter 253 - Wife Fans 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 253 - Wife Fans 2

[All is Well Year Round V]: I’ve been your fan for so many years, accompanying you through the darkest of days and most glorious times. In the past, I thought you hated women, as you couldn’t even act in a scene that involved holding hands with a woman. Even if I know you don’t belong to me, I knew at least you wouldn’t belong to anyone else.

But now, I don’t understand the CP rumors about you and a certain female actress. To be honest, I have nothing against you rumor mongering with a girlfriend for popularity, but you should at least find someone proper. That female actress, this eighteenth-tier acting… to say that she is overreaching is an insult to the word ‘overreaching’.

Every time I watch your stream, I can feel my heart bleed while others laugh. Seeing that female actress leech onto you like a vampire, leeching your popularity makes me want to rip her face off. Yet you? Not only do you not keep your distance, but you are getting more and more flirty with her. Does touching her not make you want to throw up? Or are you telling me even if she makes you sick, you’re determined to start a dating rumor with her?

Recently, what angered me the most was a rumor I heard from somewhere else. Once your previous assistant left, you didn’t find a new one, and so this female actress now wants to be your assistant. She’s so weak and prissy, how can she take care of others? How can she take care of you?

You’ve only just acquired tickets today for your excursion abroad that’s happening two days from now, and it’s economy class no less… With several hours of transfer time and over ten hours of flying… Heh. Do you have to torture yourself like this?

I’m tired; so, so tired. If you want to continue rumor mongering about your fake relationship with this female actress, I will consider leaving the fan circle.

The blogger herself already had hundreds of thousands of followers and was well known in the fanclub as well. The comment section below her post quickly broke 10,000.

——[Finally! Someone has said how I felt! Don’t talk about all the useless stuff; with his status, the Vase Fairy is not worthy!]

——[Where did she find the face to say she wants to be gege’s assistant? My god, she can’t even book a plane ticket. Forgive me for being harsh, but is her brain working]

——[I’m crying, how can my gege suffer so much, is the company forcing him to do it?]

——[Seeing the CP fans really drives me crazy. How disgusting. Gege belongs to all of us, not just that bitch, okay?!]

——[I am livid, even just thinking about my husband in a relationship makes me want to commit murder]

But some netizens also raised the question:

——[Hm, I’m confused. Shi Yingdi isn’t an idol, right? It makes sense for idols to be restricted from dating, but since when were actors not allowed to date?]

——[After watching the stream these last few days, I can say Xiang Yi is really polite to Shi Sui… On the contrary, Shi Sui is the one who continues to take the initiative to show favor, so if anyone is trying to start a rumor, it’s on Shi Sui, right?]

——[Let’s let slide for a second that the rumor about her being his assistant is fake. Celebrities would never book their own flights anyways…]

The comment section was livid, as were the live comments in the livestream.

“Bzz.” A phone on the table vibrated.

Xiang Yi opened the message to see it was from Ah Nan. A screenshot, followed by a row of crying emojis.

She replied and looked at Shi Sui. “Ah Nan says tomorrow’s flight has been canceled due to the airport’s scheduling. Want me to rearrange and see if we can head out tonight?”

Shi Sui: “Sure, whatever you think works.”

Xiang Yi responded calmly. “Okay.”

The netizens who had just arrived at the stream after hearing the news were furious.

——[Flying out just because you say so? How will you get in the air without a plane ticket?!]

——[How can you fly without a plane ticket! How dumb are you, ma’am??]

——[I’m so angry. Such a good magazine cover opportunity will be lost, all because of you!]

chapters.title: Chapter 254 - Private Jet
chapters.body:
Chapter 254 - Private Jet

In the manor.

Xiang Yi found the butler’s phone number and sent him a short message explaining their situation.

Soon, she received the housekeeper’s response.

On the day of her coming of age ceremony, her grandpa had gifted her a small private jet painted in an adorable shade of pink and named Air Bunbun.

“I already asked, and they said we can leave at any time.” Xiang Yi put her phone down. “Then let’s head out after the stream ends?”

Naturally, Shi Sui knew about Air Bunbun and nodded, gesturing to Si Chuanbai.

Si Chuanbai’s response was a series of ellipses: ….

He and the feather duster had been so anxious searching for tickets, thinking this was going to be a catastrophe for sure.

He didn’t expect little Xiang Yi to resolve it so easily…

Si Chuanbai tilted his head and wordlessly looked at Ah Nan who was still searching for plane tickets. “Why didn’t you mention your artist owns a private jet?”

“What? Does my sweet dear own a private plane? Isn’t this something that can only be seen in dramas?!” Ah Nan’s eyes widened. “Wow! My darling is rich and beautiful!”

Si Chuanbai’s lips twitched.

‘This rainbow feather duster doesn’t seem to be very bright.’

With a blank expression, he sent Shi Sui a text.

[Si Chuanbai]: I just remembered you’ve got a weak stomach, the doctor recommends you eat soft rice.*

[Shi Sui]: ?

[Si Chuanbai]: Line up soon for a shot at love. Stop working so hard, being a cute gigolo is not bad. Add oil. Good luck.

[Shi Sui]: …

Xiang Yi just finished her conversation on the phone.

A few minutes later, “All is Well Year Round” posted a Weibo status, disdainfully resuming the mockery.

[All is Well Year Round V]: Dear female actress who shall not be named, do you own an airport? Do you know how difficult it is to adjust an airport schedule? How can they open up a runway just for you? Lmao, at least read a book before you act like a poser.

The fans in the comments below agreed as they all began to mock Xiang Yi.

——[That’s right, that’s right, I am disgusted just looking at her face]

——[Who cares if her reputation goes down the drain? But what’s going to happen if gege can’t make it to the magazine shoot? That magazine is one of the TOP international publications]

——[The Vase Fairy is so annoying! Without our gege, would she even get such a valuable resource? It’s fine if she doesn’t value it, but she’s dragging our gege with her too. Despicable!]

Shi Sui had one of the largest fan bases in entertainment, so it was inevitable there would be some unreasonable girlfriend fans and wife fans with extreme power. Several female celebrities who had collaborated with him before had also been taught a lesson by them.

This time, they followed the previous practice of cherry-picking Xiang Yi’s words. This, however, was not enough as they even ended up canceling the term “Untimely Couple”.

Xiang Yi’s fans were furious, but the disparity in numbers between the two sides was too great to contend with.

Until…

Someone commented below “All is Well Year Round”‘s Weibo post.

[Excuse me, do you have eyes? Xiang Yi’s manor is massive, and she has so many badass brothers; an esports legend, a top designer, a genius Ph.D. graduate… it’s normal to have a private jet, right?]

‘All is Well Year Round’ came from a wealthy background as well and boasted to know a lot as she speedily typed in response:

[So what if she has a private jet, do you think you can fly one so easily? Do you not need to apply for a route pass? Ridiculous! And here she is saying she can fly if she wants to. Then go fly, show me! ]

Just as she clicked send, another message popped up in her notification bar.

——[Holy f*ck! A private jet really landed at the Vase Fairy’s manor!!!]

*Translator’s Note: The term ‘eat soft rice’ or eat soft foods refers to a person who is idle and worthless and freeloads off others.

chapters.title: Chapter 255 - Air Bunbun
chapters.body:
Chapter 255 - Air Bunbun

…

At the manor.

The camera focused on the scene outside the windows, clearly documenting the private jet that was descending from the sky.

Propellers spinning, the plane slowly landed on the ground.

A pink plane landed, and the cockpit was sprayed with white paint in the shape of rabbit ears and a line of English letters on the fuselage:

RABBIT.

The stream comments instantly blew up.

——[I have goosebumps, is this the daily routine of a rich and beautiful girl?!]

——[Rabbit? Air Bunbun? Ah ah ah Bunbun riding Air Bunbun, that’s so cute!]

——[Hahaha Xiang Yi might be late to the face-slapping, but she is never absent!]

Someone had pasted the Weibo post made by “All is Well Year Round” in the stream comments. After seeing it, Li Jianyu couldn’t help but ask:

“Yi mei, does your plane need to register for clearing a route? Can your Air Bunbun fly to France?”

Xiang Yi: “That’s Mr. Housekeeper’s job. I think he arranged a one-time application for frequent flyers and airspaces and sends out a flight plan every day, regardless if I fly or not. This way, the plane can take any routes or passages whenever we need to use it.”

Aside from their annual family trips, she very seldom used Air Bunbun.

The netizens:

——[Understood, understood, where can I get a plane? ]

——[Friendly reminder, of course, you can fly whenever you want, but flight routes cost money as well as maintenance and gas. This trip will cost them much more than a flight ticket]

——[I just looked it up, the model of Air Bunbun costs about 100 million yuan… And you have to hire pilots, crews, maintenance personnel, and service personnel to run the aircraft, which means that in addition to affording the aircraft, they have to raise the staff too!]

On Weibo, “All Is Well Year Round” immediately became ridiculed.

Seeing the mockery coming from the netizens, she was so angry that she smashed her phone through the screen.

It was her who liked Shi Sui for so long, and it was her who had sacrificed so much for him. But why did Shi Sui betray her efforts?!

Originally, she had felt a sense of superiority when comparing herself to Xiang Yi.

So what if she was a female celebrity? How can an entertainment star that was the focus of internet mockery compare to her?

But… with the popularity that “Two Under One Roof” had attracted, she gradually came to discover how outstanding Xiang Yi was…

A sense of crisis engulfed her. She couldn’t accept this reality.

Perhaps, it’s only because Shi Sui hasn’t seen her yet…

Maybe if he could see her, everything would be different…

Paranoia continued to linger in her mind. She picked up the phone that had shattered on the ground and slowly began to type.

The stream ended at nine P.M.

Xiang Yi’s luggage had been packed in advance. Since the shoot including their round trip would last only three days, she didn’t pack much.

She dialed a video call to her fourth brother, Xiang Yu.

Xiang Yu stared at Xiao Naofu for the entire duration as his throat began to gulp.

“Xiao Naofu, the next three days you will behave with my fourth brother.”

The girl tried to kiss it, but the cat dodged her advances.

Xiao Naofu was depressed. “Meow~”

——This huhu wants to come as well!

“The plane gets pretty shaky during take-off and landing, so you might feel uncomfortable or even sick.”

Pointy cat ears drooped as Xiao Naofu glumly leaned against her shoulders.

“Fourth Brother will take good care of you, see? You remember him, right?”

Xiao Naofu looked towards the esports legend. “Meow?”

Xiang Yu seemed composed at the other end of the video call, but his heartbeat was racing—

Ahahhhhhhh the cute fuzzy baby meowed at me!!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 256 - Diary Of The Cat Slave (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 256 - Diary Of The Cat Slave (1)

Xiang Yu cleared his throat and said, “Ahem, don’t worry.”

Xiang Yi reluctantly placed Xiao Naofu back inside the cat bag and handed it over to Li Jianyu.

As for the reason she handed it to Li Jianyu… It has to be explained from the last time the scene of Smog sniffing the cat was exposed on the Internet…

Fans of “Two Under One Roof” kept requesting the crew to go to Team Logic’s base to shoot a follow-up.

After gaining permission, Li Jianyu took the opportunity of sending Xiao Naofu back to take the cameraman with him to film the livestream.

…

While Air Bunbun was soaring in the starry sky, the gaming base of Team Logic in the South City villa cluster area was still lit up.

After a round of APM hand-speed training, the team manager clapped his hands and said aloud, “The food we ordered is here. Everyone, take a break. The filming crew of ‘Two Under One Roof’ happens to be coming over too, let’s start a simple livestream for a few minutes.”

“Oh hey, Xiao Naofu is here?” The eyes of the captain, Wander, lit up, while the rest also reacted similarly.

Xiang Yu was, instead, the most cool and collected.

The battle team manager laughed and said, “Yes, Xiang Yu’s wife is here~”

Since Xiang Yu’s cat-lover persona was established, everyone had been calling Xiao Naofu his wife.

Xiang Yu walked toward the training room outside aloofly.

In the spacious living room, Li Jianyu and others had set up their equipment and happened to see Xiang Yu.

The livestream was extremely lively.

——[Ahh, it’s Xiang Yu, Simao bro!]

——[Wow, I can’t even remember his English name anymore because you guys keep addressing him by his nickname.]

——[He looks so cool in black! Who would have thought that he’s a cat-loving maniac!?! UwU~]

…

After placing the cat bag on the ground, Li Jianyu unzipped it and Xiao Naofu popped its head out adorably.

Its pointed cat ears trembled while it stared straight at Xiang Yu with its clear sapphire-like pupils.

The young e-sports gaming expert paused in his tracks for two seconds and then walked over with one hand in his pocket.

He looked down from above at the white and soft, furry cat. “Xiao Naofu, listen up, nothing can be accomplished without rules and standards. Cats ought to behave like cats.”

“First, you must eat at your designated area, no climbing onto the table.”

“Second, sleep on your own bed, no climbing onto other beds.”

“Third, every player here is very busy so you are not to disturb them during this intensive training period. Fourth…”

After listing more than ten rules, Xiang Yu finally stopped and said coldly, “Do you remember it now?”

Xiao Naofu meowed obediently.

‘Yes…’

In fact, Xiao Naofu thought, ‘Hah, you’re just in charge of scooping this huhu’s litter, how dare you throw your weight around? Do you believe that I’ll overwhelm you with the stench of the smelliest poop I’ve ever excreted!?!’

After letting out a tender meow, it pounced right onto Xiang Yu’s chest!

‘Oh~ It’s so adorable~~~’

In the next second…

Xiao Naofu jumped onto the dining chair nimbly and then onto the dining table. It then clawed at the plastic bag containing the food that had just been delivered with its chubby paws. After sniffing it a few times out of curiosity, it pushed the food away in disdain.

‘(ˉ▽￣～) Psht~ It can’t compare to the food that that silly woman makes at all.’

It sat on the dining table and tilted its head to look at Xiang Yu.

Li Jianyu said, “Smog, Xiao Naofu is too mischievous, get it to come down.”

Maintaining a straight face, Xiang Yu picked up the takeout plastic bag and said righteously, “I haven’t had time to buy it a cat tree. The table shall suffice for now.”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded.

With raised brows, Xiang Yu looked at his teammates who had come out too and said, “Hey, what are you guys looking at? It’s not a must to eat at the dining table, right?”

His teammates were dumbfounded.

‘Whom did you set those rules for?!’

chapters.title: Chapter 257 - Diary Of The Cat Slave (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 257 - Diary Of The Cat Slave (2)

…

Two minutes later.

At the e-sports gaming base, the group of young boys were seated cross-legged on the floor next to the dining table, each holding a container of food.

Xiao Naofu occupied the entire table, with an open can of deluxe meat, a bowl of hot goat milk, and a few small dried fish in front of it.

In the livestream:

——[As expected of Brother Simao, his cat slave attributes have been exposed!]

——[Xiao Naofu: I heard you want to set some rules for me, what rules?]

——[Hahahahaha, I’m laughing so hard that even the geese in the yard screamed loudly with me]

Some netizens also criticized.

——[Am I the only one who thinks there is something wrong with Xiang Yu? Cats are just animals, why did he spoil it and let it get on the table?]

——[Exactly, don’t the other contestants mind? He’s so selfish, he doesn’t spare a thought for their feelings at all!]

…

At this moment, Xiao Naofu was scalded by the goat’s milk.

It meowed in a coquettish voice, sounding extremely aggrieved.

In an instant, Captain Wander stood up and walked over quickly.

He coaxed, “Ah, did my little baby get burned? Come on, have some canned food. I’ll cool the goat milk under the air conditioner for you.”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

The healer, Ah Shui, knocked his chopsticks against the food container and hollered furiously, “Smog, that’s not the way to take care of Xiao Naofu! If you can’t, let me do it instead!”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

Mage Little Sheep leaned against the edge of the table and looked at Xiao Naofu. He said, “Xiao Naofu, Brother Simao is a jerk. Come sleep at my place tonight, alright? I’ll warm you up.”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

Xiang Yu was speechless. “Hey, stay far away from it! Don’t scare him!”

He picked up a small dried fish and fed it to Xiao Naofu. Xiao Naofu bit it and then rubbed its head against his palm while meowing coquettishly.

Meow~

Xiang Yu said with uncertainty, “You… Do you want a hug?”

Meow~

The young gaming god suppressed his excitement and pretended to be nonchalant as he picked the cat up.

The way he carried it was like the standard way to carry a baby.

All nestled in Xiang Yu’s arms, Xiao Naofu chewed on the dried fish while rubbing itself against him. It pulled Xiang Yu’s T-shirt down and revealed his defined collarbones.

Meow~ Meow~

Xiao Naofu was really obedient, and it seemed to be saying, “I love Xiang Yu the most.”

Xiang Yu raised his chin and looked around. “I’m sorry, this is my cat, don’t covet it.”

His teammates thought, ‘Look how smug you are! Is it a big deal that it’s your cat?’

‘This atrocious man who’s been chosen by the cat!’

Seeing this, the netizens were thoroughly amused.

——[Xiao Naofu is the favorite of the group!]

——[Shocking! Team Logic got enraged because…]

——[Pretentious Xiao Naofu: Director Li, you’re only in charge of sending me to the base. Leave the rest to me, there’s no man I can’t conquer!]

…

2:00 A.M.

After the training session ended, the players returned to their respective rooms to rest.

Each dorm room was a double room shared between two people. Xiang Yu and Wander were roommates.

The cat bed beside their beds was empty, and Xiang Yu turned to look at his bed…

The adorable Xiao Naofu was lying on the middle of the bed with its legs facing up, revealing its soft and round belly. It was snoring and sleeping soundly.

Wander decided to fan the flames. “Look, Xiao Naofu is being so disobedient. Not only did it climb up onto the bed, it’s snoring too! You’ve gone overboard!”

In the next second…

Xiang Yu glared daggers at him and lowered his voice while chiding assertively, “Lower your volume! Don’t disturb Xiao Naofu from sleeping!”

Wander:”…”

chapters.title: Chapter 258 - : Listen, Is That A Humane Thing To Say?
chapters.body:
Chapter 258 - : Listen, Is That A Humane Thing To Say?

“It must be that the cat bed is too small. If it wants to sleep on the bed, let it be.” Xiang Yu walked toward his captain’s bed and said, “I’ll sleep in your bed tonight, go next door and find someone to squeeze in with.”

“Why must I do that!?!”

“Because I don’t like to sleep with someone else,” he said coldly.

Wander was speechless.

‘Is that a humane thing to say?’

…

…

Meanwhile…

“All is Well Year Round” posted something on Weibo late at night, revealing a suicidal thought.

[All is Well Year Round: You guys have no idea how rare it is for people who have been in darkness for a long time to sometimes see a ray of light. Now, my world is engulfed by darkness again… Maybe, it’s time to end all this pain.]

The netizens, who were surfing the Internet late at night, hurriedly rushed to comfort her when they saw that.

——[Sis, don’t let your imagination run wild! You’re the cutest!]

——[Are you hungry? I’ll order you a snack, okay?]

——[You’re not diagnosed with depression, are you? Oh gosh, quickly go visit a doctor!!!]

…

“All is Well Year Round” sent several replies, sounding dejected and moody.

[I hate myself so much.]

[Maybe she’s the best for him.]

[But I’m still so worried about him, I’m worried that he’ll have a hard time. He’s my baby whom I pampered for such a long time, I really can’t bear to let him be aggrieved.]

She posted a photo which was surprisingly a photo of the city Shi Sui and Xiang Yi were headed to. She had also posted screengrabs of Xiang Yi’s failed attempts at booking an accommodation in that city because all the hotels were fully booked due to an upcoming food festival.

The fans were enraged.

——[Ahhh, she can’t even get a simple thing like booking airline tickets, can that bitch book rooms at a hotel!?!]

——[The thought of Shisui boarding a long-haul flight of more than ten hours and landing in a foreign country, only to have no available accommodation really pains me. Does he really have to sleep in the airport?]

——[I also heard some insider information from Xing Chen Entertainment that the Vase Fairy took the initiative to be Shisui’s assistant! He didn’t turn her down out of courtesy back then but she shouldn’t take advantage of his gentleness to hurt him, right?]

…

A night later…

The netizens who woke up early habitually logged onto Weibo, only to see that “All is Well Year Round” was on the hot search list. Hence, many clicked on her name.

When they saw the things she posted and the strange comments left below, everyone was dumbfounded.

Xiao Hua was a white-collar worker who wasn’t quite interested in the entertainment industry, but she developed a good impression of Xiang Yi after watching “Two Under One Roof” for two days.

Hence, she couldn’t help but leave a comment too. [Uh, even if they can’t book a hotel, they can still make do with sleeping in the plane… Are you guys over-thinking?]

To her surprise, “All is Well Year Round” liked her comment.

[[He deserves the best in this world. You’re clueless. (smiles)]

That brief comment sparked a wave of criticism and hate that was inflicted on Xiao Hua by some fans.

——[Haha, is she Vase Fairy’s lackey who’s trying to clear her name for her?]

——[Stop it, her reputation will never be cleared. You can kneel down now.]

——[Why should Shisui suffer because of her? She has to compromise since she was the one who asked to be his assistant in the first place.]

At first, Xiao Hua also tried to reason with them, but she realized that it was impossible to reason with those people.

“…”

After being scolded for an entire day, Xiao Hua had been in low spirits as she felt that her mood had been ruined.

She was speechless about the behavior of the cyber-bullying fans of “All is Well Year Round”.

In the next second, she received a text from her best friend who was abroad.

——[I’m shocked. I saw a private plane landing on the top floor of Atlant Hotel on my way to school! It’s that ostentatious seven-star hotel I told you about! Poverty has really restricted my imagination!]

chapters.title: Chapter 259 - Seven-Star Hotel!
chapters.body:
Chapter 259 - Seven-Star Hotel!

They were still a few stops away so Xiao Hua began texting her best friend enthusiastically when she was in the carriage of the subway.

[Xiao Fafa]: !!!

[Xiao Fafa]: Even during the off-peak season of tourism, the cheapest hotel room still costs several thousand yuan. All the rooms are two-storey suites with paintings of that hotel, right?

[I Love Hotpot]: Yes! There are different types of suites, such as the Royal Suite, the Presidential Suite, and so on. It’s just like that TV series we used to watch; there are butlers, chefs, and waiters who are all serving a single person!

[I Love Hotpot]: Ooooh, there are rabbit ears on the exterior of this airplane, they’re so pretty! Sis, quickly become a rich woman and make me your sugar baby!! I want a pink plane, too!

[I Love Hotpot]: [picture]

“So cute…” Xiao Hua lamented emotionally and as she swiped her finger across the screen to select an emoji, she suddenly thought of something and tapped on the photo that her best friend had sent to her. She zoomed in all the way on the photo, only to see the word on the airplane.

RABBIT!

‘Air Bunbun!?!’

‘Isn’t that the private jet that Xiang Yi and Shi Sui have boarded?’

Xiao Hua was stunned!

She switched to the interface of Weibo and uploaded the photo onto the comments section of the page belonging to “All is Well Year Round”.

She added a sarcastic remark—[No way, seriously? Do you guys only select four-star and five-star hotels? Have you forgotten that the world’s one and only seven-star hotel is in A City? The top floor of the hotel comes with its own helipad, a sky restaurant, an underground ocean tunnel that connects to seafood restaurants, and submarine transport options~ The life of a rich and beautiful girl is just so simple and grounded. *dog emoji* *dog emoji*]

The photo was that of Air Bunbun landing on the top floor of the hotel.

After the comment was posted…

——[????????]

——[Seven-star hotel? What story are you making up!?! Hah!]

——[Damn… I’ve checked and this hotel really exists. The Presidential Suite that costs six figures a night has been booked…]

The fans were dumbfounded.

They pretended to have not seen it and didn’t reply for four hours.

“We have arrived at North City West Station. Passengers who are alighting, please take your belongings with you and exit through the left door of the cabin…”

The announcement of the arrival of the subway sounded, and Xiao Hua alighted, feeling all refreshed and energetic.

‘Feels wonderful to get back at them!’

She looked down and followed Xiang Yi on Weibo with a joyous smile on her face.

…

In the suite.

Xiang Yi had taken a nap during the flight so she wasn’t sleepy now. She pulled out her cell phone and sent her family a text message.

Third Brother Who Replies Immediately: [I’ve prepared the dress that you’re going to need for your photoshoot! See you at the castle tomorrow!]

The castle was the location for tomorrow’s shoot.

Xiang Qi’s studio was just nearby. After arriving last night, he had a flash of inspiration and worked together with his ten-odd assistants to put together three dresses.

The magazine firm had always been cordial toward him so when they heard that he had designed three new dresses, he was extremely agitated.

That was Hades’ return to the fashion world after a year-long hiatus!

Hence, the magazine firm immediately decided to feature Hades’ designs for the cover shoot.

Xiang Yu also replied very quickly. Apart from reminding her to take care of herself, he also sent nine photos of Xiao Naofu along with a video of it too…

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Looking at the chubby Xiao Naofu whose fur was flat and limp in the video, Xiang Yi sighed, wondering if Xiao Naofu would become obese before it became bald or the other way round under Xiang Yu’s care.

Her second brother didn’t answer so she thought that he was probably busy.

However, her uncle made a video call to her.

“Xiang Yi, Tantan is in A City too. Do you want to go meet him after you’re done with the cover shoot?”

chapters.title: Chapter 260 - His Bark Is Worse Than His Bite
chapters.body:
Chapter 260 - His Bark Is Worse Than His Bite

‘Am I…in the same city as Big Brother!?!’

Xiang Yi was a little confused.

“Xiang Chen just has a bark that’s worse than his bite…” Xiang Feng paused for a while before continuing leisurely, “But he’s at least a decent human being in front of you. Don’t be scared, I’m here to back you up!”

Xiang Yi said, “Uncle, do you dare to join me…”

Xiang Feng was speechless.

He didn’t dare to. 🙂

“Hello? Hey— The signal is not very good, I’ll hang up now!!!”

He ended the video call.

Xiang Yi sighed and sat helplessly on the sofa in the living room, hugging her knees.

Of course she wanted to see her eldest brother and resolve the misunderstanding with him, but she was already afraid of him… and she currently had no knowledge of what ‘that person’ had done to Big Brother.

The unknown was the most terrifying.

After all, Xiang Chen was the devil who had been beating up his uncle and younger brother since he was a kid.

He was really good at fighting.

When she was bullied in kindergarten, her fourth brother was the first person she complained to and afterward, he went to her third brother, and later on her second brother got involved…

In the end, all four of them got bullied together…

They ended up in a devastated state.

In the end, her eldest brother, Xiang Chen, intervened and defeated the bullies before suavely taking his younger siblings home.

“What are you thinking about? Why do you keep sighing?” the man asked in a low and alluring voice.

Xiang Yi raised her head and looked at Shi Sui with glistening eyes.

The only person in this world who wasn’t afraid of Xiang Chen was…

The person right in front of her.

Xiang Yi raised her head to look up at him. “Shi Sui…”

Shi Sui asked calmly, “Yes?”

“Um… Do you want to catch up with my eldest brother over a meal? I remember that you two used to be quite close to each other…”

Shi Sui assented and asked, “Are you scared of Xiang Chen?”

“…”

“What should we do? I’m a bit scared of him too.”

“Well… forget it then…”

“However, if I’m accompanying you, I won’t be scared anymore,” Shi Sui said with a smirk and a warm gaze in his eyes.

Xiang Yi leaped down from the couch and exclaimed in surprise, “You’re so nice!”

Seeing how delighted she was, Shi Sui smiled.

…

The two of them had lunch in the underwater seafood restaurant which was separated from the blue and clear seawater by a layer of glass. They were surrounded by corals and marine creatures that swam past from time to time. It was as romantic as a fairytale.

The food served was delicious, especially the first appetizer. Smelling the unique aroma of the food, Xiang Yi murmured with uncertainty, “Seaweed?”

It was a type of seaweed that she had seen before in a certain fast-paced world with advanced medicine. The seaweed was not edible raw, but it could be used as a spice after some processing.

The most important thing was that it had medicinal value!

Hence, when the chef came out to interact with the patrons, Xiang Yi asked him which ingredient of the dish was contributing to the unique aroma.

Hearing her calmly report the names of the ingredients and seasonings used, and even the cooking technique, the chef’s eyes widened in shock.

‘What… What an amazing sense of taste she has! She managed to tell so much about the ingredients after just taking a bite?’

However, the excellent head chef wasn’t stingy with sharing about the recipe of his dish. After all, it had been tested and proven that the dishes served at an elite restaurant could not be replicated entirely even if one were to strictly follow the original recipe.

“Thank you for your generosity,” Xiang Yi immediately thanked the chef respectfully before sending the name of that seaweed to Xiang Li.

Perhaps, it could be a great medical discovery!

chapters.title: Chapter 261 - Tackling The Gourmet (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 261 - Tackling The Gourmet (1)

…

By the time Xiang Yi sent the message, she realized that she had neglected Shi Sui.

The gaze in his eyes was gentle and innocent, as if he wouldn’t be offended regardless of what she did.

However, the more he acted like this, the more Xiang Yi blamed herself.

“I’m sorry, I didn’t mean to ignore you…”

Shi Sui chuckled gently, his laughter like ripples that spread across the surface of the water of a tranquil lake under the sun. “As long as I’m with you, it doesn’t matter whether we talk or not.”

Xiang Yi agreed with him on that point.

Xiang Yi thought to herself, ‘Shi Sui is such a nice person. He’s not a picky eater, and he has a good temper too. We can have a long conversation about a single topic or simply stay silent and do our own stuff while enjoying each other’s presence. Spending time with him just feels so effortless and natural. It’s not awkward at all.’

“Shall we go back to the hotel then? I noticed that you didn’t sleep much on the plane. Do you want to take a nap and catch up on some sleep later?”

Shi Sui nodded slightly.

Xiang Yi got up and took two steps forward, but she was suddenly stopped by Shi Sui. “Xiang Yi, wait a moment.”

“Huh?”

When Xiang Yi turned around, the tip of her hair brushed against his jaw, making him feel like he was tickled by a feather.

“Can we take some pictures?” Shi Sui asked.

“Sure, I’ll stand a little farther away then. That’ll make your legs look longer…”

Shi Sui burst into laughter and seemed to be a little helpless. He pushed his gold-framed glasses with his finger and asked, “Shall we take a photo together?”

“Huh? Oh, okay…”

After handing her cell phone to the staff member, Xiang Yi stood beside Shi Sui.

The enthusiastic staff member said, “Closer, please. You two can stand closer to each other.”

Xiang Yi was still hesitating, but Shi Sui placed his arm around her shoulder in a natural manner and even held it tightly to lean closer to her.

Being held in his arms, Xiang Yi seemed to be somewhat at a loss but the staff member had already captured the photo.

Click!

He took several shots in a row before returning the cellphone to Xiang Yi.

They were both attractive and photogenic.

“Shall I send the photos to you?”

“Sure.”

While Xiang Yi looked through her contact list for Shi Sui’s contact number, Shi Sui saw the words ‘Zai Zai’ (means ‘son’ in Mandarin).

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Being exposed was the most ruthless.

“I’ll change it, I’ll change it right now,” Xiang Yi said as she typed the words ‘Shi Sui’ very quickly.

The first two words that popped up were ‘Shisui’ (a different pair of characters that mean “ten years old”, usually used to describe a childish person in this context), and she was about to backspace when Shi Sui hurriedly said, “Just this one will do.”

“Huh? But isn’t this the nickname that only your fangirls address you by…”

Shi Sui’s eyes flickered slightly, and he seemed languid and relaxed as he said in a draggy tone, “Is that so? I thought they gave me that nickname to make me seem younger.”

“…”

‘This logic seems to be correct too. Is it possible that men also care about age?’

The thought of this made Xiang Yi suddenly realize something.

‘Is Shi Sui… facing a mid-life crisis?’

In order to take care of his sensitive soul, Xiang Yi deliberately saved his contact as “Shisui” and even took the initiative to comfort him. “You’re very young in the first place.”

She lowered her head and did not notice that he had a triumphant and sinister smile on his face.

…

Back at the hotel, the magazine publisher sent a staff member over to receive them.

The creative director briefly chatted with the two about the proposal of the shoot for “The Princess and the Vampire” tomorrow.

“We’re going for a retro, luxurious vibe for this shoot tomorrow, and the makeup and outfit will be resplendent. The scene is set in a duke’s castle, which dates back to centuries ago…

Before he finished, the creative director’s cell phone rang. He quickly apologized and excused himself to pick up the call.

After ten seconds or so, his expression suddenly changed.

“What? The owner of the castle is not giving us permission to shoot in the castle?”

chapters.title: Chapter 262 - : Tackling The Gourmet (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 262 - : Tackling The Gourmet (2)

They didn’t know what the person on the other end of the phone had said, but the creative director was looking more and more distraught.

After hanging up the phone, he looked at Shi Sui and Xiang Yi with a forced smile that looked exceptionally awful.

“I’m afraid we have to make changes to our shooting plan.”

Xiang Yi asked, “Did something crop up?”

The creative director sighed and said, “In fact, we’re not in charge of the direct communication with the owner of this castle. We rented it through an agency.”

“Just now, the agent said that the viscount has tasted some Chinese dishes at the recent food festival and felt that they tasted horrible so he posted a slew of statements on his social media account to criticize Chinese food. He heard that the castle was rented to a Chinese person so…”

Xiang Yi was bewildered. Even in the previous worlds that she had transmigrated to, the Westerners were very receptive to Chinese food.

She asked curiously, “What food did he eat?”

The creative director searched for the viscount’s social media account and showed it to Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi glanced at his posts with raised brows and discussed with Shi Sui, “It seems that this viscount is a gourmet.”

All his stories and posts were related to food.

The food pictures that he took were beautiful, and his captions were written very tastefully.

He would sing praises about the food that he enjoyed, describing them with exaggerated phrases like “the ambrosial goodness bestowed by God”, “prepared by a chef whose hands have been kissed by the deities”, “the gift of nature” and many others.

On the other hand, if he found the food to be horrible, he would criticize it ruthlessly using nasty and sarcastic remarks like “the food is so bad that it tastes like stinky wet socks that have been drenched in the rain”, “I can barely stomach it, the best part of the meal turned out to be the lemonade”, and “I bet even a husky can whip up a better meal” which were shrewd and no holds barred.

His wealth was precisely the reason that his critic reviews were guaranteed to be absolutely impartial. Besides, he was extremely fussy and picky with his food, thus he was a famous gourmet who had garnered countless fans.

Many restaurants had a love-hate relationship with him. They liked that a single good review from him could attract a large crowd of customers, but, similarly, they hated that some criticism from him would cause their business to plummet.

When Xiang Yi saw his scornful remarks and critical comments, her beautiful eyebrows furrowed into a frown.

“These… are at most modified dishes, right?”

Shi Sui said, “They seem to be awful dishes made of weird combinations of food.”

‘That’s an understatement.’

‘It’s like food prepared by a devil.’

The combinations of ingredients were absolutely bizarre and as revolting as peppers paired with ice cream would be.

The creative director’s spirits were dampened as he froze in place, no longer motivated to fight for a chance to shoot in the castle. However, he suddenly heard Xiang Yi ask in a warm voice, “Can you contact the viscount? I think we can try convincing him.”

The creative director smiled bitterly and said, “This matter is not something that can be settled just with some effort. The viscount has an eccentric personality, and nothing will please him except for top-notch food…”

Xiang Yi said seriously, “I want to give him a real taste of authentic Chinese cuisine.”

The creative director hesitated before asking, “Do you know any Michelin chefs? If you do, we might have a chance…”

Xiang Yi shook her head and said, “I don’t know any Michelin chefs, but I know how to cook.”

The creative director was disappointed, but he couldn’t bring himself to turn down Xiang Yi, the adorable beauty. Hence, he had no choice but to fake a smile and say, “I can try to contact him.”

Shi Sui found a clip of “Two Under One Roof” in which Xiang Yi was cooking up a feast of delectable dishes.

Out of courtesy, the creative director played the video…

…

Five minutes later…

The creative director exclaimed in shock, “Oh God! It’s so interesting! Let me watch it again! Let me watch it once more!”

chapters.title: Chapter 263 - : Tackling The Gourmet (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 263 - : Tackling The Gourmet (3)

…

After watching the video thrice, the creative director was completely shocked.

His eyes were glistening when he looked at Xiang Yi.

In the past, he used to admire Xiang Yi the way that one would when admiring beautiful things…

However, he was now full of awe.

His gaze was reverent.

Even though he hadn’t tasted the food she had cooked before, he felt that the cooking process and plating were simply like art!

Their culture may be different.

However, the pursuit for beauty, which is part of human nature, is universal.

In other words, at this time, Xiang Yi did not conquer him with the delicious taste of the food she had cooked but with how it looked!

Xiang Yi said, “In this case, I’m counting on you to contact the viscount.”

The creative director patted his chest and exclaimed, “No problem, you can count on me!”

…

Even though he was the creative director of a top-notch international magazine, getting the contact information of the lord viscount still took him some effort.

The creative director originally wanted to trim the five-minute video a little shorter so that the viscount could see how appealing it was right away.

However…

After watching the video again and again, he felt that every single dish in the video was incredibly beautiful regardless of whether it was stir-fried, braised, boiled, cooked, or decorated with flower petals!

He gritted his teeth and decided not to trim the video at all!

He first had a conversation with the viscount, during which he spoke to him very courteously, then he sent the video to the latter right after. He then waited anxiously for a reply.

…

…

At a certain Michelin two-star restaurant.

Restaurants can receive one to three Michelin stars; and this particular restaurant was awarded two Michelin stars last year, which brought about brisk business for them.

The head chef had fallen ill recently and was replaced by the sous chef, which caused some of the customers to be displeased.

However, no one expected that the viscount would dine at that restaurant. The owner of the restaurant immediately panicked and ordered the chef to serve the viscount with food made of the best and freshest ingredients. On the other hand, he also hurried to the wine cellar to get a bottle of fine red wine.

The appetizer was served, followed by the starters, and then the main dish… The viscount looked increasingly displeased as each dish was served.

When dessert was finally served, he took only a small spoonful of it and no longer touched it again.

The current head chef hurried out in a panic and asked fearfully, “Sir, how do you find the dishes served today?”

The viscount remarked shrewdly, “There’s nothing else to offer except expensive ingredients and gorgeous plating. Even the dessert has been sprinkled with edible gold leaf, but the taste is just awful! The red wine that was paired with the meal didn’t go well with the food at all! The tastes couldn’t complement each other and become one but instead gave the dishes an astringent taste!”

“The criterion for two Michelin stars is a restaurant that is ‘worth the long journey’, and the culinary skills of the head chef have to be excellent.”

“However, in my opinion, the food served today is worse than fast food!”

The chef looked ashamed and hung his head low.

When he saw the viscount pull out his cell phone, the owner, who was standing near him, felt like he was about to pass out.

‘Oh no, this is the end for the restaurant!’

To his surprise…

The viscount seemed to have opened a video on his cell phone, and his eyes suddenly widened after watching for a few seconds disinterestedly. He then focused his attention entirely on the video.

Those five minutes were undoubtedly a trial for the chef and the restaurant owner.

The corners of the viscount’s mouth curled up into a smirk, and he got up to leave in a hurry.

After waiting for a while, they still hadn’t seen any negative reviews about their restaurant from the viscount on social media.

“Phew, there’s hope for our restaurant!” the owner said as he burst into tears of joy. He finally realized that the test of the food should be the priority concern of a restaurant. He declared, “Let’s close the restaurant temporarily until our chef has recovered!”

…

On the other hand…

“What? A livestream of me cooking?”

chapters.title: Chapter 264 - Tackling The Gourmet (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 264 - Tackling The Gourmet (4)

Xiang Yi was a little surprised.

“That’s right, this is a request from the viscount. He wants to watch the cooking process of the delicacies and…” The creative director hemmed and hawed, unable to finish what he wanted to continue saying.

Xiang Yi asked, “What’s the matter? Do you have any other requests?”

“He wants you to aim to reach one million viewers for the livestream on MOON.”

The creative director felt that this request was too unreasonable because MOON was a livestream platform from France, where livestreams were less popular. Besides, most of the users of MOON were locals, so one million viewers was quite a staggering number.

If it was a livestream hosted by local celebrities instead, it might be possible to achieve one million viewers; but Xiang Yi and Shi Sui were not well-known in other countries. How could they possibly achieve it?

The viscount was obviously out to make things hard for them!

‘His personality is not just eccentric, he’s simply perverted!’

Shi Sui asked with his eyebrows raised, “One million?”

The creative director answered with a miserable expression, “Yes, why don’t we find another venue to shoot at? There’s quite a nice winery estate that I know of, but we might have to change our shooting plan…”

Xiang Yi and Shi Sui looked at each other. Shi Sui was smiling, while Xiang Yi was deep in thought

“Are you sure he just wants us to garner a million viewers? Nothing else?”

“This is already a task that’s impossible to achieve. If he has any other requests, the viscount would really be inhumane!”

To his surprise, Xiang Yi nodded calmly and said, “That’s good.”

In fact, garnering one million viewers was a difficult task for most people. Xiang Yi felt that she couldn’t do it because she didn’t seem to have many fans.

However, there was Shi Sui who had plenty of fans.

Shi Sui said, “Please help us prepare the equipment to be used for the livestream.”

The creative director sighed and said, “Alright.”

‘This poor hunk and beauty are probably going to suffer a huge blow! How pitiful.’

…

The livestream had begun.

The creative director used his connections and asked several friends of his to help share the link of the livestream, so that there would at least be a few viewers.

The current number of viewers in the MOON livestream they were hosting was 579.

It may not be considered a huge number in China, but it’s not too bad in France.

The creative director didn’t forget to send a copy of the link to the livestream to the viscount.

More than ten seconds later, a notification popped up on his phone. It turned out that the viscount had shared the link to the livestream with his personal account.

Soon, the number of viewers of the livestream surged to 3,804.

The creative director exclaimed, “Unbelievable!”

‘The viscount is truly worthy of being a famous gourmet! He’s so influential!’

Shi Sui said, “Let me share the link on Weibo.”

Xiang Yi said, “I’ll reblog your post. It’s too troublesome to type.”

Although he didn’t understand what the two were saying, the creative director smiled bitterly when he watched the pitiful Shi Sui fiddle with his cellphone, while the equally pitiful Xiang Yi tapped twice on her cellphone screen. He had heard that celebrities in China tend to have massive numbers of fans each, but he didn’t know many fans the both of them could influence to watch the livestream.

‘Ten thousand? Or maybe twenty thousand at most,’ he thought.

The creative director closed his eyes, and when he opened them again, he abruptly froze in shock.

The number of viewers had surprisingly soared to 205,864!

The creative director was dumbfounded.

‘Are my eyes playing tricks on me? Or am I hallucinating?’

‘How did the number of viewers suddenly multiply into more than two hundred thousand!?!’

It took him half a minute to confirm that the number of viewers was really above two hundred thousand!

However, the numbers seemed to be stagnating.

In the next second…

The number, which had been stagnant for a long time, was refreshed.

A string of numbers appeared, almost blinding the creative director!

Current number of viewers: [5,976,531]!

chapters.title: Chapter 265 - The Culinary God, Xiang Yi
chapters.body:
Chapter 265 - The Culinary God, Xiang Yi

‘Almost six million viewers?’

‘How is this possible?!!!’

Even for the livestreams of the top star-studded awards ceremonies in France, the total number of viewers would only be about ten million.

‘Yet, these two good-looking foreigners managed to garner almost six million viewers, just a few minutes into the livestream?’

‘It’s fake… It must be fake…’

The creative director was worried, and he wondered if the both of them had hired a hacker to edit the number of viewers in the livestream to satisfy the viscount’s requirement.

‘Such an unprofessional trick will definitely be discovered!’

The phone screen suddenly turned black and immediately afterward, there was a glitch in the livestream app that caused an auto-exit!
