The creative director froze. He wondered with a guilty conscience, ‘Could it be…that the lie has been exposed so our livestream was blocked by MOON?’

He tapped the chat window with the viscount and tried to redeem himself, but before he could think of a good way to phrase his words, the viscount had calmly sent him a message.

[The developer of MOON Live have arranged for the computer programmers to fix the app.]

The creative director was puzzle. ‘Repair? What’s there to repair?’

Soon, MOON Live released an official statement that cleared the creative director’s doubts.

[Moon Live] : “Due to the abnormally high traffic of the website, the app server has crashed and is currently undergoing maintenance. Dear users, please temporarily use the web version of MOON to access the live-streams. We deeply apologize for the inconvenience caused.”

The creative director was dumbfounded and speechless.

He looked a little dazed and he thought, ‘So the numbers were real?’

When he came back to his senses again, he was flabbergasted!

The way he looked at Xiang Yi and Shi Sui changed immediately too.

‘Are these two using a bug!? They managed to garner so many fans to watch their livestream!’

Little did he know, while Shi Sui was indeed influential enough to garner such a high traffic volume, Li Jianyu and Xiang Feng had also contributed to the massive amount of viewers by helping with the promotion of the livestream.

When he saw Shi Sui’s and Xiang Yi’s post on Weibo, Li Jianyu shared the link to the livestream using the official account of “Two Under One Roof”, thus influencing numerous fans of the show to flock to the livestream.

Xiang Feng was even more straightforward. There was a strategic cooperation between Starry Live and MOON Live in the first place. Besides, as Xiang Yi’s uncle, he had to show his niece some support.

Hence, not only did he share the link on Weibo, he even posted the link on the web page of Starry Live, which would take a user who clicks on it directly to the page of MOON Live.

The high traffic volume that was resultant of the combined efforts of a few parties actually caused the livestream on MOON Live to crash for many users.

Fortunately, the livestream was still accessible and somewhat playable on the web version, though there were some glitches and lags here and there.

All the necessary equipment had been fully set up in the Presidential Suite. Xiang Yi was standing in front of the clean and spacious counter top and preparing the food ingredients with her head hung low, while Shi Sui helped her out with simple tasks. On the other hand, he was also chatting with the viewers of the livestream. He was truly a dedicated livestream host.

“Good afternoon,” Shi Sui said with a warm and gentlemanly smile as he interacted with the audience bilingually.

The comments in the live-stream were popping up rapidly:

——[Ahhhh, Brother Shi Sui is so dedicated to his work! He’s hosting a livestream even when he’s overseas!]

——[Has he been sponsored by MOON Live? Brother Shisui is really famous! He’s a mega celebrity no matter where he goes!]

——[Xiang Yi, it’s been hard on you in the mortal world today! You look so ethereal and fairy-like in that little floral dress! Uwu~]

——[Are her knife skills real? Wow, impressive, Xiang Yi, come help us chop up our food ingredients in the kitchen of our hotel.]

——[Hahahaha, you want Xiang Yi to help you cut the ingredients? Are you serious?]

There were also some comments from curious foreign viewers.

——[Are they going to cook Chinese cuisine?]

——[Oh, I hate Chinese food the most. They’re so greasy and weird, I doubt any humans would like Chinese food.]

——[Are they a married couple? They seem to share a good chemistry, and they look very loving too.]

…

Everyone watched as Xiang Yi, the young, bare-faced beauty, calmly placed the ingredients into the pot…

The first dish to be cooked was spicy stir-fried chicken!

chapters.title: Chapter 266 - : The Culinary God, Xiang Yi (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 266 - : The Culinary God, Xiang Yi (2)

After the oil was hot enough, she added the dried chilies, Chinese peppercorn, onion, ginger, and other seasonings to the oil and began to sauté them. Xiang Yi had prepared the seasoning at home, and she originally intended to use it for cooking for her third brother. She didn’t expect it to come in handy now.

The chilies were grown from seeds cultivated by Little Rabbit Farm and the Agricultural Science Institute. Not only were they spicy, they were also fragrant and best used for making chili oil.

The chicken had been processed beforehand so all Xiang Yi had to do was cut it into small pieces and then coat it in cornstarch and wine. She then placed the coated pieces of chicken onto the pan and stir-fried them with some burning hot chili oil.

Xiang Yi merely tossed the pieces of chicken twice with the ladle and yet, those simple actions of hers caused the netizens who were watching the livestream to exclaim in amazement.

——[Is that a Chinese culinary technique? Cool!]

——[Jesus! She’s so slim, but she’s actually so strong?]

——[Oh, I feel like she can cast magic spells. Is this oriental witchcraft? Why am I salivating?]

…

During the last step, she added some dried chilies, soy sauce, and sugar before stir-frying the pieces of chicken until they were fully cooked. Finally, it was time for the dish to be plated!

The viscount had arrived at the hotel. Every dish that was prepared was delivered to his table as quickly as possible by a specific waiter.

The second dish was West Lake fish in vinegar gravy.

Since there wasn’t any grass carp available, Xiang Yi decided to use cod that weighed about 750 grams instead.

In the preparation of West Lake fish in vinegar gravy, heat control was an extremely important factor. Even professional chefs had messed up before when preparing this dish, but Xiang Yi remained calm and it took her only a few seconds to cook the fish to an appropriate texture.

The essence of this dish was the sweet and sour sauce that would be made with fish broth, sugar, rice vinegar, soy sauce and starch, which would form a thick gravy when put together. Xiang Yi poured the gravy slowly over the fish and sprinkled some minced ginger for garnishing.

The third dish was Wensi tofu, which was a type of soup containing finely shredded tofu.

Xiang Yi simmered shredded mushrooms, asparagus and ham in chicken broth, and after it was brought to boil, the finely shredded tofu was added. It required excellent skill to be able to make fine and elaborate cuts in the soft, silken tofu.

The fourth and the fifth dishes…

Xiang Yi was extremely fast with the preparation of the large variety of dishes. By multitasking, she managed to whip up two or three dishes at a time.

The netizens, who were shocked at first, began breaking into hysterics…

——[Ahhhh, I’m starving, Xiang Yi, stop! I’ve already gained several pounds!]

——[Why did Xiang Yi cook so many famous delicacies today? I’m having such bad cravings for those dishes that I’m about to cry]

——[The livestream today smells heavenly… Ahem, it’s so entertaining! Xiang Yi’s culinary skills are superb!]

——[Before watching the livestream: I’m not going to eat, I’m not hungry, I have to lose weight. I don’t have any desire for food. After watching the live-stream: Argh! I’m going to order some takeout now!]

——[Heh, I’ve already cooked a bowl of instant noodles for myself a long time ago. The sooner I eat, the sooner I get to enjoy, get it?]

On the other hand, the foreign netizens were extremely stunned and fascinated by Chinese cuisine!

They were surprised to find that there were so many culinary techniques…

It turned out that there were so many different types of food combinations…

They were surprised to find that Chinese cuisine could be so fine and exquisite…

——[Why does every dish look so delicious?!]

——[Mysterious oriental girl! Magical Chinese cuisine!]

——[Could it be that the Chinese cuisine I ate previously wasn’t authentic? It’s not the same as the dishes that this little genie has cooked!]

——[Honey, will you cook a dish for me? I’d give you all that I have!]

…

When Xiang Yi lifted the lid of the last dish…

Piping hot and aromatic steam wafted up from a pot containing boiling hot soup.

It was a famous and classic Chinese dish—Buddha Jumps Over the Wall.

It was a dish made of abalone, sea cucumber, pork tendons, scallops, cuttlefish and other sumptuous ingredients that were put together in a pot and simmered with broth and aged wine.

The broth was glistening and rich but not greasy. The ingredients were tender and glossy.

The netizens felt as if they could smell the heavenly aroma of the soup through the screen, which went straight to their heart…

*stomach rumbling*

At this moment, countless netizens of all nations were keeping their eyes glued to the screen!

chapters.title: Chapter 267 - Is This Your Sister?
chapters.body:
Chapter 267 - Is This Your Sister?

The ‘Buddha Jumps Over The Wall’ was served to the viscount.

At this moment, the number of viewers of the live stream exceeded 9 million, which was a staggering number!

“Okay, that’s all for today.” Xiang Yi was about to untie her apron when she realized that the creative director, as well as the staff members, were all drooling…

There was no other reason.

It was entirely because the dishes were just too fragrant!

Unlike the netizens who were watching the live stream, their sense of smell had been stimulated while they were watching the preparation of the delectable dishes!

What’s worse than delicacies that you can see but not eat, is smelling the aroma of them without getting a chance to savor them!

Xiang Yi said, “Give me a moment guys, I’ll cook some food for you.”

There were lots of food ingredients left. With her incredible cooking speed, Xiang Yi managed to whip up a few dishes in the blink of an eye. She even prepared some hand-pulled noodles topped with braised beef and vegetables, which was a simple but appetizing fare.

In the live stream:

—— [This beats the famous beef noodles by the renowned chef, Master X! Look how much meat Xiang Yi has added to each bowl of noodles!]

—— [I really want to eat those delicacies she cooked just now, as well as the simple fare she has just prepared! Xiang Yi is truly a Culinary God!!]

—— [Oh God! I seem to have really been bewitched by some witchcraft! I’ve already eaten two burgers, three slices of cheese, and a plate of macaroni but I’m still so hungry!!!]

…

“Oh, right, I’ve made this too.”

Xiang Yi took out the milk pudding that she had prepared in advance, from the refrigerator. After being left to chill for some time, the pudding had already solidified and taken shape. The light yellow pudding was jiggly and bouncy. Xiang Yi drizzled a layer of caramel over the pudding and decorated it with some sliced strawberries and mango before handing it to Shi Sui smilingly.

“There you go, this pudding is made with lesser sugar so it isn’t that sweet. You can have two!”

Shi Sui smiled and stared at her with an ambiguous gaze. He drawled, “Thank you, Xiang Yi, ~”

The live stream came to an abrupt end but the viewers who in the live-stream room who shipped Xiang Yi with Shi Sui, were exhilarated.

—— [They’re so sweet!!!]

—— [I’m shaking. Shi Sui and Xiang Yi are such a sweet couple!]

—— [She remembers his food preferences while she’s the apple of his eye and the only one he cares about. Ah, I can’t take this anymore, Doctor, save me! Quickly give me a shot of insulin!]

The foreign netizens were not familiar with Shi Sui and Xiang Yi. Hence, they immediately misunderstood something.

[Wow, what a blissful and loving couple.]

…

Xiang Yi distributed the remaining servings of the milk pudding.

After taking two mouthfuls of the pudding, the creative director finally realized that there was none left. He asked apologetically, “Alice, didn’t you save one for yourself?”

‘Alice’ is Xiang Yi’s English name.

Xiang Yi answered, “It’s alright, I can make some more when I’m craving milk pudding.”

The creative director gritted his teeth and bore with the agony as he said, “Well… In this case, I can share some with you. You may have this small portion here. I haven’t touched it yet…”

“I have one here,” said a deep, mellow voice that contained a trace of joy. Xiang Yi turned around to see that Shi Sui had given her a serving of pudding while holding onto another one.

Xiang Yi asked with curiosity, “Huh? Why haven’t you eaten any yet? Do you not have an appetite?”

Shi Sui answered slowly, “I was waiting for you so we can eat it together.”

“Oh…”

As the chef, she was often the last to eat.

The feeling of having someone wait for her…was quite pleasant.

She looked down and smiled a little.

…

In the presidential suite next door.

*Flashback*

Viscount Albert Howard was chatting with his best friend who was seated across the room, while enjoying the live-stream that was projected onto the wall.

“Chen, is this your sister?”

The man seated opposite him was dressed in a bespoke black suit and his hair was combed back neatly.

When he got a clear glimpse of the contours of his face, the hustle and bustle of the world seemed to have fallen silent immediately.

chapters.title: Chapter 268 - Real Delicacy
chapters.body:
Chapter 268 - Real Delicacy

The man’s features were handsome and chiseled. His eyes were dark, and he exuded a sharp, ascetic aura.

He glanced at the screen and said in a gentle voice, “Yes.”

It’s human nature to gossip, and Viscount Albert was no exception. “She seems to have changed a lot compared to last year.”

It was almost as if she had become a different person.

Viscount Albert had met Xiang Yi once last year.

At that time, Xiang Chen had used his connections to visit the most famous psychiatrist and neurologist in France.

At that time, Albert had quite a poor impression of Xiang Yi.

He thought that she was a materialistic, arrogant, rude, and foolish girl.

However, after looking at her today, he felt that she wasn’t as bad as he had thought.

After watching a snippet of “Two Under One Roof”, he initially wanted to nitpick on Xiang Yi and make things hard for her. But to his surprise, she managed to easily fulfill his condition of garnering at least one million viewers.

He wondered…how the dishes tasted.

As they spoke, the first dish was served.

“Chili?” Albert frowned. He was used to eating light, tasty and refreshing food as starters so he instinctively felt a little repulsed when he saw the chicken bites that were mixed with lots of red chilies.

‘But… what kind of chili is this? Why does it have such a mesmerizing aroma!?!’

Yes, Albert was a huge fan of spicy food and there were lots of photos of the various spicy dishes that he had tasted at many famous restaurants on his social media page.

The stir-fried spicy chicken bites on the plate were golden brown in color and garnished with red chilies and white sesame seeds. The fragrance of peppercorn wafted up to his nose…

Albert couldn’t help but poke his fork into a piece of chicken and stuff it into his mouth.

He inhaled sharply.

‘It’s so spicy!’

However, it wasn’t just spicy. On the contrary, there were several depths of taste to the rich flavor resulting from a perfect combination of numbing spiciness, fragrance, sweetness, saltiness… The multitude of flavors exploded at the tip of his tongue, making him feel a slight tingling sensation.

Spiciness was not just a taste but a painful sensation resulting from capsaicin being transmitted through neurotransmitters. However, it was mesmerizing and addictive.

This dish may not be the most perfect appetizer in Western cuisine.

However, for Albert, it was perfection!

Before he could marvel in amazement, the second dish was served.

West Lake fish in vinegar gravy.

There was smooth and glistening sweet and sour sauce drizzled all over a whole fish, which had been slit a few times in an elaborate manner to make the fins stay erect, resembling flower petals. Not only would doing so add a touch of aesthetic beauty to the fish, it would also enhance the flavor.

The fish was smooth, and the taste of the sweet and sour sauce was just right, neutralizing the spiciness of the previous dish. Sugar makes the brain produce large surges of dopamine and thus, after tasting the dish, Albert felt like his spirits had been lifted.

“Incredible! Has she been practicing cooking since she was a child!?”

Xiang Chen took a mouthful of the fish and said, “It’s so-so.”

‘What a heartless little girl. It’s been such a long time since she returned but she didn’t send me a single text. Yet, she keeps being so chummy with the other rascals and calling them ‘brother’ so affectionately.’

Ah. 🙂

Albert was flabbergasted!

‘They call me picky, but Chen is the pickiest eater in the world!’

Immediately afterwards, the finely shredded tofu dish was served. The fusion of tofu, bamboo shoots, shiitake mushrooms, ham and other ingredients provided an irresistibly delicious flavor that one will never get enough of, so much so that it was impossible to stop after just one bite.

Next, crimson and glossy braised pork belly that was tender but not mushy was served, followed by a light and refreshing medley of stir-fried vegetables; roasted squab that was coated in tempting grease; fresh and tender blanched vegetables…

Each and every dish was exquisite and delectable!

Albert was especially excited after the last dish, Buddha Jumps Over the Wall, was served. He was so worked up that his voice began to get shaky.

“For a restaurant to be awarded three Michelin stars, the dishes have to be prepared by a chef with impeccable culinary skills, and there must also be an exquisite selection of the best wine for pairing. The service has to be flawless, and guests have to be served in an extremely refined dining environment.”

“However, when it comes to true delicacies, nothing else is needed…”

“The food just has to be delicious!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 269 - You’Re Fully Fledged Now, Huh?
chapters.body:
Chapter 269 - You’Re Fully Fledged Now, Huh?

…

…

The livestream featuring Xiang Yi and Shi Sui that lasted for more than two hours had become viral on the social media platforms in France!

They shared it on numerous sites and platforms with a vast variety of fancy captions like “The Cuisine of the Mysterious East” and “After watching the livestream for five minutes, I was so hungry I could devour ten burgers in a row!”

The comments were shared on Weibo, and it instantly became a hot topic.

——[Damn! Xiang Yi and Shisui are incredible! They made it big overseas too!]

——[Oh, please, it has nothing to do with Xiang Yi. The majority of the viewers must be fans of Shi Sui, who’s so popular and influential.]

——[What did Shi Sui even do? He just chatted with them for a while, didn’t he? Are you blind? Did you not see the person who cooked the dishes!?]

——[This is so disgusting. Vase Fairy, please stop sucking Shisui dry, you’re leeching off him even when you’re overseas. Doesn’t doing so eat at your conscience?]

——[Hehe, of course it wouldn’t eat at her conscience—because she doesn’t have one.]

——[I’m confused. ??? Do you people really think Xiang Yi doesn’t have any fans? I’m sorry, but I watched the livestream for Xiang Yi’s sake.]

——[I’m laughing so hard. You call Xiang Yi a “vase” all the time, but in my opinion, Shi Sui is the true “vase”!]

——[???? I’m a fan who ships the two of them. *shivers* Why is the argument getting so heated…]

…

In fact, Shi Sui’s fans and Xiang Yi’s fans had long been at odds with each other, but Xiang Yi’s fans had always been relatively small in number. Hence, they didn’t really have much of a say. However, as “Two Under One Roof” got increasingly popular, Xiang Yi’s fan base grew visibly.

Furthermore, the Shisui Sisters, which was led by “All is Well Year Round”, kept kicking up a stir and trying to direct hate to Xiang Yi. Over time, Xiang Yi’s fans were fed up and full of resentment toward them. The matter this time could be considered the catalyst that triggered the heated dispute between the two fan bases.

Xiang Yi’s fans had been tolerating their unruly behavior, but now that they had gone all out, they could actually put up a fight and stood strong even after a few rounds of arguments, which was rather surprising.

…

In the Presidential Suite.

Unlike Viscount Albert, who was exhilarated and in a frenzy, Xiang Chen merely took a mouthful of each dish and the expression formed by his well-defined features remained indifferent. After taking a look at his wristwatch, he said without much emotion, “I have an appointment with someone, I’ll take my leave now.”

Albert’s cheeks were bulging because his mouth was full of food. He looked at Xiang Chen in disbelief and asked, “Chen, how did you manage to resist these appetizing and mouth-watering delicacies?”

‘Well…you’ll get used to it if you eat such food often 🙂 ‘

However, Xiang Chen didn’t bother to explain. The partner he was going to meet next was very important. If Albert hadn’t recognized the person in the video to be Xiang Yi and insisted that Xiang Chen taste the dishes together with him, he wouldn’t have wasted his precious time at all.

“Nothing can stop me from going to work,” Xiang Chen said aloofly.

“…”

As a loafer… Ahem, no, as a viscount who had inherited his title and his family’s glory, Albert felt offended.

‘Ah, Chen is a nice man and he’s perfect in every aspect, but he lacks a zest for life.’

‘Apart from work, there’s probably nothing he cares about in this world.’

Dressed in an immaculately-trimmed black suit, which was straight and taut because they were held up by his broad shoulders, paired with neatly ironed black trousers that covered his long legs, Xiang Chen strode out of the Presidential Suite.

*Buzz*

His cell phone vibrated.

He picked it up impatiently and glanced at the screen, only to see a text message notification.

[Little Rabbit Yiyi] : May…may I treat you to a meal?

[Little Rabbit Yiyi] : *location*

‘Ah, she didn’t even address me as her brother. She’s all grown up now, eh?

Xiang Chen, who was dressed smartly, stopped in his tracks and took his time to reply to her.

[I’m not free.]

chapters.title: Chapter 270 - Brother, I Will Inform Xiang Yi
chapters.body:
Chapter 270 - Brother, I Will Inform Xiang Yi

…

In the room next door.

Stuck in a dilemma, Xiang Yi deliberated over the emoticons and typed for a long time before sending the text message. After hiding her cellphone in a corner of the sofa and covering it with a pillow, she scurried to the side and gripped the corner of her clothes tightly on tenterhooks.

Amused by the sight of Xiang Yi’s shy behavior while burying her head in the sand, Shi Sui teased, “Xiang Yi, what are you doing?”

“It’s nothing much, I’m just getting some exercise,” Xiang Yi answered calmly as if she wasn’t the one who was clutching tightly at the corner of her shirt.

Shi Sui said, “Your cellphone is vibrating.”

“Is it?” Xiang Yi walked toward the sofa and paused in her tracks again. She carefully and hesitantly lifted the corner of the pillow, only to see the words “You have received a text from Big Brother.” on the screen of her cell phone. Her heart tensed up and began pounding rapidly.

She swore that she had never been this nervous, not even when she was taking her college entrance exams.

“Are you afraid to open the text?” Shi Sui asked with a smirk. “Why don’t I help you take a look?”

Xiang Yi asked after a moment of silence, “How much will you charge?”

“You can put it on credit.”

She seemed to be hesitating.

Shi Sui picked up the cellphone slowly and said, “Why don’t you take a look at it yourself then?”

Xiang Yi hurriedly took several steps back. “Okay, I agree!”

The evil Shi Sui, who had gotten his way, squinted in pleasure as he glanced at the text message in the chat window with the corners of his lips slightly raised.

‘Tsk, yet another arrogant one.’

“What did my Big Brother say?” Xiang YiTan asked nervously.

“He said he isn’t free.”

“Oh, I see…”

For some reason, she didn’t dare to read Xiang Chen’s reply. However, she seemed to be less terrified now that Xiang Chen had read it out for her.

To her surprise, Shi Sui continued to speak. He drawled in a casual tone of voice, “But, he said he’s in need of an on-flight meal during his flight back home.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Her eyes lit up, and she exclaimed, “I can prepare a meal for him! Help me reply to him!”

“The price for replying to his text is different from reading it aloud. Xiang Yi, are you sure you want to upgrade the service?” he asked, staring at the anxious young girl with joy in his beautiful eyes.

Since she already owed him a favor, she didn’t mind owing him another one. She nodded and agreed, “Yes.”

In the next second…

Shi Sui tapped and held his finger down on the voice message button on the screen while the cuffs of his sweater slid downward, exposing his wrist. His veins beneath the thin layer of his skin could be seen vaguely, adding a touch of asceticism and sexiness to his aura.

“Brother Xiang Chen, I’ll pass on your message to Xiang Yi. I hope you have a pleasant time working~”

Xiang Yi blinked and her long eyelashes fluttered. She vaguely felt that something seemed to be amiss.

She dawdled for a while before asking softly, “Why do you address him as ‘Brother’ with greater ease than I do…’

Shi Sui said innocently, “Xiang Chen is a few months older than me, to begin with. Shouldn’t I be calling him ‘Brother’ out of respect?”

“…”

‘That seems to make sense.’

Back in China.

Just as the Shisui Sisters and Xiang Yi’s fans were having a heated argument online, a famous food critic posted something on Weibo.

“[The Frugal One]: I’ve been trying to keep up with the times lately so I learned some of the lingo you youngsters are accustomed to. I don’t know if I’ve applied it correctly but just take it as a joke if I’m wrong.

The first thing I want to say is that I’m a huge fan of the Culinary God Xiang Yi @XiangYi even though I’m a lot older. I didn’t watch every single episode of “Two Under One Roof”, but I watched the cooking process of every single meal Xiang Yi made.

Most of you might pay more attention to her pretty face and her interaction with other men and such. However, what I want to say is, her culinary skills are far too underrated! The series of dishes that she has cooked can definitely represent the top standard of Chinese cuisine!

If I have to sum up her performance in the livestream overseas, I’d say it’s the epitome of beauty and delicacies!”

chapters.title: Chapter 271 - Putting To Shame
chapters.body:
Chapter 271 - Putting To Shame

That food critic had a beautiful style of writing, and he was so good at flattering Xiang Yi that he garnered many fans.

Once it was posted, Xiang Yi’s fans began sharing it and leaving comments on it happily.

Most of the Shisui Sisters were very rational and only a small portion of them began dissing sarcastically.

——[I’ve already reported your comment. Hehe, farewell.]

——[This is hilarious. It’s obviously a paid promotion, does anyone really believe it?]

——[How much did Vase Fairy pay you to suck up to her? Create a group and let us join you so that we can all earn some money together.]

—— [Do you have a problem? Don’t you have anything else to compliment about? What’s the big deal about knowing how to cook? I don’t know what’s so great about her cooking.]

Not expecting to have been slammed by the netizens, “The Frugal One” was dumbfounded and posted a few question marks in the comments’ section. Soon, the snarky Shisui Sisters began mocking him sarcastically again.

——[Oh, oh, he’s panicking, he’s panicking.]

——[They say that silly people are blessed by God, but fools aren’t~]

——[Seriously, does Vase Fairy really have fans? No way, it can’t be true.]

Just as “The Frugal One” was reading through the comment section of the post, a famous chef, who was also an influencer, shared his post and replied to it.

“[I’ll Cook For You]: From the perspective of a chef, I really take my hat’s off to this young lady. The first dish, stir-fried spicy chicken, is a classic Sichuan dish that consists of a blend of fragrant spices. It’s difficult to get the taste right. The second dish, West Lake fish in vinegar gravy, requires a good control of heat. The third dish of silken tofu requires excellent cutting skills that countless amateur chefs lack…

It can be said that she has displayed extraordinary skill in overcoming the difficulties of the preparation of each dish. For instance, stir-frying, which is the most common cooking technique, may seem relatively simple but it requires a perfect mastery of skills in moving the ladle, seasoning, and heat control. That alone would require years of training for ordinary chefs to master, not to mention the other aspects of cooking such as plating, the combination of ingredients, and adding touches of creativity to existing recipes of dishes…

Those who are not in this line of work may find the entire process entertaining, but chefs are bound to notice the superb culinary skills that this young lady has. I’m sure she’s the best among her peers and her skills are at the pinnacle!”

Xiang Yi’s fans: “Well said! Well said! Kudos!”

The Shisui Sisters: “Why is there yet another person who’s putting in a good word for her!? So irritating!”

The official account of “Chinese Delicacy Yearbook” released a statement on Weibo, which was full of praises for Xiang Yi.

“[Chinese Delicacy Yearbook]: She has extraordinary skills and excellent craft. She has given a perfect presentation of the various cooking techniques that are commonly used in the preparation of authentic Chinese dishes—deep-frying, cooking, stir-frying, stewing, boiling and roasting. This young and promising lady has done a wonderful job at promoting the traditional Chinese food culture. Neither arrogant nor subservient, she has humbly presented her skills with grace and elegance. Kudos to our “Culinary God” Xiang Yi!”

There were some people who mocked that statement at first.

——[What nonsense are you saying? You don’t make sense at all.]

——[Hey official user, are you feeling awkward? I’m getting secondhand embarrassment.]

—— [Vase Fairy has so few fans, but she went so far as to hire people to post such write-ups to flatter her.]

…

However, they were soon put to shame.

——[Sober up, this yearbook is far more impressive and prestigious than the Michelin Guide!]

——[Nonsense? Do you guys know that this is the definitive food guide in our country?]

——[Let’s just say, this is an esteemed magazine that releases only one issue annually. The restaurants and chefs that they have chosen to feature have all gained the recognition of the Chinese Chefs Association!]

In an instant, the Shisui Sisters who had been kicking up a fuss, were dumbfounded.

‘Is Vase Fairy…really such a good cook?’

On the other hand, Xiang Yi’s fans had their morale boosted and were incredibly proud of Xiang Yi!

——[Xiang Yi has done us proud!]

——[She’s just that outstanding and brilliant. Can’t help it.]

——[Shisui Sisters, please respect yourselves. You can never be worthy of Xiang Yi!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 272 - Pretentious Shisui
chapters.body:
Chapter 272 - Pretentious Shisui

…

Since Xiang Yi had received the recognition and praises from an official heavyweight culinary magazine, the Shisui Sisters had nothing to say even though they wanted to insult Xiang Yi further. Instead, they even got ridiculed.

Some of them were stomping their feet furiously, but some came to a sudden realization.

‘Ah…there are so many people who are praising Xiang Yi.’

‘Come to think of it, it seems… it seems that this woman is probably…quite brilliant.’

Many of Xiang Yi’s haters formed a new impression of her and had turned into her fans instead. After looking through the fan page that was full of fans shipping Xiang Yi and Shi Sui, they hopped onto the bandwagon too.

In France.

“Great! Viscount Albert has agreed to let us use his castle for the shoot!” the creative director exclaimed excitedly while holding his head with both hands.

Shi Sui said with a faint smile, “It’s been hard on everyone. Well done, guys.”

Xiang Yi said in a gentle tone, “We’ll count on you guys for tomorrow’s shoot.”

“Okay, I’ll make arrangements right now!”

The creative director left, as happy as a lark.

Shi Sui’s phone vibrated non-stop. He took it out, only to see that it was a call from a number that he didn’t recognize. With a slight frown on his face, he swiped his finger across the screen to decline the call.

‘Seems like my number got leaked.’

Feeling rather helpless, he had no choice but to turn off his phone for the time being.

Back in China.

“All is Well Year Round” used more than ten different phone numbers to call and text Shi Sui countless times, but he didn’t reply to a single one of them.

‘Why!!!’

‘Why is he not replying me?’

‘I adore him so much, and I spent a large sum of money for the sake of getting his phone number!’

Her eyes were full of maniacal obsession. At this moment, she borrowed her maid’s cellphone and tried to call Shi Sui again…

However, all she heard was a sweet but robotic voice.

“Hello, the user you have called has switched off his mobile…”

‘What? How can he switch off his cellphone!?!’

“All is Well Year Round” scratched her hair in frustration and roared in agony.

…

On the following day.

There had been heavy showers in the city lately, but the weather was fair today, which was rather rare.

The old but lofty and luxurious castle was located halfway up the mountain. Rays of extravagant and opulent glass mosaic windows and sculptures.

Shi Sui got out of the car and pulled the door open for Xiang Yi as a gentlemanly gesture.

He was chatting with Xiang Yi softly, but he was suddenly interrupted.

“Hey, Shi Sui, stay away from my sister!”

Xiang Yi looked up in surprise, only to make eye contact with Xiang Qi who was standing near him. “Brother!”

Xiang Qi was dressed so fashionably that he’d put a supermodel to shame.

He strode toward Xiang Yi and pulled her behind him. Staring at Shi Sui warily with his guard up, he barked, “You’re not allowed to speak to my sister!”

Shi Sui blinked and looked at Xiang Yi whose gaze was innocent and pitiful. He looked down, but he seemed to be talking to Xiang Qi. “Okay, I got it.”

He was a handsome, tall, and mature man. When he pulled the “puppy eyes” trick, it would work countless times better than when pretty boys did.

Who would be able to stand that!?!

Xiang Yi had indeed wavered. “Brother, be more polite to Shi Sui…”

Before Xiang Qi could answer, Shi Sui smiled faintly and somewhat bitterly. “It’s okay, I’ve already gotten used to it.”

Xiang Qi was speechless.

‘What on earth is happening? Didn’t this person use to be very arrogant!?’

“He’s not a good man!” Xiang Qi was extremely agitated. “Have you forgotten how he used to gang up with Xiang Chen against us!?”

Xiang Yi asked in confusion, “Oh, did he?”

Xiang Qi suddenly realized that the both of them would occasionally bully Xiang Li, sometimes himself and Xiang Qi, and most of the time, they would bully their Uncle Xiang Feng…

However, he had never bullied Xiang Yi before.

Shi Sui suddenly tugged Xiang Yi’s sleeve aggrievedly, which seemed somewhat pretentious and unlike his usual self.

He complained softly, “Xiang Yi, he badmouthed me…”

Xiang Qi was flabbergasted!

‘Damn it, why are you so two-faced?!’

…

Xiang Chen: I’m nice only to my little sister Xiang Yi.

Shi Sui: I’m acting like this, only in front of Xiang Yi.

chapters.title: Chapter 273 - Reincarnation Of A Male Vixen
chapters.body:
Chapter 273 - Reincarnation Of A Male Vixen

However, Xiang Qi felt that his little sister definitely wouldn’t fall for such a simple trap!

His eyes were full of provocation when he looked at Shi Sui.

‘Hah, so naive! Do you think Xiang Yi will believe you!?!’

To his surprise…

“Brother, Shi Sui is a very nice person. Try to get along well with him, okay?” Xiang Yi said sincerely as she tilted her tiny face upward and looked at Xiang Qi with a clear and solemn gaze.

Xiang Qi was speechless.

“Can’t you tell that he’s pretending!?” Xiang Qi was livid. He pushed Shi Sui before exclaiming, “If you don’t believe me, watch!”

When he provoked Shi Sui as a child, he was beaten up to the point that he climbed up a tree to avoid Shi Sui and even bawled loudly…

This time…

Shi Sui “staggered” and his body “swayed unsteadily” as he retreated by a few steps before finally regaining his balance “with great difficulty”. He pressed his thin lips together and felt even more aggrieved.

“Xiang Yi, look, he pushed me…”

“Brother! How can you do that!?!” Xiang Yi chided fiercely, though she wasn’t threatening at all.

Xiang Qi: !!!

‘I just gave you a little push! Must you be so weak!?!’

Shi Sui blinked innocently.

Xiang Qi was so furious that he couldn’t speak coherently anymore. “I… He… You… Ahhhh!!!”

…

Since it took a shorter time for men to get their hair and makeup done, Shi Sui had his solo shots taken first.

Xiang Yi was in the dressing room when she vaguely heard some screaming coming from outside.

Xiang Qi, who was making final alterations to his sister’s dress with a needle and thread, sneered and gibed, “He’s a playboy who’s not a decent man!”

Xiang Yi said, “Brother, you’re just prejudiced against Shi Sui.”

The phase glared at her. “Don’t you think he has a seductive face? I think he is the reincarnation of a male vixen!!!”

In short, in Xiang Qi’s eyes, Shi Sui was a scumbag!

“A vixen? He’s not that bad…” Xiang Yi muttered, defending Shi Sui softly.

…

By the time Xiang Yi had her makeup done and saw Shi Sui, she was stunned.

The shoot was ongoing, and there was a sumptuous spread of food on the long dining table that was covered with white cloth. The candles on the luxurious candelabra were burning, and the dim lighting added a touch of somberness to the atmosphere. However, it did not obscure Shi Sui’s presence.

The retro black suit accentuated his gentlemanly aura, and his tie was immaculately secured in place. He had fair complexion, and his brows seemed even darker and distinct after some light makeup was applied on them. There was a small rose painted right under the corner of his right eye, adding a touch of seduction to his features.

He was excellent in working with the camera, and it was as if he was starring in a vivid movie that had a captivating story.

As he pulled his tie to loosen it, he turned from a gentleman to a slightly sinister man as he pulled out a stalk of rose from the vase. He bit off a rose petal nonchalantly, staining his lips with the pink juice of the rose…

There was an overwhelming visual impact.

The photographer snapped numerous photos in a row as he pressed the shutter button continuously without stopping.

“Amazing!”

It was incredible!

Shi Sui was the most outstanding man he had photographed in all these years!

‘But…’

Shi Sui’s expression changed when he inadvertently saw Xiang Yi, who was in the corner.

The frivolous and nonchalant vampire seemed to have fallen into the mortal world as the gaze in his eyes became as gentle as the breeze in spring.

Seemingly aware of his slip-up, he lowered his head a little and looked down with his lips subconsciously curled up.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘Brother Xiang Qi seems to be right… Shi Sui does resemble a vixen…’

chapters.title: Chapter 274 - Fashion Black Hole (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 274 - Fashion Black Hole (1)

The photographer captured that scene in time.

The creative director was extremely excited and he hurriedly began discussing the myriad of ideas that were running through his mind with the photographer.

The shoot was paused.

Shi Sui got up and took large strides toward Xiang Yi.

There was plenty of screaming everywhere they went, regardless of gender…

Xiang Yi had a composed expression on her face. At the very least, she made herself look calm on the surface.

Xiang Yi praised sincerely from the bottom of her heart, “You’re very handsome today.”

(ˉ▽￣～)

“Thank you, Xiang Yi~”

The overly jealous Xiang Qi scoffed, while Shi Sui grinned gleefully as he thanked Xiang Yi.

Xiang Qi removed his sunglasses and wanted to diss Shi Sui, but as an elite fashion designer, he couldn’t deny that Shi Sui’s outfit was faultless. Thus, he gritted his teeth and said, “Not too bad, he looks like a decent human being.”

Whenever Xiang Yi was around, Shi Sui would automatically block out all noise except her voice. Completely ignoring Xiang Qi’s words, he kept his dark eyes fixed on Xiang Yi and began chuckling charmingly. “Xiang Yi, it’s going to be hard on you in the mortal world today~”

In order to highlight the contrasting styles, Xiang Yi’s dress was not only glamorous, it was also in a bright, cream color and decorated with some white lace elements. Xiang Qi had hand-sewn every single piece of lace onto the dress, which was even more gorgeous than the dresses donned by Disney princesses.

The retro-style square neckline of the long dress accentuated Xiang Yi’s defined collarbones and lithe waist. Her makeup was light, and her glossy lips were almost matching the rose under the corner of Shi Sui’s eye. She was full of vitality but still as graceful as ever.

Xiang Qi humphed. “My sister doesn’t need your compliment! It’s obvious that she’s beautiful!”

Xiang Yi smiled in response as she didn’t notice anything amiss.

Her heart was beating so quickly that it skipped a beat.

‘Shi Sui looks…even more like a vixen when he’s smiling…’

…

Shi Sui’s solo shoot was completed with amazing efficiency. The final product was flawless, earning itself the endless praises of the creative director and others.

After his part was over, it was Xiang Yi’s turn to shoot and they were actually ahead of schedule.

According to the shooting plan, Xiang Yi was to have an outdoor shoot in the rose garden of the palace.

However, the photographer changed his mind at the last minute and said, “Let’s go to the forest behind the castle. I heard deer often appear there, it’s going to be an awesome scene if the deer are photographed too!”

The good-tempered Xiang Yi agreed and went along with his idea.

However, when they arrived at the forest, the photographer’s attitude was rather perfunctory as he simply took a few shots casually before he began questioning Xiang Yi.

“Your movements are too rigid!”

“Do you actually know how to pose properly!?!”

“Oh, this is not the effect that I want at all!!”

“…”

Xiang Yi frowned and asked to take a look at the photos but the photographer vehemently refuted. “You don’t have the rights to do that!”

After shooting for more than half an hour, the crew was exhausted and they all glared at Xiang Yi with inevitable displeasure.

Although they felt that there was nothing wrong with Xiang Yi’s gaze and poses, they trusted Steve’s judgment because he was a professional photographer!

Hence, in their opinions, the problem definitely lied with Xiang Yi!

Steve criticized Xiang Yi repeatedly, but when he saw Xiang Qi walking over, he immediately shut up.

He pretended to take a few shots and said, “Okay, let’s take a break.”

The crew was greatly relieved.

Xiang Qi gave Xiang Yi a cup of water and had even meticulously inserted a straw for her. “Why is the shoot taking so long?”

Feeling a little embarrassed, Xiang Yi said, “Maybe I’ve been burdensome and dragging them down. I heard that the final shots are unsatisfactory.”

Xiang Qi frowned and said, “Don’t doubt yourself, the photographer might just lack proper skills.”

Steve, who was at the side, began checking the photos guiltily.

If he hadn’t been bribed by Hades’ rival, he wouldn’t have deliberately made the photos look so awful.

‘It’s a pity this Chinese beauty’s excellent posing is going to go to waste…’

chapters.title: Chapter 275 - Fashion Black Hole (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 275 - Fashion Black Hole (2)

However, he had already thought of a way to shirk the responsibility so Steve wasn’t flustered at all.

The shoot continued.

This time, Xiang Qi was watching from the side so Steve didn’t dare to criticize Xiang Yi, but he chose to adopt another approach—the silent treatment.

He remained expressionless, and all he did was press the shutter button without giving Xiang Yi any cues or prompts at all. The tension got increasingly overwhelming and unbearable.

During the second break, the staff and crew were incredibly fatigued.

If the shoot were productive, they wouldn’t mind being exhausted; but after all the energy that they had put into the shoot, the final product was still unsatisfactory. Hence, they found it completely meaningless!

Someone couldn’t help but start ranting on their social media page.

Coincidentally, some netizens from China happened to see that post and decided to share it onto their local social media platforms.

——[Eternal Gossiper]: “I chanced upon the private account of a staff member of MYSTYLE Magazine. They should be criticizing a certain female celebrity, Miss Xiang… It’s attached below:

[She’s really bad at posing and after a long day of shooting, the final product was still unsatisfactory. The photographer wanted to snap some shots with deer in the picture, but when we went to the forest, there wasn’t a single deer at all. I think she’s a cursed girl!]

Um… To be fair, Miss Xiang is not only unlucky, she might be a fashion black hole. ”

As soon as that post was uploaded, some people immediately retorted.

——[Xiang Yi is a fashion blackhole? Oh, please, her red-carpet look was gorgeous during the previous Tomato Entertainment Annual Gala!]

——[People slam her and call her Vase Fairy all the time, but that actually means that she’s really beautiful.]

There were also some who gloated.

——[Beauty does not equate to elegance. Some tacky hillbillies will never be as elegant as graceful ladies of wealthy families regardless of how hard they try to emulate them.]

——[MYSTYLE Magzine is a renowned international fashion magazine and the photos have to be high fashion, okay? Not anyone can have such vibes.]

As more and more people saw the post, it gradually rose to popularity, and when the Shisui Sisters saw it, they inevitably criticized it again.

Now that they had finally found something that they could criticize Xiang Yi for, they, of course, couldn’t miss it.

…

In the castle.

Albert invited a guest to dinner and it was Miss Sophia, the editor-in-chief of MYSTYLE Magazine.

He had been courting Sophia lately and after the two exchanged pleasantries, he tried to invite Sophia on a hunting trip with him.

“Although we rarely see deer these days, we can still hunt grouse, rabbits or other animals. If you’re interested, we can go on horseback.”

Sophia politely turned him down with a smile and took off her plain, wide-brimmed bowler hat before asking the creative director about the progress of the shoot.

“These are Sui’s solo shots,” the creative director said as he showed Sophia the photos on the computer. The photos hadn’t been retouched, but they were already stunning enough.

Sophia nodded with satisfaction and had a feeling that this issue would definitely sell very well.

“Where are Alice’s photos?” She was close friends with Xiang Qi, also known as Hades. This time, she was doing Hades a favor by choosing to feature both Xiang Yi and Shi Sui in the cover shoot of the magazine because she knew that Xiang Yi was Xiang Qi’s younger sister.

“Uh, the photos…haven’t been sent yet…”

Actually, some of them had already been sent to the computer, but none of them was satisfactory. The creative director was disappointed, but he secretly wanted to buy a little time for Xiang Yi. He thought that Xiang Yi would probably be able to get into the mood soon.

He was worried that Sophia might replace Xiang Yi with someone else after seeing those unsatisfactory photos. As the boss, Sophia was gentle in private but domineering and strict when it comes to work. She was famously known as the esteemed “No-nonsense Queen”.

At this point, the photographer Steve returned and grinned gleefully when he thought of the remaining amount of the bribe that he was about to receive very soon.

However, when he saw Sophia, his expression instantly froze.

‘What is the boss…doing here!?’

chapters.title: Chapter 276 - Sacked!
chapters.body:
Chapter 276 - Sacked!

The creative director’s heart skipped a beat.

He wondered how Xiang Yi did during the shoot.

‘It’s all my fault for being so preoccupied with perfecting the plan for the shoot that I have neglected Xiang Yi.”

Sophia said calmly, “I’ll look at Alice’s photo.”

The photographer hesitated for a few seconds before taking out the memory card of the DSLR, his hands trembling slightly.

*Import photos, Display Preview*——

A set of lousy photos appeared in front of everyone’s eyes.

The creative director had an ominous premonition. ‘Oh dear, the photos turned out so terribly, Sophia is going to hit the roof…’

To his surprise, Sophia merely looked at the few hundred photos quietly.

The photographer was secretly relieved, thinking that perhaps, Sophia didn’t see what he had done…

He could make models look beautiful in photos and likewise, he could also make them look awful.

It wasn’t his first time using that trick so he was very skillful with it. It would showcase his superb photographic skills when taking photos of lighting, portraits, and scenery while also capturing the mundane, mechanical stiffness of the people in the photograph.

He even tried to capture the expressions or movements that weren’t suitable for Xiang Yi; but to his dismay, Xiang Yi was very good at managing her expressions, and her mannerisms were very elegant and graceful too. She perfectly matched the image of the little princess in the setting, making it impossible for the photographer to capture any awful photos of her.

The staff came over and surrounded them to take a look. When they saw the photos that were supposedly “taken skillfully but unpleasant”, they immediately felt resentful toward Xiang Yi.

Flaws tend to be emphasized through comparisons.

If Shi Sui’s photos were described to be stunning, hers were shocking!

The person who had posted a derogatory statement just now even secretly took a photo and posted it onto the internet.

Thinking that no one would pay attention to her account, she posted it without further hesitation.

However, what she didn’t know was that Chinese netizens were already paying attention to her account…

As soon as the photo was posted, some people shared them on Weibo and various forums. Now that there was photo evidence, the netizens began the mockery.

——[Uh, isn’t this the standard of the photos taken at the bridal studio below my home?]

——[These photos don’t do that beautiful dress enough justice, and it’s a waste of the photographer’s excellent skills! Vase Fairy? More like country bumpkin!]

——[That’s an insult to country bumpkins.]

——[Hahahahah reality is cruel. This is probably what happens when you don’t have someone present to digitally retouch your photos.]

——[I think Vase Fairy will be boycotted in the fashion industry if these photos are included in this issue of the magazine…]

Click——

Sophia clicked the mouse gently and the first photo was displayed again indicating that she had already viewed all the photos in the set once.

The photographer heaved a sigh of relief when he saw that her reaction had remained unchanged.

‘It seems that the Big Boss did not develop any suspicions about me!’

However, the creative director looked like he was on the verge of tears as he felt that Sophia was probably going to replace Xiang Yi with someone else…

While everyone watched with great eagerness, Sophia said unhurriedly, “Did you take these photos?”

“Yes, Ma’am.”

Sophia nodded slightly. “Okay. You’re Mr. Steve, right? I hereby declare that you have been fired.”

“Yes, Ma’am… Huh?!”

He was stunned.

Everyone else was dumbfounded.

‘Fire…fired?!’

‘Why!!!’

“That’s not fair! I demand a valid reason from you!” Steve was flustered. He was earning a stable income as a photographer, and he also had a good reputation in the industry. If he were to be fired, how could he survive in this industry in the future!?

Sophia switched on the double window mode to juxtapose Shi Sui’s photos against Xiang Yi’s.

She said in a calm and professional tone, “You have excellent photography skills, but you’re not a good photographer.”

chapters.title: Chapter 277 - The Girl And The Deer (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 277 - The Girl And The Deer (1)

“Being a photographer is a profession that revolves around a natural pursuit of beauty, which is also the founding philosophy of our magazine. We strive to discover the beauty of different styles.”

“You have a discerning eye for beauty and an excellent set of skills to capture all things beautiful. It shows in the photos that you’ve taken of Sui.”

“But…”

Sophia shifted her gaze and kept her light blue eyes on Steve who subconsciously avoided making eye contact with her because he didn’t dare to do so.

She said in a now different tone, “However, I’m very disappointed with Alice’s photos. Please take note, I’m disappointed with the photos, not Alice.”

“You showed extraordinary skill, but you’ve foregone the pursuit of beauty and a pure soul.”

“Mr. Steve, I think you know what I mean. Let’s not make things too awkward for each other, shall we?”

She was straightforward yet courteous with her words as she stated the reason for firing Steve without publicly exposing his unethical behavior. She had combined strict professionalism with a feminine gentleness, forming a unique style.

Steve parted his lips and closed it again, seemingly trying to say something to redeem himself, but he couldn’t bring himself to say a single word.

His face turned pale, and he looked down dejectedly. “I understand, Miss Sophia.”

None of the staff present expected such a twist of events!

While they were still flabbergasted with their jaws wide open, Sophia had already begun arranging the other matters in an orderly manner.

“Linda, contact the photographer, Ryan.”

“Please arrange for Sui and Alice to rest for a moment.”

“Get ready for the conference, I want to see a complete shooting plan.”

“…”

At her command, order was restored at the originally chaotic scene, like a precise and highly efficient machine resuming its operation.

Mesmerized, Viscount Albert watched everything that was happening in front of him and he thought, ‘This woman is so charming!’

…

Since she had nothing to do, Xiang Yi went to the kitchen to make some snacks after obtaining Viscount Albert’s approval.

She made some round crackers that were light yellow in color and were giving off a faint aroma. Thinking that it was some biscuits that Xiang Yi had baked, Xiang Qi opened his mouth and was about to eat it, but she stopped him.

“These are deer crackers made with rice bran and wheat flour. You might get diarrhea if you eat it.”

Xiang Yi’s focus was obviously contrary to the norm as he blurted without hesitation, “Does it taste delicious?”

Xiang Yi was dumbfounded.

“Just don’t eat it,” she said.

However, Xiang Qi wasn’t convinced so he sneakily bit off half a piece of the crackers when she wasn’t noticing and started nibbling on it like a little hamster.

Being a doting brother to Xiang Yi, Xiang Qi felt that it was the best snack in the world even though it tasted a little bland—because it was baked by Xiang Yi!

…

…

The photographer Ryan, who was going to save the day, arrived as soon as he could.

Due to the replacement of the photographer, Shi Sui had to have his photos taken again too. However, considering the issue with lighting, they decided to let Xiang Yi be the first to shoot.

When Viscount Albert noticed the deer crackers that Xiang Yi had made, he asked in shock, “Are you planning to use this to lure the deers over? That’s not going to work, there hasn’t been a deer near the castle for many years…”

The deers in the nearby forest were rare, protected species that had white spots on their bodies. Stags had exceptionally beautiful antlers, but they were also rather violent by nature. Years ago, there were even records of them attacking humans.

Unfortunately, those deers were rarely seen in recent years. Some experts even speculated that the deers might be endangered or have even become extinct.

Before he finished speaking, a pair of furry, pointed ears poked out of the dense forest…

Albert was flabbergasted!

Astounded, the crowd unanimously held their breaths while looking at the fawn that had suddenly appeared…

chapters.title: Chapter 278 - The Girl And The Deer (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 278 - The Girl And The Deer (2)

The color of the fawn’s fur was very light, and there were white spots all over its coat. Its limbs were long and elegant. It didn’t have any antlers, though they were unsure if it was because it was a female deer or because it was still too young. Its furry, pointed ears made it look like a genie of the forest that was favored by the Goddess of Nature.

At this time, its round eyes were fixed on…the deer crackers in Xiang Yi’s hand.

An incredible conjecture surfaced in everyone’s mind.

‘Surely this fawn didn’t appear just to take a bite out of the crackers, right?’

Xiang Yi blinked, lifted the hem of her dress, and walked towards the fawn.

Viscount Albert warned softly, “Watch out! This breed of deer is very vicious and menacing!”

In the next second…

The fawn scurried toward Xiang Yi and bit the deer cracker that she was holding.

The sounds of the fawn chewing were exceptionally clear in the silent surroundings.

While eating, the deer rubbed its head against Xiang Yi’s hand.

Xiang Yi was slightly surprised, but she soon burst into laughter and rubbed its head gently.

The little deer squinted comfortably as if it had reached the pinnacle of its life.

Everyone was speechless.

‘Isn’t it supposed to be ferocious and menacing?’

‘It’s so docile and tame!’

Viscount Albert was about to have an emotional breakdown because he had been hit in the buttocks by a male deer years ago!

‘Are fawns just more obedient?’

Ryan snapped a few photos, but the angles that she shot from weren’t exactly ideal. Just as he was about to continue, the deer intelligently scampered back into the forest at an incredible speed.

He had no choice but to give up and he proceeded to select a spot with old trees and a flowerbed as the backdrop.

With a photographer who didn’t pull any tricks, the photoshoot proceeded very smoothly.

Xiang Yi knew how to act in front of the camera and posed exactly the way she should in a fashion shoot. Each photo was as beautiful as a painting and the results were far better than the lousy photos that Steve had taken!

“Perfect!” Ryan was extremely excited.

After looking at the final photos, Sophia was very satisfied too.

The crew intended to call it a day and return to the castle, but they suddenly heard some rustling sounds.

They looked over, only to see that there were at least more than ten deers that gathered from the depths of the forest…

Everyone was dumbfounded.

‘What? That fawn brought its entire family here for a free meal after it was given a free snack just now!?’

The leading fawn was quite brave to dash toward Xiang Yi like a bolt of lightning. While standing beside Xiang Yi, it started bleating in a tender voice.

Everyone wondered, ‘Is…is it acting coquettishly!?!’

“Did you bring your family here?” Xiang Yi smiled and continued, “You’re lucky I made plenty of deer crackers.”

She took out the rest of the deer crackers, but she didn’t feed them to the deers all at once. Instead, she placed it at a spot that was some distance away from the deers and then returned to the original place where she was standing. She began feeding the deer quietly.

Gradually, some deer gently came forth to sniff the deer crackers…

In an instant, a stag with large and beautiful antlers bit the deer cracker like a kitten that saw catnip and swallowed it!

It swallowed the cracker!

The other deers quickly swarmed over.

Albert was in a trance, and he suddenly realized that the deer might have attacked humans frequently in order to get some food.

He carefully recalled his encounter. ‘When I was getting chased by the deer at that time, I seemed to have been eating strawberries…’

The photographer Ryan couldn’t hide or contain his excitement at all as he stood up or squatted down to capture some photos. He even sprawled onto the ground for the sake of getting a special angle, and started snapping photos continuously using the DSLR!

It was such a beautiful scene!

It resembled the scenes in movies where the telephoto lens slowly zoomed out. The flowers and trees outlined the colorful background, making it look like an oil painting. The deers and Xiang Yi formed a pleasant and harmonious natural rhythm, and even the light was of the right brightness and warmth. Even the majestic castle in the distance was reduced to being a complementary background.

All the beautiful scenery in the world was inferior to this!

chapters.title: Chapter 279 - Magic Girl, Xiang Yi
chapters.body:
Chapter 279 - Magic Girl, Xiang Yi

All the beauty was captured and sealed in a photo by the photographer’s camera, turning a single moment into eternity.

Each and every single photo of the final set was breathtakingly beautiful!

The innocent little princess and the pure, flawless fawn made the pictures give off an artistic vibe.

Everyone was very impressed with this set of photos.

Next, it was Shi Sui’s turn and likewise, his photoshoot proceeded very smoothly. During the shoot, he maintained a high standard of performance and fully embodied the demeanor of a vampire in the darkness of the night.

Lastly, it was time for the main event of the day—the couple shoot.

Sofia and the other two discussed and ran through the shooting plan again. Unlike the abstract concept they used to adopt in the past, they decided to take a storyline approach this time.

“What we want to express is the sense of storytelling through the profound details of the photos…”

…

On the other hand…

The comments that the ‘Shisui Sisters’ posted on Weibo had been drowned out because his extreme, hardcore fans who swore to marry him formed only the minority of his fans. On the other hand, Xiang Yi’s fans were growing in number each day.

The Shisui Sisters had no choice but to turn to the gossip forums.

All of a sudden, the forum was resurrected and pushed to the first page.

—— [Come on, have a look at the hillbilly’s outfit~]

—— [Sorry, it’s so ugly that it blinded me]

—— [She’s such a country bumpkin that even an internationally renowned photographer can’t save her]

—— [Anyone who sees her will abhor her. Even deers will dislike her. Vase Fairy has such an unlikeable face]

…

Just as they were getting all excited, a new post suddenly popped up when the page was refreshed.

—— [Woah! Xiang Yi is like a princess who escaped from Disney!]

The Shisui Sisters were nonchalant as they were certain that Xiang Yi would be doomed once her “ugly” photos were exposed.

They tapped the photo, only to realize that the user who had posted that photo had shared a status update.

It was the same staff member who had exposed some insider information but this time, he was full of praises for Xiang Yi!

[Oh my adorable yet pitiful little princess, it turns out I’ve been wrong about her! The problem doesn’t lie with her performance but the photographer! Besides, she even baked some deer crackers herself that attracted a herd of deer, which haven’t appeared in years! God, is this the magic of the mysterious orient?]

The Shisui Sisters were about to make some snide remarks to mock Xiang Yi but all their attention was drawn the photo that they saw…

The young girl, Xiang Yi, who was dressed in the creamy yellow princess gown, was smiling faintly with a clear gaze in her watery eyes as she gently rubbed the head of the fawn.

A herd of deer was gathered not far away from her. The photographer had chosen an excellent angle to shoot from and the scene he captured look like it was straight out of a fairytale movie, with the deer looking like forest elves that had been summoned by the witch to offer their blessings to the little princess in the castle.

The Shisui Sisters were dumbfounded.

‘Is this Vase Fairy?’

They zoomed in to take a closer look at the girl in the photo.

Wow!

It was really Xiang Yi!

The other netizens who saw their comments were dumbfounded too. ‘Wasn’t everyone mocking Xiang Yi for looking tacky?’

‘You call that distasteful and tacky? Are all of you blind!?!’

‘Weren’t you all mocking Xiang Yi for being unlucky and disliked by deer?’

‘You call that dislike? There are more than ten deer in that photo and they’re all staring at Xiang Yi intently, especially that fawn! It’s almost going to roll around her feet and ask for hugs like a Husky!’

‘The deer obviously love her, okay!?’

—— [Hahaha, she can cast magic! She’s Magical Girl Xiang Yi!]

—— [Amazing, this photo is really beautiful! It seems to have been shot by a different photographer!]

—— [Ah, I’m dead! How on earth does Xiang Yi manage to effortlessly attract so many deer?!]

—— [Her solo shots are already stunning enough. How incredible will their couple shoot me? I’m all for this, I must buy this issue of the magazine!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 280 - Shooting Alongside Eachapter Other (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 280 - Shooting Alongside Eachapter Other (1)

…

The Shisui Sisters, who had finally found a flaw to nitpick on, were astounded again…

There was even a post on the forum that featured a collage of all the instances that Xiang Yi proved them wrong.

——[Xiang Yi just keeps proving her haters wrong again and again! She’s like a tornado that doesn’t stop!]

The language used in the caption of the post was so vivid and humorous that it cracked many people up while mocking the Shisui Sisters at the same time.

A video creator even created a video consisting of exaggerated, Auto-Tune remix-themed content meant for entertainment purposes.

When the Shisui Sisters mocked Xiang Yi for being unable to buy any flight tickets—

The scene in the video was that of Xiang Yi frying a large pot of vegetables with a large shovel, accompanied with the sound effects of loud slapping.

“Yes, I’m slapping you, and I don’t need a reason to.”

When the Shisui Sisters mocked Xiang Yi for being unable to book any hotel rooms——

Smack! Smack!

“Yes, I’m slapping you, and I don’t need a reason to.”

When the Shisui Sisters mocked Xiang Yi by calling her a hillbilly who lacked elegance——

Smack! Smack! Smack!

“Yes, I’m slapping you, and I don’t need a reason to.”

…

The short video was simple, but it was particularly brainwashing. Soon, it went viral and garnered hundreds of thousands of likes!

The Shisui Sisters who tried to cause a stir on the Internet were completely embarrassed, while Shisui’s official fan club also issued a statement to advocate for everyone to stay rational and civilized when idolizing Shi Sui or other celebrities.

…

In the castle.

The couple shoot officially began.

The lights were dim and the candles were burning, while a sultry light was reflected off of the glass of red wine.

Ryan took a few test shots and looked down to check the photos on his camera screen.

Both of them were very natural in front of the camera and had a good grasp of their best angles. They could also strike out high fashion poses and have no problem posing on their own too, but…

They lacked intimacy.

Ryan said politely and tactfully, “Can the both of you interact with each other a little bit? It can be physical touch or something simple like making eye contact.”

Hence, the both of them slowly…moved a few centimeters closer to each other.

Ryan was speechless.

“I want you to behave like the main characters of a romance flick who are in an ambiguous relationship and create an abrupt but romantic tension with each other. Try to act like you’re facing your first love who’s making your heart race…” Ryan tried his best to express the mood and vibes that he wanted them to create.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘I’m sorry, but this is too much for me.’

In the worlds that she had transmigrated to, she had been the wingman for several people and brought many couples together. However, she had never been in love before…

She racked her brains and kept contemplating if she should hold onto Shi Sui’s arm but all of a sudden, she felt a warm pair of large hands on the back of her head, which was pressing her head down a little…

“Huh?” Her pupils dilated slightly as she was pulled closer to him.

The tips of their noses were almost touching.

Thump-thump…

Caught off guard by the sudden eye contact that they were making, her heart suddenly began beating rapidly.

The clicking sounds of the camera shutter filled the air and Ryan exclaimed, “Excellent! Perfect!”

In the viewfinder, the vampire seemed to be gently and audaciously teasing his prey, bullying the gentle and puerile little princess in his arms who was a little flustered. When juxtaposed against his nonchalance, there was immediately a chemical reaction!

The sweet sense of affection between them would make one blush and have their hearts beat rapidly!

“Now, I want the both of you to act like you’re madly in love with each other.” Ryan rattled on, “Compulsion, submission, indulgence, passion, collision…”

It was as easy as a pie for Shi Sui to act like he was fully devoted and passionately in love. It was as if he was born with a naturally amorous gaze in his peach blossom eyes. When he smiled, there was a mesmerizing gaze in his eyes that seemed to be hiding a dark abyss.

He smiled and was pondering about how to get Xiang Yi into the mood when she suddenly grabbed his tie with her soft, tender hands and tugged it downwards forcefully…

He leaned forward uncontrollably and smirked at her ambiguously, as if to show that that trick wouldn’t work on him.

In the next second…

She gently caressed his bulging Adam’s apple with her other hand and then moved her hand downwards…

There seemed to be electricity coursing through the areas that her fingertips touched.

The gaze in Shi Sui’s eyes changed immediately.

chapters.title: Chapter 281 - Shooting Alongside Eachapter Other (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 281 - Shooting Alongside Eachapter Other (2)

His Adam’s apple moved twice sexily.

On the other hand, the person who started it all, was raising her eyebrows calmly.

She seemed provocative and alluring.

There was a deep but obscure glint in Shi Sui’s eyes. He licked the corner of his lips before smiling widely in a charming and intoxicating manner.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She was just mimicking girls who were good at seduction and flirting.

‘I seem to have gone a little overboard. Shi Sui, don’t smile at me like that, I can’t take it!’

Ryan was amazed by the perfect chemistry between them, and he took several shots for a long time before stopping.

The photos were cast onto a computer at the side that was synced to the camera, and Sophia set her sights on one of the photos.

She was holding her breath while gazing at it. Despite having broad horizons and a rich experience in this industry, she was still in awe of the beautiful scene that was shot today.

She had decided to make that photo the cover photo of the upcoming issue of the magazine!

…

The shoot was paused and the makeup artist stepped forward to touch up Xiang Yi’s makeup.

Xiang Qi came over to help Xiang Yi fix her dress too. Noticing that her eyes were slightly glassed over, he asked, “When have you started thinking about such nonsense too?”

Feigning ignorance, Xiang Yi asked, “Huh? Hey, how about we have seafood pasta with tomato sauce tonight?”

Xiang Qi subconsciously wanted to agree but when he was about to answer, he gritted his teeth and said something else instead. “I’ll deal with you after the shoot is over!”

On the other hand, Shi Sui was drinking water composedly as if he wasn’t affected by everything that had just happened.

However, his habit of reaching out to touch his cigarette case had betrayed his emotions.

“…”

Shi Sui had never found it so difficult to quit smoking before. At this moment, he desperately needed something to calm himself down.

Otherwise, the scene of Xiang Yi placing her slightly cool and tender fingertips gently against his Adam’s apple would repeatedly run through his mind…

It was just really annoying.

…

…

The photoshoot started again and, to Xiang Yi’s surprise, the scene was now in…the bedroom.

To be exact, it was on the bed in the bedroom.

She repeatedly confirmed it twice before accepting that it was reality.

Despite not showing any emotion on her face, she was panicking deep down.

Seemingly having noticed her nervousness, Shi Sui chuckled and asked, “Are you going to go first? Or do I go first? Or do we sleep on the bed together?”

‘Sleep on the bed together…’

‘Sleep…’

Xiang Yi tensed up and gave Shi Sui a little nudge. “You go first.”

However, Shi Sui was thrown off balance and ended up falling onto the soft and spacious bed, perhaps because Xiang Yi had used too much force or he merely didn’t maintain his balance. He gazed at her innocently.

The crew at the scene were looking at Xiang Yi with peculiar gazes in their eyes.

‘T-this… This oriental little beauty… Is she that eager to get intimate with that oriental hunk!?’

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She climbed onto the bed slowly and laid down beside Shi Sui according to Ryan’s instructions.

They were laying so close to each other that they could feel the warmth of each other’s bodies.

Ryan urged, “Closer! Closer!”

Xiang Yi moved her head a little closer to Shi Sui, but Ryan still wasn’t satisfied. Thus, he went forth to press their heads together and exclaimed with a joyful grin, “Great, great, this is good!”

Xiang Yi felt like she almost had a cardiac arrest.

Shi Sui remained silent too and merely stared at Xiang Yi smilingly.

Xiang Yi whispered, “Have you ever been in a photoshoot for a magazine cover?”

Shi Sui answered, “Yes.”

Xiang Yi remarked, “No wonder you’re so skillful in posing alongside others…”

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows. There were only inches between them and a romantic ambiguity was brewing uncontrollably in the air. Wisps of it began spreading around.

He seemed to be holding her waist gently, but his actions were actually full of strong possessiveness.

He inched close to her ear and whispered in a hoarse voice, “I’ve never been paired with anyone in a photoshoot.”

“Xiang Yi, you’re the first.”

chapters.title: Chapter 282 - Brazenly Taking Advantage
chapters.body:
Chapter 282 - Brazenly Taking Advantage

Shi Sui seemed to have said something else, but Xiang Yi’s mind was blank and she didn’t hear him clearly at all.

All she remembered was that his breath was warm.

Little did she know that Ryan had snapped an absolutely gorgeous photo of that scene!

The little princess, who seemed to be helplessly in love, had a look of confusion in her eyes, while the vampire who had finally gotten what he wanted had a dangerous gaze that was full of aggression.

Their breathing was chaotic, but they were smitten with each other. They seemed to be drowning in love but unwilling to struggle.

Salvation?

Sorry but that’s not necessary…

‘Please come with me and let us fall into darkness together.’

…

The last set of photos was full of symbolic significance.

The little princess stood by the window with the vampire standing behind her, confining her within his embrace as he held onto her waist. His lips were only half an inch away from the nape of her fair neck, but he was hesitating to sink his teeth into her flesh.

In the next second, the little princess raised her hand to close the window.

The last wisp of light in the castle vanished, and everything seemed to be engulfed by boundless darkness. It was as if time was sealed and frozen at this moment.

However, their interlocked fingers were reflected in the retro carved frame mirror…

“Okay! It’s a wrap!” Ryan announced the end of the shooting, and the crew on set felt like they had woken up from a dream.

It turned out that they had unknowingly become immersed in the storyline of the shoot…

It wasn’t entirely about a fairytale romance but rather, there was some darkness to it. However, it was shocking and memorable!

Ryan and the others proceeded to look at the photos that had been taken, while Xiang Yi remained standing on the same spot, still in a trance.

Only when Shi Sui flicked his finger against her forehead did Xiang Yi raise her head slowly.

Shi Sui said indifferently, “It’s just a story.”

After a brief moment of silence, Xiang Yi assented.

She was only in a momentary trance.

‘Are the vivid lives I had seen in the worlds that I transmigrated to real or imaginary? Are they all just insignificant stories?’

“Xiang Yi.” Shi Sui suddenly called her in a solemn tone. Unlike the usual way he would tease her, he said gently and seriously, “You are you. You’re not anyone else, nothing can erase your existence.”

‘Existence…’

She had completely subconsciously placed her hand against his chest.

His heartbeat was low and strong.

She heaved a sigh of relief before finally pulling away from those confusing thoughts.

In the next second, she heard the sounds of Shi Sui clicking his tongue against the roof of his mouth. Shi Sui then said in a draggy and ambiguous tone, “You’ve gotten really brazen with taking liberties with me now, huh?”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘No, I didn’t; Shi Sui, don’t spout nonsense!’

She quickly retracted her hand and said with an extremely composed expression, “My hands are dirty, let me give it a little wipe.”

Shi Sui said with raised brows, “When do you plan to wipe your hands, when they get dirty again next time?” He was drawling, even sounding like he was coaxing a kid. “Can you give me a notice in advance before you do something like that again in the future? After all, I’m not getting younger and I can’t stand it…”

Xiang Yi coughed and said, “Okay.”

She almost fled in a disheveled manner while lifting the hem of her skirt.

…

…

Albert invited them to stay at the castle for the night.

When it was almost dinnertime, Albert walked to the dining hall as if nothing had happened. He thought that he was the earliest to arrive, but to his surprise, Shi Sui, Xiang Qi, and Sophia were all present!

Albert was flabbergasted!

‘Sorry, I lost.’

The crowd talked about a variety of topics such as finance, art, and wine.

When the maid served the dishes that Xiang Yi had made, the conversation ceased.

The first thing Albert did was to lay a white napkin for Sophia and himself to prepare for the meal.

He turned his head to the side, only to realize that Xiang Qi was calmly taking something out of his large bag…

It was an extremely big bowl.

Albert was confused.

‘This works too!?!!!’

…

…

chapters.title: Chapter 283 - My Big Brother Has Brought A Large Pot Before
chapters.body:
Chapter 283 - My Big Brother Has Brought A Large Pot Before

Noticing the surprised gazes of the crowd, Xiang Qi said seriously, “Being hygienic starts from bringing your own utensils.”

Everyone was speechless, and they didn’t believe him at all.

However, everyone’s attention was soon drawn to the dishes on the table.
