There were professional chefs who worked at the castle in the first place and Xiang Yi, too, thought that the dishes she cooked might not be to the liking of everyone. Hence, she simply cooked some beef patties and fried mushrooms.

The beef patties were made from slightly marinated beef tenderloin that was fried in a pan with just the right amount of heat. They could be paired with black pepper sauce or tomato sauce, depending on the preference of individuals.

On the other hand, the fried mushrooms were made from fresh mushrooms that were picked in the afternoon. The mushrooms were battered in flour and egg, deep-fried, and then coated with a special seasoning mix of chili powder and cumin that Xiang Yi had brought from China. The heavenly aroma spread to their noses.

Albert was a devout follower of his faith who would usually lead the prayer before meals. However, today, he was very quick with reciting his prayer and soon eagerly declared that they could start eating.

The beef patties were made exquisitely. Albert bit off half of the patty and the fragrant juices of the beef seeped out of the patty, bringing great pleasure to his taste buds…

Albert’s eyes were getting glassed over.

‘Is this heaven…’

‘How can there be such delicious food…’

Sophia was very interested in the fried mushrooms. She carefully poked her fork into a small piece of mushroom and tried to bite into it…

The fried mushrooms were crispy on the outside but fresh, tender, and fragrant on the inside. The umami flavor of mushroom was perfectly combined with the batter of flour and egg to form a rich and complex taste and texture.

Sophia felt that she could write an essay about the amazing taste of the mushrooms!

As for Xiang Qi…

He had a penchant for noodles so Xiang Yi served him a bowl of seafood and tomato pasta that was topped with some mushrooms and beef patties that had been cut into smaller pieces…

While he was eating, he glanced provocatively at Shi Sui.

‘Hmph, I’m the only person whom my sister served personally!’

Shi Sui’s expression remained unchanged and he continued eating elegantly with excellent table manners. When he was almost done with eating, he picked up the snowy white napkin and gently wiped the corners of his mouth.

He asked abruptly, “Xiang Yi, have you thought of what you’re going to cook for Big Brother’s in-flight meal?”

Hearing the words ‘Big Brother’, Xiang Qi instinctively sat up straight and even stopped chewing.

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “I’m going to prepare a few of his favorite dishes.” She then turned to look at Xiang Qi and asked, “Big Brother, do you want to accompany me home to visit Grandpa?”

“…”

Be it accompanying his younger sister or visiting his grandfather, Xiang Qi would be pleased to do both. However, he didn’t want to travel with Xiang Chen.

“Xiang Yi, you’re not a little kid anymore,” Xiang Qi said sternly like an older brother would. “Will you be more mature? Do you seriously need me to accompany you on a flight?”

“Oh…”

Shi Sui smiled and said, “It’s alright, I’ll go with you~”

Xiang Qi was speechless.

‘Screw you, dog!’

However, there was nothing he could do about it because he was absolutely terrified of Xiang Chen. But Shi Sui wasn’t…

“Da Guo? (Sounds like ‘Da Ge’ which means ‘Big Brother’ in mandarin) Albert’s Chinese was not very good, but he nevertheless tried to join in their conversation. “Not only did you bring a large bowl, but you’ve also brought a large pot (‘Da Guo’ means ‘large pot’ in Mandarin). Is that so?”

Taking advantage of the fact that Xiang Chen wasn’t around, Xiang Qi decided to reveal an embarrassing detail of Xiang Chen’s past. “During one of our family camping trips, my eldest brother brought a large pot.”

“But…”

He paused and continued in a miserable tone, “I carried it for him throughout the journey!”

chapters.title: Chapter 284 - My Little Bunny Is Coming To Coax Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 284 - My Little Bunny Is Coming To Coax Me

…

Meanwhile…

At the e-sports base of Logic.

The training room was brightly lit and the sounds of mouse devices being clicked and the punching of keyboard keys filled the air.

Xiao Naofu was nestled in the pocket of Xiang Yu’s team uniform, its tiny head popping out to watch him play the game. After watching the game for a few days, Xiao Naofu had already mastered the rules and seemed to be more into than Xiang Yu himself.

“Meow meow meow!!!”

—— Charge, charge, charge, beat him up! Beat him up ruthlessly!

Xiao Naofu’s meowing was the best music to Xiang Yu’s ears.

The sniper in the game ended the battle with a clean shot and soon found a cover to hide.

He freed his hand to cover Xiao Naofu’s eyes and coaxed softly, “Be good, Xiao Naofu, such brutal scenes of violence and killing are not suitable for an adorable kitten like you.”

Xiao Naofu: …!

—No! Let me watch it! I want to do e-sports too!

Creak—

The door was pushed open by Captain Wander, who had just returned from balloting.

He sighed and said apologetically, “Sorry guys, I wasn’t lucky enough. We’re going up against Team ICE in the next round.”

This year, the international contact home ground of “Cry Glory” was in Nancheng. Team Logic was one of the two Chinese teams that made it to the top 36, which everyone in the local gaming community had high hopes for. However, Team ICE was an elite team that made it to the top three of the global league last year, making Team Logic pale in comparison. Team Logic might easily get defeated in the first round if they were competing against Team ICE.

Everyone in the team was inevitably feeling somber.

At this moment…

“Ow! Ooooh!”

Xiao Naofu pried Xiang Yu’s hands away and leaped onto the keyboard aggressively before smashing its chubby and soft paw against the attack button on the keyboard. With a loud bang, the sniper in the game accurately shot the enemy who was preparing to launch a sneak attack!

Everyone in the team was astonished!

Xiao Naofu, who thought it was a tiger that was an expert in e-sports, wanted to continue attacking but was picked up by Wander. He exclaimed tearfully, “This is a miracle! It must be a miracle! It’s God’s encouragement! Everyone, get yourselves together and let’s charge!”

All of a sudden, they were all full of zeal. “Let’s go, charge!!!”

Xiao Naofu was struggling desperately while thinking, ‘Let go of me! I can still go on!’

…

On the other hand…

In the office of the director of the research institute.

“What right does a cripple like Xiang Li have to apply for so much funding? Can he conduct experiments with his hands? He’s obviously hogging the precious resources…” A middle-aged man griped.

The director tried to pacify him but that just made him push his luck further. “How about this? We’ll keep Xiang Li’s team and kick Xiang Li out. I’ll join to guide them. Xiang Li is no longer of any value to our research institute!”

The director was confused.

Despite being injured, Xiang Li had still managed to research and develop lots of new drugs. He had also written several core theses and papers, which was enough to prove his research ability.

‘You’re just an incompetent bootlicker. How can you have the cheek to ask me to kick Xiang Li out?’

The director said sullenly, “First of all, Professor Xiang Li’s hand will recover in no time. Secondly, Professor Xiang Li has discovered a certain extract within the seaweed, and he has also made significant progress! He is the last person I’ll replace!”

…

At the same time.

In the middle of the bustling city where the building lights were glowing brightly, Xiang Chen was standing in front of a floor-to-ceiling window, clad in a black night robe and speaking to his partner over the phone.

He rejected aloofly, “New case? Not interested.”

“I have things that are more important to do.”

His thin lips curled into a smile.

“My little bunny is coming to coax me.”

chapters.title: Chapter 285 - Brother Fan
chapters.body:
Chapter 285 - Brother Fan

After hanging up, Xiang Chen opened the WeChat messaging app on his cellphone.

Xiang Yi’s contact was at the top.

He tapped the chat box with his bony fingertips, only to see that he had 0 unread messages from her although she had updated her status.

It was a selfie that Xiang Yi had taken with Xiang Qi and Shi Sui’s side profile was unintentionally captured in the photo too.

The caption of the photo was— “Brother Xiang Qi is so handsome today! o(*￣︶￣*)o”

Both of them had many mutual friends on WeChat, and there were already many comments under the photo.

—— [Rascal No.4] : I’m clearly the most handsome of all.

Replying to Rascal No. 4,

—— [Rascal No. 3] : Get lost, I’m the most handsome, okay?

—— [Rascal No. 2]: Bunny, can you send me a photo of yourself without Xiang Qi in the picture?

—— [Shi Sui] : What about me?

…

Xiang Chen thought, ‘Hah. A bunch of annoying rascals.’

It was late at night but he wasn’t sleepy at all. Hence, he decided to scroll through Weibo to kill some time.

His account was verified as “Lawyer of Lin Chen Law Firm”, so he would often be tagged in posts and comments regarding legal advice.

Occasionally, Xiang Chen will reply to a few of them.

Today, he looked through the list of mentions as usual and paused when he came across a question— “Hey, do you take any pro bono cases?”

He didn’t stop because of the question but because of the username of the person who asked that question.

[Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s the Best Girl in This World]

The profile photo was a screenshot of Xiang Yi in the variety show “Two Under One Roof”. In the photo, her hair was tied into a bun, and she was smiling with her head tilted to the side. With an added filter and star stickers, Xiang Yi looked even more gentle and adorable.

With a straight face, Xiang Chen saved the photo in his phone and then subconsciously tapped on the other party’s Weibo profile.

It was obvious that this ‘guardian’ was a fan of Xiang Yi, and almost every status update was related to her.

However, Xiang Chen was somewhat baffled by her generational terms of address.

—— [Ahhh, little Xiang Yi is so beautiful, Mommy loves you!!!]

—— [Little Sister Xiang Yi is so gentle and cute! Her tiny dimples make her look so sweet]

—— [Damn, Xiang Yi is gorgeous today! I’m dead! I want to be her girlfriend for a second!]

…

However, that did not stop Xiang Chen from saving the photos and videos. After saving dozens of them, he was content and satisfied, but he realized that “Guardian” had updated her status.

—— [Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s The Best Girl in This World] : If none of us votes, when will Xiang Yi come out on top!?! Don’t forget to vote for Xiang Yi! Also, our fan club support group ID is xxxx, all are welcome to join!]

Xiang Chen checked out the links that she had attached, all of which led to various charts.

Xiang Yi’s popularity was quite low on the charts.

Xiang Chen frowned and sent “Guardian” a private message.

[Bunny’s Big Brother] : I can take on the case.

[Bunny’s Big Brother] : But I have two requests.

The other party replied immediately.

[Huh? Ahhh, will you really do that?! Please tell me what your requests are!]

“Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s the Best Girl in This World” was incredibly excited. Although Xiang Chen’s user ID seemed a little strange, he was a verified lawyer of Lin Chen Law Firm! She had asked for help from many lawyers, but all her efforts were futile. Hence, she didn’t expect that the only one who replied would be the top one in the industry!

A new message popped up in the chat box, and ‘Guardian’ checked it nervously, for fear that Xiang Chen would raise a request that was difficult to fulfill…

[Bunny’s Big Brother] : Teach me how to support someone on the charts.

[Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s The Best Girl in This World] : ???

Buzz——

[Bunny’s Big Brother] : Also, let me join bunny… Ahem, Xiang Yi’s fan club support group, thank you.]

[Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s the Best Girl in This World]: ???

She was bewildered because she didn’t expect him to raise such a request!

‘Is this the legendary male fan? He’s an “older-brother-type” fan!’

chapters.title: Chapter 286 - The Internet Is Within The Sanction Of The Law
chapters.body:
Chapter 286 - The Internet Is Within The Sanction Of The Law

Xiang Chen sent another message because she didn’t reply for a long time.

[Bunny’s Big Brother] : Why? Is there a problem with that?

“Guardian” immediately answered.

[Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s The Best Girl in This World]: No, no! It’s perfectly fine!]

Afterwards, Xiang Chen aloofly but very professionally asked her to send him the details of the case. In order to make it easier for them to contact each other, he even gave her his user ID on WeChat.

“Guardian” added his contact anxiously and soon, the friend request was accepted.

She checked out all his status updates, only to see that he had posted only a few.

They were posted two days ago, a year ago and a year and a half ago respectively.

Two days ago: “I’m currently on annual leave, please contact my assistant, Gu Jingxi for all matters related to work.”

One year ago: “Little Bunny has ran away from home.”

One and a half years ago: “On a camping trip with my younger sister. Cooking instant noodles in a big pot makes the noodles pretty tasty.”

‘Seems like he has a younger sister whose pet name is Bunny too.’

‘What a coincidence, she shares the same pet name as Xiang Yi!’

In order to express her sincerity, “Guardian” meticulously created a simplified tutorial on voting for a fan specific candidate for the various chats, and sent it to him. She even added him to the group chat of Xiang Yi’s fan club.

[CHEN] : Thanks.

“Guardian” replied with an emoticon and ran off to watch some clips from “Two Under One Roof” that featured Xiang Yi’s cut. From time to time, she would chuckle incessantly.

After half an hour or so, several new WeChat messages popped up on her screen.

—— [Damn, Xiang Yi has a rich fan! She made it to the top of the ‘Most Popular Female Celebrities’ list!]

—— [She’s also in first place on the ‘Most Popular Artiste’ list! I’m impressed, what kind of a godly boss is that fan!?!]

—— [Bunny’s Big Brother? This name seems a bit familiar, hahaha is it a “Brother-type Fan” of Xiang Yi’s?]

“Guardian” froze for a moment and proceeded to check the various charts, only to realize that this Brother-type Fan didn’t leave many comments but he was very generous with the votes!

She was so excited that she sent a message to the group chat. “Great, our Xiang Yi has a huge fan now!”

The members of the group chat chimed in.

All of a sudden…

—— [Bunny’s Big Brother]: Did someone bully her?

The group was silent for a few seconds and all of them immediately sent kneeling emojis to him.

After a while, someone finally sent a voice message to him. “Yes, “All is Well Year Round” who is one of the Shisui Sisters, is always influencing everyone to hate on Xiang Yi. Even after being proven wrong several times, she refused to stop her annoying behavior. She even said that Xiang Yi is forcing her to her death just now, I’m speechless.”

She even attached a link to the Weibo page of “All is Well Year Round” where “All is Well Year Round” said that she couldn’t stand the malice of this world and that her only ray of light had been snatched away.

Many fans comforted her in the comments below, and others even started criticizing Xiang Yi and blaming her for forcing someone who was suffering from depression, to develop suicidal thoughts. There were already more than 10,000 likes on that post.

Xiang Chen, who was standing in front of the floor-to-ceiling window, touched the messy hairs in front of his forehead while listening to the voice message patiently even though he had never liked listening to long voice messages.

‘Tsk. She bullied my Little Bunny, huh?’

—— [Bunny’s Big Brother]: I understand

——— [Bunny’s Big Brother]: I will send a lawyer’s letter to all the netizens who have insulted Xiang Yi.

The members of the group chat thought that he was joking but to their surprise, the official account of Lin Chen Law Firm really issued an official statement.

[Lin Chen Law Firm] : The Internet is still under the jurisdiction of the law.

There was a picture of a lawyer’s letter attached below, on which there was a long list of at least a few hundred Weibo user IDs!

In an instant, the foul-mouthed Shisui Sisters panicked!

‘How did this happen!?!’

chapters.title: Chapter 287 - Extremely Quiet
chapters.body:
Chapter 287 - Extremely Quiet

‘We just scolded Xiang Yi out of anger…’

‘Xiang Yi is a public figure, what’s wrong with receiving some criticism from the public? No one forced her to become a celebrity, why are we being issued a lawyer’s letter?’

To make matters worse, it was from Lin Chen Law Firm, which was a top notch law firm in the country…

Many of them felt like they were about to suffocate when they saw the letter and guiltily deleted their comments. They even changed their user IDs fearfully, afraid that they might be sanctioned by the law.

Hence, Xiang Yi’s fans were surprised and amazed to find that the Shisui Sisters who had previously been throwing lots of shade at Xiang Yi and condemning her ruthlessly, were now silent!

Finally, someone managed to deal with them!

At this moment, the fan chat group that Xiang Chen was in was flooded with messages.

[Boss, you’re awesome!]

No longer furious, Xiang Chen looked out of the window at the starry night sky. The light of the huge billboard that was shining brightly, fell on his chiseled face, slightly softening the sharp contours of his defined features.

There were only eight hours left before he would meet Xiang Yi.

…

…

Bright early in the morning of the next day…

Xiang Qi got out of bed wearily, his dark green silk robe all crumpled up after a night’s sleep. A few of his buttons were undone, baring a large patch of his fair skin and his toned abs.

He walked to the window to take in some fresh air, but vaguely saw two familiar figures.

Xiang Qi squinted, only to realize that the figures were too far away and hence, he couldn’t get a clear glimpse of them from the window. He quickly opened the camera app of his cell phone and zoomed in on the figurs.

Wow!

The figures were Xiang Yi who was feeding some deer outside the castle and Shi Sui who was standing languidly beside her.

…

“Eat slowly, don’t rush.” Xiang Yi voice was gentle and she was patiently feeding the same deer fawn from yesterday.

Numerous deer were standing behind the fawn and trying to get fed too…

Each deer was given a few pieces of deer cracker which they munched on merrily.

Xiang Yi had already given the recipe for deer crackers to the chef in the castle and Albert graciously said that he would be happy to feed these lovely “forest elves”.

“I’m leaving today, so be safe and don’t get caught by vile poachers.” Xiang Yi said. She suddenly turned her face to the side and asked, “Do they understand what I said?”

Shi Sui was quietly accompanying her by the side. When he heard her words, he laughed silently and said, “Why don’t you translate it to English then?”

Thinking that he made sense, Xiang Yi repeated the same words in English.

The fawn deer cocked its head. Its ears were furry and its eyes were round, containing the clearest gaze in the world.

It seemed to have understood something and rubbed its nose against Xiang Yi’s hand.

The softhearted Xiang Yi took out the last piece of deer cracker from her pocket and fed it to the fawn.

The deer behind instantly lined up to be rubbed and petted, not forgetting to tug Xiang Yi’s pocket to try to get her to pull out another deer cracker.

They were truly gluttons.

Xiang Yi couldn’t help but lick the corner of her lips and said, “I heard that venison is very nourishing…”

Shi Sui said, “Hunting is illegal in the country but I think Sika deer can be bred in captivity.”

Xiang Yi’s eyes lit up. “Shall we rear two of them and then cook them when they’re old enough?”

Shi Sui said with a smile, “It’s up to you.”

The deer: ???

…

Xiang Qi witnessed the entire scene. The morning sun, naive deer, and gentle girl who was accompanied by a man… It was clearly a heartwarming scene but it seemed as disturbing as a war scene!

Although he wanted to dash over to pull Shi Sui away from Xiang Yi…

He suddenly had a flash of inspiration!

He was inspired to design a couple’s outfit!

chapters.title: Chapter 288 - Big Brother Is Here
chapters.body:
Chapter 288 - Big Brother Is Here

He broke down and scratched his hair, torn between criticizing Shi Sui and noting down his inspiration…

Finally, Xiang Qi succumbed and decide to note down his inspiration…

Since his debut as a fashion designer, he had only ever designed ladies’ clothing. Now that there was finally a chance for a breakthrough, he had to seize it!

‘As for that scoundrel… Hah, Xiang Chen can come deal with him.’

‘Shi Sui, Shi Sui, you’re about to die soon! Hahahaha!!!’

With that thought in mind, Xiang Qi picked up a pen and a piece of paper, after which he started drawing on the paper fluidly while various ideas ran through his mind…

The designs of sets of couple outfits were put on paper with the movement of his fair, long, and slender fingers…

After petting all the deer with satisfaction, Xiang Yi waved goodbye to them.

The deer blinked and suddenly bit onto Xiang Yi’s clothes while staring at her with tears in her eyes.

Their beloved fairy/food source was about to leave, of course they’d be sad!

Xiang Yi immediately felt a little melancholic. She bit her lip and said softly, “I’ll visit you again next time, okay?”

*bleat*

“I’ll definitely visit again.”

*bleat*

“Next time, I’ll make you something better than deer crackers!”

“…”

The deer stared at her for a few seconds before slowly…letting go of Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi was amused and amazed by the intelligence of the deer!

Only after watching the herd of deer return to the forest, did Xiang Yi and Shi Sui walk back to the castle.

Xiang Yi inhaled sharply because she had accidentally slipped and twisted her ankle while turning her head around to look at the deer.

Shi Sui quickly held onto her in time and asked with a frown, “Are you okay? How about I carry you back?”

Imagining herself being carried Shi Sui, Xiang Yi felt a little…embarrassed and said calmly, “I’m fine, I can walk.”

In the next second…

A black Rolls-Royce pulled over beside them, and the car doors opened automatically, revealing the cold and indifferent gaze of the man inside the car.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘It’s Big Brother!’

She parted her lips slightly in a bid to greet him but she didn’t dare to call him ‘Big Brother’

Xiang Chen stepped out of the car calmly. He had a stature of 1.88 meters, broad shoulders, long legs, and defined, chiseled features. Dressed in an immaculate black suit, he exuded a cold and domineering aura that seemed to be able to crush the sunlight behind him.

He looked down and glanced at Xiang Yi.

“Is your leg broken?”

Terribly frightened, Xiang Yi shook her head and said, “No, I didn’t.”

“Why are you being nestled in a man’s embrace then?”

Xiang Yi snapped back to her senses and wanted to push Shi Sui’s fingers away but to her surprise, Shi Sui tightened his grip around her shoulders.

His eyes curved a little and he said with a faint smile, “Big Brother, it’s been a while since we last met~”

Xiang Chen made eye contact with him and both of them had a tacit confrontation with their gazes.

After a while, Xiang Chen sneered and ordered, “Get your filthy hands off her!”

Xiang Yi subconsciously defended Shi Sui. “He didn’t touch the deer, his hands are clean…”

Whoosh…

Xiang Chen glanced at them coldly and Xiang Yi cringed while looking at him pitifully, “Big Brother, my ankle hurts badly…”

In fact, the pain wasn’t that severe.

However, when Xiang Chen was around, the pain seemed to amplify and she felt more aggrieved than ever.

She had the guts to be fearlessly willful because she was often pampered and showered with love.

“Good that you know it hurts.” For some reason, Xiang Chen’s tone was less aggressive than before although it wasn’t cold and indifferent. He raised his brows and asked, “So?”

Xiang Yi said bravely, “So… Brother, can you carry me home?”

Xiang Chen glanced at her without saying anything.

‘Uwu~ No, no, I can’t take this, I’m about to cry in panic’

She chickened out immediately and asked, “Are you tired from the journey? I-I can carry you instead…”

chapters.title: Chapter 289 - Bridal Carry
chapters.body:
Chapter 289 - Bridal Carry

“…”

“…”

Xiang Yi was afraid that Xiang Chen wouldn’t believe that she was sincere and thus, she clenched her fist and tried to flex her muscles. “Brother, I’m very strong. If you don’t like carrying me, I can carry you instead…”

Xiang Chen glanced at her fair arm and couldn’t help but frown.

For the past year that Xiang Yi’s body had been occupied, “that person” used a very unhealthy method to lose weight—going on extreme diets. Hence, Xiang Yi was much thinner than she used to be and her arms were scarily thin. She seemed gaunt and fragile, as if she could be snapped in half easily.

‘Forget it, what am I getting upset at her for?’

Xiang Chen said with a sullen expression, “Come here.”

Xiang Yi didn’t move. It wasn’t that she didn’t want to but because she was really terrified!

She would feel a greater sense of security by staying by Shi Sui’s side.

Seeing that Xiang Yi was cowering towards Shi Sui, Xiang Chen’s temples throbbed. ‘Xiang Yi really needs to be taught a lesson, is she getting into a romantic relationship at such a young age!?’

‘Does she still care about the family rules!?!’

Shi Sui could guess what Xiang Yi was thinking. He looked down with an evil gaze and said in an innocent and sluggish tone, “Brother, I’ll just hold her.”

As he spoke, he helped Xiang Yi to the castle.

Xiang Chen shifted his gaze from Xiang Yi towards Shi Sui’s…legs.

He seemed to be sizing Shi Sui up and contemplating to break his leg.

He took a large stride forward and picked Xiang Yi up in his arms!

“Huh!?”

Xiang Yi watched in shock as Xiang Chen said with a straight face, “Your legs are too short, you won’t be able to keep up with my pace. I don’t want to waste time.”

“…”

‘Is that okay?’

However, Xiang Yi realized that Xiang Chen had picked her up in his arms!

‘Does this mean that he isn’t actually that angry with me?’

Xiang Yi carefully scratched her finger against the fabric of his blazer, anxious and overjoyed.

To her surprise, Xiang Chen said, “Tsk, you’re quite heavy.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

“You’re heavier than rice.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

“Um… In that case, I’ll walk on my own… Actually, I can walk…” Xiang Yi muttered. She felt a little conscious but of course, she was mostly afraid…

Xiang Chen was a man whom all his family members feared.

Xiang Chen said coldly, “You’re so noisy, shut up.”

Xiang Yi murmured, “…okay.”

She was even more afraid to speak.

Shi Sui, who was behind him, smirked gleefully.

‘Yet another man who can’t be spited~’

‘He’s clearly worried sick about his sister but he’s still pretending to be nonchalant. Clearly, he’s…not the type to express his feelings. Still waters run deep :)’

…

…

In the living room of the castle.

Xiang Chen put Xiang Yi on the sofa. Having been to the castle several times, he was familiar with the layout of the place. After doing so, he got up and went to the kitchen to get some ice.

Xiang Yi came downstairs with a stack of design sketches and showed them off to Xiang Yi like they were treasures. “Xiang Yi! Come take a look at the couple’s outfits I’ve designed!”

Xiang Yi took a glance at it and was instantly amazed.

In the past year, some people in the fashion industry had been disgruntled about the fact that Xiang Qi’s designs would often become trendsetting pieces. His haters would criticize him for sticking to the same design elements all the time and for being able to only design ladies’ clothing.

In fact, many designers in the world specialized only on a specific category of clothes. However, in the eyes of Xiang Qi’s haters, they felt that he would be considered a good-for-nothing who couldn’t live up to his title as a genius, if he wasn’t well-rounded enough to design all sorts of clothing.

They held him to harsh standards but were lenient with themselves.

However, this set of couple outfits that Xiang Qi had designed were very ethereal, exquisite, and absolutely beautiful!

“You designed couple’s outfits for her too?” Xiang Chen asked coldly in a low and deep voice.

After shuddering, Xiang Qi hurriedly denied in fear, “No! It’s a family outfit!”

chapters.title: Chapter 290 - The Demon Of The Xiang Family Does Live Up To Expectations
chapters.body:
Chapter 290 - The Demon Of The Xiang Family Does Live Up To Expectations

Xiang Chen scoffed. He then half-knelt beside Xiang Yi’s feet, lifted the hem of her trousers, and placed an ice bag on it.

Xiang Yi’s eyes widened, not because of Xiang Chen’s sneer but because of his actions…

‘Is he…taking care of me!?’

She tried to retract her feet uneasily and Xiang Chen glared at her with a threatening gaze. “Don’t move, behave yourself.”

Xiang Yi didn’t dare to move anymore and she remained seated obediently on the sofa.

Xiang Qi was still racking his brains to explain his creativity. “Xiang Chen, look, this one’s a siblings’ outfit…”

Xiang Chen remained cynical and indifferent.

‘Go on, keep trying to fool me.’

‘Watch how I’ll deal with you.’

‘Don’t think I don’t know that Xiang Yi is your muse and the source of your inspiration.’

Indeed, all of Xiang Qi’s designs were related to Xiang Yi to a certain extent. The perfect combination of his obsession with his sister and his ultimate pursuit for art had miraculously created a spark of inspiration.

Xiang Chen chuckled.

Xiang Qi was on the verge of tears and he instinctively tried to move closer to Shi Sui and hide behind him too.

“Brother Shi, save me…” he called softly.

The good-tempered Shi Sui said mellowly, “Sure…”

“Brother Shi, you’re really…” Before he could say the word ‘awesome’, he heard Shi Sui laughing. “I’m going to charge you a service fee, it’s up to you to to decide. Take it or leave it.”

“…”

‘Screw you!’

‘You really think I have to beg you, huh?’

‘Do you think I’m such a spineless person?’

‘Um, actually…I am.’

Xiang Qi said deferentially, “Yes, yes, Brother Shi, I’ll obey everything you say.”

Afterwards, Shi Sui said calmly, “The agency that Xiang Yi is signed to tends to take advantage of her all the time. Why don’t you let her be signed to Xiang Feng’s company instead? She’ll enjoy more freedom when deciding her future career path, be it withdraw from the entertainment industry or continue developing.”

Shi Sui understood that the mention of Xiang Feng would cause great displeasure to many.

As expected, Xiang Chen frowned and clipped, “What is he doing? It’s already been such a long time, why hasn’t he prepared the contract yet?”

Shi Sui chimed in, “Exactly.”

Xiang Chen exclaimed, “I’ll call him right now!”

He tossed the ice bag at Shi Sui and proceeded to call Xiang Feng with a sullen expression.

Xiang Feng, who was far away in Nancheng where it was nighttime, was woken up from his sleep by the call. He groggily answered the call from his eldest nephew, only to receive a scolding.

Xiang Feng was confused.

He was really puzzled.

…

In the living room.

Xiang Qi watched in shock as Shi Sui successfully carried out the simple ruse of distracting Xiang Chen by mentioning Xiang Feng.

‘What’s going on!?!’

‘Teach me!’

Shi Sui leaned over and meticulously iced Xiang Yi’s ankle with the ice bag.

Her fair toes were curled up and she was overwhelmed with uneasiness.

It didn’t seem like a big deal for her brother to ice her leg…

But now that Shi Sui was doing it, it seemed to feel completely different…

“Does it still hurt?” Shi Sui asked in a warm and gentle voice. In the instant that he looked up, Xiang Yi seemed to be avoiding eye contact with him.

The ambiguous tension made her heart race rapidly.

Xiang Yi cleared her throat and said, “I’m fine.”

Shi Sui asked, “Are you sure?”

After a brief moment of silence, Xiang Yi assented.

Only then did Shi Sui put away the ice pack. Seeing how uneasy she was, he chuckled and asked, “Are you that afraid of Xiang Chen? He can’t possibly eat you up.”

His original intention was to comfort Xiang Yi but he didn’t expect Xiang Yi and Xiang Qi to both widen their eyes in horror.

Xiang Qi muttered cowardly, “Big Brother… He won’t eat us up I reckon…”

Xiang Yi swallowed her saliva and said, “He…probably wouldn’t…”

The pair of siblings huddled up together while shivering in fear.

Shi Sui was speechless.

‘Indeed, Xiang Chen lives up to his title as the demon of the Xiang family.’

chapters.title: Chapter 291 - Xiang Chen Has A High Status
chapters.body:
Chapter 291 - Xiang Chen Has A High Status

…

Xiang Chen called again and shot Xiang Yi a glance. “We can sign the contract when we’re back.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘Such incredible efficiency!’

After that, Xiang Chen turned to gaze at Xiang Qi.

Xiang Qi was sprawled across the sofa at first, but he suddenly sprung up and sat upright. Back straight and hands on knees, he looked just like an obedient elementary school student.

There was eye contact.

One second…

Two seconds…

Three seconds…

Xiang Qi broke down. “I was wrong, I was wrong!”

Xiang Chen said, “Tell me what your mistake is.”

“I’m wrong about everything!” Xiang Yi said feebly. “Yes, it’s indeed a couple’s outfit, but it’s just a design I came up with. It doesn’t mean I support Xiang Yi getting into a relationship too soon!”

Xiang Chen said, “Continue.”

Xiang Qi admitted right away. “I shouldn’t have sneakily eaten the deer crackers that Xiang Yi made…but I’ve already had the runs yesterday…”

Xiang Yi felt a little speechless. “I told you those weren’t edible for humans.”

The next second, Xiang Chen said in a devilish voice, “Your turn, Xiang Yi.”

The first thing she did was to move toward Shi Sui…

Shi Sui grinned and rested his arm on the back of the sofa behind Xiang Yi. It looked like he was holding the slender Xiang Yi in his arms.

“The deer are so cute, I-I shouldn’t have thought of eating venison,” Xiang Yi answered timidly in a shaky voice as if she were an elementary school student.

She looked nothing like the boss that came from the transmigration world.

“What else?” Xiang Chen squinted and asked while staring at her.

Xiang Yi’s eyes were full of confusion.

‘I didn’t do anything bad apart from this…’

Xiang Chen sneered and deliberately said, “Don’t think I don’t know that you’ve fallen in love!”

His tone was fierce and his aura was so domineering that it made Xiang Yi panic. “Ah, I… Did I?”

Shi Sui fell silent. ‘Xiang Chen is quite impressive.’

Xiang Yi was slightly relieved to see his sister’s reaction. “It’s best if that’s the case.”

Xiang Yi exclaimed with great relief, “I’ll go prepare your in-flight meal then!”

She scurried into the kitchen, feeling as if she had just escaped an ordeal.

Xiang Qi was no longer in the mood to eat the food that Xiang Yi had cooked. He put away his large bowl and said, “Brother, I’ll go make a dress for Xiang Yi now! Bye!”

‘I’m not being a coward, I’m just following my heart’s desire…’

Xiang Chen and Shi Sui were the only ones left in the living room.

Xiang Chen sat down on a single-seat couch and crossed his slender legs. He folded his arms and warned sternly, “You’d better not harbor any inappropriate designs on Xiang Yi.”

Shi Sui said, “Sure, Brother~”

Xiang Chen answered, “Speak properly.”

Shi Sui blinked. “What if Xiang Yi is the one who has designs on me? Should I accept her or defend against her? Tsk…”

Xiang Chen was confused.

He took a deep breath. There was only one thought in his mind now.

‘This scoundrel is asking for a beating!’

…

…

Xiang Yi had whipped up a sumptuous spread, and she placed them into air-tight thermos containers. Some of the dishes were left to chill in the refrigerator. Later on, she would bring them up to Air Bunbun.

They were going to board the plane with Xiang Chen and travel together later!

Albert walked over when he smelled the aroma, and he was so thick-skinned that he asked to try it.

Xiang Yi grinned and said, “I made you a set too.”

Extremely touched, Albert exclaimed, “Alice, you’re an angel!”

In the next second…

Xiang Chen said coldly, “Didn’t you cook those dishes for me? Pack up all of them.”

Albert exclaimed in dismay, “Are you a devil?!”

Xiang Chen nodded and said, “Thank you for the compliment.”

Albert was speechless.

chapters.title: Chapter 292 - Not As Pretentious As You
chapters.body:
Chapter 292 - Not As Pretentious As You

…

…

Xiang Chen watched as Xiang Yi bit the bullet and put the food into containers.

Air Bunbun landed in the manor, and Xiang Chen boarded the plane together with Xiang Yi.

Albert bade them goodbye tearfully, unsure if he was sad because they were parting or because he wouldn’t get to eat the food that Xiang Yi cooked anymore…

The aircraft hovered and rose into the sky.

The deer in the forest seemed to have detected it as it raised its head and began bleating, seemingly bidding farewell to Xiang Yi.

…

On board Air Bunbun.

In addition to a resting area, there was also a chatting area where there was a sofa and a coffee table.

Xiang Chen was the first to take a seat.

Shi Sui sat opposite him.

The two men then looked at Xiang Yi in unison.

The two rows of sofas were opposite to each other. In other words, Xiang Yi could only choose to sit next to either of them.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

If she sat beside Xiang Chen, she definitely wouldn’t be able to escape if she got hit…

‘It seems that it would be safer to sit beside Shi Sui…right?’

With such a mindset, she slowly moved toward Shi Sui and sat down beside him.

In an instant…

One was pleased and smug.

The other had an icy cold gaze.

Xiang Chen picked up the porcelain teacup and took a sip of green tea.

‘I’m not angry. I’m not angry at all.’

Shi Sui was composed, and he even started chatting with Xiang Yi. The topic of conversation revolved around “Two Under One Roof” and Xiang Yi gradually relaxed.

Xiang Chen waited for more than minutes and before Xiang Yi said anything to him, he was almost going to crush the porcelain cup.

“Ahem.” He cleared his throat.

That seemed to have a silencing effect as Xiang Yi quickly fell silent.

Shi Sui smiled at her and kept quiet too.

Xiang Chen frowned. ‘Am I that scary?’

He loosened his tie with his bony and fair fingers. After undoing the top two buttons of the shirt, he leaned back on the sofa in an extremely relaxed state.

“What do you plan to do next?” he asked sternly, looking like a discipline master.

After being shocked for a few seconds, Xiang Yi finally realized that he was asking her that question.

She answered softly, “I-I don’t have any plans. I’m just going to film for the variety show and do some cooking. I’ll start living my retirement life in advance.”

Xiang Chen asked casually, “Is it because you’re feeling exhausted?”

Xiang Yi shook her head and said, “Cooking is not tiring.”

Doing something you genuinely enjoy will never be tiring.

Xiang Chen continued to ask, “Did anyone bully you?”

He glanced at Shi Sui ambiguously.

Xiang Yi was extremely obedient and said in a mellow voice, “No, everyone is pretty nice, and I enjoy myself when filming for the variety show.”

Xiang Chen expressed assent and said calmly, “If someone upsets you, do you know what to do?”

‘I know!’

Xiang Yi answered agitatedly, “I’ll tell you guys!”

“You’re childish.” Xiang Chen said coldly, “You have to make them unhappier than you are, you hear?”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

“You need me to teach you how to do that?”

Xiang Yi swallowed her saliva and said, “I should know how to do it.”

Xiang Chen finally seemed to be satisfied with her answer.

…

The journey lasted for a long time, and Xiang Yi soon began to feel sleepy so she fell asleep while leaning against the sofa.

Shi Sui moved her head and let it rest on his shoulder as if there was no one around.

Xiang Chen was confused.

‘Do you think I’m dead?’

Before he said anything, Shi Sui said, “I didn’t expect your brother to really get angry, I didn’t do it on purpose.”

Xiang Chen gritted his teeth. “You…”

Shi Sui interrupted innocently, “Brother, don’t get angry, I’ll apologize to you, okay?”

Xiang Chen was flabbergasted.

‘Damn it, you’re so pretentious!’

chapters.title: Chapter 293 - Pretentious Shi Sui
chapters.body:
Chapter 293 - Pretentious Shi Sui

Apart from Xiang Feng, no one had made Xiang Chen that angry in recent years.

He questioned in a cold voice, “Are you openly taking liberties with my sister right in front of me?”

“Brother, why would you think that way?” Shi Sui said smilingly. “I’m just helping Xiang Yi because I’m scared that she might not sleep well~ I didn’t even ask Xiang Yi to thank me.”

Xiang Chen took a deep breath and exhaled…

‘A little endurance… my foot!’

Seeing that violence was about to break out in Air Bunbun, Shi Sui interjected and said something that eventually made Xiang Chen compromise. “Brother, can you be gentle when you hit me? I’m afraid that we might disturb Xiang Yi.”

‘Screw you!’

After glancing at Xiang Yi who was fast asleep, Xiang Chen closed his eyes and suppressed his urge to throw him off the plane.

…

Perhaps because Xiang Chen was around, Xiang Yi subconsciously felt a strong sense of security even though she often appeared to be very scared of him. She slept for more than two hours during the flight.

She opened her eyes in confusion, only to realize that she was sleeping with her head on Shi Sui’s shoulder. She propped herself up and apologized softly, “I’m sorry, I didn’t mean to… Why didn’t you push me away…”

Seated opposite them, Xiang Chen was so angry that he wanted to vomit blood. ‘This a**hole put your head on his shoulder! He wished he could glue you to him!’

Shi Sui didn’t move and simply said evilly, “My shoulder is a little sore.”

Xiang Yi suggested in a gentle voice, “Should I give you a massage?”

“Will that be troublesome for you?”

“No, no, it’s my fault to begin with.”

Shi Sui blinked gently and said, “Thank you, Xiang Yi.”

When Xiang Chen saw that——

‘This is such a pretentious thing to do!’

He pinched his forehead and could vaguely understand what Shi Sui meant when he said that Xiang Yi might harbor designs on him.

‘This dog laid a trap for Xiang Yi and tricked her into falling for it!’

However, what puzzled him was that Xiang Yi had always kept her guard up against others, but she didn’t seem to be wary of Shi Sui at all!

…

However, despite being angry, he still had to eat.

When he took the food out of the thermos container, it was still piping hot.

Xiang Yi had prepared six dishes and one soup, which were nutritious and sumptuous. Most of the dishes were Xiang Chen’s favorite.

The braised meatballs were made with minced pork that was 70% lean and 30% fatty, mixed with water chestnuts, mushrooms, and other ingredients. They were first fried and then cooked. The meatballs were juicy and indulgent.

The steamed carrot dish was made of shredded carrots mixed with some vegetable oil, flour and salt, left to steam, and lastly drizzled with garlic sauce and chili oil. The carrots were soft, airy, and delicious.

The other dishes include mapo tofu, braised chicken pieces, fried eggs with shrimp, wintermelon and pork ribs soup and so on. Due to the limited range of food ingredients, the dishes that Xiang Yi prepared were just some common home-cooked dishes. However, they gave Xiang Chen the taste of home that he hadn’t had in a long time.

After taking the first bite of the food, he stopped frowning; even Shi Sui seemed less detestable.

Xiang Yi picked up a piece of braised pork ball fearfully and gave it to Xiang Chen. “Eat up, Brother.”

She was so nervous that her palms were sweaty, and she had even braced herself for the scene where Xiang Chen would throw her dishes into the bin.

However, to her surprise…

Xiang Chen ate the food that she had given him with a normal expression.

Greatly relieved, Xiang Yi asked, “How does it taste?”

“So-so,” Xiang Chen remarked indifferently.

In the next second…

He blocked Shi Sui’s chopsticks with his chopsticks and raised his eyebrows while warning coldly, “Try picking up another piece of food.”

chapters.title: Chapter 294 - : Obsessive Fan (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 294 - : Obsessive Fan (1)

Xiang Yi’s brothers were all bachelors, so whether or not they were protective husbands was an unsolved mystery. However, they were very protective of their food…

Their skills at protecting their food was comparable to their skills in climbing trees and being arrogant.

When Xiang Chen wasn’t around, they would snatch as much of the food as possible; but when Xiang Chen was around, they would distribute the food into individual servings.

Of course, the servings weren’t equal.

Rather, it was based on status and combat power 🙂

Xiang Chen would forever be No. 1.

Hence, he would get the largest share of the food, and no one would dare to take a single grain of rice from him!

After the distribution was completed, everyone protected their food very well as if a beast had successfully gotten a share of the territory.

Shi Sui decided to use a passive-aggressive approach and moved his chopsticks away. He then said to Xiang Yi with a forced smile, “It’s okay, I can just eat some vegetables.”

As he spoke, he picked up a piece of vegetable and placed it in the bowl.

In contrast, Xiang Chen was like a tyrannical landlord who bullied the weak.

Xiang Yi began to waver again.

She moved closer to Shi Sui and whispered, “Don’t be scared, I saved you some food. You can eat them sneakily later, but make sure you don’t get caught!”

Shi Sui said with an evil smirk, “Xiang Yi, you’re so nice~”

The eyebrows of Xiang Chen, who had a sharp sense of hearing, twitched violently.

…

More than ten hours later.

The plane arrived at the Xiang family’s manor.

Due to the time difference, it was still daytime in Nancheng.

Xiang Chen barely caught a wink on the plane, so he headed back to his room to catch up on sleep right after they got off the plane.

Xiang Yi was all refreshed after a long nap on the plane, so she decided to go to Little Rabbit Farm to get two geese and bring them home for the stew that she was going to make.

Shi Sui naturally accompanied her.

They strolled along the lush bushes and flower beds. For some reason, they felt like an old married couple who were enjoying the peace and each other’s company.

All of a sudden…

Shi Sui received a call from his agent, Si Chuanbai.

He frowned and Xiang Yi stopped in her tracks when she sensed that something was wrong.

The phone call didn’t last for long.

After hanging up the phone, Shi Sui said somewhat apologetically, “Sorry, I have to go take care of some matters, I’m afraid I can’t accompany you anymore.”

Xiang Yi said, “It’s alright, I can just go by myself.”

Before she finished speaking, she heard the sounds of an argument coming from the entrance of the manor.

“Get out of the way! I want to see Shi Sui!”

“I saw the plane touchdown! I want to see him! Right now!”

“Don’t touch me, or I’ll call the police and tell them that you raped me!”

“…”

A woman was yelling hysterically at the top of her lungs, while a few security guards were trying their best to persuade. There was quite a ruckus.

Shi Sui’s face was sullen, and his eyes were full of an obscure gloominess.

Xiang Yi was slightly stunned. She had actually never seen Shi Sui losing his temper before, but she instinctively sensed that…he was angry.

His thin lips were pressed together tightly as he strode toward the entrance of the manor.

Xiang Yi was worried that he might act irrationally, so she frantically chased after him.

…

Outside the mansion.

“All is Well Year Round”, whose real name was Qiao Ruo’an, immediately beamed with joy that was written all over her gaunt face when she saw the slender and taut figure of Shi Sui from afar!

‘It’s him…’

‘It’s really him…’

‘He’s walking toward me…’

The long-legged Shi Sui had taken large strides so he soon reached where she was. He nodded politely and said, “You’re Miss Qiao, right? I heard that you have been looking for me.”

His voice was mixed with a tinge of anger, and it was much deeper and hoarser than before, making him sound even more alluring.

Gazing at him with infatuation, the smitten Qiao Ruo’an eagerly confessed her feelings for him. “Yes, I’ve been looking for you for a long time! I’m a huge fan of yours! I really like you so much!!!”

Shi Sui said politely, “Thank you for your support, but this is a private residence. May I arrange for a car to send you away?”

Qiao Ruo’an said righteously, “No, I’m not leaving, I finally got to see you. Why should I leave!?!”

She reached out to grab Shi Sui’s hand without warning…

chapters.title: Chapter 295 - Obsessive Fans (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 295 - Obsessive Fans (2)

At the critical moment, Shi Sui took a step back and dodged to prevent her from touching him.

Qiao Ruo’an missed and stumbled forward, almost losing her balance and falling onto the ground.

She raised her head in disbelief and looked at Shi Sui.

‘Why? Why did he avoid me?’

‘Am I some kind of garbage that should be avoided!?’

“I adore you, I really do.” Qiao Ruo’an desperately confessed her feelings to Shi Sui. “I’ve liked you ever since you debuted and I’ve also watched all the movies and TV dramas that you acted in. I vote for you to bump your position up on the charts every single day. I gave up my studies for your sake and spent all my free time on you…”

However, Shi Sui did not seem touched at all.

Qiao Ruo’an suddenly had a thought in mind. ‘He looks mellow and gentle only on the surface. In fact, he’s such a withdrawn and aloof person…’

“Giving up your studies and your life for anyone is not a sensible choice,” Shi Sui said coldly in a clear voice. “You have your own life to lead and I should not be the only person your life revolves around. Miss Qiao, I won’t hold it against you for secretly taking photos of me and tailgating my car previously. I hope that you can return to your normal life and I’ll give you my blessings.”

Qiao Ruo’an muttered, “You mean…you don’t need my adoration?”

She widened her eyes in disbelief, unable to accept reality.

She happened to notice Xiang Yi.

In fact, Xiang Yi kept a great distance from them but in the eyes of the paranoid Qiao Ruo’an, Xiang Yi was deliberately trying to provoke her!

She became even more emotionally unstable when she saw Xiang Yi.

“Is it because of her? What’s so good about her? Why are you so concerned about her? Why do you care about her? You shouldn’t even take a single glance at her!”

She said agitatedly, “I’m clearly the one who adores you the most and I gave in the most for you. Will you just take a look at me? Even if you must like someone, it should be me…”

Qiao Ruoan’s logic was very extreme. She expected him to like her back just because she liked him and had put in a lot of effort for him.

Otherwise, he would be letting her down!

The car arranged by Si Chuanbai was driven over and he alighted from the car and then opened the door of the backseat.

Shi Sui insisted harshly, “Miss Qiao, please.”

That was undoubtedly a bolt from the blue for Qiao Ruo’an.

“Are you…chasing me away? Just because of that bitch Xiang Yi?!”

Shi Sui, who had always been considered polite, suddenly said coldly after hearing her words. “Miss Qiao, please mind your words.”

At this moment, there were some fluctuations in his emotions even though he usually didn’t feel much.

Refusing to believe him, Qiao Ruo’an said, “You…you snapped at me because of her… Without my support, you’ll be nothing! Now that you’re famous, you’ve decided to abandon me for that bitch!?! Shi Sui, you’re so heartless! You jerk!”

Si Chuanbai was dumbfounded.

‘She made herself sound like the lawful wife and Miss Xiang Yi the mistress. What a straw man argument.’

He was much more straightforward. “Miss Qiao, this is not the first time you harassed Shi Sui. You dined at the same restaurant as him, bought a plane ticket for the seat beside him, and even knocked on his door… You’re already an adult and you should be responsible for yourself. If you continue acting like this, I’ll have to report you to the police.”

“Go ahead and do that then! Let’s see if the police will arrest you guys or me! I think you’re out to kill me!”

Qiao Ruo’an suddenly took out a tripod from her bag and attached her cell phone to it before starting the live-stream.

The words ‘Countdown To Suicide’ were displayed conspicuously at the top of the screen…

chapters.title: Chapter 296 - Live-Stream Flopped (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 296 - Live-Stream Flopped (1)

…

When Qiao Ruo’an saw Air Bunbun touching down a few minutes ago, she had already posted a teaser on Weibo.

[“All is Well Year Round”: If all hope comes from you, you’re the reason for the pain that I’m feeling today too. Maybe, leaving this world will be the best form of relief. I’m tired, I really am.]

The link to the live-stream was attached to her post. When her fans saw the words ‘Countdown To Suicide’, they were extremely frightened.

—— [Oh my God, Sister, take it easy!]

—— [s there anyone who can contact her in real life!?! I’m worried sick!]

—— [Ahhh, I don’t know if it works but look at her previous location, she should be from Nancheng. @PeaceNancheng]

Someone raised a doubt.

[Suicide on live-stream? Why does it seem like she’s just seeking attention or trying to threaten someone…]

The number of comments increased to a hundred within just a few short minutes.

—— [B*tch, kneel down!]

—— [Who would try to seek attention at the expense of their own lives!? Screw you!]

—— [Do you have any sympathy at all? She’s already on the verge of suicide and yet, you’re still being so mean to her!]

—— [I hate it when people weep miserably in front of the camera. I really want to curse my heart out when I read your comment!]

…

It wouldn’t be an exaggeration to say that that Weibo post caused a huge uproar among the fans.

Hence, as soon as the live-stream began, tens of thousands of people immediately tuned in.

When they saw the gaunt and haggard-looking “All is Well Year Round” whose eyes were reddened, many people took pity on her.

—— [I dare not imagine what you’ve experienced…]

—— [Sister, let me hug you and treat you to milk tea, okay?”

—— [Ah, I’ve been a fan of idols for years and I really understand how it feels to want someone that you can’t have.]

…

However, at the next second, Qiao Ruo’an flipped the camera and pointed it at Shi Sui’s face. She questioned, “Tell me, have you fallen in love with that bitch Xiang Yi?!”

Although the camera was pointed from a close-up angle that was supposed to be unflattering, Shi Sui’s face was still flawless and his long eyelashes were drooping. It was as if he was shrouded in ice as he exuded a cold aura.

He said calmly, “Miss Qiao, we are all independent individuals and we have the freedom to love whoever we can, regardless of gender. That’s the freedom that we are born with.”

“However, liking someone should never be a reason for you to harm others.”

The fans who were watching the live-stream:

—— [Damn it, Shi Sui!?!]

—— [Wow, his words are so impactful. Simply awesome!!!]

—— [No, wait, am I the only one who’s confused? Why is “All is Well Year Round” with Shi Sui now?]

—— [I’m going to make a comment softly, this manor seems to be the set of “Two Under One Roof”. “All is Well Year Round” seems to be an obsessive stalker fan…]

…

Qiao Ruo’an said, “I can’t outargue you but I just want you to like me. Is it that difficult? I’ve done so much for you but you don’t care about me at all. Does the support of your fans not matter to you at all?”

Si Chuanbai’s expression changed a little.

‘She’s going a little overboard with trying to mislead the others.’

‘If something goes wrong, the fans will stop liking Shi Sui.’

As an artiste manager, he would of course, prioritize the interests of his artiste. Hence, he went forward to stop Qiao Ruo’an. “Miss Qiao, you are not only trespassing a private residence, you’re also filming without permission…”

Whoosh——

Qiao Ruo’an whipped out a fruit knife and looked like she was about to slit her wrist. “Don’t come here!”

Si Chuanbai immediately stopped moving, for fear that he would agitate her.

The fans watching the live-stream were dumbstruck.

—— [Damn, she’s an obsessive stalker fan!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 297 - Live-Stream Flopped (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 297 - Live-Stream Flopped (2)

Chapter 297: Live-Stream Flopped (2)

—— [See how skillful and familiar she is, she must have done this a lot.]

—— [??????? Damn, such obsessive behavior! What a stalker!]

—— [According to the time, Shi Sui should have just arrived in China a short while ago. He doesn’t get to rest after a long-haul flight of more than ten hours, and now he’s being filmed by a stalker from such an unflattering angle. It’s so scary to think about it…]

…

The public opinion changed all of a sudden.

Qiao Ruo’an glanced at the pop-up messages, only to be puzzled by the comments.

‘Why are they not supporting me anymore?’

‘Why has my livestream flopped!?’

However, she didn’t have the time to think about that now because she just wanted to threaten Shi Sui and make him give in to her.

To her surprise, Shi Sui answered directly to her question.

“I’m very thankful for the support of my fans. Being liked and supported is a lucky thing for actors.”

“Without fans, I, Shi Sui, won’t be who I am today.”

“However, undisturbed personal space is something that everyone wants to have, and I would prefer that fans focus on my work, not me as an individual, and much less my private life.”

His response was polite and sincere, and it made him seem very likable!

—— [Woo~ Well said, Shi Sui!]

—— [He’s an actor! An actor!!! Not the person whom “All is Well Year Round” should be harassing!]

—— [It must be hard on Shi Sui. He managed to carve a career of his own with his hard work, but he still has to face such treatment from his obsessive fans.]

…

Si Chuanbai was emotional.

He was well aware that Shi Sui wasn’t being polite and saying those words out of courtesy but rather, he meant it from the bottom of his heart.

Fans were akin to top traffic volume. As long as he wanted to make use of his fans, he would be able to earn loads of money.

Those who were immoral would take on endorsements for unscrupulous merchants.

As long as one was thick-skinned enough, making money wouldn’t be a huge problem.

However, Shi Sui was not like that.

He wouldn’t agree to sponsorships and commercial activities easily and was particularly serious about acting. Even for cameo roles that he wouldn’t get paid for, he would make sure to put in all his effort and never films perfunctorily.

Si Chuanbai genuinely felt from the bottom of his heart that Shi Sui was worthy of being an idol and truly deserved all the achievements he had made!

However, Qiao Ruo’an panicked. Without the help of the public, she wouldn’t be able to threaten Shi Sui.

She made up her mind and said, “I just want you to accompany me for three days! After those three days, I won’t bother you again for the rest of my life! If you don’t agree, I will…” 1

“You will what?” Shi Sui interrupted her. “You don’t even cherish your life. Have you ever considered the feelings of those who care about you?”

However, Qiao Ruo’an refused to listen to him. She hollered with bloodshot eyes, “You can’t even fulfill such a simple request of mine!?”

Some fans in the livestream couldn’t help but butt in.

—— [Actually, Shi Sui can just agree for now just to placate her…]

—— [Shi Sui is a bit too cruel. It’s not the time to reason with her now, a life is at stake! Does he understand or not!?!]

—— [Yeah, there’s no harm in telling a white lie. “All is Well Year Round” seems to be mentally unsound. He can just lie to her before sending her to a psychiatrist for treatment.]

Everyone was pointing fingers at Shi Sui, as if they were much wiser than him.

All of a sudden, Qiao Ruo’an slid her wrist across the blade and as soon as her skin was slit, a pair of large and strong hands stopped her with great force.

Qiao Ruo’an struggled with all her might, but she ended up stabbing Shi Sui’s arm in a moment of panic…

“Ah~!” She screamed hysterically and tossed her phone away.

Shi Sui remained calm and even snatched the fruit knife away from her hand indifferently while blood flowed all over his fair skin.

He said softly and coldly, “I’m sorry, but I can’t lie to you.”

“Because I’m carrying a torch for someone, and I want to be a good person for her sake.”

chapters.title: Chapter 298 - Goose Stewed In An Iron Pot (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 298 - Goose Stewed In An Iron Pot (1)

Shi Sui spoke austerely in a raspy voice that was deep and low, but it frightened Qiao Ruo’an.

For a second, she even thought that Shi Sui would stab her in the chest with that knife.

However, in just a second, he calmly turned the knife away casually before tossing it far away.

Clang…

The fruit knife fell to the ground.

Qiao Ruo’an’s cell phone too, fell onto the ground with the camera lens facing downwards. Thus, the screen of the netizens watching the live-stream turned pitch-black and numerous comments popped up.

—— [Ahh, did Shi Sui get stabbed?]

—— [I have only three words for these stupid obsessive stalker fans. Go to hell!]

—— [Shi Sui, please be alright! *cries out loud*]

—— [What’s wrong with this woman? Is it funny to threaten others using her own life?]

…

Shi Sui’s voice was rather soft when he said those words so no one except Qiao Ruo’an heard him.

Si Chuanbai and the other security guards held Qiao Ruo’an down.

The sound of sirens began to get louder and louder as the police cars approached.

Qiao Ruo’an broke down completely. “You like her? How can you like her? How is she better than me in any way… She’s just a bitch…”

Si Chuanbai covered her mouth calmly with a rag that he picked up.

Qiao Ruo’an was so furious that she rolled her eyes, but she couldn’t say a single word.

Soon, Qiao Ruo’an was taken away by the police in the police car and her cell phone was also confiscated as an object of evidence.

The live-stream ended.

The last panning shot captured a slender figure trotting towards Shi Sui.

The netizens who had stayed began actively discussing.

—— [I’m really curious, how long will her jail term be for committing such an act?]

—— [I guess she’ll very likely be sent for reform… What I’m most worried about now is that someone might mimic her and follow suit.]

—— [Ahh, is the person who walked past Xiang Yi? Xiang Yi, quick, let us take a look at Shi Sui’s arm!]

—— [Am I the only one who thinks that the Vase Fairy is at fault for this incident? If she hadn’t seduced Shi Sui, she wouldn’t have provoked “All is Well Year Round” and incurred her wrath. This wouldn’t have happened either.]

As soon as that person posted that comment, all the netizens in the comments section retorted.

—— [Yes, you’re the only one who thinks that way, you orphan.]

—— [Dear, I suggest you go to the hospital to have your brain checked by a neurologist.]

—— [Yes, yes, yes, everything you say is right, come on, come on, everyone, let’s wish it well. Rest in peace *candle* *candle*]

…

In the manor.

Xiang Yi ran too quickly and thus, was a little out of breath as she panted heavily when she stopped. However, she didn’t have time to rest at all. She took off her lightweight jacket and treated Shi Sui’s wound simply to stop the bleeding before grabbing his other arm.

“Let’s go back and take care of your wound.”

Shi Sui let her take him away as he followed obediently. At this moment, the cold attitude he had when he faced Qiao Ruo’an had been replaced by a warm and somewhat languid attitude. He asked gently, “Are you worried about me?”

Xiang Yi felt a little self-reproachful. “I should have accompanied you so that I could protect you.”

‘Shi Sui is too weak and vulnerable.’

Si Chuanbai was speechless.

He was at a loss for words because Shi Sui was completely capable of protecting himself. Not only had he received elite training since he was a teenager, he had also specially trained in mixed martial arts (MMA) with a world-class coach in preparation for the filming of a martial arts movie previously,

Logically speaking, he should have been able to dodge Qiao Ruo’an’s attack just now…

Si Chuanbai suspected that Shi Sui was just faking it.

He could hear their conversation clearly when he was walking behind them.

“Xiang Yi, the wound hurts,” he said in a “feeble” voice.

Xiang Yi coaxed softly, “Let’s go have stewed goose later, shall we?”

Shi Sui chuckled. “Sure~”

chapters.title: Chapter 299 - Goose Stewed In An Iron Pot (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 299 - Goose Stewed In An Iron Pot (2)

In the living room.

Xiang Yi took out the first aid kit and first cleaned Shi Sui’s wound before disinfecting it carefully.

Fortunately, the wound was not deep and was only superficial. However, the amount of blood loss was terrifying.

Xiang Yi raised her head to look at him. “Do you need to take a painkiller?”

“I think I can endure it.”

“It’s okay, you don’t have to tolerate it.”

Si Chuanbai was speechless.

‘Why did I come in!?!’

‘They’re just getting the wound treated, why do they have to say such mushy things!?!’

Xiang Yi said softly, “Actually, my hearing is bad so if you cry or wail, I won’t be able to hear anything.”

Shi Sui blinked, stared at her for a few seconds, and then shifted his gaze onto Si Chuanbai nonchalantly.

He seemed to be asking Si Chuanbai why he was still around.

Si Chuanbai was dressed like an elite in a black suit, and was seated with his back straight.

Although he wasn’t smiling, deep down, he was thinking, ‘I must have a share of the stewed goose!’

“Ahem, my hearing is bad and I’ve never had a perfect score for my listening assessments,” Si Chuanbai, the elite artiste manager, said as he tried to act like he had a bad sense of hearing.

Xiang Yi took out some painkillers and was about to hand it to Shi Sui but he parted his lips calmly and opened his mouth coquettishly like a kid trying to ask for candy.

The young girl subconsciously stuffed the painkillers into his mouth.

She gently touched his thin lips which were slightly cool and moist to touch.

She curled her fingers uncomfortably before looking down to continue dressing his wound.

After a while…

Shi Sui said, “Xiang Yi, it still hurts badly.”

Xiang Yi said worriedly, “The effects of the painkillers won’t kick in so quickly… Why don’t I think of another solution?”

The gaze in his dark eyes gradually became darker and he glanced at her lips.

Si Chuanbai was speechless.

‘Why is my artiste so delicate and vulnerable now? When he broke his bones during filming in the past, he could still follow through casually with a smile. Why is he complaining about the pain now!?!’

He watched as Xiang Yi carefully gave him a few stitches.

“Is it better?”

“Much better.”

Only then did Xiang Yi feel much more relieved and she patted his head comfortingly. “Rest well while I go make you some snacks.”

To her surprise, she walked towards the outdoor kitchen, Shi Sui tagged along closely.

Xiang Yi was confused.

Shi Sui said with a straight face, “I intend to do a live-stream and give my fans an explanation so that they won’t be worried.”

Xiang Yi said as if she had come to an epiphany, “That’s very considerate of you, should I ask Director Li to come here?”

Li Jianyu was more skillful at directing live-streams.

Shi Sui raised his hand and wrapped his fair and slender fingers around the hem of her skirt. “But I won’t be doing the live-stream alone. I want to do it together with you, Xiang Yi.”

Si Chuanbai was speechless.

He raised his hand to hold his forehead, hiding his dumbfounded expression.

‘I can’t watch this, I really can’t.’

“Oh…” Xiang Yi thought that it wasn’t a big deal. After all, Shi Sui was an emotionally vulnerable man, or so she thought. “Let’s do it together then.”

Hence, the live-stream for “Two Under One Roof” began earlier than usual today.

…

“To our dear viewers, make sure not to miss this. On today’s menu, we have stewed goose in an iron pot and the only main ingredient is one goose. Yes, that’s it.”

Li Jianyu was extremely playful as he asked the cameraman to aim the camera at the large white goose that was walking in a carefree manner.

The big white goose was bold and wandered to the camera with a domineering stride. It tilted its head and cawed.

The pop-up comments on the screen:

—— [Quick… Run… Ah!]

—— [It’s dangerous, you’re in danger!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 300 - Goose Stewed In An Iron Pot (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 300 - Goose Stewed In An Iron Pot (3)

…

…

In the next second, a pair of fair and slender hands seemed to have appeared out of nowhere and picked it up mercilessly.

“This one is so fatty, it’ll definitely be fragrant after I stew it,” Xiang Yi said in a gentle and tender voice as she gave it a serious review.

The netizens were appalled.

‘What? Little fairy, why do you have to say the cruelest words in the most gentle tone?’

—— [Deceased: Goose, Cause of death: Excessive obesity]

—— [How many times have I said it? If you’re too fat, you’ll get eaten up!]

—— [I’m shivering in front of the screen while chewing on some roasted duck neck and sipping on milk tea…]

…

They clamored about the cruelty of humans. The fat white goose was dragged away by the cruel Xiang Yi while shrieking incessantly.

The cameraman also took a long shot of Xiang Yi as she strutted away domineeringly…

A few minutes later…

The goose was slaughtered.

Due to the fact that the process was too gruesome and gory, the cameraman didn’t film much of it. By the time the audience saw the goose, it was already laying naked on the chopping board…

The citizens who were posting comments were extremely playful.

—— [Goose: You people are so shameless! You’re lusting over my body!]

—— [This variety show is so delicious… Ahem, I mean, it’s so enjoyable, I’m going to write down the recipes.]

—— [The goose’s life has been short but full of slender, ordinary but noble. It has left this world peacefully.]

…

There were also a few aggressive ones who kept criticizing.

—— [This is so upsetting. The goose is so cute, why do you have to eat the goose?]

—— [Why are you so greedy for food? That’s a life we’re talking about!]

—— [Girls should be more gentle and virtuous. Killing a harmless little animal is too cruel! Vase Fairy, you’re so ruthless and unfeeling!]

…

In response, the netizens decided not to give them any attention.

Reason being, it was time for the Mukbang that would make everyone elated!

The fresh goose meat was cut into small pieces and placed in a pot, after which cold water was added. After some blanching, the meat cubes were fished out.

Xiang Yi had chopped up some onions, garlic, dried chilies, and dried orange peel, and set it aside. She then heated some oil in the pot, added the ingredients, goose meat cubes, soy sauce, wine, seasonings, and started stir-frying it evenly. At this point, the aroma of the goose meat had already begun diffusing and the crew who was present couldn’t help but take a whiff of it. The heavenly aroma made them subconsciously salivate.

Xiang Yi added the right amount of water to the pot and stewed it slowly over low heat from a fire started with firewood. Goose meat could be stewed for a long period of time. About 40 minutes later, she added the side dishes.

This was the perfect time for Shi Sui to interact with the fans.

Xiang Yi raised her head and looked at Shi Sui, whom she shared a tacit understanding with. Shi Sui immediately said, “As you can see, the goose has already been stewed.”

Hearing his voice, the fans immediately asked abuot his situation.

Li Jianyu ordered the staff to bring an electronic tablet over so that he could read the messages from the netizens in the live-stream.

“I’m sorry to have made everyone worried. My wounds are not very severe and they’ve already been treated.”

“I really didn’t lie to you,” Shi Sui said with a smile. “If you lie, your nose will become longer.”

The fans watching the live-stream were extremely agitated after seeing his smile.

—— [Ahhh, Shi Sui, don’t smile like that!]

—— [So attractive, he’s so attractive, my legs have gone limp, who can stand this!?]

—— [I’m so immersed in this, I think I’m already on my way to marry Shi Sui.]

…

“What’s your take on All is Well Year Round’s behavior? Um…”

Shi Sui was seated upright in a noble and dignified manner, as if he didn’t belong to this smoky kitchen at all. He stopped smiling and began speaking earnestly with a solemn expression.

“There’s nothing wrong with liking someone and their devotion shouldn’t be trampled on either.”

“Everyone has the right to accept the affection that someone else has for them. Likewise, everyone also has the right to reject.”

“Please don’t make the adoration you have for someone, become a burden that weighs them down.”

chapters.title: Chapter 301 - Shi Sui And Xiang Yi Are A Real Couple!
chapters.body:
Chapter 301 - Shi Sui And Xiang Yi Are A Real Couple!

…

Along with Shi Sui’s low voice, the netizens watching the livestream got into an uproar.

—— [Uwu, this man is really gentle…]

—— [Since the beginning, he has never treated “All is Well Year Round” as an obsessive stalker fan. He should be trying to save her pride…]

—— [He had gotten hurt and harassed, but he can still remain so calm. Seriously, even if he’s just pretending, I still love him.]

Someone noticed that Xiang Yi was being busy on a bench at the side and left a comment out of curiosity; Shi Sui replied to it.

“What is Xiang Yi doing? She’s picking some peas.”

The camera turned to Xiang Yi, who answered cooperatively, “I’m preparing the ingredients for pea cakes.”

Li Jianyu asked, “Oh, what? You can make those at home?”

Xiang Yi said, “Yes, but it’s a little time-consuming.”

It wasn’t a snack that she would usually make, but Xiang Chen liked it.

Hence, it would be worth her time.

Shi Sui drawled sluggishly, “Xiang Yi, everyone has a lot of questions for you.”

However, he chose not to say what the questions were.

“What did they ask?” Shi Sui was holding the tablet and scrolling through the comments very quickly. In order to get a clearer glimpse of it, she subconsciously moved closer to him. In the frame of the camera, their heads were almost touching each other.

The fans who shipped Xiang Yi and Shi Sui together were extremely ecstatic because they hadn’t seen such romantic behavior from them for a few days.

—— [Ahhhh, sisters, I’m screaming!]

—— [I repeat, Untimely Couple is real!]

—— [Sitting on a small bench and reading some comments with their heads pressed together. Shi Sui and Xiang Yi are so cute together!]

…

Xiang Yi’s ears turned red and warm when she read the comments. At the same time, she began to recall the content of the forum that Ah Nan had shown her…

“Ahem, they want to know the recipe? I’ll write down the detailed steps later and post it on Weibo,” Xiang Yi said, picking the questions to answer very seriously.

She tried to ignore those comments about her and Shi Sui, but the latter addressed it.

“Shi Sui and Xiang Yi are cute together?”

His tone was innocent, and he looked confused and silly!

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She assented, pretending to be very focused on picking the peas.

The pop-up comments on the screen:

—— [Hahaha, I bet Xiang Yi knows what we’re driving at!]

—— [Hah, Vase Fairy is obviously trying to start this. Poor Shi Sui who’s completely in the dark. He’s such a poor thing, he’s clueless.]

—— [Hilarious. This is the first time I’ve ever seen fans who ship a pair of celebrities making their comments so direct. Have you got any brains? Don’t you feel awkward at all!?!]

…

In the next second…

Shi Sui took out his phone. Due to the injury on his right arm, he had to type with his left hand, which slowed down his typing speed greatly.

However…

“Oh~~ it turns out that Untimely Couple is a combination of our names.” Shi Sui clucked his tongue against the roof of his mouth. “There’s a forum about us too. I’m going to go look at it.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Xiang Yi’s expression changed a little, and she was no longer as composed as she usually was. “Don’t look at it…”

Late at night.

Shi Sui read the forum.

He even commented as he went along.

“This animated avatar is quite cute.”

“The cut of the video of sweet Xiang Yi… Yes, she’s quite sweet.”

“Untimely Couple sticker pack. Follow the forum to collect. Is this a request for followers?”

“…”

Shi Sui’s activity log on Weibo——

“@ShiSui has followed the forum [Untimely Couple], let’s play together!”

“@ShiSui has checked into the forum [Untimely Couple] once. Let’s check-in together!”

“@ShiSui has contributed all his points in the forum [Untimely Couple], let’s bump the charts together!”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 302 - Support Herself
chapters.body:
Chapter 302 - Support Herself

The netizens were all dumbfounded.

In particular, those who were not watching the livestream were leaving comments on Shi Sui’s page in a frenzy.

—— [Ah, who hacked into his account?]

—— [Shi Sui: I ship myself with Xiang Yi?]

—— [Forget it if he’s following the page, why did he upvote it too? Hey!]

…

The netizens who were in the know decided to help explain the situation.

[Oh, oh, Shi Sui and Xiang Yi were hosting a livestream and during their interaction with the fans, they saw someone mentioning about “Untimely Couple” so Shi Sui searched it up and even followed the forum page. This man is so dedicated to the variety show, I admire him!]

There were also some who doubted so.

[Is it really just an exaggeration for the variety show? I think he’s more supportive of that idea than I am…]

Of course, the Shisui Sisters were all insistent that Shi Sui was just deliberately pretending to be supportive for the sake of adding a dramatic effect to the variety show.

…

In the kitchen.

The aroma of the goose meat that was being stewed in the iron pot had already wafted up into the air. Xiang Yi had also added Chinese herbs like ginger, herbal fruits, nutmeg, and so on. The subtle fragrance of the herbs had blended in perfectly with that of meat, forming a heavenly aroma!

Xiang Yi had gotten completely distracted from cooking and she couldn’t help but ask, “I heard that they ship us as a couple…”

“And so?” Shi Sui asked candidly as he met her gaze.

His rhetorical question made Xiang Yi dumbfounded.

‘Uh…am I just making mountains out of molehills?’

‘It seems that Shi Sui is just making a joke out of it… There doesn’t seem to be anything wrong with following it…right?’

If Xiang Chen or Xiang Li were around, they would have been able to see through his conspiracy!

He was just so good at fooling others!

Xiang Yi had successfully brainwashed herself and figured out the logic of it. “Supporting myself seems to be quite interesting and fun, huh?”

In the livestream:

—— [Hahahah Xiang Yi’s confused expression is so funny.]

—— [Shi Sui, don’t be fooled by the sly old fox. You’re not allowed to date anyone! I won’t allow it!]
