—— [I’m a new fan. What kind of a nonsensical program is this? She’s stewing a goose and shipping herself with another celebrity? No way, I have to start binging on this show!]

Everyone in the livestream was guffawing merrily and the hashtags #UntimelyCouple and #ShiSuiTopFans even made it to the hot search list. Shi Sui and Xiang Yi also gained plenty of followers.

…

At a restaurant in Nancheng.

Qin Wanyan drank with the bosses for half a day and thought that she could get the opportunity to star in the variety show. Although she just wanted the chance to be a temporary guest on the show, it was an extremely popular national variety show that was well received by audiences of all ages.

However, after she returned from a brief trip to the bathroom to touch up her makeup, she saw that the directors and others were laughing incessantly while staring at their phone screens.

“Hahahah, Shi Sui is so funny! This female celebrity is amusing too!”

“Her name is Xiang Yi. She’s part of the cast for ‘Two Under One Roof,’ a show that I pay close attention to. She’s very talented, can play a variety of instruments, and has an excellent set of culinary skills!”

“Is that so? In that case, she’s quite suitable for our variety show.”

“…”

Seeing that the opportunity was about to be given to Xiang Yi, Qin Wanyan clenched her fist and said with a feeble sigh, “I do know Xiang Yi. We used to be best friends, but now that she has become famous, she stopped hanging out with me.”

The director frowned.

Qin Wanyan decided to fan the flames and add fuel to the fire. “She’s embroiled in lots of messy relationships with many male celebrities too. I have screenshots for proof.”

While showing the screenshot to the directors, Qin Wanyan said, “Well she’s a temptress…”

chapters.title: Chapter 303 - Definitely Not Her Biological Brother
chapters.body:
Chapter 303 - Definitely Not Her Biological Brother

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

In the past year, Xiang Yi had sent her countless screenshots of her chats, which Qin Wanyan had saved in a folder that she deliberately created.

Qin Wangyan was actually in great disdain of Xiang Yi because she disliked how boy-crazy Xiang Yi was despite being the heiress of a rich family. She hated that Xiang Yi would flirt with good-looking men whenever she had the chance to.

However, she seemed to have made an agreement with a mysterious person that she cannot be in romantic relationships or get intimate with any men. Hence, touching the hands of boys like Yan Nai and Xiao Yang was as far as she would go.

“She has even harassed Yan Nai, the son of Director Yan Zhenhua, before… Later on, he developed an emotional trauma.”

“She has also taken liberties with Xiao Yang…”

Since there were chat records and screenshots as evidence, coupled with the fact that Qin Wanyan had stated the names of two boys, the directors looked even more displeased.

Seeing this, Qin Wanyan decided to be ruthless and exclaimed, “The most shocking thing is that she has even slept with someone!”

All of a sudden, everyone got into a huge uproar.

…

In the livestream of “Two Under One Roof”.

The piping hot stewed goose was served!

Xiang Yi scooped the chunks of golden brown goose meat up with a ladle and placed them into a porcelain white soup pot. After several hours of stewing, the meat had become tender and could be easily separated from the bones. Potato and carrot cubes were added to the soup to add color and vibrancy.

The aroma wafted into the air, and the taste was flavorful and heavenly.

With the addition of a few light vegetarian dishes, the sumptuous feast was ready.

The netizens were extremely enticed by the food.

—— [Dear goose, you died a terrible death! Somehow, my tears are coming out of my mouth instead…]

—— [My takeout hasn’t been delivered yet! *cries out loud* I’m going to die, all I have left at home is a packet of ramen that has expired for months. Is it still edible? I’m waiting for an answer. It’s urgent.]

—— [This meal for patients is so sumptuous… Xiang Yi, I’m in so much pain! Can you deliver a set to me by express courier? I can deliver myself to your house too.]

…

Xiang Yi was about to call Xiang Chen, but he woke up first.

Instead of formal clothing, he was dressed in silk home wear because he was in his own home. His mannerisms were elegant and refined, attracting the attention of countless people as soon as he appeared in view!

—— [Damn! Damn! Is he a new guest of the show?]

—— [Hah, man, you’ve successfully attracted my attention! I want all his information within five minutes!]

—— [His legs, his waist, ahhhh… I seem to have caught a glimpse of his abs, they’re so firm and toned…]

—— [He’s so handsome… Ahem, he smells so good… What a feast for the eyes…]

—— [I found him, I found him! I managed to find him with the picture recognition function! He’s Xiang Chen, the founder of Lin Chen Law Firm!]

—— [???? Wait, wait, when Dr. Xiang Li came previously, Xiang Yi seemed to have said that he was her second brother. Could it be that Xiang Chen is her eldest brother!?!]

…

There was a lot of chatter and discussions going on in the live comments section of the livestream.

Xiang Chen had already gotten seated calmly, deliberately separating Xiang Yi and Shi Sui, though he managed to make it seem unintentional.

He was a typical domineering brother who was overprotective of his sister.

Si Chuanbai ignored that and picked up a piece of goose meat before stuffing it into his mouth…

“!”

The fresh, tender and pure flavor was fragrant but not overwhelming. There was even a hint of a light herbal aroma that made the meat absolutely delicious!

“Delicious! It’s so delicious!” Si Chuanbai actually lost his composure, which was rare of him.

Shi Sui nodded slightly to indicate that it tasted good.

Xiang Chen was the only one who said indifferently, “It’s so-so.”

A netizen immediately left a shocking comment.

—— [Vase Fairy is definitely going to be condemned this time, I’m certain he isn’t her biological brother!]

chapters.title: Chapter 304 - : Destruction Of Persona (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 304 - : Destruction Of Persona (1)

That comment gained the approval of many.

—— [I hate Vase Fairy’s retarded fans who keep supporting her blindly. All men are your brothers, huh?]

—— [Does anyone think that Xiang Yi is very much like those pretentious bitches in high school who calls every guy her brother but flirts with them instead?]

—— [C’mon, wake up, Xiang Chen is a top-tier lawyer who specializes in finance and only takes on cases for listed companies. Truly elite lawyers can earn tens of millions of yuan in commission without having to appear in court at all. Does Xiang Yi think she’s worthy of him? Who is she to deserve all the good things?]

…

The majority felt that Xiang Chen was very likely to be Xiang Yi’s brother at first, but after reading the seemingly reasonable analysis given by the haters, many of them began to waver.

They thought that it made sense because… it seemed unlikely that Xiang Yi would have so many outstanding brothers. Three of her brothers were already exposed to be an e-sports expert, an internationally-renowned fashion designer, and a genius medical professor. Thus, they thought it was impossible that she’d have another brother who was a top financial lawyer.

…

At the dining table, Xiang Yi took a bite of the goose meat and said with a frown, “The mixture of the few spices seems a little too abrupt but wait… I’ve done this with the same combination of spices before.”

Si Chuanbai was speechless.

‘Seriously, Miss Xiang Yi? Do you have such strict requirements for your own cooking?’

To him, it was already a delicacy that he would get to eat, probably only once in a lifetime!

God knows how much he wanted to let his artists marry Xiang Yi… Even if they couldn’t, it wouldn’t be a bad idea to become her live-in husband.

He was willing to become Xiang Yi’s manager from now on! All he wanted in exchange was an occasional chance to eat a meal cooked by her from time to time!

Xiang Chen said calmly, “Mushroom.”

Xiang Yi immediately understood what he meant. “Oh, I see!”

Deep in thought, Shi Sui said, “Is it a clash of seasonings?”

Si Chuanbai was speechless.

He was an elite celebrity manager but at this moment, he felt like a clueless elementary school student who was the only one in class that didn’t understand the lesson…

His dumbfounded expression was so funny that Li Jianyu unethically had the cameraman give him a few more close-ups.

However, Li Jianyu was indeed quite curious too. “Xiang Yi, what’s the issue?”

Xiang Yi answered, “Mushrooms are rich in glutamic acid, which is an acidic amino acid that has a uniquely fresh taste and is soluble in water. That’s also one of the reasons mushroom broth always tastes so fresh. However, it clashes with the seasoning so it makes the soup taste a little odd.”

She savored it carefully, took out a piece of Chinese seasoning herb and made her conclusion. “This should be it.”

Li Jianyu said, “Let me taste it, I won’t believe it without any evidence!”

In the pop-up comments:

[Everyone, let’s type the words ‘shameless old fogey’ now!!!]

Xiang Yi gave Li Jianyu a large bowl of stewed goose which made his eyes pop wide open after tasting it.

‘This is so delicious, I can polish off the entire pot!’

‘How does it taste strange at all!?!’

He ate the meat and potatoes in three or two bites before gulping down the broth. He said shamelessly, “You gave me too little, I couldn’t quite taste the strangeness of it. Give me one more bowl.”

All the viewers began to comment that Li ianyu was the most shameless director they had ever met.

—— [Is it that miraculous? Attorney Xiang is such a picky eater!]

—— [Xiang Yi has such sensitive taste buds! She managed to guess which seasoning it is with just one mouthful.]

—— [Who knows if it’s true or not? Maybe she’s just making it up, who knows if she’s bragging?]

—— [There’s something wrong with you guys. If it really tastes awful, would Director Li have enjoyed it so much? I bet Xiang Yi’s existence is a fault to begin with in the eyes of some people. Regardless of what she does, she’s always wrong.]

—— [Vase Fairy’s fans, please stop trying to clear her name! There’s new gossip about her on Weibo, open it for a surprise. Hehe.]

chapters.title: Chapter 305 - Destruction Of Persona (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 305 - Destruction Of Persona (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

She logged onto Weibo, only to see that #QinWanyanDeletedPost was on the fourth place in the hot search list.

The reason for that was that Qin Wanyan had posted a set of nine screenshots on Weibo but quickly deleted them and claimed that her account had been hacked.

However, in this digital age where one’s traces on the Internet can almost never be erased, those photos could be found again easily.

A netizen reposted the photos that Qin Wanyan had posted.

They were all screengrabs of chat records!

Although the photos were a little blurry, the gossipy netizens who were passionate about drama, managed to decipher the content in no time.

The first photo was the chat record of “Xiang Yi” complaining to Qin Wanyan.

“Xiang Yi” had apparently sent a screenshot of her conversation with Yan Nai to Qin Wanyan.

[Xiang Yi]: Brother, are you asleep? Are you free tomorrow night? Shall we have dinner?

[Yan Nai]: …

[Yan Nai]: Xiang Yi, don’t do this again in the future. I really…think you’re disgusting.

The second photo was the screenshot of “Xiang Yi” showing off and boasting.

[Xiang Yi]: After flirting with Xiao Yang for so long, I’ve finally gotten my hands on him~ He thinks he’s my one and only, what a joke. Actually, I’m just teasing him. Only silly women would pin all their hopes on one man and rely on him to bring her happiness. Having several men at once is the best~]

There was a screenshot of Xiang Yi’s conversation with Xiao Yang.

[Xiang Yi]: Hubby *shy* *shy*

[Xiao Yang]: Honey *flying kiss* *flying kiss*

[Xiang Yi]: I missed you so much, filming the variety show has been so tiring and arduous for me. You didn’t even come to visit me.

[Xiao Yang]: Baby, you’ve worked hard! I’ll visit you at work tomorrow and arrange for a food and milk tea truck to show up there too. I’m going to give you the best support, Baby Xiang Yi!

…

Apart from that, there were also screenshots of Xiang Yi’s chat records with other celebrities, music producers, and wealthy heirs.

If those were the only screenshots, the netizens would at most think that Xiang Yi was a “femme fatale”. Although she frequently flirted with multiple men, she would never take any physical action or commit herself to any of them.

However…the last screenshot made everyone flabbergasted!

In the screenshot, Qin Wanyan took the initiative to broach a certain topic.

[Qin Wanyan]: Do you get along well with your family?

“Xiang Yi” answered: I accidentally climbed into my eldest brother’s bed last time, he got so mad at me that I was almost frightened to death. Ah, I didn’t mean to do it anyway. *aggrieved* *wronged*

There was a screenshot of her conversation with her eldest brother.

[Xiang Yi]: Big Brother, don’t ignore me, I know I was wrong to have done that.

[Xiang Yi]: Big Brother, can you give me some pocket money? I’ve been so poor lately.

[Xiang Yi]: Brother~ Brother~ don’t ignore me.

[Xiang Chen]: I’m busy

[Xiang Yi]: Can I go look for you overseas? I promise what happened last time won’t happen again!

[Xiang Chen]: Behave yourself, or else, you’ll know the consequences.

…

Everyone on Weibo got into a huge uproar.

The server began to lose stability and almost crashed.

The netizens were furious as they all vented their anger on Xiang Yi’s Weibo page.

She had posted two detailed recipes and although they didn’t garner many comments, the comments that were left below were very heartwarming. However, they were now flooded with hate comments.

—— [Your image is ruined big time. You’re taking advantage of Yan Nai? Please have some shame!]

—— [Damn it, who are you treat Xiao Yang as a backup boyfriend? You treat men like fishes being reared in a pond? To hell with that! You scum!]

—— [I’m so disgusted! She climbed into Attorney Xiang’s bed and still has the cheek to act all coquettish with him???]

—— [The point is, he’s her brother, her biological brother!!! Ew! I’m going to throw up last night’s dinner!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 306 - Variety Show Royal
chapters.body:
Chapter 306 - Variety Show Royal

…

The netizens on Weibo, forums, and other social media platforms…had all gotten into a huge uproar.

It was almost as if the public relations department of Tomato Entertainment did not respond at all as they simply tolerated the hate nonchalantly like it had nothing to do with them.

That instead became a signal of sorts as it got people speculating that the content of the leaked screenshots must be true! Otherwise, there was no reason for Xiang Yi’s management company to not deny it.

They should have at least released a statement to clarify or issue a lawyer’s letter to warn those who were spreading false rumors.

Non-denial was tantamount to acquiescence!

If she couldn’t prove her innocence, she would have to suffer the consequences!

…

In the apartment.

The corners of Qin Wanyan’s lips curled up into a triumphant smile as she watched the silly netizens rejoice.

Her agent texted her.

[Wanyan, I’ve already sent you the contract for that variety show. If you have no issues with it, I’ll confirm with them.]

Qin Wanyan answered with a simple “yes” and tossed her phone aside before pouring herself a glass of wine slowly.

‘I really don’t understand that stupid woman Xiang Yi. She clearly has so many good cards on her hands, but she hasn’t known how to play them correctly in the past year. Yet, she ended up ruining it for herself and began getting her brothers involved.’

‘If she had known earlier, she shouldn’t have done this.’

The appearance of her three brothers had previously helped her gain some popularity.

However, the appearance of her eldest brother now was just like a bomb. Qin Wanyan had merely tugged the fuse a little, and it exploded just like that.

Xiang Yi could not afford to be labeled as a wench who had seduced her eldest brother.

The thought of Xiang Yi being insulted and humiliated for the rest of her life made Qin Wanyan feel particularly pleased as she sipped on her wine gleefully.

…

…

In the manor.

After seeing the latest news about Xiang Yi on the cellphone that his assistant handed to him, Li Jianyu immediately announced, “End of livestream!”

The live broadcast came to an abrupt halt, followed by a statement released by the official Weibo account of “Two Under One Roof” that included an explanation about there being a problem with the equipment. They also stated that the resumption time was to be determined.

However, the netizens didn’t buy it.

—— [Please get rid of the lousy artist, Xiang Yi. *smiley* *smiley*]

—— [Hah, I thought this show was meant to help boost Shi Sui’s popularity. Now it seems that it’s meant for grooming Xiang Yi, huh?]

—— [Vase Fairy is the royalty of variety shows, they’re always grooming her and boosting her popularity. Even when she’s embroiled in a controversy, they will never abandon her. Regardless of how much the fans of the show protest against her, they remain loyal to her. This elite variety show with the highest ratings is definitely going to be ruined by her. :)]

…

However, the good thing was that the livestream had ended so things didn’t escalate further.

After seeing the screenshot, Xiang Yi was dumbfounded.

She never thought that the ‘bad thing’ that her little uncle was talking about would be the fact that the person, who had occupied her body, had climbed onto Xiang Chen’s bed…

Xiang Yi turned pale, and she pushed the cutlery away before stumbling back into her room.

She didn’t dare to look at Xiang Chen at all.

She was afraid of seeing the look of disgust in his eyes.

She was even more afraid that Xiang Chen would never forgive her again.

Xiang Chen frowned and got up to take chase, but he was stopped by Shi Sui.

“Get out of the way,” Xiang Chen said coldly.

Shi Sui said helplessly, “Isn’t there a single person in your family who knows how to coax a girl?”

Xiang Chen humphed coldly. “I don’t need you to teach me.”

Shi Sui said, “Tsk, let me guess how you are going to coax her, give her some sweets?”

Xiang Chen had a hand in his pocket and he was fiddling with a piece of candy, but he suddenly stopped.

“It’s a milk candy you’re holding, isn’t it?”

“…”

“Indeed, all of you are used to using sweets to coax her…” Shi Sui smirked and said, “Let me do the cajoling.”

He blinked and said to Xiang Chen, “Brother, I’m the best at coaxing Xiang Yi~”

chapters.title: Chapter 307 - Best Sister
chapters.body:
Chapter 307 - Best Sister

Xiang Chen’s jawline was taut and defined, and he gave off a sharp and menacing aura that produced a natural sense of oppression.

The innocent viewers who were watching the livestream began to panic a little as they felt that Xiang Chen would beat Shi Sui up at any time.

However, Xiang Chen let his concern for his sister rule his head. He closed his eyes and said through clenched teeth, “If you can’t coax her well and cheer her up, you’re dead meat!”

Shi Sui said, “Sure, Brother~”

Xiang Chen cursed.

…

Xiang Yi hugged her knees and sat on the floor, leaning against the side of the bed as a myriad of thoughts ran through her mind.

‘Perhaps, Xiang Li’s guess is right.’

‘I’m not the true chosen one but just a substitute.’

In the worlds that she had transmigrated to, she had been mocked, betrayed, harmed, schemed against, and abandoned…but none of that mattered to her.

Reason being they had nothing to do with her.

She wasn’t bothered because she didn’t care.

However, all her hard work and efforts now seemed like a joke and a bubble she lived in.

Xiang Yi felt that she had an excellent mindset because she would be able to come to terms with reality calmly even when she was on the brink of death. However, she was really breaking down now.

Even the strongest people would have their Achilles’ heel.

Xiang Yi couldn’t accept this reality.

The door was unlocked with a clicking sound, but Xiang Yi ignored it. Only when she felt a warm and strong hand on her head did she sluggishly raise her chin to face him.

It was Shi Sui.

She forced herself to be brave, and she said in a soft but slightly hoarse voice, “How did you get in?”

Shi Sui coughed to clear his throat and seemed to have felt that what he was about to tell her wasn’t quite an honorable thing.

“When I was acting in a movie previously, I stayed in prison for a few days and learned a little bit about picking locks.”

“Oh, I see.” Xiang Yi tried to force herself to smile but to no avail.

Shi Sui’s eyes moved slightly, and he leaned forward to sit down beside her. With one leg against the ground and the other bent, he rose and fell, revealing his well-defined ankle bones. The soft fabric of his clothes grazed against his fair and cold skin.

“You don’t have to force yourself to smile if you don’t want to.”

“Do you need a shoulder or a piece of tissue?”

“I’d recommend the option of borrowing my shoulder because the clothes I’m wearing today are made of sweat-absorbent fabric, which should also work well for absorbing tears.”

“Want to give it a try, Xiang Yi?”

Xiang Yi hesitated for a few seconds before slowly, gently, and carefully leaning against his shoulder.

Although she often said that Shi Sui was like a little boy, she had actually often found him reliable and gentle, treating him like a brother since she was young.

Shi Sui accompanied her quietly.

There was nothing but silence in the room.

Some time later, Xiang Yi said sobbingly, “I suddenly miss my parents.”

Shi Sui pressed his thin lips together.

Xiang Yi’s parents passed away in an accident that the three of them had gotten into, and the most cruel thing was that Xiang Yi was the only survivor.

She witnessed her parents’ death with her very own eyes and was subject to lots of unnecessary, callous criticism.

Some of her senseless and silly elders would repeatedly ask six-year-old Xiang Yi if she missed her parents, said that her brothers would blame her for being a jinx, and tell her that she was about to be abandoned soon.

Once Xiang Yi cried, they would say things like— “Ah, this kid can’t take a joke at all. We were just making a casual remark, what is there to cry about?”

Shi Sui coaxed patiently in a gentle voice, “Your parents have become the stars in the sky who will always be watching over you.”

“Your brothers have never held it against you or gotten angry at you for it because all of them know that you’re the best sister in the world.”

chapters.title: Chapter 308 - Once The Group Of Bullies Speak, Hate Will Be Directed (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 308 - Once The Group Of Bullies Speak, Hate Will Be Directed (1)

Xiang Yi didn’t say anything, but her nose felt a little sore.

Resting her forehead against Shi Sui’s shoulder, she could sense the warmness of his body that was radiating toward her continuously.

Shi Sui said softly, “I have a bad sense of hearing.”

Others may not understand what Shi Sui meant, but Xiang Yi understood it immediately.

He repeated what she said again.

She said in a nasally voice, “I’m not going to cry.”

‘She’s probably cried too often as a child so she can’t bring herself to cry now.’

Her first reaction to being sad was not to shed tears but to endure the misery.

Shi Sui chuckled and said, “Yes, Xiang Yi is a strong girl to begin with.”

He still remembered the way the fair and delicate Xiang Yi would chase away the detestable elders while crying her heart out when she was a child.

At that time, Xiang Li hugged her while Xiang Qi spat at those elders and Xiang Yu cursed at them.

Xiang Chen was even harsher toward them.

He picked up a brick and stood at the side sternly with a cold and hostile expression on his face, resembling the King of Hell. He was clearly threatening to get physical with them.

Regardless of the arguments and little fights they had at home, they would forever stay united when facing outsiders.

After trying to get a grip on her emotions for a while, Xiang Yi gradually calmed down.

She realized in hindsight that Shi Sui… had also seen that “Xiang Yi”.

When she had transmigrated back to her body, she was lying on the bed in his room…

Shi Sui did not mention that matter again. Xiang Yi thought he didn’t mind it, but after giving it some thought, she wondered if he had discovered something amiss.

“You… I… We…” Xiang Yi licked her cherry-like lips and raised her delicate face. She asked, “Uh, nothing happened between us at the hot spring lodge the other time, right?”

Shi Sui raised an eyebrow, his gaze deep and enigmatic. “Do you think something should have happened between us?”

“…”

‘I don’t know the answer to that.’

Feeling a little awkward, Xiang Yi said, “Did I…violate you at that time?”

Shi Sui asked with a smirk, “Violate?”

Xiang Yi was chagrined because she had blurted those words almost without any hesitation. ‘It’s all Ah Nan’s fault for using such evil words that I clearly still remember to this day.’

“Ahem, I’ll rephrase my question. At that time, did I do anything to you that isn’t in line with any core socialist values?”

Xiang Yi was extremely righteous and, if not for her slightly flushed earlobes, she would have seemed rather composed at first glance.

Shi Sui stayed silent for a moment, making Xiang Yi tense up uncontrollably and putting her on edge. Only then did he drawl, “You fell asleep as soon as you entered the room.”

There was a slip-up with the key cards to the room that night. “Xiang Yi” initially wanted to unlock the door to the room of another young hunk but had accidentally ended up in Shi Sui’s room.

The way that “Xiang Yi” looked at him was really repulsive.

However, she fainted soon after. Shi Sui originally thought that she was just acting. He was ready to smoke a cigarette and ask Xiang Feng to come over to take her away, but she woke up again shortly.

Her face was unchanged, but the look in her eyes was different.

Shi Sui knew that she was no longer the same person.

Xiang Yi was relieved to hear his words.

However, seeing how calm he was, Xiang Yi had a feeling that he knew something and was about to ask him about it, but there was a sudden banging on the door.

Thump-thump…

The person who spoke had a familiar accent and silly tone, “Little Xiang Yi, open the door! I know you’re in there! Look what you’ve done! As your uncle, I must teach you a lesson today!”

It was Xiang Feng, who had rushed over after catching wind of the news.

He almost passed out in exasperation when he saw the hot search list.

Creak——

The door was opened.

Xiang Feng was just about to criticize her with the authoritative attitude of an elder, but he soon saw the reddened corners of her eyes and pitiful look of uneasiness.

Xiang Feng cleared his throat and said, “Ahem, actually, I’ve thought about it. It’s not that big of a deal.”

chapters.title: Chapter 309 - Once The Group Of Bullies Speak, Hate Will Be Directed (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 309 - Once The Group Of Bullies Speak, Hate Will Be Directed (2)

Xiang Yi asked with a dumbfounded expression, “Huh?”

Xiang Feng said righteously, “How can I possibly doubt Xiang Yi? It’s a misunderstanding! It must be a misunderstanding! Okay, okay, don’t cry, I’ll take you to have some of your favorite junk food!”

Xiang Yi clenched her little fist. She had already braced herself for a harsh scolding but she didn’t expect such a sudden twist.

She nodded groggily, feeling a little giddy.

…

Ten minutes later.

Xiang Chen walked out of his room eagerly in a bid to see how well Shi Sui had coaxed Xiang Yi.

He entered, only to see that Shi Sui was in the living room but Xiang Yi was nowhere in sight.

The bedroom door was wide open, and Xiang Yi wasn’t in the room either.

Xiang Chen gritted his teeth and asked, “Where’s my sister?”

‘How did he even coax her? She’s gone missing now.’

Shi Sui answered, “Brother, can you take a deep breath before I answer the question?”

Xiang Chen was confused.

Shi Sui said, “Xiang Feng came by.”

The mention of Xiang Feng immediately aroused Xiang Chen’s anger as his cold forehead throbbed vigorously.

“He brought Xiang Yi out for some junk food.”

Xiang Chen was flabbergasted!

“Where did they go?” he clipped through clenched teeth.

Shi Sui blinked and said, “Brother, you have to pay to get information from me~”

Xiang Chen sneered and said, “I think you haven’t woken up from your sleep yet.”

‘You won’t tell me, huh? I’ll beat you until you do.’

Seeing that Xiang Chen had begun rolling up his sleeves, Shi Sui said, “He also brought iced milk tea and cola for Xiang Yi.”

Xiang Chen gritted his teeth. “Deal.”

…

…

In the garage.

Although this side of the manor was Xiang Yi’s permanent residence, her brothers had all parked their cars in her garage. There was an impressive fleet of vehicles of various makes and models including global limited edition sports cars, motorbikes, and Xiang Feng’s hoverboard.

In a certain off-road car, which had the most spacious interior of all the cars in the garage.

“Come on, Xiang Yi, have some fried chicken while it’s hot.”

“And this ice-blended strawberry cheesecake smoothie. It tastes awesome!”

“Do you want some iced coke? Do you want to try sharing a can with a straw each? That doubles the happiness!”

Xiang Feng was continuously offering food to Xiang Yi.

He had been rather busy with work lately. After all, he was a “domineering CEO” and hadn’t seen his niece for a long time.

Now that he had finally gotten the chance to see her, he, of course, had to bring her some delicious treats.

He had intended to chide Xiang Yi first and personally teach her a lesson since society hadn’t done so yet!

He planned to coax her after lashing out at her.

However, he skipped the scolding and jumped straight to cajoling her with food because he felt that there was nothing wrong with her dating Shi Sui!

Like a little hamster, Xiang Yi nibbled delightedly on the food, all nestled up in the back seat. She was thoroughly enjoying herself.

‘The taste of cheap, poor-quality food that’s full of additives and flavorings…is so delicious!’

Xiang Yi, who was a collected and composed girl in the eyes of others, had now let her hair down in front of her uncle and allowed herself to indulge in the milk tea, cola, and other delectable snacks. She felt so blissful that she began shaking her little legs with excitement.

“Mmm, Uncle, you’re so good to me…”

In this second, she felt that her uncle was the best person in the world! It was an indisputable fact!

Xiang Yi looked at her with an affectionate gaze. “Look at you, you’re as thin as a stick. Listen to me, you have to gain at least five kilograms. Chubbier girls are more adorable!”

Xiang Yi puffed her cheeks up and said, “I’ve already gained a few kilos.”

Xiang Feng prodded the bags of food to pick something to eat. “I bought some Devil pepper bean curd fritters. The last time I had it, it was so spicy that I teared up! Do you want some? I’ll open a bag for you.”

“Yes, yes!”

Xiang Yi nodded profusely.

In the next second…

Someone started knocking on the car window.

Xiang Yi held her breath, thinking that the person outside wouldn’t be able to see her because the car windows were heavily tinted. ‘He can’t see me… can’t see me…’

Xiang Feng was extremely nervous too, and he accidentally blurted, “There’s no one in the car, there really isn’t!”

Xiang Yi, who had been caught off guard, was speechless.

chapters.title: Chapter 310 - Now You Know To Call Big Brother?
chapters.body:
Chapter 310 - Now You Know To Call Big Brother?

Xiang Feng hurriedly tried to cover up. “It’s just me! Really!”

Xiang Yi: “…”

When she met her Little Uncle’s eyes, her gaze was full of pain.

From outside their car window, their big brother’s devilish and cold voice could be heard. “I would advise you two to quit your senseless resistance and open the door.”

Xiang Feng’s brain churned at the speed of light. “Actually, I’m in the car next door!”

Xiang Yi: “….”

She couldn’t watch this any longer.

Even the fried chicken in her hands seemed to have lost its flavor.

“I’m going to count down to three. If you don’t open the door, don’t blame me for my methods.” Xiang Chen’s tone was cold and sharp as icicles. “3…”

Before he could reach the next number, the uncle-and-niece duo immediately opened the door. They didn’t dare even think about pulling any playful stunts.

As the rich fragrance of grease and fried chicken diffused out of the car, Xiang Chen felt his temples twitch a few times. He crossed his arms and watched the scene unfold with a condescending gaze.

Xiang Yi held fried chicken in one hand and a spicy bean curd in another. Evidently, she had been enjoying her meal.

Xiang Feng held a milk tea in one hand and a bottle of cola in the other. Clearly, he had been feeding Xiang Yi.

“Heh.” Xiang Chen sneered abruptly.

Xiang Feng and Xiang Yi: Tremble~~~~

At least Xiang Feng was considerably reliable as he said with a shaking voice, “This has nothing to do with little Xiang Yi, I forced her to eat it!”

Xiang Chen: “You’ve reversed what’s right and wrong. Your punishment will be raised by one level.”

Xiang Feng’s eyes widened. “We’re both adults, what’s wrong with snacking from time to time!”

Xiang Chen: “Impervious to advice. Your punishment is raised to two levels.”

Xiang Feng instantly cowered. “I’m sorry, I know it now, I apologize to you on behalf of little Xiang Yi and myself!”

Xiang Chen: “Fake and insincere intentions. Your punishment is raised to three levels.”

Xiang Feng: ????

Anything I say is wrong, isn’t it??!

“You, come here.” This line was directed at Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi flinched and hid behind him, her eyes pleading.

Little Uncle, don’t leave!

Xiang Feng’s eyes filled with tears. “Little Xiang Yi, Uncle loves you most! Don’t worry, Uncle won’t leave you! Us Uncle and niece should go through wealth and adversity together! Just like how we share fried chicken and cola!”

Xiang Yi was touched. Her cherry blossom lips parted as she was about to say something.

The next second.

Xiang Feng decisively hopped out the other side of the vehicle and disappeared like a puff of smoke!

His legs moved faster than that of a rabbit, so fast that you could almost make out a motion blur.

Who knew what he went through over the years…

Xiang Yi: “…”

So love between family members can disappear after all, right?

Stiffly, she twisted her neck to meet her elder brother’s eyes.

The man’s tall figure was masked by the dim light of the garage. His legs were pin straight, and his whole body emulated an oppressive air that had been present since he was a child. He lowered his gaze as it pierced Xiang Yi.

The little rabbit: Continued to tremble ~

Xiang Chen slowly opened his mouth. “Go on, why did you stop? Fried chicken doesn’t taste good if it gets cold.”

Xiang Yi’s eyes were horrified as her hands trembled, almost dropping her chicken.

“Big Brother…”

“Now you know I’m your big brother? Where were you a second ago?” Xiang Chen’s mouth curved downwards, his expression full of indifference and disdain.

His irritable mood couldn’t be suppressed though, especially after seeing the cold and spicy food. As if a fire was set off, his tone immediately became caustic and cold.

“Xiang Yi, you think your wings have hardened, huh.”

“First you leave home without a word, and now you return without even telling us?”

“You’d rather accept comfort from that dog Shi Sui than come to me?”

“Do you no longer have this elder brother in your heart?!”

chapters.title: Chapter 311 - You Think I’M Dumb？
chapters.body:
Chapter 311 - You Think I’M Dumb？

“…”

Xiang Yi was dumbfounded.

She continued to hold onto her fried chicken and fried dough stick, unmoving.

A few seconds later, she snapped back to reality.

Her elder brother’s words meant…

She had an assumption but was too scared to confirm it.

Xiang Chen’s expression was firm. As he was about to continue scolding her, the young girl suddenly let out a cute and soft hiccup.

Xiang Yi: “…”

Xiang Chen: “…”

Sure enough, you shouldn’t drink carbonated drinks like cola…

With this sudden interruption, Xiang Chen turned his face to the side and covered his thin lips with a hand.

Perhaps Xiang Yi was mistaken, but it seemed like her big brother was…hiding his laughter?

“Ahem.” Xiang Chen cleared his throat and sternly continued. “Did you learn your lesson?”

Xiang Yi nodded.

“Are you going to run away from home again?”

Xiang Yi shook her head.

Xiang Chen seemed satisfied with this. “Ok, continue with your fried chicken.”

Xiang Yi looked at him in disbelief, thinking her ears had fooled her.

“Can, can I really eat it?” The girl asked softly.

Xiang Chen was puzzled. Was he some kind of devil? How come she’s always so scared when she sees him?

It made sense that their little uncle and the other boys were afraid of him. It was normal for men to fight over squabbles. But has he ever laid a finger on his little sister during her whole life?

Every time she would start crying before he even finished a sentence. It scared him so much he didn’t even dare raise his voice at her.

Xiang Yi tentatively took a bite of chicken. Seeing her elder brother’s demeanor remain the same, she hurriedly took several more bites.

Wahhh, to think I would live to see the day I can eat junk food in front of my eldest brother!!

This scene could be written into the humble and pitiful biography of Chen Chen of the Xiang family!

It’s just that as she was about to take a bite of her fried dough stick, it was snatched away by her brother’s large hand.

“No spicy or cold food.” Seeing his sister’s face crinkle, Xiang Chen’s heart softened for a second before returning to his cold-blooded and ruthless scowl.

“But, but…Isn’t it a waste to leave them?” Xiang Yi said in a small voice.

Xiang Chen was silent for a second. “Move over.”

“Eh?”

“Make some room for me.” The man said indifferently. The man sat down beside her and with a blank expression… took a bite of the spicy dough stick.

Bleh.

Garbage indeed.

Xiang Yi gazed at him with watery eyes. “Is it tasty?”

Xiang Chen retorted, “Disgusting.”

Xiang Yi: “…” If it tastes so bad, why don’t you give it to me?

Why make both of us suffer?

“Then the milk tea…”

“You can drink it once it warms up to room temperature.”

Xiang Yi: ???

What’s the point in drinking frozen milk tea and cola at room temperature?

“Why are you looking at it? No looking.” Xiang Chen felt his tone was too rigid and, with all seriousness, lowered the tone of his voice. “Stop being so vain. Don’t you know your period is coming up?”

Xiang Yi: ╰(*°▽°*)╯

Eldest Brother actually remembered this, too?!

Xiang Chen took a few bites of the spicy dough sticks in silence and frowned as he ate.

What the hell is this?

Can humans eat this?

His palette was very sensitive as he could taste every ounce of additives, preserves, and low-quality oil when he ate this kind of food.

“Big Brother…”

The girl’s delicate and timid voice softly sounded next to him.

“Hm?”

Xiang Yi licked her lips. “Did “she” really do something to you…”

If she were to leave this matter alone, it would become a life long knot between her and her brother.

There was a tacit understanding that existed between the siblings as Xiang Chen instantly understood who she was referring to.

Thinking of the ridiculous scene she had caused, his jaw tightened. Xiang Chen’s long and narrow eyes turned ice cold.

“You think I’m dumb?”

“You think I wouldn’t know the difference between my own sister and a fake?”

chapters.title: Chapter 312 - Knot Untangled
chapters.body:
Chapter 312 - Knot Untangled

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

That night, Xiang Chen had run into ‘Xiang Yi’ at the hospital.

After hearing of his sister’s car accident, he immediately pushed off his work and rushed to the hospital.

After staying by his sister’s bed for a few hours, he started to feel drowsy and dozed off beside her bed.

Soon, the fake person woke up and began to judge him from the edge of the bed.

Xiang Chen opened his eyes to meet her gaze. It was strange.

Xiang Chen didn’t think too much of it and asked in a low voice, “Are you hungry? Want some congee?”

The girl blinked. When she spoke, her voice was almost cringeworthy. “Big Brother, you’re the best.”

Xiang Chen immediately noticed something was off.

“Big Brother, I want you to sleep with me for a bit longer.” The girl flexibly crawled onto the bed and burrowed into the man’s arms. Her hands slid into the man’s shirtsleeve and flirtatiously stroked his wrist.

That person had his beloved sister’s face, yet her words that came out of her mouth disgusted him.

Xiang Chen snatched her neck, his body as cold as frost and powerful enough to crush anything to pieces.

“What did you do with my little sister?!”

The fake Xiang Yi glared as a sliver of fear appeared in her gaze.

His hands tightened, and the counterfeit’s face turned red as a pig’s liver as the feeling of suffocation surged.

At the final juncture.

Reason returned to him.

Xiang Chen retracted his hand as he felt his chest surge with heat. “I’ll ask you again. Where is my sister?”

The counterfeit realized that he wasn’t going to attack her. She played deaf and ignorant, refusing to answer any of his questions.

Afterwards, Xiang Chen took her to the most internationally acclaimed psychologists and therapists. He was a staunch materialist, yet in light of the situation, he had turned to theology for help.

There was no progress until Grandpa Xiang, a longtime practitioner of Taoist ideals, personally did a checkup and came to the conclusion:

External possession.

In layman’s terms, something unclean had infiltrated and possessed her body.

Xiang Chen smoked most of the night away before accepting this reality, after which he came up with a series of regulations that restricted ‘Xiang Yi’s’ activities.

It’s just that he didn’t have to explain this to his sister.

Xiang Chen pulled out a napkin and handed it over. “Wipe your mouth.”

Obediently, Xiang Yi listened.

Xiang Chen: “Xiang Li told me his deductions, and our theories aligned.”

Xiang Yi was startled. Did that mean ‘that person’ could possibly return?

“Since a main system already exists that helps you travel the world, can’t you report this kind of bug? Can you still contact the system?”

This reminded Xiang Yi. She couldn’t contact them now, but…Xiao Naofu might be able to!

It was time to take Xiao Naofu home.

“I’ll think of a way.” After untangling the knot in her heart and setting out a plan for the future, Xiang Yi sniffled and sadly exclaimed, “Big Brother, wouldn’t it be nice if our whole family transmigrated…”

Xiang Chen frowned. “What? Were you bullied!”

“Yah! I was beaten so many times! Especially in the martial arts and Xian Xia world!” Perhaps in Xiang Yi’s heart, her big brother was the most trustworthy and dependable. Like a naive child who complained to her parents, she continued on: “If you were there, there would only exist the reality of our family beating up others!”

Xiang Chen: “…”

What did his sister see him as?

Xiang Yi continued to daydream. “Eldest Brother will be in charge of beating people, Second Brother will be in charge of cheating people, Third Brother will be in charge of bullying people, Fourth Brother will be in charge of being mean, and the Little Uncle… eh… can be our mascot?”

She thought about it, conflicted. “Maybe we can leave him here.”

A soft scoff sounded, muffled and sultry.

Every inch of the man’s sharp edges seemed to soften as his lips unfolded into a rare and gentle curve.

Indeed… Her brother was smiling.

chapters.title: Chapter 313 - A Self Slapping Session Does Not Last Overnight (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 313 - A Self Slapping Session Does Not Last Overnight (1)

Xiang Yi felt a bit more courageous. Her toes curled slightly, and she tentatively asked, “Can I take a sip of milk tea? Just one sip, really!”

Xiang Chen raised his eyebrows and pulled out a wet wipe, patiently cleaning off his slender and fair fingers.

Xiang Yi was feeling discouraged until she heard the heaven-sent words:

“Sure.”

Xiang Yi: “!!”

She happily picked up the milk tea and puffed out her cheeks to take a big gulp.

Xiang Chen’s eyes narrowed as one-third of the cup of milk tea evaporated…

It’s technically one sip.

Xiang Chen: ?

Noticing her brother’s gaze, Xiang Yi put down the milk tea with restraint and swallowed it with a gulp. A burp surfaced as she was too full.

A vibrant smile appeared on her face.

From today onwards, she was the bravest cub of the Xiang family!

Not only did she eat fried chicken in front of her eldest brother, she even drank milk tea while he was watching!

Seeing her sweet smile, Xiang Chen swallowed the wave of scolding that had been at the tip of his tongue.

Forget it, so what if she’s a little mischievous. After all, little sisters are meant to be pampered and spoiled.

But their little uncle had to be disciplined. 🙂

Xiang Chen suddenly remembered his business and calmly said, “Don’t bother with those rumors on Weibo, I will deal with them.”

Xiang Yi looked at him with confusion.

“You don’t read Weibo?”

“No…” She hadn’t checked Weibo since she posted that recipe.

Xiang Chen patted her head. “Maybe it’s better that you didn’t see it. I’m expecting everything to return to normal by tomorrow.”

He wasn’t going to allow his sister to take the blame for a fake.

Xiang Yi protested quietly, “Big Brother, this isn’t how you pat someone’s head…”

Xiang Chen squinted. “Oh?”

“I’m going to go bald if you use this much pressure…”

Xiang Chen stared at her for a few seconds and sneered. “Who else has touched your head besides me? Shi Sui? Hm?”

Xiang Yi’s smile disappeared.

After reacting, she imitated her uncle’s actions and leaped off the car through the other door. Barefoot, she escaped from the vehicle, almost tripping over the shoe Xiang Feng had dropped behind in the process…

Xiang Chen: “….”

He wanted to maintain his ice-cold exterior but couldn’t hold back the smile forming on his thin lips.

Heh, a silly bunny.

As the public opinion churned and everyone was condemning Xiang Yi, a relationship blogger finally brought the case of “Xiang Yi climbing into her brother’s bed” to a climax.

[Qinghe Blooming V]: As a girl, the first thing we are taught is self-respect, self-discipline, self-awareness, and self-love. If you can’t do these for yourself, how can you expect others to respect and cherish you?

With all due respect, the female celebrity that has been the center of gossip has disregarded the basics of ethics and morality and stooped below the bottom line of human nature. Such behavior is really shameful! Stars in the entertainment industry are public figures, and any bad behavior will be magnified to be socially impactful!

Just imagine, if someone tried to imitate said actress’s behavior in messing up their private life, even acting inappropriately towards their biological brothers, uncles, or fathers…How much social unrest would that cause?

Entertainment is paramount, but the industry should also have a bottom line! I strongly recommend canceling such bad actors! Cleanse the entertainment circle!

This blogger often made sharp comments on current social issues and amassed a large number of fans. Once this was posted, it was regarded as the ‘bible’ and the ‘holy truth’ by several netizens, making it the perfect weapon for attacking Xiang Yi.

However.

Eight o’clock sharp that evening.

The official Weibo account of Ling Chen law office posted a cold and concise statement.

[Ling Chen Law Office V]: Statement regarding Miss @Xiang Yi is as follows:

chapters.title: Chapter 314 - A Self Slapping Session Does Not Last Overnight (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 314 - A Self Slapping Session Does Not Last Overnight (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

There was no additional text, only a lawyer’s letter with an official seal was attached.

In the accusation, only one person and one incident was the target!

Qin Wanyan’s rumor-mongering!

“…The following circumstances shall be deemed as ‘fabricating facts to slander others’ as stipulated in the first paragraph of Article 246 of the Criminal Law: (1) Fabricated facts that damage the reputation of the client and rumor-mongering on networking forums, or organizing, instructing or gathering personnel…”

The letter was concise and struck precisely where it meant to. All the spectating netizens suddenly became very confused.

How… How did it suddenly become a rumor?!

Only promotional accounts start rumors. Qin Wanyan was a celebrity; why would she need to spread rumors??

Qin Wanyan was dumbfounded as well.

Her manager called to reprimand her. “How stupid are you? If you want to post it, at least use a burner account. If you use your own account, isn’t it just like delivering your head on a silver platter? Don’t you know Xiang Yi’s eldest brother is a top-tier lawyer in China?!”

Qin Wanyan was full of unspeakable woes.

There was no way a PR account or burner account would have the influence of a celebrity account. Only if she posted it and deleted it right away would the most optimal result be achieved.

Besides, for the last few years, Xiang Yi had been adamant that her eldest brother despised her to no end. He wouldn’t even acknowledge her, let alone represent her!

But why did Xiang Chen suddenly appear now?

And he even came with an officially drafted lawyer’s note as a warning.

Qing Wanyan cursed in her mind. She had only posted one Weibo status; it shouldn’t be serious enough to mess with the law.

“I will handle it appropriately, no need to worry.”

Afterward, Qin Wanyan hung up the phone and pondered for a while before posting another status on Weibo.

[Qin Wanyan V]: “I am deeply apologetic that something like this has happened. I didn’t think the information on my phone would leak out, or that someone would hack and repost the conversations I had with Xiang Yi in private!”

We used to be the best of friends, and even if we are drifting apart now, I still wish her all the best. After the incident, I had actively reached out to her to apologize, but she didn’t respond.

As for the cause of the rumors, it wasn’t my intention to spread them, let alone my actions in doing so.

The law is fair, but while some choose to use the law to maintain order, others choose to utilize the law for their own self-interest… Whatever, there’s not much to say. I can apologize for something I didn’t do, but…

@Xiang Yi, can you please reply to my WeChat message?

Attached was a photo of her conversation with Xiang Yi.

All of Qin Wanyan’s messages had been warm and sincere regards, apologizing for the post deletion incident. However, Xiang Yi did not respond to a single message.

As Qin Wanyan expected, the influence of a celebrity was much greater than any marketing account!

The spectators all gathered around and were immediately brainwashed by her White Lotus ways.

—— [Look at that, poor poor Qin Wanyan!]

—— [I feel so bad for Goddess Qin. Never mind her stolen account, the Vase Fairy won’t even respond to her messages. The nerve of that woman!]

—— [Did anyone notice that Yanyan has Xiang Yi nicknamed as AAA Yiyi with stars? She really sees Xiang Yi as a friend.]

—— [Everything else aside, isn’t it a bit disgusting to not respond? It’s fine if you ignore her for a few days, but it’s been weeks since she responded to our jiejie! Who does she think she is? Just because she is on one reality show that’s a little bit popular, she thinks she’s a first-rate celebrity?]

Qin Wanyan’s fans continued their mockery as the paragraphs spewed out one after the other.

Unfortunately——

A few minutes later, someone posted a photo.

Qin Wanyan’s IP address did not change throughout this whole duration!

In other words, her account was never stolen!

Suddenly, the internet went into an uproar.

chapters.title: Chapter 315 - A Self Slapping Session Does Not Last Overnight (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 315 - A Self Slapping Session Does Not Last Overnight (3)

What was this lightning-speed face slapping!

It was as if someone was waiting to expose her IP address right as she uploaded her Weibo post.

Seeing the photo, Qin Wanyan became dumbstruck.

Has she been targeted?

How can someone be this vile! How will she explain herself in front of all these netizens?!

But it was her manager who was angered to the point of spitting blood.

Ever since she signed on with Qin Wanyan, the manager had known she wasn’t an easy person to please.

Thankfully, her methods were useful, and she’d always be able to secure the best resources.

For example, not many people were enthusiastic about her at first, but after building up hype around her sisterhood with Xiang Yi and making a fake account to gain clout in Xiang Yi’s fan club, she was able to rope a large number of fans.

Another example was her use of Xiang Yi’s stupidity to amplify her goddess-like status, which seemed to have left the mud without a single stain. With that, she was able to obtain many resources that did not originally belong to her…

Qin Wanyan’s manager felt that it was good for an artist to be ambitious, and understand how to scheme in order to benefit oneself. It wasn’t anything vile, so she let her be.

The catastrophe might come late, but it was for sure always on its way.

“From now on, I’m confiscating your Weibo account!” After scolding Qin Wanyan, she hurriedly thought of a way to announce the news.

Soon, Qin Wanyan’s manager had made an emergency PR post using her own Weibo account.

[Fatty Who Loves HotPot V]: An audience’s words are gold, and they can destroy a person to the bones. Rumors are the most harmful things you can do to an artist; those who know Qin Wanyan will understand what kind of a person she really is.

I hope everyone refrains from the acts of believing, spreading, and creating rumors. Our team will resort to legal action to protect our most precious artists, and to protect justice! Thank you, everyone!

Evidently, this was written for Qin Wanyan’s fans.

Naturally, the fans responded: [Of course we trust in our goddess Qin!]

Meanwhile, other netizens mocked them:

——[lmao. It’s selfish when other people resort to using the law, but when you do it it’s protecting justice??]

——[Hahahaha the double standards are too real. Stop with your grandeur and post your lawyer letter if you really mean it! Learn some efficiency from the Vase Fairy!]

——[Do you really think all lawyers are that efficient? Don’t compare yourself to the Ling Shen Law Office, they are literally the glass ceiling of the profession… all the cases that Lawyer Xiang has personally handled can be found online, he is really a god among gods. I suggest everyone in law to familiarize themselves with his publications.]

The wind direction was starting to shift.

People began to doubt the authenticity of Qin Wanyan’s screenshots, but even more, people began to have preconceived notions.

——[Hehe. This is just two bitches fighting. Qin Wanyan is a White Lotus, but the Vase Fairy is nothing good either.]

——[Excuse me, but the incidents of seducing men and crawling onto their beds were all exposed by the Xiang idol herself; it’s not like someone put a knife to her throat and made her come clean.]

——[Stop trying to vindicate her, it won’t happen! Just because she knows people in higher places doesn’t mean the world is now in reverse. The internet remembers! So what, having a lawyer brother makes you hot shit now?]

——[Just wait. The Vase Fairy’s family will not post another statement. After all, this would be considered a scandal in high society, and who doesn’t care about losing face in the upper social classes? ]

The next second.

Someone exclaimed: [Holy sh*t! Xiang Yi’s eldest brother personally responded! If you guys search up @Bunbunseldestbrother you can see as well!!!!]

And it was on that night that several bystanders and spectators discovered Xiang Chen’s Weibo account.

[Bunbunseldestbrother V]: All recent events are complications of amnesia. Our little bunny lost her memory 376 days ago after a car accident. Attached are her medical records and certified diagnosis papers from a licensed psychiatrist, therapist, and psychologist. Attached also is a comparison video of before and after her amnesia.

chapters.title: Chapter 316 - A Self Slapping Session Does Not Last Overnight (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 316 - A Self Slapping Session Does Not Last Overnight (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The netizens: Eh? Amnesia?

Nowadays, everyone is subject to copious amounts of information on a daily basis. Trending topics alone on Weibo varied several times a day, and sometimes, netizens would forget about the drama they were following.

But some people had better memories than others, and they immediately explained to everyone what Dr. Xiang Li said about Xiang Yi losing her memory for a year.

Everyone was shocked. So this means… Everything is tied together?

They viewed the photos.

Xiang Chen’s photos were like his person—clear in logic, brief, and concise.

The diagnosis, medical certificate, and monitoring screenshots of hospitals and foreign clinics were in both Chinese and other languages. Attached were also emails and electronic files, all marked with timestamps, which could not be faked.

This was solid evidence!

Seeing this, several netizens realized they had been played and even used as a weapon against Xiang Yi!

Several overstimulated fans rushed over to Qin Wanyan’s Weibo and went into Zaun mode*.

Some netizens also chose to open the second Weibo post that Xiang Chen posted, which was the video footage.

At the start, the video showed warm colors and tones, and one could make out… a family dinner?

Elder Brother Xiang Chen, Second Brother Xiang Li, Third Brother Xiang Qi, Fourth Brother Xiang Yu, and a rather derpy-looking man… The entire family was very aesthetically attractive.

In the video, a Xiang Yi with fuller cheeks wearing a Mori cotton skirt, with hair softly draped over her shoulders, was smiling gently.

“Little Xiang Yi, happy birthday, this is from your Little Uncle!” The derpy man pulled out a gift box first. “This is a lifetime VIP card to your favorite ice cream store!”

The next second, all four brothers turned toward him with daggers in their eyes.

Xiang Chen grunted. Seeing it was his sister’s birthday, he would not quarrel today.

Xiang Yu was the second person to bring out a gift. “Sis, sis, here’s a game console from me! It’s a limited-edition model! Now we can play video games together!”

Next was Xiang Qi in a mocking tone. “Your dress is too ugly, eh? Here, wear this one I made for you! I even sewed so many flowers just for you!”

Then it was Xiang Li’s turn. The man pushed at his glasses and said smoothly, “I wrote a new AI code lately. It’s pretty useful for checking recipes and nutritional information. I’ve installed it in this speaker.”

Last was Xiang Chen. The man’s expression was cold, and his gaze was sharp. He tossed her a piece of folded white paper. “Write down what you want, whatever it is.”

Everyone else: …!!

How is that allowed?!! Xiang Chenchen, you’re cheating!

Only, nobody dared to say a word under Xiang Chen’s penetrating and cold gaze…

“Okay, okay, blow out the candles. Little Xiang Yi, make a wish!”

Xiang Yi blinked and clasped her hands together. “I hope next year, we can be together as a family!”

The video was cut to black and switched to another segment.

It was “Xiang Yi” after experiencing amnesia speaking to her brothers.

“You’re my brother? You’re also my brother? Then, shouldn’t you give me my allowance by now? I just saw a bracelet over there, it’s fully embedded with diamonds. So shiny and pretty!”

It was the same face, but everything else, from her expression to her tone, even her actions, confirmed it was a completely different person.

The comment section suddenly became more unified.

—— [Holy sh*t I’m shivering, it’s like something from the occult!]

—— [Don’t tell me she’s acting! If the Vase Fairy was acting, she would have won an Oscar already!]

—— [Oh my god, I thought of another possibility. It might not be amnesia, but a saying from my village: She’s been possessed by the weasel! **]

*Translator’s Note: Zaun is the name of a server in the Chinese version of the video game League of Legends. One day, someone from that server posted a screenshot of a chat history that blew up online and left the impression that players from the Zaun server were the most foul-mouthed and toxic players in the game. “Zaun mode” or going “Zaun” now refers to people who are very good at talking smack about anything.

** The direct translation used here is ‘the weasel has possessed her’. In Chinese myth, the ‘weasel’ is similar to the fox demon, which is known for possessing people and turning them into evil-minded folks. It’s usually a term used for people with mental illness who spew nonsense.

chapters.title: Chapter 317 - Sister-In-Law Fans
chapters.body:
Chapter 317 - Sister-In-Law Fans

The ‘weasel demon’ comment was immediately liked so much it reached top comment.

—— [Delete that. Let me post /doge /doge]

—— [What are you saying? No more demonic possessions after the republic was founded, remember?]

—— [Holy sh*t, I’m going to die from laughing at these comments. You can say fox demon or white lotus demon, but what the hell is a weasel demon!!!]

It must be said, though, that Xiang Chen’s work was fast, effective, and cruel.

By sending out a lawyer’s letter first to resolve the rumors, then providing evidence that expunges the rumors, and then posting hard evidence like a video to prove Xiang Yi’s innocence… At this point, 90% of the netizens believed Xiang Yi had amnesia!

Nobody would believe in the transmigration story, but medically, amnesia and its after effects made sense. In a way, it was also not wrong to deem the ‘counterfeit’ Xiang Yi as a mental illness.

The public opinion was immediately reversed.

—— [You really can’t control amnesia]

—— [Pure passer-by commenting here: If this thing happens to a male artist, would you still be excited? Will the scumbag be forgiven? Will the scumbag be nailed to the pillar and shamed? Don’t argue, if you argue, you are wrong.]

—— [I looked it up, the complications of amnesia are quite terrifying. Some people will see a change in their temperament, while others will have multiple personality disorder. Some punks would suddenly become top students… I can only say the world is full of wonders]

Most people purely felt that even if Xiang Yi had done something after she got her memories back, she would only harm her family.

If her family hasn’t said anything, then what more can these outsiders say?

Well, they should go roast Qin Wanyan first, then figure out the rest later!

All of a sudden, Qin Wanyan’s Weibo was bombarded with over 100,000 comments scolding her, creating an all time highest record for traffic to her page.

—— [White Lotus Award of the Year goes to: Qin Wanyan]

—— [Are you playing us like clowns? Shameless]

—— [Good sisters? Is this how you treat your sister? Does it feel good to stab her in the back?]

Qin Wanyan’s agent knew how to operate a fanclub though. Often, she would remove and ban fans and implement a strict management protocol for the fanclub. That way, not only were her fans great for combat, they were extremely loyal as well.

The fans were not convinced as they cursed the only remaining fault of Xiang Yi’s: [ It doesn’t matter what our goddess Qin did wrong, Xiang Yi shouldn’t have ignored her messages! ]

Then, Shi Sui updated his status.

[ Shi Sui V]: This account of Yimei’s was registered the year she lost her memory. After she gained her memory back, she never used it.

Qin Wanyan’s fans: ….WTF???!!!

It’s not that she was ignoring her, but it’s because this account wasn’t being used at all!

If they were actually best friends, wouldn’t Qin Wanyan know about this?

Or if she had known and continued to send messages to that number everyday, wouldn’t she be acting and directing her own play, the faker of all fakers?!

Angry netizens soon swarmed Qin Wanyan’s Weibo page and slaughtered all the remaining super-talk.

Her fans were as quiet as sitting ducks, with nobody even following up when her biggest fans had declared internet war.

As the netizens vented their emotions on Qin Wanyan’s Weibo page, two groups of people with strange demeanors suddenly appeared…

The first wave was Xiang Yi’s ‘Sister-in-law fans’, who mainly congregated in the comment section of the video posted by Xiang Chen.

—— [Sorry, but my husband and I are already registered @bunbunsoldestbrotherV]

—— [Bleh! Me and Chenchen’s child is already three years old!]

—— [Ahh I declare I am Xiang Yi’s ‘sister-in-law’ fan now! Oldest sister, second sister, third sister, fourth sister; I can be either!]

The other group, of course, was naturally the Untimely CP fans who could find moments of sweetness in a pile of glass shards with a microscope….

chapters.title: Chapter 318 - He Did It!
chapters.body:
Chapter 318 - He Did It!

These fans naturally conglomerated at Shi Sui’s Weibo page.

—— [Ah——I’m screaming like a groundhog every day!]

—— [Shi Sui is so indulgent! During the stream he was crazy looking at his wife, now he’s gone crazy protecting his wife!]

—— [I’m going to faint from shipping this couple, voting in the Super-talks, then protecting Yimei on Weibo, Shisui and Yimei are locked up! In my mind, they’re already married with two kids, thank you very much! ]

What excited these CP fans the most was the unexpected wave of sweetness!

Shi Sui had posted nine consecutive photos of his and Xiang Yi’s dual magazine cover for ‘MyStyle’, which attracted countless people!

Shi Sui wore a vintage black suit with coquettish makeup that he bore quite well. For the individual photo, he selected the one where he had petals in his mouth, the photo of himself cutting steak, and another close up where his intense gaze met the camera under dim candlelight.

The Shisui Sisters who were the first to comment:

—— [Gege’s otherworldly beauty can kill a person aahhhh!]

—— [This man is so photogenic. He’s the most enchanting vampire in history!]

—— [I wish I was that flower petal, Gege’s kiss is so sultry and domineering /shy /shy]

Xiang Yi was in a cream-colored long dress with clear makeup and sparkling eyes. She completely fit the image of the most popular Disney princess on the internet. Her individual photos included a few closeups, one with her smiling as she walked through the forest while holding her skirt, as well as the shot of a wild deer kissing her fingertips that seemed to have come straight out of a fairytale.

Xiang Yi’s older sister fans and mother fans reported for duty.

—— [Q_Q our Yimei is such a little goddess!]

—— [Ahhh baby Yi, mommy loves you! You look so sweet feeding the deer!]

—— [Hey kiddo! Mommy forbids you from revealing your collarbone! Cover it up now! Who can understand an old mother’s worries]

However, the most popular photo was the dual cover.

The first shot was when the vampire and the innocent princess met each other’s gaze in the forest.

The second shot had moved into an old castle, where Shi Sui had his arms wrapped around Xiang Yi’s chest as if he was about to kiss her.

The third shot was a reflection in the mirror. A big slender hand locked pinky fingers with a paler, smaller hand….

The comment section exploded!

The passing netizens were amazed, and the fans even more!

—— [I don’t care! Wedding photos! These are wedding photos!!]

—— [Mommy, I ship it so hard! Untimely Couple! Is! So! Sweet!]

—— [What’s with the hand-holding, are you lacking in publicity? Kiss! KISS! Shi Yingdi, are you good or not? If not, I can take your place!]

Seeing that his post was gaining in popularity, it didn’t take long for an official account to release a video of the edited footage from filming.

After adding a sepia filter and adjusting the saturation, Sophia’s photography aesthetic could truly be perceived, and it was amazing.

A piano and violin ensemble sounded at the start.

The video had a complete storyline, from when the vampire first met the princess to their intense romance, to the fall, until they fell into the darkness…

At first, the music was soothing and melodious, then it turned into a passionate tango tune, then slowly faded into a lingering melody that became gloomier and gloomier…

With the addition of these filters and the music, hearts were stirred for those who loved tragedy.

But at the end of the video was a scene of a man grasping the girl’s waist with one arm and the other behind her head, fiercely bringing her closer to his chest. The camera had given him a close-up…

His Adam’s apple rolled, and hungrily, he licked the corners of his pale thin lips…

The video suddenly stopped.

Untimely CP fans:

—— [It’s Christmas, it’s Christmas!!!]

—— [Someone get me the loudest fireworks in the world!]

—— [Sisters, let’s repost this! He did it, he did it, he did it, Shi Yingdi finally did it!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 319 - I Am A Domineering Ceo (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 319 - I Am A Domineering Ceo (1)

The chemistry between Shi Sui and Xiang Yi was too strong.

Even if they weren’t a fan of the couple, people had expressed they would buy the issue of this magazine regardless!

Fashion bloggers also praised these nine photos into the sky:

—— [Hades’ designs will never disappoint. The precise cut and folds on the dress give it the ‘fleeing princess’ vibe, while the details are compelling. I think not only a fawn in the forest would be smitten; every woman must be as well in the depths of their souls!]

—— [Shi Sui’s three-piece suit was made by a designer from the 90s named George, and it is a veritable ‘limited edition’ vintage ready to wear. After it was tailored, the suit feels much more gentle and elegant, as it seamlessly integrates classic and modern fashion. Shi Yingdi himself is also famously known to be a very good clothes hanger and was even able to interpret the suit to demonstrate his own charm.]

—— [‘MyStyle’ never disappoints. Miss Sophia has shown us the excellence of an American Born Chinese and was even able to change the usual overly sweet style of the cover magazine to a dark and retro style that is very unique. Returning to a medieval and noble style, her work is gorgeous and extravagant, and the selection of the two models are also not superficial or surface level at all. She really brings meaning to the phrase 1+1 is greater than 2.]

Seeing the enthusiasm from word of mouth, the magazine publishers immediately printed out this month’s issue of the magazine.

As for the scene of the little princess seducing the vampire, it would be used as a final bonus!

At the manor.

After some discussion, the stream started up again.

Considering that their clarification may not have been seen by every netizen, Li Jianyu decided that a second briefing on the stream will achieve better results.

In addition, in order to ease the public opinion, he released a topic that would arouse everyone’s interest:

“Hello to our godly viewers, this Friday evening at 9:00 pm, our cut of “Two Under One Roof” will premiere on all major streaming platforms. I hope that you can give me some face and click on it, post a live comment, and give it a like. The production crew bows down and thanks you all graciously!”

Li Jianyu’s speech was mellow, as if he was in a standup show. Because of his frightening physique, he amassed a large number of ‘dad fans’.

In an instant:

—— [Son, it’s cold on the floor, two hours of kneeling is enough]

—— [Daddy, I want to watch knees sliding, can you arrange that?]

—— [Watching other shows: The director sees me as an audience member. Watching Two Under One Roof: I treat the director like dirt. One word: NICE!]

A wave of ‘hahahaha’ swept through the stream as the atmosphere became harmonious.

Only, once the camera swept to the right, curses began to appear on the stream.

These viewers were a step behind the other dramamongers and did not see the Weibo post from Lin Chen Law Office or from Xiang Chen as they continued to mock Xiang Yi.

—— [Nobody is going to disagree if I say the Vase Fairy is a burnt out variety show artist, right? ]

—— [Hahaha I’ve never seen a celebrity that is on trending everyday, yet has no fans to defend her ]

—— [Not only does she have no fans, her management company is basically dead too. These stupid CP fans keep making it worse as well.]

—— [Is there anyone who doesn’t know about the overlord contract signed by Xiang Yi? The contract is only terminated upon death. The company will retain 90% of all profit while the remaining 10% will be counted toward income tax. The most important thing, however, is that terminating the contract requires a fee of 100 million RMB hehe]

Xiang Feng had been watching the stream with headphones on but wasn’t paying too much attention. When he suddenly saw the ‘foul language’ that was being spewed by these netizens, he immediately clacked back a response.

After only a few sentences, Xiang Feng received a notification:

[Your account has been banned]

Xiang Feng: “…”

chapters.title: Chapter 320 - I Am A Domineering Ceo (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 320 - I Am A Domineering Ceo (2)

I, the domineering CEO of Xing Chen app, has been banned again?

Stupid review! Stupid restricted words! Stupid ass developer!

Deduct his salary! Deduct all their salaries!

Feng Feng of the Xiang family was in a raging fit while remaining helpless until he heard the gentle voice of his niece. “Little Uncle, do you want milk tea?”

Xiang Feng: “!”

Garbage stream, turn it off.

Happiness, here I come!!

After adjusting his mood, Xiang Feng started preparing for milk tea.

The Xiang family loved sweet things, especially the Little Uncle, who loved sweets the most. Knowing this, Xiang Yi prepared several ingredients in advance. After the stream began, she naturally began boiling the milk tea in a small pot, explaining the whole time.

Shi Sui and Xiang Chen remained silent throughout, occasionally speaking a few words to support Xiang Yi.

The girl’s voice was gentle, and her actions were not rushed. It was quite pleasing to the eye.

First, bring the red tea to a boil. When the tea is a bright shade of mahogany, pour into a container on the side while straining the leaves.

Next, bring the milk to medium heat, and melt rock sugar while stirring. As she stirred, Xiang Yi said: “My big brother and Shi Sui don’t like things too sweet, so my milk tea is not very sweet on its own, but the additional ingredients are very sweet. If someone likes their drink sweeter, they can always add it.”

In “Two Under One Roof”, Xiang Yi’s existence was quite noticeable when she wasn’t cooking.

She always appeared to not have a care in the world and did not try to dominate the camera. She didn’t put on an act, nor try to compete with the other guests for anything.

This kind of personality had both benefits and downfalls.

With no presence, people would often think she could be easily bullied.

This was one of the reasons why so many anti-fans would mock her unscrupulously.

Many netizens suddenly realized that tonight, the Xiang Yi making milk tea was the most talkative one.

This allowed more people to intuitively recognize her.

Just listening to her talking was inexplicably healing.

Li Jianyu cued her: “Yimei, some of the audience members are asking if you bought your toppings or made it yourself.”

“These?” Xiang Yi gestured to the table of toppings.

She generously prepared several toppings, including pudding, taro balls, puree, grass jelly, red beans, oats, purple rice…

And of course, the match made in heaven and soul of milk tea—tapioca pearls!

“I made these just now, and they are very simple. For example, tapioca pearls are made from boiling brown sugar and water, pouring in tapioca starch, and stirring them until they become dough-like in substance. Then just knead it into small balls and cook it slowly. For the taro balls, I just steamed some sweet potatoes and pressed them into a puree before adding an appropriate amount of water and potato starch…”

The netizens:

—— [I’m screen recording this! Going to try it after!]

—— [My brain: easily understands; my hands: easily ruins it]

—— [QQ Xiang Yi is so gentle after all, I love hearing her talk, it’s so comforting! Can the pretty sister keep her mic on more often! I even love listening to her talk about recipes!]

Seeing Xiang Yi introduce milk tea to the audience, Li Jianyu became overwhelmed with emotion as the audience’s favor rose.

Streaming was a double-edged sword. Some people gained countless fans after going live, while others only gained anti-fans.

Perhaps he had been wrong all along, thinking it would be better for Xiang Yi to remain low profile in order to avoid attracting anti-fans.

But it seems like letting her display her true self was much more attractive to gaining fans!

Ding dong——

The timer sounded on the electric pot as she combined the milk with the black tea and boiled the drink to a temperature of 80 degrees.

Xiang Yi served a cup to her uncle first. Like picking up a hot potato, Xiang Feng quickly handed the glass to Chen Chen.

“Little Chen Chen, you drink first!”

He was living up to the reputation of being the biggest pushover of the Xiang family.

chapters.title: Chapter 321 - I Am A Domineering Ceo (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 321 - I Am A Domineering Ceo (3)

Xiang Chen grabbed it expressionlessly and took a sip. The refreshing aroma of tea and rich milkiness of the milk were fused together to provide a silky smooth mouth-feel.

The sweetness was just right for him.

Although Xiang Chen didn’t say anything, he took two more sips quietly.

The netizens were shocked!

It must be delicious! They thought.

One of the “Sister-in-law Fans” typed with tears in her eyes: [I didn’t expect that I’d one day not only crave for Xiang Chen’s body but also for the milk tea in his hand!]

Xiang Feng got the second cup, and he excitedly added a load of toppings. Without even bothering to use a straw, he started chugging the cup of milk tea…

“!”

‘Milk tea with pearls, taro paste, pudding, and loads of syrup! It tastes heavenly!’

He looked at Shi Sui provocatively, thinking to himself that he was finally not the last in line!

‘My little niece scooped the toppings for me first!’

In the next second…

Shi Sui smiled and raised his hand to add some toppings to his milk tea, but his hand suddenly “trembled” and the spoon dropped into the bowl of toppings. His eyes were filled with a trace of helplessness.

Xiang Yi frantically said, “I’ll help you add the toppings, which ones do you want?”

“Thank you, Xiang Yi.” Shi Sui said with an innocent but grateful gaze, “Two scoops of taro paste, please.”

Xiang Yi added two large scoops of taro paste to the drink and even inserted the straw before handing it to Shi Sui.

She was just short of feeding him herself.

Xiang Feng widened his eyes in astonishment.

In the livestream:

——[Hahaha, who is this silly man!?! Why is he so amusing?]
