——[I previously heard Xiang Yi calling him ‘Uncle’, he should be her relative.]

——[??? I refuse to believe it. Xiang Yi and Xiang Chen are obviously much smarter than him. How can they possibly belong to the same family!?!]

The netizens were irked with Xiang Feng, and their comments were flooding the screen, almost threatening to emerge from it.

…

On Weibo, the latest post by Tomato Entertainment received tens of thousands of hateful comments.

In fact, Xiang Yi did have her own fan base, but her fans were all peace-loving and chose to put the blame on Tomato Entertainment instead of arguing with the haters on the Internet.

Even the smug Qin Wanyan had her manager to defend her unexpected actions. No matter how poorly the public relations were handled, they at least didn’t disappoint Qin Wanyan’s fans.

Yet, what did Tomato Entertainment do?

They feigned ignorance and never issued a single statement since the last announcement about the impending launch of SEASEVEN’s new album on the online music platform.

Xiang Yi’s fans were enraged.

——[This money-grubbing company is trash!]

——[Daily Question: Has Tomato Entertainment collapsed yet?]

——[What kind of celebrity management company is this? Is the PR Department dead?]

…

While the fans were all agitated and spamming hateful comments on the Internet, Xiang Yi’s manager, Ah Nan, suddenly posted something on Weibo.

[@LittleAhNan]: Guys, stop the scolding, please… We’re going to take action soon.

The fans were furious to see that he was still standing up for his company.

——[I think you’re tired of living.]

——[As Xiang Yi’s manager, what have you done for her?]

In the next second…

The official account of Tomato Entertainment, which had been silent for a long time, finally posted something.

[Tomato Entertainment]: Ten minutes ago, we had already completed all the administrative processes with @XingChenEntertainment. The current business affairs and artists signed to Tomato Entertainment will all be handed over to Xing Chen Entertainment. Our company will start the business restructuring today, and the new person in charge is @XiangYi. Hello Miss Xiang, please guide us along in the future.

The fans were all dumbfounded.

‘Damn it, how did Xiang Yi become a director just like that!?!’

…

In the livestream:

Xiang Feng received a notice from his assistant who informed him that the acquisition of Tomato Entertainment was completed.

Xiang Yi was stunned.

Seeing this, Xiang Feng flew into a rage and protested, “What’s up with that expression of yours? It’s not that difficult to acquire a company. I’m a domineering CEO!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 322 - Vying To Sign The Indenture (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 322 - Vying To Sign The Indenture (1)

“Uncle, did you…you acquire my management company?” Xiang Yi answered as she looked at Xiang Feng in disbelief after snapping back to her senses.

Xiang Chen glanced at him but couldn’t be bothered to criticize him for his inefficiency.

Hands on hips, Xiang Feng looked all cocky and smug. “Mhm, I’ve also registered your name as the legal nominee. From now on, you’ll be your own boss!”

In the livestream, some netizens stubbornly refused to believe it and even began mocking them.

—— [LMAO, do you know how much it costs to acquire a company?]

—— [Tomato Entertainment may be a small company, but it is valued at several billion yuan. Yet, he acquired it so easily? What an outrageous braggart.]

The netizens who had already seen the latest news on Weibo retorted.

—— [Not convinced? Suck it up!]

—— [Xiang Yi is beautiful and rich, protected by her brothers, and pampered by her uncle. That’s how rich and powerful she is.]

…

There were lots of comments in the livestream, and there was even a netizen who claimed to be a professional and put forward her opinion.

[I’m a professional of the finance industry. Fixed assets and liquid assets are two completely different concepts. Having a net worth of billions doesn’t necessarily mean that one has billions in cash. This silly guy said he acquired a multi-billion dollar company? So he means he has at least billions or even tens of billions worth in assets?]

That comment gained the approval of many.

‘Exactly, how can a silly-looking man like him be a domineering CEO?’ they thought.

It would still be somewhat credible if Xiang Chen was the one who said it, but no one believed that Xiang Feng was capable of the acquisition.

Just as the haters thought that they had “figured out the truth” and started mocking Xiang Yi in the livestream…

Xiang Yi’s fans, who had been waiting quietly for them to finish throwing shade, finally and calmly sent the link to the official statement that Tomato Entertainment had posted on Weibo.

—— [ [Tomato Entertainment]: Ten minutes ago, we had already…]

The haters: ???

The haters: !!!

Wow!

That silly guy is really a CEO now!?!

As if that wasn’t frustrating enough for them, Xiang Yi’s fans had learned to gloat at some point and deliberately rubbed it in by mocking them at this moment.

—— [Congratulations to Xiang Yi for being such an underdog and making a comeback as a boss~]

—— [Xiang Yi: I will never be a salaryman, I’m fit only for the role of a domineering CEO.]

—— [I really want to yell, Xiang Yi’s uncle is so impressive!!! Okay, I’m done yelling, he’s still pretty silly. Well, just see how he’s using a spoon to scoop up the tapioca pearls and grass jelly that he couldn’t suck into the straw.]

…

The haters thought, ‘Damn it, we’ve always been the one angering others. Who knows it’d be the other way around today!?’

…

Shi Sui, who had been seated beside Xiang Yi and drinking his milk tea obediently, suddenly asked, “Xiang Yi, are you going to work hard on signing more celebrities to your agency and focus on your career from now on?”

Everyone knew that Shi Sui’s contract with Xing Chen Entertainment was about to expire.

Xiang Feng was dumbstruck.

‘You’re openly trying to jump ship right in front of me!?’

Feeling a little embarrassed, Xiang Yi said, “I don’t think anyone wants to be signed to my company…”

She knew a fair bit about business management and had tried her hands at it in the world that she had transmigrated too, but it wasn’t that easy to clinch a deal with excellent celebrities.

After getting over it, the haters replied furiously. [At least you still have some self-awareness!]

At this moment, they suddenly heard the sounds of an argument coming from outside the living room.

“We were here first, we want to see Sister!”

“Hah, I won’t let you. Do you want to fight one-on-one or come at me all together? Take your pick!”

In the livestream:

[Uh… It seems to be Chen from SEASEVEN. Aren’t they celebrities who’d be the perfect ones for her agency?]

The haters: in the midst of vomiting blood——

They were exasperated!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 323 - Vying To Sign The Indenture (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 323 - Vying To Sign The Indenture (2)

…

…

Xiang Yi blinked and stood up. “There are guests, I’ll go take a look.”

The cameraman followed closely behind.

Xiang Yi opened the door and the cameraman also happened to capture the scene outside.

As expected, the most popular young hunk among the seven members of SEASEVEN, Jiang Chen, was having a childish argument with someone.

The person standing opposite him was surprisingly the roguish teenager from Mingxi Boys’ High School, Rong Huai.

“Can you stop being so unreasonable!?!” Jiang Chen hollered, clenching his fists furiously.

Rong Huai had a buzz cut, and he was shaking his leg in an unbridled manner. “I told you, it’s up to you to decide if you want to fight me one-on-one or take me on together. If I’m not scared, what are you being such a coward for? Garb…” Before he could finish saying the word ‘garbage’ he noticed Xiang Yi who was standing behind the door smilingly. He said, “The spicy chicken cubes taste pretty good.”

Jiang Chen said, “Is there something…” Before Jiang Chen could continue, the leader of the group, Shen Ci, reached out to block him.

Shen Ci was a handsome young man. He said smilingly at Xiang Yi, “Hello, Sister! Ahem, Jiang Chen meant to ask if you know of a Sichuan cuisine restaurant to recommend.”

Jiang Chen’s ears were red because he didn’t expect that Xiang Yi would see him arguing with others.

‘Uwu, I’ll definitely be hated on.’

Feeling a little uneasy, Rong Huai whistled and pretended to be calm, but he would steal a glance at Xiang Yi from time to time, feeling rather guilty.

To his surprise, Xiang Yi’s tone was still as gentle as ever and she said, “I made some milk tea, do you want to have some?”

Rong Huai exclaimed, “Yes, I do!”

The members of SEASEVEN exclaimed, “I want some too!”

They stared down at each other, full of tension and aggression.

Xiang Yi said helplessly, “There’s enough for everyone, come on in.”

Rong Huai was tall, strong, and had a rich experience in fighting. After pushing Jiang Chen and the others away, he entered the living room right away.

The members of SEASEVEN: … Ah, we were too careless! He beat us to it!

They may not be able to beat that little brat, but they could trump their fellow members!

Hence, the seven of them began vying with each other and crowded around the entrance.

If Xiang Yi hadn’t tried to persuade them, they might have really gotten into a fight…

Their team spirit was nonexistent!

…

Since there were too many of them and there wasn’t enough space on the sofa, the members of SEASEVEN sat on the ground instead.

Xiang Chen, Xiang Feng, and Shi Sui who were seated on the sofa immediately looked down at them from above.

Xiang Feng said enviously, “If I was ten years younger, my skin would be as good as theirs.”

Xiang Chen scoffed.

Shi Sui followed suit.

“Hmph, do you two think you’re any better? Just like me, you two are old men who are turning thirty soon!”

Xiang Chen was speechless.

Shi Sui was speechless too.

Tension grew in the living room, and the SEASEVEN members began shuddering. Even Rong Huai couldn’t help but inch closer toward Jiang Chen.

Jiang Chen wanted to protest, but Rong Huai glared at him and hollered, “What are you looking at?! If you look again, I’ll beat you up!”

“…”

‘He’s so fierce.’

However, it seemed less scary now that they were seated together. ‘That’s probably the same concept as huddling together for warmth.’

“The milk tea is ready. Add your own toppings,” Xiang Yi said as she poured a cup of milk tea for each of them. The boiling hot milk tea seemed to have a bewitching power…

The netizens were appalled.

—— [There’s surely going to be a sharp surge in orders for milk tea on all major takeout delivery platforms! Everyone, please pay Xiang Yi advertisement fees, thanks!]

—— [Little Vase, stop! I’ve gained so much weight since this livestream started!]

—— [Hah, what a lousy livestreamer! All she does is cook and make milk tea. Can’t she make everyone ship her with a male celebrity or something?]

—— [Ahem, there’s a perfect ship called Untimely Couple, go do some research.]

chapters.title: Chapter 324 - Vying To Sign The Indenture (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 324 - Vying To Sign The Indenture (3)

The fans who shipped the couple secretly butted in…

Ignorant netizens: Huh? What’s Untimely Couple? I gotta search this up.

Afterwards, they accidentally…joined the fan base.

The leader: I’m not worthy of surfing the Internet if the people I introduce the couple to don’t end up shipping them too after getting influenced by me!

…

In the living room.

Rong Huai was just like a little tyrant as he snatched two cups of milk tea as soon as he went up.

He was acting like a young hooligan who had unreasonably forbidden others from drinking the milk tea before he got to do so.

Jiang Chen protested softly, “You can’t do that, Sister Xiang Yi poured a cup for each of us…”

Rong Huai then smirked sinisterly and revealed his muscles. “Are you asking for a beating?”

Jiang Chen stayed silent.

‘I’ll pretend nothing has happened and act like I don’t like milk tea.’

In the next second…

Rong Huai was smacked on his forehead forcefully. He inhaled sharply in pain before raising his head aggressively like a young but wild and beastly wolfdog, only to meet Xiang Yi’s calm, warm, and gentle gaze…

He rubbed his forehead aggrievedly and asked, “Why did you smack me?”

Xiang Yi said, “Everyone gets one cup each. Give the other cup you’re holding to Brother Jiang Chen.”

“Him? You want me to call him Brother?” Rong Huai retorted in disbelief, as if he had heard some joke.

‘I’m always the one getting called Big Brother, not the other way around!’

Xiang Yi sat cross-legged on the ground, and she gazed at him quietly, resting her face in her cheeks.

She looked him in the eye.

One second…

Two seconds…

After three seconds of eye contact, Rong Huai couldn’t take it anymore and quickly looked away while his ears turned red.

‘Damn it.’

‘This woman is not restrained at all!’

‘How can she stare at me like this? It’s making me so embarrassed…’

He reluctantly pushed a glass of milk tea to Jiang Chen.

Jiang Chen was shocked!

‘Uwu, Sister Xiang Yi is so gentle!’

After taking a sip, the warm and sweet milk tea seemed to warm his heart. The faint fragrance of tea mixed with red beans and oat flakes was perfect…

However, it was definitely high in calories.

‘I can’t have too much of this!’

After taking a large mouthful, he thought, ‘Should I have a little bit more…?’

Gradually, he began slurping more and more…

By the time Jiang Chen reacted, he had already finished an entire glass of milk tea!

The young man hung his head low, feeling extremely chagrined.

Rong Huai sneered, “Since you’ve already drunk it, what’s the point of regretting it? Didn’t you derive joy from Sister Xiang Yi’s milk tea?”

Jiang Chen was relaxed and thinking carefully about Rong Huai’s words…

‘Yeah, Sister Xiang Yi’s culinary skills are just so magical and amazing, they make you feel warm and happy.’

‘Isn’t this the essence of tasting beautiful food?’

Jiang Chen said, “You’re such a philosophist! The things you say are so meaningful and make so much sense!”

Rong Huai: ‘You’re a fool.’

“Add more yam balls for me,” Rong Huai said, bossing Jiang Chen around openly. However, Jiang Chen obeyed and followed suit.

They had completely forgotten that they were still in a livestream…

Little did they know that the eagle-eyed netizens had seen their entire interaction.

—— [Ahhh, the top “traffic-generator” and the untamed youth. So sweet!]

—— [I’m sorry, the supporters of this couple seem like a cult, but I couldn’t help but join in for a second!]

—— [Jiang Chen probably only looks cold and aloof on the surface but is actually silly and sweet. Hahaha, he’s getting bullied badly by Rong Huai.]

…

After chatting for a while, Xiang Yi finally asked them for the reason for their visit.

Rong Huai cleared his throat. Just now, Jiang Chen had given him too many taro balls which left an overwhelmingly sticky feeling in his throat. “I plan to take the arts exam and try to qualify for the theater academy. I heard…that Sister opened a company. Can I work there?”

Seemingly afraid that Xiang Yi would turn him down, he said with glistening eyes, “You won’t regret signing me on!”

chapters.title: Chapter 325 - Vying To Sign The Indenture (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 325 - Vying To Sign The Indenture (4)

Although he seemed to be speaking very quickly, Xiang Yi could sense the determination in his tone.

He truly trusted Xiang Yi.

He was full of a youthful zeal and ardor. Although she knew that it was clearly very childish, she couldn’t help but be influenced by him.

Xiang Yi adjusted her posture and sat up straight.

Instead of belittling Rong Huai because of his age, she said seriously, “Rong Huai, I’m very happy for you now that you have a new study plan. However, signing a contract with an agency is not a trivial matter, I hope you can take some time to consider it seriously.”

Rong Huai panicked and asked, “Hey, do you think I’m not good enough?”

Xiang Yi said gently, “I don’t, I’m just saying this from an objective point of view. You are still underage and legally, you’re a… Uh…”

She looked at Xiang Chen, seemingly asking for help.

Xiang Chen crossed his long legs and said indifferently, “A person who does not have the capacity to enter a contract. This usually refers to minors under the age of eighteen or minors and adults who are unaware of their own behavior.”

Rong Huai gritted his teeth and stared at Xiang Yi with his dark eyes. Feeling furious and a little aggrieved, he exclaimed, “Sister, I know what I’m doing!”

He took out a ball of crumpled paper from his pocket, which seemed to be a page that he had torn off of his notebook, and placed it in front of Xiang Yi sulkily.

Xiang Yi unrolled the paper and saw the word ‘contract’ that was written at the top, as well as his name which he had signed at the bottom right corner with great force.

His handwriting was crooked and ugly.

In the livestream:

—— [Damn it, did someone cut onions? I’m tearing up.]

—— [Rong Huai really trusts Xiang Yi… This is tantamount to handing the rest of his life to her.]

—— [I was just about to cry, but I laughed again when I saw Rong Huai’s handwriting. Hahahah, it’s so ugly!]

…

Xiang Yi kept her clear, doe-like eyes fixed on Rong Huai.

Rong Huai was extremely nervous and he began to clench his fists tightly as he kept his hands by his side. His palms had begun to get sweaty too.

He was afraid that Xiang Yi would rebuke him without getting the facts right.

He was even more afraid that Xiang Yi would reject him.

However, Xiang Yi said, “Rong Huai, thank you for trusting me.”

The young man was stunned.

“I’ll accept this contract, but I think we should give each other the chance to choose, right? Since you’ve chosen me, I’ll likewise choose to sign you on once you get into the Film Academy. During this period of time, we are both entitled to the right to change our minds. Is that okay with you?”

She was extremely gentle and affable throughout the discussion.

She didn’t act all bossy and make arrangements for his life in the future.

Instead, she gave him an option.

Rong Huai’s Adam’s apple rolled a little and he looked exuberant, as if he had just had an energy drink and was about to go onto the court to play a round of basketball. “Alright, I agree, we’ll both be entitled to make a choice of our own.”

He quickly added, “Don’t go back on your word, though! Otherwise… Otherwise, I’ll…”

After thinking about it for a long time, he still couldn’t come up with a powerful threat. He inadvertently glanced at Jiang Chen and then choked him from behind. “I’ll beat him up!”

The innocent Jiang Chen who got implicated for no reason: ???

Amused by him, Xiang Yi said, “You’re being too mischievous.”

The viewers of the livestream all guffawed incessantly.

The “hostage” Jiang Chen raised his hand to signal that he was about to speak.

Rong Huai loosened his grip a little.

Jiang Chen said, “Sister Xiang Yi! I’ve signed a five-year-contract with Tomato Entertainment! Do you want to extend the contract by a few more days?”

Shen Ci said, “Five years is nothing. My contract is longer, it’s ten years!”

Everyone else butted in too.

“Sister, please renew my contract, my rates are cheaper!”

“I can do it too, Sister! Please pick me!”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘Huh? Little brothers, why are you vying to sign an indenture for yourselves!?!’

…

chapters.title: Chapter 326 - Does Sister Xiang Yi Think My Rates Are Too Expensive?
chapters.body:
Chapter 326 - Does Sister Xiang Yi Think My Rates Are Too Expensive?

Xiang Yi felt an urge to love.

‘These kids… It’s really hard to turn them down.’

“There is no rush to renew your contracts, but I promise to hire professionals and plan your career paths for you.”

The members of SEASEVEN nodded profusely.

Jiang Chen bumped Rong Huai with his shoulder and said with some smugness in his tone, “We will basically have a stable career as long as we are signed to Sister Xiang Yi’s agency. You gotta work hard, Rong Huai. If you can’t make it to the Film Academy, Sister Xiang Yi won’t sign the contract with you.”

Rong Huai gritted his teeth. “Are you asking for a beating?”

Xiang Yi said, “Children are not allowed to fight.”

Li Jianyu reminded, “Hey, hey, mind your language, I don’t want our livestream to be canceled!”

Rong Huai stayed silent. ‘This is infuriating, but I have to pretend to be obedient in front of Sister Xiang Yi.’

…

The netizens in the livestream room expressed their opinions emotionally.

—— [I’ve seen people scrambling to terminate their contracts with their agencies, but I’ve never seen anyone vying to renew their contracts…]

—— [They’re clearly getting shortchanged by their agency and were duped into signing a contract with them. Yet, they’re now flaunting it proudly. These little brothers of SEASEVEN are adorable yet pitiful.]

—— [We the fans are weeping. I’ve always taken pity on them for being signed to this unscrupulous agency and now, I feel like I’m starting to see a silver lining. I hope Xiang Yi won’t let them down because they trust her so much.]

…

Someone got the point.

—— [Hahaha, look at Shi Sui’s expression, isn’t it a little amazing?]

…

Countless viewers kept their eyes peeled onto Shi Sui’s face on the screen.

Shi Sui was leaning languidly on the couch, wearing a pair of gold-framed glasses that was resting on his nose. He was looking down and his long eyeshadows had cast a shadow on his fair skin.

Xiang Yi somehow felt a sudden chill on the nape of her neck, and she turned around to exchange glances with Shi Sui.

She asked in puzzlement, “Huh?”

Shi Sui asked with a casual tone, “Xiang Yi, do you hate me?”

Dumbfounded, Xiang Yi answered, “No…”

“Why won’t you sign me to your agency then…”

“You… I…”

“Xiang Yi, do you think my rates are too expensive? I can charge cheaper,” Shi Sui said in a deep voice. He deliberately made his voice even lower and a little hoarse. “Or do you think that I won’t be able to earn enough money for you after you sign me on?”

His tone was meek, vulnerable, helpless, and pitiful.

His words and voice really tugged at the heartstrings of the people who heard him.

At a loss for what to do, Xiang Yi said, “That’s not what I mean… I thought you were joking.”

After all, Shi Sui was signed to Xiang Feng’s agency, and Xiang Feng treated Shi Sui very well too. He helped him set up a personal studio and basically let him decide the jobs that he wanted to accept. In other words, Shi Sui enjoyed absolute freedom.

Why would a normal person be willing to sign a contract with another agency and let their freedom be restricted?

It didn’t make sense at all.

The netizens watching the livestream were shocked too.

—— [Damn it! Am I hearing things? Shi Sui is asking to work for her!?]

—— [@SiChuanbai: Manager Si, do you know that your artist is letting love rule his head!!]

—— [Ahhhhh, the domineering female CEO X the Best Actor of the entertainment industry. Sisters, I’m totally digging this!]

—— [The boys are vying to sign an indenture and so is Shi Sui… He’s not only selling his craft but also himself!]

…

Shi Sui pushed his glasses up his nose and glanced at Xiang Yi with a deep gaze. He said aggrievedly, “I’m not joking with you.”

Xiang Feng said feebly, “Shi Sui, I’m your boss! Hey, do you hear me?! I’m your boss!”

In a daze, Xiang Yi said, “Okay, I’ll sign you on then.”

‘One more won’t make a difference anyway.’

Xiang Feng was on the verge of a breakdown. “Little Xiang Yi, he’s jumping ship right in front of me, and you’re poaching him right in front of me too. Do you guys take me seriously at all?!”

chapters.title: Chapter 327 - A Family
chapters.body:
Chapter 327 - A Family

Shi Sui folded his arms and asked, “Are you an unscrupulous boss?”

Xiang Feng subconsciously denied, “Of course not!”

“Then what’s wrong with letting your employees be transferred to other agencies freely?” Shi Sui looked at Xiang Chen and blinked. “Or is jumping ship punishable by the law?”

Xiang Chen was speechless.

Although he hated Shi Sui, he indeed…owed him a favor for just now.

Xiang Chen answered with a straight face, “There isn’t such a provision in labor law.”

Shi Sui shrugged his shoulders and spread his hands. “So, what’s wrong with me jumping ship to Xiang Yi’s agency?”

Xiang Feng was giddy, and his eyes were glassed over too.

The netizens watching the livestream:

—— [Hahahaha, there’s nothing wrong!]

—— [Don’t let others reap the benefits that you’ve sown. You belong to the same family anyway *dog head emoji*]

—— [A family is such an interesting description. Do Xiang Yi and Xiang Feng belong to the same family? Or does it refer to Xiang Yi and Shi Sui? Hehe…hehehe…]

—— [To the person who posted the comment above: How did you manage to send a voice message!?! I can already hear your devilish laughter just by reading your comment!!!]

…

Even after the livestream that night ended, countless netizens were still discussing it with great interest.

There were also several new threads on the gossip forum. One of the netizens had even downloaded photos of Xiang Yi and photoshopped peach blossom stickers onto it.

The thread was titled “Let’s Get Some of Xiang Yi’s Luck in Love!”

The main post of the thread:

[Let me introduce myself. I was Xiang Yi’s fan when I first started watching the livestream and now I’m a bona fide fan of Shi Sui hahaha~

[Statistics show that Xiang Yi is really popular with boys (not in a bad way). First up, we have the boys from Mingxi Boys’ High School (I strongly support Rong Huai! High school boys are so cute! Go, go, go!!) Next, we have Jiang Chen and the other boys of SEASEVEN, and the old man in his late twenties (nah, he’s not old), Best Actor Shi Sui.

[In terms of looks, Xiang Yi is an absolute beauty; but the amazing thing is her eyes are so round, puerile and non-aggressive. Simply put, she’s the type who will be well-liked by elders and is very easy on the eyes. Of course, Xiang Yi also has a great personality, and someone as gentle as her is bound to appeal to both genders~

[However, I think the most important point is, Xiang Yi is just really lucky when it comes to romance, so she tends to attract all the pretty boys! She’s a Romance Spirit! I edited a photo and I intend to use it as my wallpaper for luck. I’ll find this post again when I get a boyfriend!]

…

The post was too silly, so it reached the top of the page soon.

—— [What on earth is that? Why are you getting superstitions involved?]

—— [To the person who posted the comment above: What do you know? This is called using theology for spiritual support! Bye, I’m going to set that photo as my wallpaper too]

—— [What Romance Spirit!? You’re probably a fake fan! Romance Fairy is more like it! She’s beautiful, resplendent, and graceful~]

…

In short, that post became viral for an unknown reason and, at one point, became one of the top three posts on the forum.

Xiang Yi got a text from Ah Nan before she went to bed.

[Ah Nan]: Whiff!

[Ah Nan]: Whiff, Whiff, absorb the stars!]

Xiang Yi slowly replied to him with a few question marks.

Ah Nan replied with a voice message. “Sister Xiang Yi! I heard you’re a Romance Fairy! Let me take a whiff of you, I need some luck with love too. I don’t want to be a singleton anymore!”

Xiang Yi said in puzzlement, “I’m a singleton too…”

Ah Nan blurted, “Aren’t you married to Shi Sui? You’ve already had a wedding shoot and a honeymoon trip… Ahem, I’m sorry, I’m too obsessed with shipping you two.”

“Shi Sui and I?” Xiang Yi answered with a look of innocence, “There’s nothing between us.”

Before she finished speaking, someone knocked twice on her door.

A gentle and alluring voice sounded softlyslowly.

“Xiang Yi, are you asleep?”

chapters.title: Chapter 328 - Brother-In-Law~
chapters.body:
Chapter 328 - Brother-In-Law~

Ah Nan who was staring at his screen: …!!

He was suddenly excited.

He lowered his voice and covered his mouth while laughing. “Wow, he’s come looking for you late at night. There’s really nothing between you guys, huh~”

Xiang Yi explained, “It’s not what you think…”

“Okay, okay, you don’t have to go on. I understand.” Ah Nan made a hand gesture and said, “Be good, don’t worry, I’ll support you regardless of what you do! Go, go, destroy Shi Sui! All the best!”

Smack.

He hung up.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘What can I do when I have an overly silly manager?’

She straightened her nightgown and draped a small blanket over herself before walking toward the door in her slippers.

As soon as she opened the door, she was greeted with a beautiful sight.

Shi Sui took off his glasses, revealing his bold brows and deep, dark eyes as he gazed at her with a smirk.

His pajamas seemed to be oversized as the neckline was rather loose, revealing a large patch of his fair skin and clear, well-defined collarbones…

Xiang Yi subconsciously swallowed her saliva.

She had yet to realize that her feelings for Shi Sui were different from how she felt toward her brothers…

“What brings you here at such a late hour?” Xiang Yi asked.

Shi Sui asked, “Shall we go pick Xiao Naofu up together tomorrow? It must be homesick.”

Xiang Yi said, “Sure, I was planning to go tomorrow anyway… Mm…”

A bony hand was suddenly placed on her head. His movements were gentle and meticulous. “There’s a feather.”

‘It doesn’t seem to be a big deal for an older brother to help his sister remove a feather.’

“Maybe it’s from the pillow.” Xiang Yi forced herself to stay calm. After a few seconds, Shi Sui still had no intention of stopping. She couldn’t help but ask, “Are you done?”

“Yes.”

Shi Sui withdrew his hand, his voice low and mellow.

‘But…’

As he moved, the already loose pajamas slipped down a notch, revealing his thin but not frail shoulder…

“Um… Your shirt…” Xiang Yi muttered softly.

Shi Sui blinked and asked, “What did you say?”

Xiang Yi composedly draped the small blanket over Shi Sui’s body.

“It’s cold, cover up.”

“…”

Shi Sui was stunned for a couple of seconds before regaining composure. “Thank you.”

“You’re welcome, I’ll go back to my room then.”

Xiang Yi turned around and went into the room, closing the door after herself.

She leaned against the door panel and patted her chest.

Her heart…was beating unusually quickly.

…

Outside the door.

Shi Sui stood in place for a moment and chuckled softly.

Clad in a black silk pajamas, Xiang Chen stood in front of the floor-to-ceiling window not far away, seemingly having become one with the darkness.

He tightened his grip on his glass of water, as if he were a frosted cedar tree on a distant mountain.

“I think you don’t need your leg anymore.” He didn’t specify which leg.

Shi Sui slowly walked toward Xiang Chen and stopped when he was a few steps in front of him. Seemingly trying to show off, he wrapped the small blanket tightly around himself. The fragrance of Xiang Yi’s hair was still lingering around it.

“Are you angry again? Brother-in-law~”

Xiang Chen was flabbergasted!

His gaze was stern, and he questioned coldly, “What did you call me?”

Shi Sui said with an innocent expression, “Brother-in-law, can you break my leg the day after tomorrow? After all, Xiang Yi and I have to go pick up our baby tomorrow~”

Xiang Chen gritted his teeth. “Baby?”

Shi Sui chuckled. “Yes~”

Xiang Chen was so angry that he started to roll up his sleeves.

He initially thought that he could have a showdown with Shi Sui, but he didn’t expect Shi Sui to call Xiang Yi confidently.

Xiang Yi asked, “What’s the matter?”

Shi Sui complained, “Xiang Yi, someone bullied me…”

“Who? Who’s there!?!”

Xiang Chen was speechless.

He took a deep breath, grabbed the phone and said coldly, “Go to bed.”

‘Damn it, you shameless and despicable dog!!’

chapters.title: Chapter 329 - Not A Bad Thing To Be A Live-In Husband
chapters.body:
Chapter 329 - Not A Bad Thing To Be A Live-In Husband

…

…

On the following day.

After her morning workout, Xiang Yi made some simple scallion pancakes, soup dumplings, and pumpkin millet porridge.

She saved some food for Xiang Feng and Xiang Chen, and headed out together with Shi Sui after having breakfast.

Li Jianyu asked the photographer along. They conducted the livestream while walking in preparation for “Smog Adoring Cat Highlights Version 2.0”.

Halfway through the walk, Xiang Yi suddenly thought of a serious problem. “E-sports players usually train until a very late hour; they should still be sleeping now.”

Li Jianyu came to a sudden realization and said, “It’s only eight something now, they might still be sleeping… Shall we turn around?”

Xiang Yi’s eyes lit up and she said, “Why don’t we go to the amusement park?”

Shi Sui said, “Sure, you call the shots.”

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Is this considered a date!?!]

—— [Fancy a bunch of adults going to the amusement park. Why are they pretending to be young!?!]

—— [I’m speechless. They’re so spontaneous. The amusement park is very crowded, and there’s definitely going to be trouble when celebrities show up there. Xiang Yi, can you please use your brains?]

Li Jianyu was a little tempted, but after considering the safety issues, he had no choice but to say regretfully, “Forget it, we haven’t contacted the authorities of the amusement park to clear the venue for us in advance. Even if you two enter under a disguise, you’ll be recognized easily. There’ll be trouble if something goes wrong.”

The crazy, obsessive stalker fan, “All is Well Year Round”, was a perfect example of trouble.

Xiang Yi said, “Clear the venue? Leave it to me.”

Li Jianyu was shocked. “Xiang Yi, do you think you’re almighty!?”

There would always be critical netizens picking on Xiang Yi when watching the livestream.

—— [Can you do whatever you want as long as you have money? Yes. *smiley* *smiley*]

—— [She’s showing off her wealth now, isn’t she? She’s just flaunting her riches. I can’t believe there are people who like a woman like her. Are all of your brains working properly?]

—— [Imagine having booked tickets in advance and getting all excited to go to the amusement park, only to be denied entry simply because some rich people have rented out the entire amusement park for the day. Hah… is no one going to do anything about the massive gap between the rich and the poor?]

…

Their nanny van pulled over at a certain amusement park.

The cameraman first alighted from the van and filmed the surrounding scenery.

There was lush greenery and beautiful flowers in bloom around them. The skies were blue with fluffy white clouds strewn across it, and even the road signs were cartoon-themed.

One of the netizens from Nancheng was bewildered. [I’ve been to all the amusement parks in Nancheng, but I’ve never seen one with such excellent greenery. Which amusement park is this? Is it newly opened?]

In the next second…

The camera was pointed at the gate of the amusement park.

The words “Bunbun Amusement Park” appeared on the screen.

The netizens were dumbfounded.

—— [I have a familiar premonition…]

—— [No… No way, I don’t believe this!!!]

—— [Does Xiang Yi’s family own an amusement park?]

…

Li Jianyu was also stunned when he saw the name of this amusement park.

He asked feebly, “Xiang Yi, does this…belong to your family too?”

Feeling a little embarrassed, Xiang Yi said, “It was built by my grandfather, but it’s not open for business to the public. This is actually just a mini-version because it’s only about a tenth of the size of a standard amusement park. There’s only a merry-go-round and a few other rides inside, though they should be enough to entertain us for a few hours.”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded.

‘!!! Even if it’s only one-tenth of the size of a standard amusement park, it’s still huge! You could have used the land to build a house!’

Even after having slogged his guts out at Muyao TV for a few years, he still hadn’t earned enough to pay for the down payment of an apartment…

In the livestream:

—— [Poverty has indeed limited my imagination…]

—— [All you haters, come out now and face the beating! The amusement park belongs to her family, she’s not affecting others at all!]

—— [What should I do? I suddenly think that it’d be a good idea for Shi Sui to marry Xiang Yi as a live-in husband and sponge off her.]

chapters.title: Chapter 330 - Candy
chapters.body:
Chapter 330 - Candy

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

—— [Does such a good deal exist? Shi Sui, move aside! Let me do it instead!]

—— [Xiang Yi, let’s negotiate, will you accept a spouse of the same gender?]

—— [Look at you people, do you have any decency? All you’re thinking about is marrying her! Mom! I’m your long-lost child who got separated from you more than twenty years ago!]

—— [Hahaha, you’re cracking me up. Xiang Yi is only twenty years old this year, how can she possibly have a child who’s in his twenties?]

The silly netizens had a whale of a time joking with each other, their comments soon piling up and drowning out those of the haters.

…

…

The entry procedure of the amusement park was very simple—they just had to show their faces.

Although there were only a few staff members, they had an excellent service attitude.

Xiang Yi and Shi Sui entered first.

Li Jianyu said seriously, “Isn’t this meant for kids? Old Zhang, let’s do a good job at filming this later. Let’s strive to create the vibes of an idol romance drama.”

The netizens: [Director Li, you must be the leader of the fan base, huh!?! How can you talk about plotting a conspiracy so loudly?]

The cameraman, Old Zhang, nodded and said, “Um, that’s a must. I’m already in my forties, I’m too old for these rides.”

…

A few minutes later…

Li Jianyu sat on the merry-go-round and began laughing like a fool. “Hahaha this thing is quite fun! Wew~ Higher, higher~ Hey lad, can you double the speed of this?”

The staff member said with a Mona Lisa smile, “Sure.”

Li Jianyu exclaimed, “Old Zhang, come, come, come here! Hurry up and come on! Riding a merry-go-round at twice the original speed is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity! If you miss it, you’ll have to wait ’til the next lifetime!”

Old Zhang was tempted. “Uh, I’ll accompany you for a couple of rounds then.”

Hence, the handheld shot turned into a fixed-camera position…

The netizens watching the livestream were thoroughly amused.

—— [Director Li and Old Zhang: Awesome!]

—— [You two, come to your senses! We want to watch Xiang Yi and Shi Sui going on a date!]

—— [Where’s the romance drama you promised? Why has it turned into a scene of a hillbilly romance between two old men!?! I’m laughing like a pig in front of the screen.]

…

Humor is an important aspect of variety shows.

The majority of viewers watch the livestream for the sake of killing time and having some fun.

The amusing sight of Li Jianyu and Old Zhang inadvertently letting themselves loose and unwinding to their hearts’ content added great humor to the livestream, and it had since become one of the textbook examples of essential segments of variety shows in the future…

…

On the other hand…

The entire amusement park was themed around rabbits, with numerous rabbit figurines of various sizes and colors like white and gray, everywhere within the premises. Most of the rides were related to rabbits too.

Xiang Yi was playing the “Whac-A-Mole” game machine where bunnies were used as targets instead of moles.

It was her favorite carnival game since she was a child, and the feeling of smashing rabbits with a carrot for a hammer was particularly stress-relieving for her.

Meanwhile, Shi Sui had his interest piqued by the cotton candy being sold at a booth at the side. The vendor of the cotton candy booth had already started blushing because of his staring. “Um, do you want to have some? I’ll give you a serving.”

Shi Sui smiled and thanked her with a nod before waving his hand at her to turn down her offer.

However…

When Xiang Yi was done with playing the game, she felt her sleeve being tugged at lightly. She looked up, only to exchange glances with Shi Sui whose eyes were now watery, making him look…really pitiful.

“What do you want? I’ll buy it for you! I have enough money!” Xiang Yi said, sounding as if she was coaxing a child.

Putting aside her other sources of income, the annual revenue of Little Rabbits Farm would definitely be breathtaking to many if it was publicized.

Moreover, Xiang Yi also owned the subsidiary cards of the credit cards belonging to all the Xiang family members, a building from her grandfather, a floor of stores from her grandmother, a small-scale gemstone ore overseas from her aunt, and many other assets…

Although it would be a little difficult to liquidate all of them now, she had more than enough money to provide for Shi Sui!

Pointing at the cotton candy near them, Shi Sui said, “Xiang Yi, I want that~”

Xiang Yi agreed, “Sure, let’s buy some.”

The female vendor of the cotton candy booth was dumbfounded.

‘Didn’t he say that he doesn’t want any just now?’

chapters.title: Chapter 331 - Grandparents Who Cannot Be Coaxed (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 331 - Grandparents Who Cannot Be Coaxed (1)

“Hello, I’d like to have some cotton candy,” Xiang Yi said, her tender voice drawing the vendor back to reality.

As a staff member of Bunbun Amusement Park, she knew very well who the amusement park was built for.

Xiang Yi was the apple of her grandparents’ eyes, and they often showered her with love by spoiling her to bits. Even the amusement park was named after Xiang Yi’s nickname.

The maintenance of the facilities and land of the park alone required an indefinite amount of manpower and human resources. Staff members like her were actually college students who were sponsored by the Xiang family and would work on shifts at the amusement park. The job was stress-free, and they would also be able to earn some money to cover their living expenses.

“Miss Xiang, the cotton candy is free. There are two colors, which one would you like to have?”

Xiang Yi turned her head slightly to the side to look at Shi Sui.

He looked down and answered with a faint smile, “Pink.”

“Sure, please wait a moment.”

In no time, a huge ball of pink, fluffy cotton candy was handed to Xiang Yi on a stick.

Xiang Yi handed it to Shi Sui with a bright smile on her face.

The sight of a tall, grown man holding onto a stick of cotton candy was clearly supposed to be somewhat amusing, but Xiang Yi made it seem really sweet…

They must be in love, huh? They must be, right!?! Right!?!

…

Meanwhile…

A low-key but comfortable car was stopped in front of the entrance of the amusement park.

Xiang Yi’s grandfather was the first to step out of the car. He was dressed in a fashionable outfit comprising of a printed shirt and a pair of beige trousers. Although his hair was white, he looked rather energetic.

Xiang Yi’s grandfather opened the car door for his beloved wife, a habit he had been practicing for years.

Old Mrs. Xiang was wearing a floral dress and an apricot-colored shawl. The color of her bag matched that of Old Mr. Xiang’s tie.

“Old man, take a photo of me later. I want to upload it onto my WeChat Friends page to spite Mrs. Zhou from next door!”

Mrs. Zhou was the leader of the square dancing group that Xiang Yi’s grandmother was in. Apart from being the long-time lead dancer who would always take the center spot, she was also the first among the group to master the skills of using WeChat, which was to the envy of countless groupmates.

Old Mr. Xiang chastised, “How childish of you.”

Old Mrs. Xiang humphed and asked, “What? Are you despising me now? Well, get yourself another grave then. Don’t get buried next to me in the future.”

Old Mr. Xiang said, “Fine, I’ll help you take some photos, okay?”

He didn’t quite know how to use WeChat.

Why didn’t his family members teach him? Well, of course, it was because…

His children were busy and so were his grandsons and granddaughter…

‘Hmph, I don’t have a granddaughter. That brat made her grandmother so furious to the point of passing out on several occasions. I won’t acknowledge her!’

Xiang Yi’s grandparents weren’t Internet savvy, so they still weren’t aware of Xiang Yi’s livestream.

Old Mrs. Xiang said, “I heard from Xiang Feng that Little Bunny has become normal again. Did you forget what Daoist Master Qin said? An evil existence possessed her body…”

“Nonsense!” Although Old Mr. Xiang was a Traditional Chinese Medicine practitioner who believed in the theological theory of using Yin and Yang energy as well as the five elements to treat illnesses. However, he vehemently refused to believe in superstitions like ghosts and supernatural beings. “Why did you mention her? It affects my mood! Old lady, let me tell you, I, Xiang Yin, will never acknowledge her as my granddaughter for the rest of my life!”

Old Mrs. Xiang sighed, feeling extremely vexed when she recalled the unruly way “Xiang Yi” had behaved in the past year.

At the beginning, she brought “Xiang Yi” back to the Xiang family’s old residence to rest and recuperate, but “Xiang Yi” ended up wreaking havoc at home. One of the worst things she had done was to anger Old Mr. Xiang to the point of getting hospitalized and almost being checked into the intensive care unit…

Over time, Xiang Yi’s grandparents gradually became disappointed.

Later on, Xiang Chen took charge of the matter and sent her away. Since then, “Xiang Yi” had never taken the initiative to contact them and gradually lost touch with them.

To their surprise, when they entered the amusement park, the staff member said respectfully, “Old Mr. Xiang, Miss Xiang has brought her friends here to play.”

Old Mr. Xiang frowned and asked “How many of them are here? Are they male or female?”

The staff answered, “Uh, there are three men…”

Old Mr. Xiang flew into a rage and exclaimed, “You silly brat!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 332 - Grandparents Who Cannot Be Coaxed (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 332 - Grandparents Who Cannot Be Coaxed (2)

‘She’s getting more and more wayward!’

Back in the old residence, she was head-over-heels in love with her online lover. But of course, Xiang Yi’s grandparents didn’t know at that time that “Xiang Yi” had more than one online lover.

Xiang Yi’s grandmother liked it when it was lively at home and would thus hold gatherings at home every now and then. The guests who were invited were mostly her old friends who would occasionally bring their nephews, nieces, or grandchildren along.

Later on, “Xiang Yi” even took a liking to a man who was more than ten years older than her and of a generation before hers.

If they were truly in love, the Xiang family would still be able to accept it because they didn’t attach much importance to seniority.

However, that man was known to be a frivolous playboy.

Yet, “Xiang Yi” insistently clamored about marrying him and threw a tantrum for a long time before stopping.

Old Mrs. Xiang persuaded, “Why don’t we go home?”

On the one hand, she was afraid that her husband would be infuriated to the point of affecting his health. On the other hand, she was afraid that Xiang Yi would get beaten up. No matter how disobedient she was, Xiang Yi was still her granddaughter and she would be sad to see Xiang Yi get hurt.

Although Old Mr. Xiang seemed to be stubborn and incredibly harsh toward Xiang Yi on the surface, she knew very well that of all the men in the family, he was the one who doted on Xiang Yi the most.

Xiang Yi’s brothers may pamper her, but Old Mr. Xiang simply indulged and spoiled her endlessly.

Most parents would stop carrying their children when they reach the age of two or three, but Old Mr. Xiang would still carry Xiang Yi in his arms while shopping, even when she was already four or five years old…

“I’m not going back! If anyone has to hide, it must be her who hides from me! I’m her elder, it doesn’t make sense for me to hide from her!” Old Mr. Xiang was extremely fierce. He swung his gentleman’s cane twice in the air before saying, “I’ll go see what nonsense she has gotten up to again. If she dares to fool around, I’ll break her legs!”

Old Mr. Xiang took the lead and walked in.

Xiang Yi’s grandmother followed suit.

…

There weren’t many attractions in Bunbun Amusement Park. All the rides there were low-risk, so they had an unobstructed view of the entire place.

As soon as Xiang Yi’s grandparents entered, they saw…

Li Jianyu and Old Zhang who were both still having a whale of a time on the merry-go-round.

At this point, they had already requested for the speed to be quadrupled and the merry-go-round was revolving extremely quickly…

Although Old Mr. Xiang was advanced in years, he still had a sharp sense of hearing and a good eyesight. However, the merry-go-round was moving at such a high speed that it took him some time to see their faces clearly.

He snapped loudly, “That wretched brat has such a poor taste in men!!”

‘She doesn’t take after me at all :)’

Old Mrs. Xiang took out her presbyopia glasses and put them on elegantly. After looking at them for a while, she sighed despondently.

‘Why are the men she likes…’

‘Each one is uglier and older than the last.’

‘Little Bunny’s taste in men is really…unbearable.’

Old Mr. Xiang suddenly noticed some movement in the bumper cars area. He squinted his sharp eyes and vaguely saw Shi Sui’s back view.

He couldn’t help but mutter softly, “This one seems to be not too bad…”

Old Mrs. Xiang asked, “Old man, what are you saying?”

Old Mr. Xiang cleared his throat and made himself seem austere. “I’ll go see what kind of a scoundrel she’s found!”

Old Mrs. Xiang was even more worried. ‘Will this one be even older…’

When the two of them walked past the camera which was fixed onto the tripod, Li Jianyu and Old Zhang were still immersed in the childish joy of riding the merry-go-round and didn’t notice them at all.

However, the netizens watching the livestream were sharp-eyed and began making comments about them.

—— [Wow! That elderly couple is so stylish!]

—— [Uwu, that elderly man’s tie is of the same color as that granny’s handbag!]

—— [Wait, didn’t Xiang Yi say that this amusement park is not open to the public? Could it be that they are her elders!?!]

—— [Huh? Doesn’t that mean that Shi Sui is going to meet Xiang Yi’s family!?]

chapters.title: Chapter 333 - Grandparents Who Cannot Be Coaxed (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 333 - Grandparents Who Cannot Be Coaxed (3)

…

On the other hand.

Xiang Yi was playing with Shi Sui merrily.

There were two long rabbit ears on the front end of each bumper car which would droop whenever it collided with another bumper car, resembling a lop rabbit.

Xiang Yi seldom visited the amusement park to play ever since middle school.

The reason was simple.

No matter how fun the amusement park may be, it would be pointless to play alone.

After her parents’ accident, she couldn’t get over it for a long time and thus started homeschooling.

After she started middle school, she kept skipping grades and as she got busier with her academics, she didn’t have much time to socialize.

The very few friends whom she was close to had cut her off and stopped contacting her since she was possessed by that being who wreaked havoc in her life.

She felt that Shi Sui was a really nice person because he was willing to accompany her to play such a childish game despite being much more mature.

After turning the steering wheel skillfully, she locked onto Shi Sui and drove toward his bumper car at full speed…

Halfway through, an old man suddenly appeared out of nowhere.

Xiang Yi hurriedly stepped on the brakes, after which her head was slammed onto the steering wheel due to the inertia. When she raised her head again, her fair and shiny forehead had already reddened.

It looked really painful.

Xiang Yi’s grandfather couldn’t help but frown.

When Xiang Yi saw him, her eyes lit up and she exclaimed, “Grandpa!”

Old Mr. Xiang immediately exclaimed, “Don’t call me your Grandpa! I’m not your grandfather! I don’t have a granddaughter like you!”

His tone was cold and harsh, causing the luster in Xiang Yi’s eyes to gradually become dull…

She looked down, adjusted her emotions for a few seconds, and then… pressed the button to reverse the car.

The bumper car reversed by a few meters, but the bunny ears malfunctioned as they started drooping.

Xiang Yi’s grandfather was speechless!

‘What? Are you really not going to call me your grandfather just because I told you not to?’

‘Now you’re obeying me, huh!?!’

Xiang Yin didn’t expect to be even angrier at Xiang Yi when she was obedient than when she was defiant!

Old Mrs. Xiang was a few steps slower, and by the time she had walked over, she realized that Xiang Yi had not only reversed, she didn’t greet her either.

Old Mrs. Xiang’s heart melted when she saw Xiang Yi’s reddened forehead and eyes. Waving at her, she said, “Your grandfather is scaring you, don’t bother about him. Be good, Bunny, come to Grandma.”

Xiang Yi hesitated to go over.

Xiang Yi’s grandfather hollered, “Don’t come over! I don’t want to see you!”

“…”

Hence, Xiang Yi reversed the bumper car far, far away.

“Old Mr. Xiang, Old Mrs. Xiang.” Shi Sui got out of the car at some point and greeted the both of them in a warm voice. Immediately afterwards, he began chatting with them naturally with ease. They couldn’t find any fault with his manners and etiquette at all.

After exchanging some pleasantries, Xiang Yi became the topic of their conversation again.

Old Mr. Xiang said sarcastically, “She has the time to come to the amusement park with you, but she doesn’t have the time to come back to the old residence and visit me. I bet she doesn’t care about me at all!”

Shi Sui said apologetically, “Sir, you’ve misunderstood. It’s not that Xiang Yi doesn’t want to visit you, but she’s held up by work. We’re here today for shooting.”

He glanced at the merry-go-round while his temples throbbed. “Those two are the director and cameraman of our program respectively. They’re conducting the livestream.”

Just as he was about to explain what a livestream was, Xiang Yi’s grandmother said, “A livestream? I’ve heard of it before, livestreams are used for selling goods! It’s just like a TV shopping channel. I saw my neighbor Mrs. Zhou’s grandson teaching her how to buy things online!”

She was green with envy because she and Old Mr. Xiang didn’t know how to do that.

Shi Sui asked with a smile, “Grandma, what do you want to buy? Do you want Xiang Yi to come over and help you with it?”

Before Xiang Yi’s grandmother could answer, Old Mr. Xiang interjected, “No, we don’t need her help!”

chapters.title: Chapter 334 - Grandparents Who Cannot Be Coaxed (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 334 - Grandparents Who Cannot Be Coaxed (4)

Old Mrs. Xiang chided, “Do you know how to do it?”

Old Mr. Xiang answered diffidently, “I-I can learn.”

“You’ve already tried learning several times,” Old Mrs. Xiang exposed him mercilessly.

Old Mr. Xiang thought, ‘Ouch… That hurts my ego, old woman.’

He insisted stubbornly, “Anyway, I don’t want that wretched brat to teach me! Since she ignored me, I’ll ignore her too!”

…

Xiang Yi’s grandfather, Xiang Yin, had a loud voice so Xiang Yi could vaguely hear his words, which made her feel so crestfallen that she wanted to hide in a corner. However, the bumper car she was driving didn’t move an inch at all.

She raised her delicate face, only to realize that Shi Sui had pressed the switch with his fair and slender fingers.

“Where are you going to hide?” Shi Sui asked, looking downwards at her with a smile on his face.

Xiang Yi looked away and said, “I’m not hiding.”

She was just feeling a little aggrieved.

It clearly wasn’t her fault, but she had to suffer the scoldings of her grandfather who used to dote on her the most.

Shi Sui stared at her for a few seconds before bending forward to half-squat beside her.

He said in a low and gentle voice, “Xiang Yi, you can hide, but it’s not the best way to solve the problem. If you are not willing to face it, I will leave with you. Your grandparents aren’t that scary, are they?”

The tone of his voice made Xiang Yi’s heart waver.

“Xiang Yi, even if you’re scared, you don’t have to hide so far.” Shi Sui’s thin lips curled into a faint smile and continued, “Just hide behind me.”

For some reason, Xiang Yi felt a little touched.

She felt really childish compared to the mature Shi Sui.

‘I’m not fit to be a Mommy fan.’

“It really hurts to be beaten by my grandpa…” Xiang Yin was known to be a hot-tempered and feisty Traditional Chinese Medicine practitioner, who would lash out at patients who refused to abide by his medical advice. Everyone in the industry knew that he was very harsh and merciless with his beatings. Xiang Feng would often get beaten up into tears by him.

“It’s alright, I can take a beating.”

“…”

A few seconds later, Xiang Yi pursed her lips and said, “Alright… I’ll go see Grandpa and Grandma.”

Shi Sui rubbed her head gently twice, which was an absolutely breathtaking gesture.

“Xiang Yi, you’re so obedient.”

…

…

Only after Li Jianyu and Old Zhang had set themselves free and derived joy from riding the merry-go-round did they finally remember that they were still on the job. Thus, they frantically carried their cameras and other livestream equipment over to look for Xiang Yi.

They happened to see Xiang Yi driving the bumper car with Shi Sui in the passenger seat. She even reminded him to put on his safety belt.

Although the rabbit bumper car was a two-seater, Shi Sui was tall and had long legs that made the seat rather cramped for him. Hence, their arms seemed to be pressed together.

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Hahaha putting on the safety belt? That’s so cute~]

—— [There are millions of roads, but safety comes first!]

—— [This car is adorable! I want one! I want to have one!]

…

Xiang Yi drove toward her grandparents. Shi Sui alighted immediately, while Xiang Yi remained hesitant.

Shi Sui chuckled and opened the car door for her. He even drew a half circle in mid-air with his hand, as if he was inviting an aloof and elegant princess to dance.

“Princess Bunny, please alight.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Despite feeling a little shy and ashamed, she was quite happy to have been given an out.

She got out of the car, grabbed the hem of her dress uneasily and greeted softly, “Hello, Grandpa and Grandma.”

Xiang Yin was shocked!

‘She called me Grandpa again! She’s so obedient too!’

‘But does she think I’ll forgive her just because of that?’

‘How naive!’

‘I’m the most difficult old man in the world to coax! So is my wife!’

‘Don’t try to coax us!’

To his surprise…

Xiang Yi asked meekly in a tender voice, “Grandma, I’ll teach you how to buy things in a livestream, okay?”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother agreed, “Alright, sure, sure, Little Bunny is so sensible!”

Xiang Yin was bewildered.

chapters.title: Chapter 335 - How Fragrant (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 335 - How Fragrant (1)

Dumbfounded, Xiang Yin shot Xiang Yi’s grandmother a glance, seemingly trying to say, “Didn’t we agree to stand on the same side?”

Old Mrs. Xiang rolled her eyes at him. ‘No, we didn’t.’

‘Since Little Bunny is so obedient and meek now, it means that Daoist Master Qin is right. That evil being that possessed her has already left.’

‘How can I not pamper my granddaughter?’

Xiang Yi spoke very slowly, and she taught her grandmother very patiently. “Grandma, take out your cellphone and tap on this orange icon to open the app. Then, tap on the search box…”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother didn’t get it after hearing her instructions.

Hence, Xiang Yi taught her again patiently.

Finally, Old Mrs. Xiang learned how to buy things on the livestream and tapped on the livestream seller, who was ranked No. 1 on the real-time charts.

“Dear viewers and friends, the absorbency of this cloth is superb! There are plenty of colors to pick from! They sell these in a pack of three for 59.9 yuan at the supermarket. Here in our livestream, we sell it at a discounted price of 19.9 yuan for a pack of three! The first 10,000 buyers will be given a 100ml-pack of natural, pollution-free detergent as a free gift!”

The host of the livestream was touting enthusiastically. At the critical moment, she suddenly exclaimed, “The number of sets available in this livestream is limited to 50,000! 5-4-3-2-1, click on the link to buy now!”

Old Mrs. Xiang urged eagerly, “Little Bunny, quick, buy it or else we won’t get the chance to do so anymore!”

Xiang Yin was speechless. “It’s not like we don’t have washcloths at home. Besides, when do you ever do the household chores?”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother exclaimed, “Shut up!”

Xiang Yin said, “Alright.”

When the viewers of “Two Under One Roof” saw that scene, the netizens almost burst into laughter.

—— [I… I’m watching a livestream in a livestream?]

—— [Xiang Yi’s grandmother is as panicky as I was when I watched a live-stream sale for the first time…]

—— [Hahahaha, I can’t even. The way Grandma Xiang snapped at Grandpa Xiang is so cute! Grandma Xiang looks so fierce and stern, but it turns out that he’s henpecked!]

…

Watching the interaction between her grandparents, Xiang Yi tried to contain her laughter. She followed the livestream host’s tips and snatched the coupon code before completing the purchase.

The receipt on the screen showed that the order was placed successfully.

Old Mrs. Xiang was over the moon. “Great! Wonderful! We got it!”

Xiang Yi said, “Grandma, actually…”

Before she could say that there were actually more than 50,000 sets available and that the host was just using a marketing gimmick, Shi Sui tapped her on her shoulder.

Xiang Yi exchanged glances with him, both sharing a tacit understanding.

— All that matters is that Old Mrs. Xiang was happy, and there was no need to expose her.

Shortly afterwards, the host introduced the second product. “Up next, we have mens’ sports shorts that are sweat-absorbent and comfortable! The usual price is…”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother asked with disdain, “Little Bunny, there isn’t a skip button for this, is there?”

Xiang Yi shook her head.

Xiang Yin was getting a little anxious as he hollered at the screen, “Why are you speaking so quickly? Young man, slow down!”

He hadn’t heard the host’s words clearly yet.

The netizens were appalled.

—— [This is reality. It’s the reality of the mortal world.]

—— [Hahaha, does anyone want to comment on that livestream and tell the host to slow down too?]

—— [My sister’s like that too. She’s really attentive and proactive when she shops for herself, but when I ask her to help me get some socks, she tells me that I’m not worthy…]

…

The livestream host soon finished describing the product, and Xiang Yin was obviously tempted to buy it. He urged Xiang Yi’s grandmother, “Old woman, buy some for me.”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother retorted nonchalantly, “It’s not like you don’t have any shorts to wear. It’d be a waste of money to buy so many.”

Xiang Yi’s grandfather was speechless!

Old Mrs. Xiang had done it on purpose. Having lived with him for decades, she had long gained a thorough understanding of Xiang Yin’s character.

As expected, Xiang Yin folded his arms angrily after she turned him down. He didn’t actually want to buy those shorts at first, but after hearing that there were only 5,000 pairs left, he could not help but poke Xiang Yi’s arm.

He moved his finger away as soon as he touched her.

“Hey, you, buy some for me.”

chapters.title: Chapter 336 - How Fragrant (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 336 - How Fragrant (2)

‘Huh? Why is Brother apologizing to me?’

Xiang Yi was stunned.

‘Is Grandpa…talking to me?’

Seeing that she wasn’t replying, Xiang Yin said reluctantly, “I’ll pay you! I won’t let you be shortchanged!”

Shi Sui’s eyes contained a trace of joy.

Xiang Yi’s grandmother turned around and secretly snickered with her hand on her mouth.

‘Who said that he was going to ignore Little Bunny? He’s only lasted for a few minutes.’

Xiang Yi came back to her senses and exclaimed, “Grandpa, I’ll buy it for you now! Which color do you want?”

Xiang Yin humphed twice and answered,

“Black, it’s more versatile.”

He had learned that term from Xiang Yi’s grandmother.

‘Women are just so troublesome. Isn’t she sick of wearing matching couple outfits after decades of doing so?’

He had no choice but to comply and wear matching outfits as her.

Xiang Yi grinned and said, “Okay.”

Haters appeared in the livestream again:

—— [She’s buying it just like that? She didn’t even ask her grandfather for his size. She isn’t meticulous at all!]

—— [This is hilarious. What kind of a “rich and pretty girl” is she? She’s trying to please her grandfather with such cheap shorts that cost only a little over 100 yuan.]

—— [No wonder her grandfather dislikes her; she totally deserves it. After all, boys are favored because they carry on the family’s last name, while girls tend to take on their husband’s last name.]

…

In the next second…

Xiang Yi asked, “Grandpa, I remember that your usual size is XL. Can I buy these shorts in size XXL? Exercise shorts fit more comfortably in a size larger.”

Xiang Yin muttered softly, “You still have a conscience after all, you little brat.”

Old Mrs. Xiang said smilingly, “Little Bunny, let me test you, what are mine and your Grandpa’s shoe sizes?”

Xiang Yi blurted without hesitation, “Grandma, your shoe size is EU36 and Grandpa’s is EU43.”

“Little Bunny, you’ve got such a great memory!” Xiang Yi’s grandmother couldn’t help but praise. “You’ve been meticulous since you were young, and you’re much more caring than your brothers. You’re our little baby, they’re less important compared to you. As for your uncle, tsk… he’s almost nothing compared to you guys.”

Xiang Yi snorted with laughter. ‘Uncle really does get frowned upon all the time.’

…

This time, no one indulged the haters in the livestream as they simply clapped back at them.

—— [What? We live in a modern era now, it’s no longer that common for boys to be favored over girls!]

—— [You call that uncaring? Anyway, I don’t know what my grandparent’s sizes are either.]

—— [Those who are hating on Xiang Yi, are you guys that patient with the elderly? Do you have the patience to teach them how to use the Internet over and over again?]

…

Xiang Yi accompanied her grandparents to watch a livestream for a while, during which they brought many things.

The livestream host did not expect the number of viewers of his livestream to suddenly surge by close to two million within just a little over ten minutes!

The internet traffic was usually low at this time of the morning, and the fact that it could reach this number meant that…

He had gone viral!

However, the livestream host did not understand how he had become famous at all. Besides, the people watching the live stream kept commenting “speak slowly”.

‘What’s this?’

‘Is this a new Internet slang??’

…

Someone had recorded a snippet of the scene of Xiang Yi teaching her grandparents how to watch a livestream and buy things on it, and it was shared on various video platforms. They didn’t expect it to have become famous unintentionally.

Within just a few hours, the number of ‘likes’ exceeded 200,000, and the video was shared tens of thousands of times.

—— [Ahhhh, what a wholesome video! She has explained it even better than me!]

—— [I sent it to my family’s group chat. My mom and aunts have learned how to watch and shop on live streams!]

—— [My grandparents said that Xiang Yi is beautiful and kindhearted! They think that she looks really benevolent and even suspect that she’s their biological granddaughter!]

From that day onward, Xiang Yi gained a large number of fans, many of whom were middle-aged and elderly women… She became even more famous.

…

Xiang Yi turned off the livestream when her grandparents had watched enough of the livestream.

Old Mrs. Xiang said softly, “Look, old man, Little Bunny is acting like her usual self again!”

Xiang Yin said vehemently, “I haven’t forgiven her yet!”

‘Does she think she can coax me and win me over with such a simple trick?’

‘Well… I’m 1% coaxed!’

‘Hmph!’

chapters.title: Chapter 337 - Grandson-In-Law (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 337 - Grandson-In-Law (1)

Xiang Yin sneaked a glance at Xiang Yi, only to discover that…

Shi Sui had handed Xiang Yi a bottle of water and even helped her unscrew the cap.

Xiang Yin squinted and kept his eyes fixed on Shi Sui.

He was quite pleased with Shi Sui just now, but he found him to be really loathsome and detestable at this moment…

However, Xiang Yi’s grandmother mistakenly thought that Shi Sui and Xiang Yi were dating. Perhaps because she had just seen Li Jianyu and Old Zhang on the merry-go-round, Shi Sui seemed to be much more pleasing to her eye in contrast to them.

…

…

In the manor.

Xiang Chen slept in until nine o’clock in the morning, which was a rare indulgence for him.

As per normal, he habitually read the headlines of the financial news section while drinking some black coffee before looking at the stock chart.

Immediately afterwards, Xiang Chen started reading and replying to his emails.

Although he was on vacation, he inevitably had to respond to some matters regarding the work that he was responsible for.

Halfway through replying to the emails, his cellphone vibrated. He picked it up to see that it was a text from “Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s The Best Girl in This World” whom he had previously added on Weibo.

[Guardian]: Sorry to disturb, but I’ve collated all the details of the case. Can I send the document to you directly?

Xiang Chen answered with a simple “yes”.

Soon, “Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s The Best Girl in This World” sent the document.

Xiang Chen opened the file and skimmed through the content before sorting through details carefully one more time.

It was roughly about Guardian’s close friend, who was a Chemistry major and had just graduated from college this year. During her written job interview, she had the best score among her fellow candidates, but she didn’t end up getting recruited. Instead, a boy who scored lower than her got the job offer.

She called the Human Resource department to inquire about it, only to be told that that job position was more suitable for men.

Guardian’s friend was furious; but being a fresh graduate, she didn’t have enough money to file a lawsuit against the company so Guardian wanted to stand up for her. She suddenly thought of sourcing for a pro bono lawyer on Weibo and decided to give it a try.

She didn’t expect to get a reply from Xiang Chen.

She was extremely grateful and after finding out that Xiang Chen was Xiang Yi’s eldest brother, she was even more embarrassed because she felt that she was causing an inconvenience to Xiang Chen and, indirectly, for Xiang Yi.

[Guardian]: Is this case easy to handle? If it’s going to be a waste of time, forget it… My friend is trying to search for a new job now.

[Guardian]: Pitiful.jpg

In the beginning, she and her close friends were indeed furious but over time, she had no choice but to accept it helplessly.

After all, there are too many inequalities in this society.

They were just ordinary fresh graduates who couldn’t fight against those cruel rules of society.

[CHEN]: I will arrange for someone to follow up.

[CHEN]: Do you have more stickers?

Guardian was stunned for a moment before finally realizing that the sticker that she had just sent him was made with Xiang Yi’s photos.

[Guardian]: Yes, there are.

She hurriedly sent the dozen or so Xiang Yi sticker packs that she had made to him.

Xiang Chen stared at his screen seriously with a straight face…

He saved each and every sticker pack.

[CHEN]: On the account of the stickers, I’ll handle this case personally. We’re estimated to go to court in three days, get yourself and your friend prepared.

Guardian was dumbstruck.

‘My eyes aren’t playing tricks on me, are they? The top attorney in the country, who usually only takes on multi-million-dollar cases, is actually willing to personally take this case?!]

Guardian immediately chickened out a little. ‘Ah… he didn’t have to go to such lengths…’

Besides, Xiang Chen wasn’t a pro bono lawyer who provided services for free. He charged extremely high fees for his service; and even if he might not want to take any money from Guardian and her friend, they ought to still pay him some money. She reckoned that she and her friend would have to scrimp and save for the next few months…

*Buzz*

She looked down at her cellphone…

[CHEN]: Send me all Xiang Yi sticker packs immediately after you create them in the future. Thanks.

After locking his phone screen, Xiang Chen restored his cold and aloof expression.

chapters.title: Chapter 338 - Grandson-In-Law (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 338 - Grandson-In-Law (2)

…

…

At the amusement park.

Hearing that Xiang Yi’s grandmother wanted to have her photos taken, Li Jianyu took the initiative and offered to help.

Xiang Yin had a disgruntled expression on his face.

‘What? Is he trying to snatch my job?’

Shi Sui tried to make things less awkward for everyone. “How about we all take turns to take a photo for Grandma Xiang? She can choose her favorite one to upload to her Friends page.”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother nodded elegantly and said, “I’ll have to trouble you guys then.”

Thus, the netizens watching the livestream witnessed Xiang Yi’s grandmother striking a classic pose for the camera—touching her shawl.

—— [Director Li is so hardworking and dedicated, he’s lying on the ground to get the best shot. Hahaha]

—— [Hey! I suspect that Xiang Yi’s grandmother has been spying on my family!]

—— [This is true. My aunt and mom love getting into this pose when having their photos taken at scenic spots!]

After changing a few poses, Xiang Yi’s grandmother came over to look at the photos.

Li Jianyu was rather ingenious. After getting permission from Xiang Yi’s grandmother, he asked Old Zhang to do a close-up shot of each of everyone’s phone.

The first was Xiang Yi’s cell phone. The photo of her grandmother that Xiang Yi had taken was ordinary and considered acceptable.

Next, it was Li Jianyu who had done an excellent job at making Xiang Yi’s grandmother look like a gorgeous model of a fashion editorial.

Shi Sui was up next. His photography skills were surprisingly superb, and he made Old Mrs. Xiang look gentle and personable.

Lastly…it was Xiang Yin’s turn.

The viewers of the livestream mocked him mercilessly.

—— [Xiang Yi’s grandfather is such a typical guy! You barely included Old Mrs. Xiang in the photo!]

—— [Thanks, I feel offended because the photos that my boyfriend takes of me are that ugly too.]

—— [Hahaha, I saw several shots where Xiang Yi’s grandmother had her eyes closed. “Perfect” timing, huh? The shot was taken right when she blinked.]

…

Xiang Yi’s grandmother pulled her shawl and said smilingly, “I hereby announce that the person who took the best photo is Little Bunny…”

Before she could finish, someone protested furiously. [Even if she wants to be biased, she shouldn’t do that! Anyone can tell that Director Li and Shi Sui have done the best job! I’m speechless!!]

In the next second, Old Mrs. Xiang said calmly, “Little Bunny, Shi Sui and Li Jianyu did the best! She winked at the three of them and continued, “There’ll be rewards later.”

The netizens watching the livestream were slightly stunned for a moment before realizing how high Old Mrs. Xiang’s EQ was.

—— Ahhhhh, Grandma Xiang is so gentle and nice! I don’t care, I don’t care, I must get my grandmother to learn!]

Xiang Yin panicked. ‘What about me? Am I second best?”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother said in disdain, “You can dream on, you’re last in place.”

She was clearly holding double standards.

Xiang Yin was aggrieved and furious. He turned around and ignored her.

He questioned Xiang Yi fiercely, “Is the photo I took really the worst?”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘What a lethal question.’

While contemplating on how to answer him, Shi Sui naturally answered it on her behalf. “Grandpa Xiang, Grandma Xiang definitely likes the photo you took the most because… you’re her favorite person.”

Xiang Yin sulked for two seconds…

At the third second, he smirked gleefully.

‘This kid is quite good at talking.’

However, in the blink of an eye, he recalled the scene of Shi Sui offering Xiang Yi a bottle of water, which made him sulk again.

‘He has such a glib tongue!’

‘What if he bullies Xiang Yi in the future?’

‘A man like him is unacceptable!’

The netizens watching the livestream were appalled and commented that Xiang Yin’s mood changed as quick as lightning.

Xiang Yi’s grandmother had obviously guessed what Xiang Yin was thinking and quickly found an excuse to ask him to take some photos of the flowers at the side. She then grabbed Shi Sui’s hand enthusiastically.

“My dear grandson-in-law, you must take good care of our Little Bunny.”

Xiang Yi was confused.

‘Grandma, did you misunderstand something?’

Just as she was about to explain, Shi Sui smiled and said, “Grandma Xiang, you’re being too formal. It’s only my duty to take care of Xiang Yi.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

chapters.title: Chapter 339 - : I Disagree To This Marriage
chapters.body:
Chapter 339 - : I Disagree To This Marriage

She parted her cherry-like lips before closing them again. “No… He’s not…”

Shi Sui suddenly put an arm around her shoulder, leaving her at a loss for words as she looked at Shi Sui in puzzlement.

Shi Sui kept a straight face and bent forward to whisper something into her ear.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Shi Sui said that he didn’t want to disappoint Xiang Yi’s grandmother since she was in such high spirits, and that he could pretend to be her boyfriend in order not to dampen Old Mrs. Xiang’s mood.

Although he sounded as if he was sparing a thought for Xiang Yi and her grandmother, Xiang Yi felt that something was amiss.

The viewers of the livestream who shipped the two of them were speechless and shocked!

—— [The ugly husband is meeting the parents now, huh?!]

—— [Ugly? Mind your words, how is Shi Sui ugly at all?!]

—— [Official announcement? Grandma Xiang called Shi Sui her grandson-in-law, but he didn’t deny so that means he has admitted to it!]

…

Old Mrs. Xiang couldn’t help but cover her mouth and snicker when she saw them behaving intimately with each other.

‘Seems like my obedient Little Bunny is in a loving relationship with my grandson-in-law~’

Old Mrs. Xiang had always thought that girls should experience a few relationships in order to become more mature at handling relationships.

However, in the eyes of Xiang Yin…

Xiang Yin glared at them with his eyes wide open and hollered, “Scoundrel! Take your hands off her! Now!”

Xiang Yi was so shocked that she suddenly shivered.

Shi Sui tightened his grip on her shoulder.

Xiang Yin stopped taking photos of the greenery and charged over aggressively while swinging his cane against Shi Sui.

Shi Sui didn’t dodge either and simply took the hit.

Xiang Yin hit him rather forcefully, and even Xiang Yi could hear the loud thud of the cane hitting his flesh.

“Grandpa!”

“Old man!”

Xiang Yin ignored the both of them and cursed at Shi Sui furiously. “Don’t touch Xiang Yi! She’s such a nice and adorable girl, you’re not worthy of her at all, rascal!!! Don’t try to play tricks. As long as I’m alive, you will never be able to abduct her!”

He took a breath and added viciously, “No man can!”

Some of the netizens watching the livestream were worried when they saw that scene, while others gloated.

—— [Wow, Grandpa Xiang is so fierce. That must have hurt.]
