—— [So fragile… Grandpa, stop abusing them, will you?]

—— [What is this old man being so haughty for? Who are you to look down on Shi Sui? Come on, your granddaughter is the one who isn’t worthy of him, okay?!]

—— [Wonderful, Old Mr. Xiang, you must break them up! I’ve long detested Vase Fairy! What right does she have to enjoy all the benefits? Let her die alone as an old spinster! Hehe]

…

Even Li Jianyu felt that Shi Sui was definitely going to flop this time…

As a director of a variety show, he was good at judging the expressions of others.

The way one looks at someone they genuinely adore is completely different from that of actors acting out a romantic scene as an on-screen couple.

He could long tell that Shi Sui had a thing for Xiang Yi.

Shi Sui had been too careless this time!

He managed to win Old Mrs. Xiang’s favor but ended up angering Xiang Yin and making Xiang Yin detest him. It was simply a huge loss.

Unexpectedly…

When Xiang Yin swung his cane at Shi Sui again, Xiang Yi tugged Shi Sui backward with one hand and clutched Xiang Yin’s cane with the other.

“Grandpa, you’re mistaken, I’m not going to his home.”

Xiang Yin hollered, “Are you going to let him marry into our family?!”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother said, “That’s not impossible…”

Xiang Yin barked in exasperation, “I don’t agree to this marriage!!!”

He straightened his back and waited for Xiang Yi to promise him that she would draw a clear line between herself and Shi Sui in the future.

In the next second…

Xiang Yi swallowed her saliva and dragged Shi Sui along with her as she dashed away.

The netizens were dumbfounded.

Xiang Yin was flabbergasted!

‘What? Are they eloping!?!’

chapters.title: Chapter 340 - Want To Kiss Brother?
chapters.body:
Chapter 340 - Want To Kiss Brother?

…

…

Xiang Yi pulled Shi Sui away and dashed as quickly as she could. Even after chasing for a long time, Li Jianyu and Old Zhang couldn’t catch up to them. Instead, they were terribly exhausted.

“Oh my God, I can’t do this anymore, it’s exhausting,” Li Jianyu said while panting heavily.

To make matters worse for Old Zhang, he was carrying equipment that weighed dozens of kilograms. He was so worn out that he could no longer speak.

Li Jianyu walked up to the camera and said, “Hehe, do you guys want to continue watching us play the merry-go-round?”

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Ahhh, get lost! You’re making me look ugly!]

—— [Shi Sui and Xiang Yi: Absolutely gorgeous

Director Li: Ugliness Critical Hit.]

—— [Son, perform a 360-degree aerial pirouette for two and a half weeks, and I’ll forgive you.]

…

Li Jianyu was quite good at scene control. Amid the laughter, he paused the livestream temporarily.

He muttered, “Shi Sui is indeed worthy of all his glory. He’s so good at adapting and can turn adversity into opportunity. He’s performed so splendidly…”

‘So what if he offended Old Mr. Xiang?!’

‘So what if he got a beating?!’

‘He has won Xiang Yi over!!!’

…

On the other hand…

Only after making sure that they were at a safe distance away did she heave a sigh of relief and mutter, “That really scared me to death. Grandpa is so fierce…”

She felt that Xiang Yin would have broken all of Shi Sui’s legs if she didn’t take him away.

Shi Sui had run alongside her for quite a great distance, but his breathing wasn’t erratic at all. In fact, he could even tease leisurely with ease, “Xiang Yi, your hand.”

Xiang Yi frantically let go of his hand as if there was static between their hands.

“Don’t get the wrong idea, I was just…scared that Grandpa might hit you…”

“Yes, I know.”

Looking at his smiling self and joyous gaze in his eyes, Xiang Yi suddenly felt uneasy.

“Ahem, I’ll call Grandma. Then we can go pick Xiao Naofu up afterwards?”

“Alright.”

…

Xiang Yi went to the side to make a phone call.

Shi Sui could vaguely hear her speaking coquettishly.

Her voice was gentle, meek, and…very sweet.

However, when she returned to his side, she regained her composure again and said calmly, “Grandma said she would help me coax Grandpa. But speaking of which, why would they think that we…are dating?”

Xiang Yi was utterly bewildered.

The culprit, who had started it all and made the misunderstanding deepen, said with a straight face, “Maybe it’s because I’m too likable.”

Xiang Yi was confused.

“Don’t you know that those who want to have a blind date with me during the New Year holiday would have to make an appointment in advance?”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She was shocked.

‘Sonny Shi Sui… Ah, no, I’m not worthy of being a “mommy fan” anymore. Is Shi Sui that popular in the matchmaking market?’

‘No wonder Grandma likes him so much.’

She asked curiously, “What does it feel like to go for matchmaking sessions and blind dates? Will there really be weirdos like what they say on the Internet?”

In the past, Ah Nan had shared lots of juicy relationship confessions and gossip articles with her, among which many were complaints about meeting weird people on blind dates.

Shi Sui asked, “Are you curious to find out?”

He chuckled and said, “Why don’t I let you experience it for free during the New Year holiday next year?”

Thinking that he was just joking, Xiang Yi said, “It’s not right to cut the queue. I’ll just join the queue.”

Shi Sui stopped in his tracks and then responded accordingly to her statement nonchalantly, “Okay, I’ll call you when it’s your turn.”

…

…

At the e-sports base of Logic.

Xiang Yi and company arrived at past eleven in the morning. Apart from Xiao Naofu, who was jumping around actively, no one else at the base was awake…

At this moment, Xiang Yi was gazing at the large cat tree, luxurious cat villa, and well-equipped cat playground. She soon fell into deep thought.

‘I’ve been mistreating Xiao Naofu.’

‘My brothers are so good to Xiao Naofu…’

She somehow felt like a parent who had been raising her child frugally but her wealthy relatives had taken over and provided the best living conditions for her child…

Hearing the sounds of footsteps, Xiao Naofu turned around and wagged its tail excitedly a few times before dashing towards Xiang Yi.

‘Ah~ Silly woman! I want hugs! I want kisses!’

Shi Sui suddenly wrapped his hands around the back of Xiao Naofu’s back and lifted it up in front of himself.

He drawled with a relaxed smile, “Xiao Naofu, it’s been a while since we met. Do you want to kiss me?”

“…”

‘Damn it, get lost! Ahhhhh!!!!’

…

chapters.title: Chapter 341 - Gradually Becoming A Dog
chapters.body:
Chapter 341 - Gradually Becoming A Dog

Shi Sui’s peach-blossom-shaped eyes were slightly curved, and he smiled derisively. He then bent forward in a bid to kiss Xiao Naofu.

He moved his pale and thin lips closer to Xiao Naofu…

“Meow meow meow!!!”

Xiao Naofu stretched out its fleshy paws and tried its best to block Shi Sui’s lips, not allowing him to get closer by a single inch.

A trace of viciousness flashed in Shi Sui’s eyes, and he slowly retreated.

Xiao Naofu heaved a sigh of relief.

‘Uwu~ I’ve protected my chastity!’

All of a sudden…

Shi Sui suddenly asked, “Huh? Xiang Yi, look, is it just me or Xiao Naofu is balding?”

Xiang Yi went over and took a closer look before saying worriedly, “Yes, a little bit.”

The fur on the crown of Xiao Naofu’s head was obviously much sparser and flatter than the other parts of his body…

‘It’s only been a few days. How long did Xiang Yu rub him for…’

Xiao Naofu’s round eyes were wide open, and it raised its tiny paws to touch its head.

‘Has my fur really become sparse?!’

‘Doesn’t that mean that I’m going to become a bald tiger?!’

To its surprise, it was greeted with a sudden kiss from Shi Sui.

With a soft “mwah”, Shi Sui pressed his lips against Xiao Naofu’s face.

Xiao Naofu was flabbergasted.

Its world began to crumble.

It stared at Shi Sui, dumbstruck, as if he had suffered a huge blow.

“Tsk, why is its fur falling out?” Shi Sui smirked and continued with a somewhat gloating smile, “It doesn’t feel nice to kiss it at all.”

Xiao Naofu: …!

‘Damned dog! Ugh!’

‘Screw you, screw you, I’m going to bite you to death!!’

It opened its mouth wide to flaunt its sharp and shiny teeth, seemingly ready to fight to the death with Shi Sui.

However, in the next second, it fell into a warm, fragrant embrace.

“Xiao Naofu, don’t bite,” Xiang Yi said, like she was teaching a young child.

Xiao Naofu pointed its paw at Shi Sui. “Ow… Grr…”

‘He kissed me! That dog of a man kissed me!!!’

Xiang Yi roughly understood what he meant. She coaxed softly, “Brother Shi Sui kissed you only because he adores you.”

Shi Sui was still adding fire to the flames from the side. “Yeah, I will never kiss anyone else’s kitten.”

Xiao Naofu was so furious that it lost its rationality. “Woof! Woof! Woof!”

It gradually turned into a dog.

Li Jianyu and Lao Zhang, who were watching from the side, were laughing hysterically.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘Do you still remember that you’re a little tiger?’

‘Which little tiger in the world can bark…’

“Okay, okay, don’t be angry, Xiao Naofu, you’re the most obedient one…” Xiang Yi carried Xiao Naofu in her arms and paced back and forth in the room for a few minutes while coaxing it. Xiao Naofu sniffled and nestled itself in Xiang Yi’s arms, rubbing its head coquettishly against her soft and pillowy chest.

Shi Sui, who was standing near them, suddenly squinted his dark eyes.

Xiao Naofu humphed and threw a coquettish, petty tantrum for a long time. At this juncture, Xiang Yu had gotten out of bed and washed up as quickly as he could. Before he could even have time to comb his hair, he immediately headed downstairs to feed Xiao Naofu.

When Li Jianyu saw Xiang Yu, he gestured for Old Zhang to start the livestream.

The opening scene of today’s livestream was that of the “God of E-sports” who looked weary and unkempt, with his hair in a mess.

“Xiang Yi?” he asked, his voice slightly raspy because he had just woken up.

“Brother, I’ve come to pick Xiao Naofu up.”

“…”

Xiang Yu stayed silent and carried Xiao Naofu over from her arms. Rubbing Xiao Naofu’s head skilfully, he said coolly, “A frequent change of environment is not good for the mental health of cats.”

The netizens were appalled.

—— [I really dig the way Smog looks when he has just woken up!]

—— [Hahahah, the way Smog is petting the cat is like kneading meatballs.]

—— [Smog: My mental health will suffer without Xiao Naofu.]

chapters.title: Chapter 342 - Your Sister Is Our Sister
chapters.body:
Chapter 342 - Your Sister Is Our Sister

—— [Hahaha, just keep pretending, Xiang Yu. I still have the video of you sniffing the cat previously!]

…

Xiang Yi said, “Have your breakfast, we’ll ask Xiao Naofu for its opinion later.”

Xiang Yu nodded aloofly. “What do you want to eat? I’ll order some takeout.”

“I’ve prepared some ingredients,” Xiang Yi said, her eyes slightly curving as she grinned. It was as if there was some gentle, warm moonlight in her eyes. “Xiang Yu, let me cook for you guys.”

Xiang Yu said seriously, “You can cook your own food while I order some takeout.”

‘I’ll eat the food Xiang Yi cooks!’

‘Takeout is for Wander and the other animals.’

…

…

There was a cook who was specially hired to cook for them at the e-sports base, but the players preferred to order takeout.

The cook helped Xiang Yi with the preparation of ingredients and soon, the heavenly aroma of food began to waft out of the kitchen.

The food was so fragrant that it woke the players up one by one, a feat that even alarm clocks couldn’t achieve…

“Auntie, what did you make for breakfast today? It smells heavenly!”

“Awesome, it must be roast pork. I’m going to have two bowls of rice later!”

“I seem to smell pork ribs soup too… I’m so hungry, do you have any snacks? Give me some to fill my stomach for a while.”

“…”

Xiang Yu waited until they were almost done discussing before pretending to be nonchalant as he said seemingly unintentionally, “It’s my sister, she’s here.”

“Huh!?!” The crowd was shocked.

They had signed a contract with the livestreaming platform which stipulated that they had to stream for a certain number of hours every month. Occasionally, they would watch the livestreams of other hosts; but apart from the match replay videos, there was a livestream program that all members of the team wanted to watch…

That was, the highlights of Xiang Yi’s cooking!

They call it the best thing to watch while having their meals!

Watching her cooking was simply a great pleasure for them!

They didn’t expect that Xiang Yi would come to their e-sports base to cook today!

The youngsters immediately started trying to butter Xiang Yu up.

“Let me shovel Xiao Naofu’s feces today!”

“Smog, you are my best buddy, that makes your sister our sister too!”

“Brother, do you want some water? Do you want it iced, boiling hot, or warm? Warm? Or lukewarm?”

“…”

They were definitely bootlicking.

Xiang Yu shook his phone and said, “I ordered some takeout for you guys. I’ll be eating the food my sister cooks later, while you guys can have the takeout.”

“Hmph! Petty miser! Forget it if you won’t let us eat!”

‘Takeout tastes just as superb!’

As soon as Xiang Yu finished, the takeout was served at the same time as the dishes that Xiang Yi had prepared.

Xiang Yu had ordered some dishes that they usually ate such as crayfish and barbecued sticks wrapped in aluminum foil to ensure that they remained hot.

On the other hand, Xiang Yi made braised pork with quail eggs, braised prawns, roasted luffa with ginger sauce, stir-fried bok choy with mushrooms, and pork ribs and corn soup.

The main course was curry chicken omelet rice.

“I made a simple fare of home-cooked dishes. Please give them a try and see if they are to your liking,” Xiang Yi said warmly.

Wander and the others first tasted the crayfish and barbecued skewers, but they soon tried the dishes that Xiang Yi had made with Xiang Yu glaring at them murderously…

“!”

The braised pork was fatty and tender but not overwhelmingly greasy. The quail eggs had been fried and thus were slightly crispy and full of sauce that was drenched over them…

The prawns were light vermillion in color, fresh, and slightly sweet to taste. The shredded luffa was crunchy, refreshing and fragrant. The omelet rice, which was mixed with curry, boasted of the unique spiciness of curry and a tender, silky mouth-feel because of the egg. It was a perfect combination. Nothing brings about more joy than savoring a mouthful of omelet rice mixed with curry!

‘This! Is! Absolutely! Delicious!’

‘So fragrant! Impeccable!’

‘What kind of trash is takeout food?!’

The youngsters began hanging their heads low and wolfing down the food in front of them without the slightest fear toward the tyrant of their team, Xiang Yu.

While stuffing their faces with food, they asked Xiang Yi questions.

“Sister Xiang Yi, it must have been hard on you in the mortal world, right?”

“Sister, do you play games? I’ll carry you and soar high!”

“Sister Xiang Yi, Sister Xiang Yi, do you need a younger brother?”

chapters.title: Chapter 343 - Hehehe I Was Pretending
chapters.body:
Chapter 343 - Hehehe I Was Pretending

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The youngsters’ cheeks were all puffed up because their mouths were full of food, and their lips were greasy.

The netizens watching the livestream:

—— [I’ve gotten used to it. Miss Xiang is really such a Mary Sue. lighting-up-a-cigarette-with-melancholy.jpg]

—— [I suspect that Xiang Yi must have drugged the meal! Otherwise, why is everyone enjoying it so much?!]

—— [??? Are they the same group of rebellious and wild kids that made their club manager and coach worried sick? They instantly became so obedient in front of Xiang Yi!]

…

While Xiang Yi went away to feed Xiao Naofu some prawns? The young men started looking at Shi Sui.

“Brother Shi Sui.” Captain Wander couldn’t care less about table manners. While chewing, he asked, “Are there any requirements to be on your show?”

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows and said, “I’m afraid you’ll have to ask the director about that.”

Wander looked at Li Jianyu and asked, “Uncle, can we be on your show?”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded.

‘Shi Sui and I are only two years apart. Why did he call me Uncle instead of Brother like how he addressed Shi Sui?’

“I’ll give you ten seconds to rephrase your words,” Li Jianyu said with a fierce expression on his face.

Wander was stunned, and he came to a sudden realization before asking loudly, “Uncle! Can you give us a chance?”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded.

The comments section of the livestream was flooded with comments like “hahahaha”.

Li Jianyu said leisurely, “No, you guys are too expensive to hire.”

China’s e-sports industry was booming with the rising popularity of e-sports, coupled with the rapid development of livestreaming platforms and the livestream community. The value of many e-sports players was not inferior to movie stars.

They could afford to hire one or two players but a team like theirs was too expensive for a smalltime variety show production team like theirs to hire.

Wander immediately said, “Uncle! I can do it for free!”

Ah Shui immediately chimed in, “Me too!”

Xiao Yang said coyly, “All I ask is to be fed…”

Li Jianyu was speechless.

‘As expected of you, Xiang Yi.’

‘All you did was whip up a feast, and you helped us save a seven-figure sum…’

‘Well, I just have to be called Uncle, what’s the big deal?’

‘I don’t mind being called Grandpa either!’

Li Jianyu smiled foolishly because a great opportunity had fallen right into his lap once again.

…

…

After the meal…

The youngsters were all full from stuffing themselves silly and were now sprawled sluggishly across the couch by the coffee table, like a bunch of dead fish.

Xiang Yi placed Xiao Naofu on the ground. She pointed at Xiang Yu and then at herself before asking, “Do you want to stay here with Brother Xiang Yu or come home with me?”

Xiang Yu was full of confidence.

He had spoiled Xiao Naofu to bits and gave it everything it wanted. He even let Xiao Naofu occupy his bed!

Hence, he was sure that Xiao Naofu would pick him!

In the next second…

Without even looking at him, Xiao Naofu happily leaped into Xiang Yi’s arms and hummed meekly.

Meow~ Meow~

—— “Silly woman! Hurry up and take me home~”

Xiang Yu was in disbelief.

‘What? How can that be? How is it possible?!’

‘Was all the love that Xiao Naofu has shown me in the past few days all fake?!’

The camera coincidentally gave him a close-up shot, and the netizens watching the livestream kept laughing incessantly.

—— [So love does disappear, right?]

—— [I’m sorry. Smog’s life is really tragic, but I really want to laugh.]

—— [Poor Smog, he’s finally going to find out how fake Xiao Naofu is.]

…

Carrying Xiao Naofu in her arms, Xiao Naofu was getting ready to leave.

“Wait a minute!” Xiang Yu suddenly called out to her to stop her. Looking at the kitten in her arms with agony in his eyes, he asked, “Fufu… Did I not do something well enough?”

Xiao Naofu blinked its blue, watery eyes and meowed again.

Meow~ Meow~

—— “Bye Brother, I’ll miss you!”

Xiang Yu glanced at it wistfully and bade it goodbye softly with reluctance, “Fufu, I’ll visit you often.”

Xiao Naofu turned its head away and burrowed itself in Xiang Yi’s embrace with a sinister smile.

—— “Miss you? Of course I won’t. Do I feel sad? No. Hehe, I was just pretending~”

chapters.title: Chapter 344 - Little Xiji
chapters.body:
Chapter 344 - Little Xiji

The entire scene was captured by the camera.

Li Jianyu intended to shoot ‘Smog Sniffing the Kitten 2.0’, but he didn’t expect to have received an unexpected bonus of Xiao Naofu being a jerk.

—— [Pretentious Xiao Naofu, rotten cat!]

—— [Damn, look at that smile. He’s really almost becoming child-like!]

—— [I suggest that we pin the jerk, Xiao Naofu, on the public notice!]

…

…

The crowd thought that Xiao Naofu had no other rival apart from Shi Sui.

However, when Xiang Yi and the rest arrived back in the manor, they discovered that there was a cute little Shiba Inu which they had never seen before.

The fur on its back was light yellow in color, its belly was cream-colored, and its eyes were watery as it laid on the ground obediently.

Xiang Chen said coldly, “This is the dog that Uncle Xiang Feng’s friend has given to him. He wants you to help him look after it for a few days. Its name is…”

He revealed its name reluctantly, “Little Xiji.”

There was quite a stark but cute contrast when he said those cutesy words with an aloof expression.

Xiang Yi asked, “Little Lion? His fur does resemble a lion’s fur.”

Xiang Chen said seriously, “It’s Little Xiji.”

“Oh…okay.”

Xiang Yi bent over and tried to give Little Xiji a rub on its head.

The Shiba Inu rubbed its head against her palm obediently. Woof~

“You’re so adorable. I’ll make you some delicious food later.”

Woof~ Woof~

…

Xiao Naofu immediately felt as if the sky was falling down when it saw that scene from behind!

‘Am I… no longer the one this silly woman loves the most?’

‘She’s giving this dog… Ugh! She’s going to make some food for this ugly dog?!’

Xiao Naofu was so furious that it scurried over and roared at Little Xiji viciously.

Meow! Meow!

Little Xiji: ●ω●

It stared at Xiao Naofu for a few seconds and took the initiative to lick Xiao Naofu’s fur as a sign of friendship.

Xiao Naofu was speechless.

‘Ahhhhhh you made me so dirty!’

It waved its little claws and slapped Little Xiji’s face.

After getting hit, Little Xiji didn’t retaliate and merely took a few steps back in an aggrieved manner.

Refusing to give in, Xiao Naofu tried to hit it further.

It was suddenly lifted off the ground and hovered in midair. Xiang Yi had picked it up.

Xiao Naofu was incredibly aggrieved as it kept meowing.

—— Get rid of this tacky dog! It’s either that dog or me!

“Xiao Naofu, it’s only staying for a few days.” Xiang Yi tried to reason with it. “Uncle Xiang Feng will come pick him up when the time comes.”

Xiao Naofu was vehement. ‘I’m not having it! I’m not having it!’

It squirmed, broke away from Xiang Yi’s arms, jumped to the table and moved Xiang Yi’s favorite cup to the edge of the table with a wave of its fleshy paws.

Li Jianyu asked in shock, “Is it threatening you, Xiang Yi?”

Xiang Yi answered in confusion, “It should be…”

“Woof?” Little Xiji had no idea what was happening. It rubbed itself affectionately against Xiang Yi’s calf, seemingly wanting another head rub.

That scene made Xiao Naofu boil with fury and triggered its pretentious behavior.

Bang!

The cup fell onto the ground.

Still not satisfied, Xiao Naofu leaped onto the sofa and kicked the rabbit soft toy a few times with its tiny legs before sitting down aggrievedly, huffing and puffing while its chubby body heaved up and down.

Xiang Yi’s heart turned soft and couldn’t bear to scold Xiao Naofu. Just as she was thinking about how she should coax Xiao Naofu, Shi Sui stuffed something into her hand.

Xiang Yi looked down to see that it was Little Xiji’s leash.

“Xiang Yi, let’s go walk the dog,” he said without mentioning Xiao Naofu at all.

Xiao Naofu pounced onto her and meowed aggrievedly.

—— Silly woman, don’t walk this tacky dog! At most… At most, I’ll let you walk me, okay?

chapters.title: Chapter 345 - Dog-Like Man Walks The Dog
chapters.body:
Chapter 345 - Dog-Like Man Walks The Dog

…

Five minutes later…

Shi Sui held onto Little Xiji’s leash, while Xiang Yi carried Xiao Naofu in her arms as they strolled side by side in the cool area of the garden.

Xiao Naofu placed its fleshy paws on Xiang Yi’s shoulder to show off to Little Xiji arrogantly.

The silly Little Xiji barked.

Xiao Naofu: “Hmph.”

It then looked at Shi Sui smugly.

‘A dog-like man walking a dog. What a perfect match.’

Shi Sui raised his brows and looked at it, seemingly trying to say, ‘I suggest you behave less smugly.’

Xiao Naofu: …

It was scared.

It hugged Xiang Yi tightly and meowed coquettishly in a puerile voice.

Xiang Yi said helplessly, “Xiao Naofu, how many meals a day did you have when you were staying with Xiang Yu?”

It had only been a few days but Xiao Naofu had obviously gained weight.

Feeling guilty, Xiao Naofu thought, ‘Well…just three meals a day with some additional canned food, meat and fish jerky, nutritional gel, anti-fur-loss paste, and other snacks…’

Shi Sui said, “Actually, I know of a way to make Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji get along properly.”

Xiang Yi’s eyes lit up. “Really?”

Shi Sui pushed his glasses with his finger and said with a smile, “How about we give Xiao Naofu away?

Xiao Naofu: …!

‘Is that a humane thing to say?’

Shi Sui winked at Xiang Yi, who instantly caught the hint and played along, “I think we should give him to Second Brother. He’ll definitely come up with a specialized, scientific, and nutritious weight-loss meal plan for Xiao Naofu.”

‘Second Brother…’

‘Isn’t that the demonic Xiang Li?’

‘If she gives me to him… won’t I end up being neutered?!’

Xiao Naofu panicked.

“Meowww~”

—— This tiger doesn’t want to go to Xiang Li’s house!

Shi Sui said nonchalantly, “Little Xiji is so obedient and doesn’t eat much. It can look after the house too…”

Xiao Naofu’s ears moved, and it purred anxiously.

—— I can be good too, I can be obedient. I can also eat less and watch over the house… I can do it!

In order to show how “fierce” it was, Xiao Naofu put on a menacing and aggressive expression and tried to bark.

Xiang Yi tried her best to contain her laughter while mouthing some words to Shi Sui. “Is it really a good idea to lie to it?”

Shi Sui said with a straight face, “Children will grow only after a harsh beating.”

Little Xiji barked.

Its dark eyes were full of bewilderment.

It seemed to be suspecting that Xiao Naofu was its kind.

Shi Sui praised, “Yes, indeed; it’s barking very ferociously, the bad guys are definitely going to flee in fear.”

Xiao Naofu was getting all conceited as it let out another bark.

Little Xiji responded heartlessly with two more barks.

However, Xiao Naofu thought that Little Xiji was provoking it!

“Ow! Woof Woof!”

“Woof! Woof Woof!”

“…”

Xiang Yi couldn’t help but turn her head to the side and laughed out loud.

Not far away, Li Jianyu squatted on the steps and said in awe, “Shi Sui, even a dog is less of a dog than you are.”

He glanced at his phone screen, feeling perplexed and vexed.

Just a few minutes ago, Li Jianyu received a message from a friend who said that the edited premiere of the livestream show, “Eating Well for All Three Meals” produced by Muyao TV, was going to be released during the primetime slot on the satellite TV channel!

The program style of the “Eating Well for All Three Meals” was a complete imitation of “Two Under One Roof”, which made Li Jianyu feel frustrated enough. Now that “Eating Well for All Three Meals” was going to be aired on TV as opposed to “Two Under One Roof”, which was aired online, he felt even more upset.

Although the television industry has been in decline, and there hadn’t been a variety show that exceeded viewership ratings of 2 and above, the fact that it would be aired on TV meant that the new program would a greater influence and reach a wider audience.

chapters.title: Chapter 346 - Failed Attempt At Mimicking
chapters.body:
Chapter 346 - Failed Attempt At Mimicking

“Two Under One Roof” was broadcast online, and majority of the audience was made up of young people.

At present, “Two Under One Roof” was topping the ranks in terms of viewership ratings.

However, if “Eating Well for All Three Meals” were to rise to national fame, it would definitely surpass “Two Under One Roof”.

‘Are the efforts of the production team, filming crew, and Xiang Yi over this period of time going to go down the drain just like that?’

…

On Friday, what Li Jianyu was the most worried about still happened after all.

The premiere of “Eating Well for All Three Meals” was aired on all major network platforms during the 8pm primetime slot.

The combination of a fresh and novel theme with top celebrities like the martial artist star Zhuo Yi, who had also won a double gold Best Actor award, followed by the top songstress, Jiang Yun’er, who was a household name in the nation and had numerous top hits under her belt, allowed the program ratings to exceed 1.8 in the first ten minutes of the broadcast!

That was the highest viewership rating that a local variety show had achieved in the past three years!

The online broadcast of “Eating Well for All Three Meals” had also garnered more views than “Two Under One Roof”, and the gap seemed to be widening.

Gradually, criticism began to surface on the internet.

—— [Eating Well for All Three Meals is so enjoyable! I strongly recommend it, but what on earth is ‘Two Under One Roof’? Is it a ripoff?”

—— [Muyao TV is awesome! For the first time in my life, there’s a variety show that my entire family watches together! ‘Two Under One Roof’ is really disgusting, they’re such copycats!]

—— [Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er are still so loving even though they’ve been married for years. This is the best form of love. Previously, there were people trying to ship Shi Sui and Xiang Yi together every single day. I just want to say, true blue will never stain!]

…

When Li Jianyu saw these remarks, he was so furious that he almost dropped his phone.

He knew that Muyao TV must have done something to bump up the popularity of the show, such as hire a bunch of keyboard warriors to deliberately influence the other netizens. However, most people started bombarding and criticizing “Two Under One Roof” before they even got their facts right.

Li Jianyu looked at Xiang Yi who was cooking in the kitchen. Her hair was tied up into a bun and her movements were clean, slick, and fluid. Although Shi Sui, who was beside her, had injured his arm, he was still helping her out by handing the things she needed to her and interacting with the netizens.

In fact, hosting a livestream every single day was an exhausting task, and the duration of each livestream was far beyond the stipulated duration in contract that they had signed at first.

‘But…’

‘What should we do now?’

Li Jianyu was confused.

He had considered having “Two Under One Roof” aired on TV too, but he had a limited network of connections even though he had been working in Muyao TV for years.

He was just a variety show director who didn’t have much of a say in things, and there was no way he could reach the senior executives of other TV stations either.

“Bad news, Director Li!” the assistant said with a suppressed voice as he scurried over to show him the comments in the live stream.

Li Jianyu’s expression changed drastically.

—— [Is this the variety show that’s a copycat of Eating Well for All Three Meals? Jiang Yun’er cooks in that show, so you’re doing the same too? Please have some shame.]

—— [I initially had a good impression of Shi Sui, but I didn’t expect him to have no bottomline at all… He’s really capable of doing anything for the sake of money.]

—— [I’m laughing my ass off. Jiang Yun’er and Zhuo Yi are really a married couple, so their interaction is a display of affection. These two aren’t even dating and yet, they’re using their ambiguous romance for clout. They’ve done such a bad job at imitating.]

…

There were people who tried to explain in the comments’ section of the livestream, but the new audience refused to listen at all. Afterward, there were more new viewers.

Li Jianyu couldn’t help but curse.

The assistant said worriedly, “Director Li, what should we do now… At this rate, the reputation of our show is going to be ruined…”

All of a sudden, the crisp and loud sound of stilettos came spreading over…

chapters.title: Chapter 347 - Retaliation! (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 347 - Retaliation! (1)

Tap-tap-tap

Each click sounded like the beat of a drum that was pounding rhythmically on their heart.

“Good evening, Director Li.”

A familiar female voice rang in Li Jianyu’s ears.

He turned his face to the side and asked in shock, “Station Manager Ruan?”

It was Ruan Qing, the deputy station manager of Muyao TV where he used to work at.

Ruan Qing’s impeccable discernment and capabilities were unquestionable. Back in the day, Li Jianyu had come up with several variety show proposals and plans, but no one paid any attention to them at first. Later on, Ruan Qing managed to spot his works with her discerning eye and good judgment, thus giving him the chance to produce a few variety shows that ended up becoming hits.

“I’ve resigned.” Ruan Qing was dressed in a shirt and a long skirt, with a geometrical patterned silk scarf around her neck and exquisite makeup on her face. She exuded the elegance and charm of a mature woman.

Li Jianyu rubbed his hands somewhat helplessly and asked, “Is that so… I didn’t know you were coming today. What’s the matter?”

As a seasoned corporate slave, he still couldn’t help but be a little nervous in front of his former superior.

Ruan Qing chuckled and said, “I saw the recruitment notice for your program production team.”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded.

Ruan Qing took out a document from her purse. “Here’s my resume.”

Li Jianyu was confused.

Flabbergasted, he looked at everything in front of him in disbelief.

…

In the glass floral room.

The warm colored glazed lights emitted several rays of radiant light.

In just a few minutes, Ruan Qing was successfully inducted into the production team of “Two Under One Roof”.

Li Jianyu accepted this reality in a trance.

He felt like he was truly worthy of being a corporate slave, and he would definitely garner a massive number of clicks if he were to post something in the discussion forums for corporate slaves.

#TheMandatorySharingAboutHowIBecameTheBossOfMyFormerBossWhoIsABeauty

That’s right, Ruan Qing joined the program planning team for “Two Under One Roof” and even rose by several ranks to be promoted to the leader.

Since the livestream was still going on, Li Jianyu explained, “When we wrap up later, I’ll have everyone come say hi to you.”

“Okay.” Ruan Qing switched into work mode in a matter of minutes. She took out her electronic tablet from her bag and showed Li Jianyu the PowerPoint presentation that she had made in advance before saying in a professional manner, “After some in-depth analysis, I’ve concluded that there are two reasons for the crisis that ‘Two Under One Roof’ is facing and the hate that its receiving today.”

“Firstly, while there are people who watch both livestreams and variety shows, these people don’t make up the majority of the audience. Currently, livestreams and variety shows are of equal significance in the country’s entertainment industry. The solution for this is simple, let Two Under One Roof be aired on national TV.”

Li Jianyu said with a bitter smile, “I’ve thought of that too but… we can’t just do that easily…”

Ruan Qing took a sip of coffee and said, “Director Li, please, is there a perfect promotion and wage increment scheme for our program team?”

Thinking that she was joking, Li Jianyu answered, “You’re now second-in-command of our program team, if I promote you any further, you’ll become the boss.”

Ruan Qing said, “I think I can handle it.”

Li Jianyu asked in confusion, “What will happen to me then?”

“I’ll call the shots, and you can be second-in-command.”

Li Jianyu said, “Ruan Qing, you’re really funny, hahahaha…” As he laughed, he sensed that something was amiss. He asked feebly, “You’re not serious about this…are you?”

Ruan Qing smiled.

…

…

With the broadcast of the TV version of “Eating Well for All Three Meals”, there were more and more comments on the Internet that were mocking “Two Under One Roof”.

—— [Tsk, tsk, the online premiere of ‘Eating Well for All Three Meals’ has already exceeded 80 million clicks~ Yet, ‘Two Under One Roof’ has garnered only 50 million. Hahaha skr~]

—— [When Shi Sui was still a newbie, he had spoken rudely to Zhuo Yi. A rude artist like him who doesn’t know to be polite to his seniors is bound to be boycotted sooner or later.]

—— [More than 10 million viewers for the livestream? I bet half of those viewers are bots. If it’s that impressive and popular, how can it still be only a web variety show?]

chapters.title: Chapter 348 - Retaliation! (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 348 - Retaliation! (2)

People tend to have preconceived notions. Having watched “Eating Well for All Three Meals” on TV, they naturally thought that it was the “genuine” program, while “Two Under One Roof” was just a “knockoff.”

They started criticizing without even bothering to find out which one of the two variety shows was aired first and which idea came about first.

In particular, Zhuo Yi’s fans had been pestering Shi Sui.

When Shi Sui first debuted, he had collaborated with Zhuo Yi in a certain film. During its course, it was exposed that a mere newcomer in the industry had spoken rudely to his senior and seemed to be acting like a big shot by putting on airs.

Later, Zhuo Yi won a double-gold ‘Best Actor’ award, and he kept using that to mock Shi Yingdi/Shi Sui.

However, Shi Sui then won a triple-gold ‘Best Actor’ award and became the youngest person in the entertainment industry to hold such an impressive title. Hence, Zhuo Yi’s fans didn’t dare to criticize him anymore.

Today, the old feud was brought to light again.

…

At nine o’clock.

The livestream ended.

Li Jianyu gathered the staff in the courtyard and introduced Ruan Qing to them.

“This is Sister Ruan, my boss.”

Everyone was dumbfounded.

‘Huh?’

‘Director Li’s boss?’

Li Jianyu said with dismay, “Anyway, Sister Ruan is now in charge of the planning and PR of our program. You just need to remember that she is the boss of our program team!”

He felt that this topic would go viral on the corporate slave discussion forum too.

#Hello-Everyone-I’m-A-Boss-Who-Found-Myself-Another-Boss

Everyone was dumbfounded, but they nevertheless still greeted Ruan Qing in a friendly and subservient manner.

“Hello, Sister Ruan!”

“Sister Ruan, when can we have a pay raise?”

“Sister Ruan, I want to report that Director Li and Old Zhang secretly ate chicken!”

“…”

Most of the staff of the program team were young people. Although life was a little tough for them, they were all very motivated and driven. Hence, the vibes were pleasant.

Ruan Qing could definitely deal with such a situation with ease.

However…

Having gotten used to the internal strifes, backstabbing, and devious schemes that go on in Muyao TV, she was somewhat at a loss when facing these simple and pure young people who were full of pure enthusiasm.

“Do you want some supper?” Standing at the entrance of the villa, Xiang Yi popped her head in and continued, “I cooked some lean pork porridge with century egg.”

The crowd was tempted, and they looked at Ruan Qing intently.

Ruan Qing didn’t put on airs at all. She said with a smile, “Go ahead.”

The crowd cheered in unison and swarmed to the kitchen.

Soon, Xiang Yi came out with a tray of porridge and other side dishes together with Shi Sui.

Shi Sui had worked with Ruan Qing before. Thus, he took the initiative to greet her. “Sister Ruan.”

Ruan Qing nodded in response and shifted her gaze onto Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi had a reserved and composed temperament. When she smiled, her dimples showed. “Hello, Sister Ruan.”

“Hello, Miss Xiang.”

Xiang Yi asked, “Do you want to try the supper I made?”

Ruan Qing said, “I’m in for a treat.”

They sat down in the gazebo.

Ruan Qing tasted the congee and suddenly stopped in her movements.

She seemed to have understood something.

Xiang Yi’s cooking was indeed delicious, but apart from that…

It provided an irresistible warmth.

Perhaps, joining them was the best decision Ruan Qing had made.

…

Ten minutes later.

When the haters of “Two Under One Roof” were in the heat of the moment, the official account of Nancheng TV suddenly posted a statement on Weibo.

[Nancheng TV]: Stay tuned to Nancheng TV at 8pm on Saturday, which is also tomorrow night. The TV premiere of the highlights of S1:EP1 of the first local livestream variety show will be aired. See ya!]

The official account of “Two Under One Roof” reblogged the post immediately, causing a huge uproar online!

—— [Wtf???]

—— [Those who mocked “Two Under One Roof” for being a web variety show, does your face hurt?]

—— [Nancheng TV is an official TV channel! Aaaaahhhh this retaliation is awesome!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 349 - That’S What Prestige Is
chapters.body:
Chapter 349 - That’S What Prestige Is

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

—— [Hahaha, those fans were so confident. No matter how impressive Muyao TV may be, it’s just a provincial station. Nancheng TV is an official TV station. This is what prestige is~~!]

…

The work chat group of Muyao TV.

After Nancheng TV released that statement, the employees of Muyao TV started a video conference immediately.

The director of the station flew into a rage. “What is going on? Why did Ruan Qing join the program team of ‘Two Under One Roof’? How did ‘Two Under One Roof’ obtain the chance to be aired on Nancheng TV?!”

For a while, no one dared to speak.

After a long silence, someone finally whispered, “I heard that Ruan Qing has been in contact with people from Nancheng TV recently…”

“I heard so too…”

The station manager was infuriated. “Why didn’t you say so earlier?!”

“…”

Of course, they all thought that Ruan Qing was just a woman and wouldn’t have the ability to cause much of an impact.

They thought that an official satellite TV station like Nancheng TV wouldn’t take her seriously at all.

They thought that, at most, Ruan Qing wanted to work for Nancheng TV as a managerial executive; but they could have never imagined that she would reach a cooperation with Nancheng TV!

“Eating Well for All Three Meals” was still less popular online than “Two Under One Roof”.

Even though they had planned and staged all sorts of scenes such as displays of affection between Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er, arguments, squabbles between guests, and so on, the number of viewers can never exceed ten million.

The popularity of the last livestream-based variety show, “Heartbeat”, plummeted drastically and the die-hard fans of the celebrities featured in the show were the only ones who watched it. The investors and sponsors all wished they could withdraw all the money that they had invested in the show, let alone increase their investment amount. Now, they are relying entirely on Muyao TV’s funds to survive.

They had recently been intending to beat “Two Under One Roof” by taking advantage of the fact that “Two Under One Roof” was broadcast solely online, while the premiere of “Eating Well for All Three Meals” would be aired both on TV and online. They were all ready to boost the popularity of “Eating Well for All Three Meals” and snatch away the viewers of “Two Under One Roof”.

Yet, they were now told that “Two Under One Roof” was going to be aired on the national TV channel too!

Moreover, it was Nancheng TV, which was a notch higher than Muyao TV!

The station manager lost his temper. “Garbage! You’re a bunch of good-for-nothings who can’t even defeat a woman!”

There was nothing but silence in the video conference as no one dared to mention that the TV station manager himself was the one who had driven Ruan Qing away…

…

…

Muyao TV had a taste of their own medicine, and Zhuo Yi’s fans were slammed by the “Shisui Sisters”!

—— [The youngest “Grand Slam” Best Actor award winner, Shi Sui, is still the record holder for the highest ratings generated in the history of television. Shi Sui is the best actor ever, and he’s so good at generating sales.]

—— [Putting on airs? Do you really think there are no records on the Internet? Who was the one who threw real blows when acting out a fighting scene and hit Shi Sui so hard that his ribs were fractured?]

—— [Zhuo Yi rose to fame with a persona of a dreamboat bachelor and what he was back then is equivalent to an idol now. Yet, he secretly got married and deceived his fans. After his marriage was revealed, he used it for clout to gain more attention and popularity. How can he have the cheek to criticize Shi Sui!?!]

…

The Shisui Sisters were indeed very aggressive. Previously, they were just helping “Two Under One Roof” keep the comments under control and ward off the haters; but now, they are working together to rebuke Zhuo Yi’s fans harshly!

It was extremely lively on the Internet tonight as the netizens from all walks of life stayed up all night to enjoy the gossip.

‘What? It turns out that Zhuo Yi had deliberately fractured Shi Sui’s rib when filming a scene?’

‘What? It turns out that Shi Sui still managed to nail the long scene in one take despite having had his ribs fractured? He actually has impeccable, godlike acting chops?’

‘What? Shi Sui actually abstains from physical contact with all women except the female celebrity, Xiang Yi?!’

The fans who shipped the Untimely Couple felt sorry for what happened to Shi Sui back then, but they didn’t let it get in the way of their support for the couple…

…

On the following day.

Bright early in the morning, the team of “Two Under One Roof” released an official announcement of the guest stars who would be arriving today…

chapters.title: Chapter 350 - Zhong Yi’S Smile Is Charming
chapters.body:
Chapter 350 - Zhong Yi’S Smile Is Charming

[@TwoUnderOneRoof: Please accept today’s surprise! We’re honored to have invited the Best Actress @ZhongYi to join our livestream today. We also have two secret guests, you may look forward to them~]

Everyone was shocked that they had invited Zhong Yi!

Zhong Yi had excellent acting skills and was absolutely gorgeous. However, during the early years after her debut, she had the persona and image of a seductress, which people often use against her nowadays.

The production that propelled her to fame was the movie “Untainted”, in which Shi Sui was her co-star. Shi Sui played a detective, who was the protagonist of the movie, while Zhong Yi played a dance hostess, who was neither good nor evil. She was the love interest of Shi Sui’s character.

The director formed a lot of artistic metaphors through their relationship, and both Shi Sui’s and Zhong Yi’s superb acting skills were showcased in the scenes that they acted out together. Since then, they were both put on a pedestal, and the film was regarded as a classic in the film industry.

Both of them were about the same age, with Zhong Yi being thirty years old this year. After the film premiered, many people were shocked by the acting skills they displayed in the film, and they even mistook the two of them for a real couple. There was a relatively high number of fans who shipped the two of them.

The reason was none other than Shi Sui’s lack of interaction with actresses.

Zhong Yi’s fans immediately expressed their opinions.

—— [Her Highness, the lawful wife, has arrived!]

—— [Shipping #ShiZhong is a guaranteed profit!]

—— [During an interview back then, Shi Sui said that girls like Zhong Yi are her type.]

—— [Hahaha, there’s a good show to watch now. Zhong Yi is beautiful and invincible. Vase Fairy is indifferent and shriveled~]

…

Seeing that Zhong Yi’s fans were mocking Xiang Yi, Xiang Yi’s fans were displeased.

‘Is Xiang Yi someone you can bully just because you want to?!’

Hence, Zhong Yi’s fans were taught a lesson bright early in the morning.

They were dumbfounded. ‘Is this Xiang Yi that famous? Why does she have so many fans?’

…

The livestream started at nine in the morning.

The loyal fans of “Two Under One Roof” surged into the livestream immediately.

There was a long-distance shot and the green mountains could be seen vaguely. The colorful windmills of Little Rabbit Farm rotated rapidly in the wind. The vegetable field was fertile, the garden was lush, and the chickens and ducks were moving about in flocks.

Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji were fighting in the courtyard.

To be more precise, Xiao Naofu was bullying Little Xiji.

Xiao Naofu refused to drink its goat’s milk and insisted instead on vying with Little Xiji for the milk in its bowl.

The little Shiba Inu’s black eyes were full of tears. It was punched a few times by Xiao Naofu’s fleshy paws, but it didn’t retaliate at all. Instead, it even took the initiative to let Xiao Naofu have the goat’s milk.

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Hooligan Xiao Naofu! Spay and Neuter Warning!]

—— [Wow, this Shiba Inu is so cute! It’s such an adorable puppy!]

—— [Have I been watching too many couples lately? Why does Little Xiji seem to pamper Xiao Naofu?]

—— [Hahaha, you don’t need to feel that way. Yesterday, I saw their profile information that the staff uploaded. They may be of different species, but they’re of the same gender. Nothing will come out of their interaction!]

…

After the heartwarming scene was filmed, the camera turned to the entrance of the manor.

The black iron gate was covered in vines and roses. Zhong Yi, who was dressed in a red V-neck dress and had a domineering vibe, alighted from the car. She strutted over in black heels that seemed to have elongated her fair and straight legs. Although she had a curvaceous figure, she didn’t look fat at all. She ruffled her wavy hair and her instincts as an actress allowed her to find the camera accurately. She smiled sweetly.

The pop-up comments on the livestream:

—— [Ahhhh, kill me, Sister!]

`—— [Zhong Yi’s smile is so charming, she makes everyone else pale in comparison!]

—— [Zhong Yi is such a queen! I finally understand the charm of a 30-year-old woman. Vase Fairy really can’t compare to her at all!!]

In the next second, Zhong Yi turned around.

She reached into the car and carried a chubby little girl, who was dressed in a tulle dress and had her hair tied into a bun. She was also holding onto a rainbow-colored lollipop tightly in her hand.

chapters.title: Chapter 351 - Daddy, Carry Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 351 - Daddy, Carry Me

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘What? Where did this kid come from?!’

Someone asked:

[It’s not… Zhong Yi’s baby, is it?]

As soon as this pop-up comment appeared on the screen, Zhong Yi’s fans retorted aggressively.

—— [Please don’t create rumors!]

—— [You can eat anything you want, but you can’t speak freely without caution. *smiley*]

—— [How would you know? Are you the midwife? If not, shut up, okay?]

…

The program team was dumbfounded too.

However, Ruan Qing merely made a few hand gestures at Li Jianyu, who then coughed and picked up the microphone to say to Zhong Yi, “Zhong Yi, welcome to Two Under One Roof, I hope you have an enjoyable day~”

He didn’t mention anything about the child because he didn’t want to put Zhong Yi in an awkward spot.

Zhong Yi nodded and said, “Hello, everyone, it’s been hard on you guys.” Looking at the little girl in her arms, she said with a tender gaze in her eyes, “This is my daughter, Jiangjiang.”

The program team was shocked speechless!

The netizens were dumbfounded!

The corner of Li Jianyu’s mouth twitched and he thought, ‘I’m in luck lately, huh? Our variety show is going to make it to the hot search list today…’

The Muyao TV executives next door, who were secretly watching the livestream of “Two Under One Roof” again, almost vomited blood when they heard that!

It was a juicy piece of information that was bound to be a hot topic again!

Why did “Two Under One Roof” get lucky again?! They thought.

They had spent hundreds of millions of yuan to hire Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er for the show. In addition, the cost of hiring the other guest stars for each episode ranged from several millions to ten million yuan too.

As far as they knew, the program team of “Two Under One Roof” wasn’t paying their guest stars much, mainly because they had been inviting veteran actors to the show, all of whom would charge a friendly rate that was cheaper than usual, with the maximum being a few hundred thousand yuan.

Xiang Yi and her families were starring in the show for free and her third brother, Xiang Qi, had even forked out lots of money from his own pocket…

There were also other guests whom they hired for free, such as the chairman of the Traditional Chinese Medicine Association, the male idol group SEASEVEN, and Logic’s e-sports team which was about to join the show very soon…

They had reaped big returns with a small capital

That was enough to make others green with envy.

Yet, the variety show was full of newsworthy and juicy topics!

For example, the folk music bigwigs’ comments on Weibo when Xiang Yi played the zither, the Chinese Music Association, the cruelty revealed by the incident at Mingxi Boys’ High School, and the subsequent societal reflection on education…

Not to mention, the boost in popularity that the show got when Xiang Yi’s brothers revealed their true identities!

Now, Zhong Yi even revealed herself to be a mother of one!

The station manager of Muyao TV was livid. If he had kept Li Jianyu around back then, wouldn’t all these achievements, clout, and popularity brought about by “Two Under One Roof” bring him glory?!

…

Jiangjiang had soft and cute features, with round, puerile eyes. She seemed to be scared of strangers as she kept her arms wrapped tightly around Zhong Yi’s neck.

When Zhong Yi told her to greet everyone else, she refused outright.

However, when Zhong Yi carried her to the courtyard and saw Shi Sui who went out to welcome the guests, Jiangjiang blinked.

Shi Sui greeted gently and politely, “Good morning, Senior Zhong.”

Although Zhong Yi was just three years older than him, it had been more than ten years since her debut in the industry and thus deserved to be called his senior.

“It’s been a while since we last met and you’ve gained so much weight. Seems like you’ve been well-fed lately,” Zhong Yi teased.

Shi Sui smiled and asked, “Is it that obvious?”

As soon as he said that, the little girl in Zhong Yi’s arms suddenly reached her hands out to Shi Sui. “Daddy~”

In an instant, Li Jianyu’s vision turned black and he almost passed out.

‘Daddy? Shi Sui has a daughter!?!’

‘Oh dear, not only are we going to make it to the hot search list today, Weibo might crash too!’

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows and asked, “Are you… Jiangjiang?”

“Yes, yes! Daddy, carry me~” The little girl reached her fair, chubby and stumpy arms towards Shi Sui.

…

When Li Jianyu saw Xiang Yi, who had appeared behind Shi Sui, his vision became darker,

“Ruan, if I pass out later, can you press the acupoint on my philtrum?”

Ruan Qing squinted. “Ruan?”

Li Jianyu was about to break down. ‘Now’s not the time to dwell on the way I address you!’

chapters.title: Chapter 352 - Shi Sui’S Daughter?
chapters.body:
Chapter 352 - Shi Sui’S Daughter?

“Sister Ruan, I’ll call you Sister Ruan, okay?!”

Ruan Qing pondered quietly for a few seconds before saying, “Wait a while before you faint, observe the situation.”

“…”

“If you faint now, work will be affected.”

“…”

‘Sister Ruan, you’re the definition of a capitalist.’

…

When Xiang Yi heard the little girl calling Shi Sui ‘Daddy’ softly, she was clearly stunned.

‘Shi Sui’s daughter?’

‘How is this possible?!!!’

Even though her rationality told her that the probability of it was almost nonexistent, she somehow felt suffocated.

She was even a little vexed.

Shi Sui didn’t like children so he didn’t carry Jiangjiang and instead, just rubbed her little head gently while saying, “Jiangjiang, I’m not your father.”

However, Jiangjiang was insistent. She exclaimed in a babyish voice, “You… You’re Daddy!”

There was an uproar in the comments section of the live stream.

—— [Oh my goodness! Jiangjiang is the daughter of Shi Sui and Zhong Yi!?]

—— [No wonder Zhong Yi went on a long hiatus and stayed out of the limelight for such a long period of time a few years ago. She had probably gone to give birth to Shi Sui’s baby.]

—— [Shi Sui is so mean. The kid’s already calling him Daddy and he still refuses to acknowledge her? Does your on-screen persona matter more than your own flesh and blood?!]

…

Lots of advertising accounts flocked over and those who were quick at typing had already rolled out full writeups and news articles with attention-grabbing titles!

—— [Shocking! Shi Sui’s daughter is exposed, she’s actually…]

—— [The #ShiZhong ship has sailed and come to fruition! I believe in love again!]

—— [The lawful wife, Her Highness Zhong Yi, has risen to glory with her child! She has defeated the shameless homewrecker!]

There were some who were enjoying the gossip, chasing clout, and spreading rumors… All of a sudden, the gossip spread as quickly as possible and the number of viewers of the livestream for “Two Under One Roof” had surged rapidly. Within just a few minutes after it had begun, the number rose to a few million!

…

In the midst of all the attention, Zhong Yi merely said calmly, “Jiangjiang, you got the wrong person.”

“Mommy…” Jiangjiang blinked her large, grape-like eyes and began bursting into tears. “Mommy, you’re lying!”

However, Zhong Yi changed the subject smoothly, “Jiangjiang, there’s a kitten there. Don’t you like kitties the most?”

Jiangjiang was only three years old, the age where children have the shortest attention span. When she saw Xiao Naofu, her eyes lit up immediately and she started dangling her legs. “Mommy, put me down!”

Zhong Yi put her on the ground, after which she scurried toward Xiao Naofu in a puerile, naive and carefree manner.

Zhong Yi tried to make light of the matter, but the netizens weren’t buying it.

—— [Zhong Yi must be hiding something!]

—— [That’s it? What a weak denial!]

—— [Umm, I was only 30% convinced just now but based on Zhong Yi’s current attitude, I’m 70% convinced that there’s something going on between her and Shi Sui!]

…

“Miss Xiang.” Zhong Yi had just watched some video clips of “Two Under One Roof” before coming over so she could recognize Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi stepped forward and greeted her politely.

Zhong Yi asked, “Are there any tasks scheduled for us?”

Li Jianyu answered on her behalf, “Today’s task is to change the flower pots and fertilize the plants, and also to put up a fence for the vegetable patch.”

Zhong Yi nodded to indicate her understanding. She asked Xiang Yi, “Where’s the room? I’d like to get changed into some lightweight clothing.”

“Senior, this way please.” Xiang Yi took her to change her clothes.

The two were polite and slightly distant from each other, which was actually quite normal. After all, they didn’t know each other personally prior to this.

However, the netizens had countless ways of interpreting their interaction.

—— [Zhong Yi really looks like the empress, while Vase Fairy seems like a palace maid in comparison!]

—— [Tsk, tsk, I think a battle is about to begin. Zhong Yi’s figure is superb, she can easily defeat Xiang Yi!]

—— [Zhong Yi has worked with Shi Sui five years ago! A certain actress is considered the third wheel who came in between them…]

chapters.title: Chapter 353 - Backfire
chapters.body:
Chapter 353 - Backfire

…

The netizens were enjoying the gossip. The relationships between celebrities were bound to spark joy all the time.

All of a sudden, various speculations appeared.

Some speculated that Shi Sui and Zhong Yi had a one-night-stand, but Shi Sui abandoned Zhong Yi and their daughter after he had become famous.There were also speculations that Shi Sui and Zhong Yi had already gotten married a long time ago but had kept their marriage a secret, like Jiang Yun’er and Zhuo Yi. They even claimed that Shi Sui and Zhong Yi would probably announce their relationship tomorrow.

On the other hand, Xiang Yi began to be labeled as the “homewrecker” and drew flak.

While everyone was chattering and discussing, Zhong Yi came out after changing.

She was now wearing a black tank top, tight sweatpants, and an oversized jacket. Her gender-neutral sports attire downplayed the sexiness of her figure, making her look clean and suave.

Zhong Yi’s fans began praising her, not forgetting to criticize Xiang Yi too.

—— [Sister Zhong Yi looks so good in sportswear!]

—— [Queen Zhong Yi looks good in anything she wears, she can be sweet-looking and valiant too! She’s the Best Actress who can be suave and sultry!]

—— [Sister Zhong Yi’s figure is really the best among all actresses. Vase Fairy, who’s nothing but a pretty face, can stand back.]

…

In the next second, Xiang Yi also stood in front of the camera.

She did not change her clothes and instead just removed her cutesy apron to reveal her blue short-sleeved shirt, which was decorated with a few small daisies that was embellished on the chest, paired with a high-waisted wide-legged pants that made her legs look long and her waist even more slender than they already were.

It was a simple, casual and laid-back outfit.

However, everyone else couldn’t take their eyes off her.

The comments in the livestream seemed to have come to a halt. After a few seconds, the comments began moving past the screen too.

—— [I have a similar short-sleeved shirt. It turns out that the daisy on the fabric of the chest area can look like it’s blooming!]

—— [Seriously, I never thought Xiang Yi was good-looking, but after comparing her to Zhong Yi, I realized that she’s really pretty!!]

—— [I’m laughing my butt off. Is this your first time surfing the Internet? Do you really think anyone can be called Vase Fairy? She can qualify to be called a “vase” precisely because she’s pretty!!]

…

Xiang Yi and Zhong Yi happened to be in the same frame.

The comparison really made Zhong Yi’s flaws stand out.

Zhong Yi’s fans realized that Xiang Yi seemed to have a better complexion, a slimmer waist, and was much more…well-endowed than Zhong Yi!

‘What did you eat growing up?!’

…

Changing plant pots was a rather simple task. Xiang Yi demonstrated it once. It was actually just the process of taking the plants out of the pots together with the soil and then moving it into another pot before adding more nutrient-rich soil and slow-release fertilizer.

“You can add some insecticide to the soil to keep pests away… For the slow-release fertilizer, you can also scatter some on the soil…” Xiang Yi explained each step patiently.

Some netizens noticed that the few pots of plans that she had handed to Zhong Yi were smaller and lighter, while the ones she replaced were much larger.

Someone praised: [Xiang Yi is so gentle! I love her, I love her!]

Someone rebuked: [She’s just pretending in front of the camera, isn’t she? She’s just trying to prove that she’s doing more work than Zhong Yi. What a scheming woman!]

…

When Xiang Yi stood up to pick up a pot of flowers from the rack, her short-sleeved shirt flipped upward by a small section as she moved, revealing her lithe and slender waist, as well as her porcelain skin that was glistening under the sun…

In an instant, the comments of the livestream changed again.

—— [Xiang Yi’s back is not a back, it’s a Bulgarian rose!]

—— [Xiang Yi’s waist is not a waist, but a lethal scimitar!]

—— [Ahhhh, quickly flood the screen with your comments and cover our kid Xiang Yi! Mommy won’t allow others to see Xiang Yi’s waist!!]

…

None of Zhong Yi’s fans had the cheek to diss Xiang Yi by saying that her looks and figure were inferior to Zhong Yi’s.

After all, the feeling of getting put to shame was too terrible…

chapters.title: Chapter 354 - Supporting Obedient Bunny (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 354 - Supporting Obedient Bunny (1)

Zhong Yi looked up and inadvertently caught sight of that. Just as she was thinking of how to politely remind Xiang Yi, a tall figure suddenly appeared behind Xiang Yi seemingly unintentionally, just in time to block the camera.

Xiang Yi turned around while still carrying the flower pot in her arms, only to see that Shi Sui was behind her. She blinked in confusion.

Her shirt slipped back to its original position when she turned around again.

Shi Sui took the flower pot in her hand and their fingers touched inadvertently. Shi Sui did not show discomfort and casually asked, “How much ceramsite should we add?”

“Just a thin layer to cover the bottom of the pot,”

Shi Sui nodded slightly and went to the side to put the ceramsite in the flower pot.

Their interaction was harmonious and natural. A trace of puzzlement appeared in Zhong Yi’s eyes.

As a person who had been Shi Sui’s co-actor, she knew how much he disliked physical contact with women.

They had once gone through dozens of failed attempts to film a scene together. In the end, the director gave up and replaced the physical contact between their characters in the scene with eye contact.

At that time, Zhong Yi was curious as to how a man like him would behave when he’s in love with someone.

However, now, she realized that Shi Sui seemed…to be completely comfortable with having physical contact with Xiang Yi.

“Mommy!” Jiangjiang exclaimed, making Zhong Yi snap out of her trance. She turned to the side to see that Jiangjiang was carrying Xiao Naofu in her arms and grinning brightly.

Xiao Naofu was in despair. ‘Why are human children so annoying?’

However, it didn’t dare to struggle because it had heard how weak and fragile children can be and was afraid of hurting Jiangjiang with its claws. Thus, Xiao Naofu had no choice but to let Jiangjiang bully it.

Jiangjiang exclaimed, “Mommy, this cat can bark like a dog!”

Xiao Naofu protested with a meow!

—— “I’m a tiger, not a cat! I can’t bark like a dog either! That…that was clearly a tiger’s roar!”

“Kitty, can you bark?” Jiangjiang’s large eyes were full of expectation.

Xiao Naofu coldly turned its face away and ignored her.

Zhong Yi said helplessly, “Jiangjiang, don’t bully the kitten.”

“Okay…” Jiangjiang pursed her lips and put Xiao Naofu on the ground.

Xiao Naofu dashed toward Xiang Yi like it had been spared from death.

However, it was grabbed by the back of its neck halfway through.

“…”

“Xiang Yi is busy, you can’t disturb her.” Shi Sui said with a smile, “Do you want me to play with you? How about a kiss?”

Xiao Naofu was enraged. Woof! Woof!

—— “Dream on! Delusional man!!!”

Jiangjiang’s eyes were round and full of admiration. She said, “Wow, Daddy is awesome! He actually made the kitten learn to bark like a dog!!”

Zhong Yi seemed to have thought of something as she was stunned speechless.

The netizens watching the livestream saw that scene…

—— [There’s so much love! He looks just like a father coaxing his daughter!]

—— [The look in Zhong Yi’s eyes is so melancholic. It must have been tough being a single mother all these years.]

—— [Shi Sui is a jerk! If you have the guts, make your relationship public! If you don’t care, why are you playing with Jiangjiang? Are you trying to let her have a taste of paternal love before depriving her of it? Are you even human!?!]

…

The netizens were full of righteous indignation and imagined Shi Sui as a scumbag.

Some fans of the Untimely Couple suggested that Shi Sui might be cajoling Xiang Yi, but they immediately faced the wrath of other netizens!

In their eyes, Shi Sui, Zhong Yi and Jiangjiang were a family of three.

Xiang Yi’s presence was redundant.

They thought that ganging up together to criticize the “homewrecker” was the right thing to do! Doing the opposite would be wrong and unethical! They shouldn’t be openly supporting the “homewrecker”!

chapters.title: Chapter 355 - Supporting Obedient Bunny (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 355 - Supporting Obedient Bunny (2)

Most of the time, a certain school of thought would seem to be right as long as it was supported by the majority.

As long as one takes the moral high ground, they can judge others to their heart’s content.

What is the truth? Does it matter?

People tend to think that their beliefs are the truth.

Just when the netizens thought that they had done justice…

Shi Sui rubbed Xiao Naofu’s head and placed it in an empty flower pot next to Xiang Yi. He said in a warm voice, “Don’t run around lest you get pricked.”

Xiao Naofu humphed!

‘I’m not scared!’

It waved a paw to show its prowess, but it just so happened to touch a pot of cactus beside it…

Meow meow meow meow!! Xiao Naofu shrieked in misery.

Xiang Yi, who was at the side, wiped her hands frantically and carried Xiao Naofu back to the living room.

Shi Sui half squatted in front of Jiangjiang and said seriously, “Jiangjiang, you have to call me Uncle.”

Jiangjiang said aggrievedly, “But you are Daddy…”

“I’m not.” Shi Sui’s voice was gentle, but his attitude was firm. “Jiangjiang, will you call another woman Mommy?”

Jiangjiang sounded like she was on the verge of tears. “No…”

“Why? Because I’m sure you know that calling someone else mommy would make your Mommy sad, right, Jiangjiang? So if you call me Daddy, your real father would be sad too.”

Shi Sui tried his best to reason with Jiangjiang by explaining it using logic that children would understand, but Jiangjiang burst into tears.

“Sorry, Senior Zhong, I hope you can talk to Jiangjiang properly. I don’t want this misunderstanding to continue. Can you do that?” Shi Sui looked at Zhong Yi.

The corners of Zhong Yi’s mouth curled up into a bitter smile. ‘Indeed… he hasn’t changed a single bit…’

Shi Sui was a paradox.

Gentle, yet cruel.

He was really gentlemanly most of the time and was courteous to everyone.

However, in some aspects, he would refuse to give in or compromise.

She initially had some selfish reasons… but now, it seems that Shi Sui will not tolerate it at all.

Zhong Yi closed her eyes and said ruthlessly, “Jiangjiang, this is Uncle Shi Sui, he is not your father. Your father has gone somewhere far, far away.”

Jiangjiang sobbed. “Well… then will I get to see Daddy again in the future?”

“We will never see him again,” Zhong Yi said, her voice trembling a little.

Jiangjiang cried even harder.

Zhong Yi gently coaxed her.

Shi Sui’s gaze remained indifferent, as if there was nothing but cold blood under his handsome and peerless appearance.

…

Countless netizens watching the livestream felt uncomfortable after seeing Jiangjiang cry.

—— [This scumbag must die!]

—— [Hey, no matter what happened between you two, the kid is innocent. What wrong has she done to deserve this?]

—— [Jiangjiang is so pitiful. Zhong Yi is obviously putting up a strong front on purpose!]

—— [I retched. I thought ShiZhong was real, but I didn’t think Shi Sui would be so selfish! Not only is he refusing to publicly announce their relationship, he’s still forcing Jiangjiang not to call him Daddy and making Zhong Yi lie to her!]

The overwhelming comments could probably drown Shi Sui if turned into spit.

…

…

The living room of the villa.

Xiang Yi applied some aloe vera gel on Xiao Naofu’s paw and bandaged it simply.

Li Jianyu and Ruan Qing came in time and instructed the cameraman to go shoot Little Xiji going about its daily life. They then asked Xiang Yi to switch off the microphone that was attached to her clothing.

“Xiang Yi! Jiangjiang is not Shi Sui’s daughter!” Li Jianyu explained anxiously.

Xiang Yi said calmly, “Yeah, I know.”

Li Jianyu sighed with relief and said heartlessly, “Xiang Yi, you’re so smart!”

Ruan Qing was speechless.

‘What an insensitive guy. No one can be more insensitive than him. Xiang Yi is obviously jealous!’

chapters.title: Chapter 356 - Supporting Obedient Bunny (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 356 - Supporting Obedient Bunny (3)

Li Jianyu was still boasting. “Hey, Xiang Yi, don’t worry, there’s nothing between Shi Sui and Zhong Yi.”

Xiang Yi said, “Oh, is that so?”

Li Jianyu explained, “They’ve only been co-stars for one movie and garnered a ton of fans who shipped the two of them together because their scenes were too interesting.”

Xiang Yi said, “Oh, I see.”

“But most of these rumors about on-screen couples actually dating are fake. They’re either a publicity stunt or just the imagination of the fans…”

Ruan Qing suddenly covered his mouth and asked with a smile, “How is Xiao Naofu?”

“It’s fine, it just got pricked.” Xiang Yi placed Xiao Naofu back inside its little house, but Xiao Naofu refused to sleep there and insisted on occupying Little Xiji’s kennel. It sprawled itself in the kennel and moved its butt.

“Maybe you can chat with Shi Sui,” Ruan Qing suggested.

Xiang Yi said calmly, “You misunderstood, there’s nothing for us to talk about.”

“We’ve only worked together in a variety show.”

“Nine out of ten couples of the entertainment industry that people ship aren’t real.”

“The two of us are no exception.”

Ruan Qing coughed and tried to remind her that Shi Sui was right behind her…

However, Xiang Yi was still calmly narrating.

“We’re not really a couple.”

“Whether he has a daughter or not, it doesn’t matter to me.”

“I also…” She paused, seemingly not convincing Ruan Qing but hypnotizing herself. “I’m just his fan.”

Shi Sui was standing at the door, his slender and toned body against the light. His handsome face was concealed by the darkness and his emotions could not be seen.

Li Jianyu held his breath and did not dare to exhale.

‘What devilry is this!?!’

Ruan Qing hesitated for a few seconds and tested the waters “So you… don’t like Shi Sui at all?”

Li Jianyu looked at her with a vivid expression, as if to say: “Sister Ruan, are you out of your mind?”

In the next second, Xiang Yi said spitefully, “I don’t.”

The figure at the door stiffened for a few seconds before leaving.

Bang…

Li Jianyu’s heart was about to shatter.

Was he going to see the end of the #UntimelyCouple before he even got to see them begin officially?!

But…

Ruan Qing asked again, “You really don’t like him?” She laughed and said, “Well then, if Zhong Yi and Shi Sui share a child, they’ll be a family of three. That seems not too bad, huh?”

Li Jianyu looked at Ruan Qing in disbelief.

‘Sister Ruan, why are you fanning the flames and adding fuel to the fire!?!’

‘Unexpectedly, something surprising happened…’

There was nothing but silence in the room. Xiang Yi didn’t answer the question and merely teased the air with the stick.

Li Jianyu was bewildered. ‘Xiang Yi, is there something wrong with you? Xiao Naofu is clearly in the kennel, who are you teasing?’

The corners of Ruan Qing’s mouth curled up.

Sometimes, actions speak louder than words.

She walked up and patted Xiang Yi’s shoulder. “I forgot to tell you something, the two mysterious guests today are related to you.”

After a brief moment of silence, Xiang Yi assented.

Before he finished, a kind and warm voice came from the doorway. “My obedient bunny, Grandma is here to see you!”

Xiang Yi’s dull eyes instantly lit up. “Grandma!””

Old Mrs. Xiang entered the doorway and exclaimed to the person behind her, “Old man, we’re already here, why are you still standing at the door?”

Xiang Yin said obstinately, “What do you know? I’m enjoying the scenery!”

Old Mrs. Xiang covered her mouth and snickered.

She whispered to Xiang Yi, “Just ignore him. He got up early in the morning and tried on more than ten outfits because he’s joining your show today! I’ve never seen such a vain old man!”

…

chapters.title: Chapter 357 - Supporting Obedient Bunny (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 357 - Supporting Obedient Bunny (4)

As Xiang Yi imagined her grandfather trying on several sets of clothes, she was both touched and sad.

She cocked her head to the side to hide the emotions in her eyes.

Old Mrs. Xiang noticed the difference in her emotions and raised her hand to touch her head gently with love and benevolence.

“Are you upset about something? Tell Grandma.”

“It’s nothing.”

Old Mrs. Xiang coaxed, “You can fool others, but you can’t fool me. Feel free to tell me if you have any grievances. Grandpa and I are here for you!”

Although Xiang Yin was pacing back and forth outside the door, he kept peeking into the living room from time to time.

Seeing this, he immediately entered and asked sternly, “Which ignorant fool has bullied you?”

Xiang Yi sniffled and said, “It’s really nothing…”

She wasn’t afraid of being aggrieved.

She was afraid of facing the concern of her family members after being aggrieved.

Old Mrs. Xiang chided in displeasure, “What are you yelling about? Are you trying to show off your loud voice? Don’t scare Xiang Yi.”

Xiang Yin was speechless. He gritted his teeth and said in a lower tone of voice, “Have you forgotten what I taught you when you were younger? When something happens, you must inform your family first!”

The concept that the Xiang family instilled in their children since they were children was that family will forever be their strongest pillar of support.

Hence, the children of the Xiang family were known for their unity and the elders were known to be extremely protective of their children…

Xiang Yin once fought with the parents of the young brat who lifted Xiang’s skirt in kindergarten…

At that time, he said, “If you don’t teach your kid how to behave today, I’ll teach you how to act like a f***ing human!” It was then regarded as a golden classic…

“I haven’t forgotten.” Xiang Yi grinned, not wanting her grandparents to be worried about her. “Grandpa, Grandma, have a seat. I’ll go pick some fruits for you guys.”

Xiang Yi left with a bamboo basket in hand.

Li Jianyu was used to being heartless and went back to work. On the other hand, Ruan Qing stayed in the living room for a while longer and briefly told them about what just happened.

She didn’t speak with any subjective emotions and merely said that Jiangjiang had mistakenly thought that Shi Sui was her father before leaving too.

Xiang Yin frowned and barked, “That little punk, I don’t think he’s even worthy of my granddaughter at all!”

Old Mrs. Xiang took a sip of tea and said unhurriedly, “Well, but your granddaughter likes him.”

“What are you saying? Impossible! That’s absolutely impossible!”

Old Mrs. Xiang rolled her eyes and said, “Do you think this matter would have affected her mood if she doesn’t like him?”

Xiang Yin fell silent.

Having raised her since she was a child, they knew her character best.

She was a quiet and patient girl who could spend an entire day studying boring medical books without the slightest boredom. She could also practice playing a music instrument for a long time and wouldn’t shed a tear even if her fingers started bleeding. As long as she had set her mind to something, she would do it without distractions and it seemed that nothing could affect her at all.

But now…

Shi Sui had become someone who could affect her mood.

The thought of it made Xiang Yin perturbed.

Old Mrs. Xiang was much more meticulous and had thought about something else. She adjusted her collar and said, “I’ll go appear in the live stream now.”

“Is the live stream your current priority?Your priority should be Xiang Yi’s obsession! Don’t let a jerk take her away!”

Old Mrs. Xiang looked at him sympathetically. “Has it never crossed your mind that it’s Xiang Yi who wants to take him away?”

Xiang Yin was shocked!

…

The elderly couple went to the glass nursery and Zhong Yi happened to be bringing Jiangjiang out at this time.

Jiangjiang walked towards Shi Sui and said, “Uncle, I’m sorry.” Her eyes were red from crying.

Shi Sui assented indifferently and picked up the flowering jug to water the plants that had just been moved to another pot.

He looked down when the corner of his coat was gently tugged.

Jiangjiang asked with an expectant gaze, “Uncle, can you be my Daddy?”

chapters.title: Chapter 358 - Lady
chapters.body:
Chapter 358 - Lady

The little girl was innocent and naive, and her eyes were all red. If it were someone else, they would have perhaps taken pity on her and gave in.
