However, Shi Sui remained indifferent and didn’t waver at all. In fact, he didn’t even stop watering the flowers.

“Sorry, Jiangjiang.”

Shi Sui did not say anything else but Jiangjiang had already understood what he meant. Her large, grape-like eyes were filled with tears and she let go of the corner of Shi Sui’s shirt, bit by bit…

The viewers of the live stream got into an argument again because of that scene.

—— [I’ve never seen such a heartless father!]

—— [Even if she’s not your daughter, there’s no harm in coaxing her. She’s still so young!]

…

Old Mrs. Xiang went up and gently cajoled her comfortingly, “Jiangjiang, do you want some candy?”

She fished out a piece of milk candy from her pocket.

Shi Sui was speechless too.

He suddenly understood why Xiang Yi’s family members liked offering sweets when coaxing others.

Jiangjiang hesitated but eventually couldn’t resist the temptation of the candy. She grabbed it and said in a tender voice, “Thank you, Grandma.”

“You’re welcome.” Old Mrs. Xiang was very personable and got along well with children. “Jiangjiang, can you tell me why you’re calling this uncle your daddy?”

Jiangjiang looked at Shi Sui, and then at Zhong Yi. After a long time, she drawled, “Because… Mommy showed me a photo of Daddy and he looks very much like Uncle.”

“But it doesn’t mean that they’re the same person just because they resemble each other, right?”

Jiangjiang nodded.

After placating the young girl effortlessly, Old Mrs. Xiang looked up to glance at Shi Sui.

“Shi Sui, I watched you grow up and I believe you are a responsible man. Is Jiangjiang your daughter or not?”

The netizens watching the live stream instantly perked up as they wondered if there would be a twist this time.

However, Shi Sui sighed helplessly and said, “Grandma, I haven’t even had a girlfriend before. How can I have a daughter?”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘Seriously? Shi Sui is still denying it?’

Not far away, Zhong Yi’s face turned pale. Sh e pursed her lips and tried to change the subject by asking, “Where’s Miss Xiang? I want to ask her how much of this insecticide to add…”

However, Old Mrs. Xiang suddenly asked, “Miss Zhong, forgive me for being nosy, and pardon me for taking the liberty to ask about this, but is Shi Sui the biological father of Jiangjiang?”

A woman’s intuition made Old Mrs. Xiang feel that there was something very wrong with Zhong Yi.

Her attitude was too ambiguous.

That would naturally lead to misunderstandings.

She kept avoiding the important questions even though it was clearly something that could have been clarified in one sentence. That inevitably left a lot to imagination.

Old Mrs. Xiang seemed elegant and gentle but her aura was very domineering and she seemed to be able to see through the hearts of others with her eyes. It was so daunting that Zhong Yi’s heart almost jumped out of her chest.

She squeezed her palm and said in a hoarse vioce, “Is it really that important whether he is or not?”

Jiangjiang misunderstood and suddenly glared at her with gleaming eyes. “Mommy, are you lying to me? Is Uncle Daddy or not!?!”

This time, Xiang Yin hollered loudly with gusto before Old Mrs. Xiang said anything.

“Woman, parents are the role models of their children, please teach your little brat well by leading by example!”

Zhong Yi suddenly snapped out of her feelings of misery.

“…”

The netizens who were enjoying the drama going on in the live stream: ???

‘Did we hear him right? Did Xiang Yi’s grandfather call Zhong Yi… Woman?’

Someone scolded with a burning passion:

—— [Hah, you called her ‘Woman’ just like that? Do you respect women at all!?!]

—— [That old lady is so unreasonable while the old man is so overbearing. This family is so ill-mannered!]

—— [Thugs and villains have become old. How can they brazenly hurt others for the sake of their own granddaughter?]

chapters.title: Chapter 359 - You’Re Heartless
chapters.body:
Chapter 359 - You’Re Heartless

There were many people who sympathized with Zhong Yi and Jiangjiang, and felt sorry for their plight.

They desperately need an outlet to vent their anger.

First, it was Shi Sui, and now it was Xiang Yi’s grandparents.

Zhong Yi, who was usually addressed as ‘Sister’ took a long while to accept the address ‘Woman’.

Zhong Yi felt bitter but she obviously knew that Xiang Yin and Old Mrs. Xiang were supporting Xiang Yi.

She really… envied Xiang Yi for being so pampered.

“Jiangjiang, I’m sorry, I lied to you, Uncle Shi Sui is not your father.” Zhong Yi finally confessed.

Jiangjiang’s eyes were full of disappointment.

“Who is… Daddy then?” She asked with her eyes wide open.

“Your Daddy… is not in this world anymore.” It took Zhong Yi a great deal of effort to tell her the truth. She continued, “He has turned into a star in the sky and is watching over you, Jiangjiang.”

The three-year-old Jiangjiang seemed to have somewhat understood what she meant but she could feel her mother’s misery and burst into tears,whicg was really a heartbreaking sight.

The viewers watching the live stream all froze in front of the screen.

—— [Does Zhong Yi mean that Jiangjiang’s father has passed away…?]

Old Mrs. Xiang could not bear to see Jiangjiang crying and took the initiative to help coax Jiangjiang.

Zhong Yi pursed her lips and looked at Shi Sui. “Can I talk to you?”

Li Jianyu gestured with his hand and signaled for the cameraman to move elsewhere. However, Zhong Yi said, “It’s okay, you can continue shooting.”

It also meant that she agreed to let her conversation with Shi Sui be included in the live stream.

…

They walked towards the vegetable patch and they looked just like old friends taking a walk.

However, Shi Sui kept a proper social distance from her. His attitude was gentlemanly and distant.

Zhong Yi noticed everything and thought to herself with some self-deprecation in her eyes, ‘Indeed, he still loathes contact with women.’

“I’d like to apologize to you, Shi Sui, I’m sorry. Well because Jiangjiang’s father…passed before she was even born. He was a doctor and had an unfortunate accident while attending an international volunteer event abroad.”

Zhong Yi looked down with pain and agony on her beautiful face.

“But for my selfish reasons, I wanted to let Jiangjiang have something to imagine so when she asked about her father, I showed her the stills of you back in ‘Untainted’ and lied to her that you’re her father.”

When filming ‘Untainted’, Shi Sui lost a ton of weight for his role, so coupled with the makeup and photo filters, Shi Sui looked very different in the stills compared to in real life.

However, it was still the same person after all. Thus, when Jiangjiang saw him for the first time, she felt that he “resembled” her father.

The netizens who had been criticizing Shi Sui badly just now were dumbstruck.

‘What the hell?’

‘So Shi Sui wasn’t lying at all and Zhong Yi was just lying!?!?!’

“I’m sorry, I’m really sorry… I didn’t mean anything else, I just didn’t want Jiangjiang to feel that she’s a fatherless child…”

Zhong Yi lost control of her emotions and covered her face with her hands to cover her tears. “Actually, you don’t look anything like him, he’s not as handsome and tall as you but he’s very, very nice and wonderful…”

Towards the end, Zhong Yi had already been somewhat incoherent but he could tell that she was referring to Jiangjiang’s father.

Shi Sui’s eyes were dark and deep. He looked down with a cold and somewhat indifferent gaze.

“Senior, my condolences. I think you need to be alone for a while.”

His words made the fans of ShiZhong completely heartbroken!

—— [Shi Sui, you scumbag! You heartless jerk!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 360 - Waiting
chapters.body:
Chapter 360 - Waiting

—— [??? Can’t you comfort her? I’m not asking you to give her a hug, but you can give her some tissue paper, can’t you?]

—— [Doesn’t Shi Sui like to show off his high EQ? Why is he not doing so now? Is he going to leave her to cry here?!]

…

However, the Shisui Sisters were displeased when they saw Shi Sui being criticized.

At first, they had various concerns and were worried about the relationship between Shi Sui and Jiangjiang, but after the clarification, they no longer had any more worries.

—— [Onscreen couples are different from real-life couples *smile* *smile*]

—— [The two of them are just senior and junior, they can’t even be considered friends. What’s wrong with letting Zhong Yi be alone?]

—— [Those who called Shi Sui a scum, I hope you can all find a nice guy who likes coaxing other girls~ I’m taking Shi Sui away. A gentleman is not the same as a flirt.]

…

Although Zhong Yi had fans, Shi Sui had a larger number of fans who were very aggressive too. Within just a few minutes, peace and quietness was restored in the comments section of the livestream, which was previously full of tension.

The reason was none other than the fact that they could not outargue Shi Sui’s fans.

A highly popular and competent actor, who would generate high traffic, could easily trump the haters!

…

Shi Sui did not go back to the glass nursery and instead went near the vegetable field.

The fence had been put up, and there was one last thing to do—painting.

Holding a small brush, Shi Sui began painting the white paint on.

Not long after, he heard the familiar sound of footsteps and smiled.

His strategy of waiting had worked.

He raised his head, his narrow, peach-blossom-shaped eyes curled upward. When he smiled, he often seemed amorous, yet devoted.

Xiang Yi walked over slowly from the orchard with a basket of fruits.

She had to pass by the fence.

“Xiang Yi, you picked so much fruit?” Shi Sui asked.

Xiang Yi assented, clearly much colder than usual.

The netizens were appalled.

—— [No way, is Untimely Couple going to flop too?]

—— [I have a bold guess. Is Xiang Yi jealous?]

—— [Xiang Yi looks so hot when she’s sulking, just like her brothers when they act aloof!]

…

Xiang Yi wanted to leave with a straight face, but she subconsciously glanced at Shi Sui.

Since the wound he sustained from the scuffle with the stalker fan, “All is Well Year Round”, hadn’t completely healed, he could only paint with one hand. Although the painting was even and fast, it seemed tedious for him.

Xiang Yi immediately stopped in her tracks.

Shi Sui asked warmly, “Why don’t you go back? It’s too sunny here, you might get a sunburn.”

“…”

‘He’s really so worrying.’

Xiang Yi moved slowly and walked toward Shi Sui. “Let me do the painting, you go back in.”

Shi Sui said, “No, I can do it.”

Xiang Yi said, “No, you can’t.”

Shi Sui laughed. “How do you want me to reply to that?”

Before Xiang Yi answered, many silly netizens commented, “Shi Sui can’t do it”.

Xiang Yi snatched the brush from Shi Sui’s hand and shoved the fruit to him.

She exclaimed, “Go have your fruit, leave the rest to me!”

Shi Sui said, “Xiang Yi, I’m really not as useless as you think.”

“You’re so long-winded and noisy.” Xiang Yi sulked.

Shi Sui blinked and then walked toward the crew before returning with a floral umbrella.

Whoosh——

He opened the umbrella for Xiang Yi with his slender and well-defined fingers.

He said in a gentle and loving voice, “It’ll be boring if you do it alone. I’ll be quiet, don’t mind me, okay?”

chapters.title: Chapter 361 - She Likes Shi Sui
chapters.body:
Chapter 361 - She Likes Shi Sui

The umbrella was so small that it could not shield two people at all.

Shi Sui placed most of the umbrella over Xiang Yi’s head, letting the sunlight shine over his shoulders.

Xiang Yi said, “Suit yourself.”

She hung her head low and painted quickly and eagerly, as if she was hiding her emotional fluctuations.

Shi Sui really did not utter a single word and just silently held the umbrella for her.

There were numerous comments in the livestream:

—— [Yet another day of crying over the beautiful love that Shi Sui and Xiang Yi share!]

—— [Ahhh, it’s not that Shi Sui is cold and unfeeling, he’s just nice only to specific people!]

—— [Holding the umbrella for her is such a sweet gesture. I feel like I’m eating sugar! I’m desperately covering my mouth!]

—— [Fans who ship Shi Sui and Zhong Yi, don’t cry; you can join the club that ships the UntimelyCouple instead. I guarantee it’s sweet *dog head* *dog head*]

—— [Shi Sui really practices double standards.

To Zhong Yi: “I think you need some time alone.”

To Xiang Yi: “I’ll be quiet, don’t mind me, okay?]

…

The fans who shipped the Untimely Couple were exhilarated, while the staff running the marketing accounts were dismayed.

There goes their KPI!

The draft that they had just sent out had caught so much attention but now, they were wretched!

Shi Sui’s daughter exposed? That’s just a lie!

Without the gimmick of “Shi Sui’s daughter”, the words “Zhong Yi’s daughter” alone will not attract much attention nor generate high traffic!

For the sake of clicks, some people have taken an extreme and malicious approach, that is…

Taking a jab at Zhong Yi!

In an instant, discussion threads with titles like “Zhong Yi has a child out of wedlock”, “Zhong Yi is a bloodsucker”, “Zhong Yi and her daughter are chasing clout by using Shi Sui” and many more sprang up.

Many netizens felt that they had been cheated by Zhong Yi and, for a while, there were waves of scoldings directed at her.

—— [You had a child out of wedlock? That’s gross]

—— [Your daughter is only three, and you’re already so eager to bring her out here to make her earn money?]

—— [She might have planned and staged this herself. Well, bad publicity is still publicity. With high traffic, she’ll get to earn more money.]

—— [There were barely any news about Zhong Yi the past few years, and the films she starred in had all flopped. She might just be here to show her face before going back home to sell things on a livestream and act all coquettish. *barfs* *barfs*]

Zhong Yi did not expect that her selfish plan would lead to such a huge backlash.

…

Xiang Yi painted the fence as fast as she could.

The white fence and green vegetable patch looked rather fresh.

She picked a few green peppers and a few red peppers by hand and turned around to look at Shi Sui, who was still holding the umbrella. She said awkwardly, “Let’s go back.”

Shi Sui went to return the umbrella.

Xiang Yi was going to pick up the fruit basket on the ground, but Shi Sui beat her to it. “I can manage this,” he said.

Xiang Yi thought about it and decided to let him carry it since it wasn’t very heavy anyway.

After all, Shi Sui was a fragile and sensitive man (Shi Sui?). It wouldn’t be nice to hurt his ego.

The two walked side by side on the way back.

Standing on his left side, Xiang Yi noticed that the cold, fair skin of his exposed collarbone was red from the sunlight.

She found herself really strange as she didn’t know why she was angry with Shi Sui and why she felt sorry for him.

She was conflicted and confused.

Shi Sui noticed the look of puzzlement on the face of the young girl beside him and asked in a deep voice, “Xiang Yi?”

Xiang Yi suddenly stopped in her tracks.

As if she had a sudden epiphany, she turned to look at Shi Sui abruptly, only to look deep into his abyss-like eyes.

Xiang Yi thought of a possibility.

She might have… Perhaps… Maybe… Seems like…

It seems that she wasn’t Shi Sui’s “Mommy Fan” but his “girlfriend fan”…

She had developed a crush on Shi Sui…

chapters.title: Chapter 362 - : Acting As Him
chapters.body:
Chapter 362 - : Acting As Him

Chapter 362: Acting As Him

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Whoosh——

Everything seemed to have become extremely clear to her now, like the dissipation of mist that shrouded a mountain.

Xiang Yi got a great shock.

She actually had a crush on Shi Sui.

1

What if Shi Sui finds out?

2

“Two Under One Roof” would span across about two months, and there was about a month or so left.

If Shi Sui were to find out about her feelings for him…

Wouldn’t it be awkward when she interacts with Shi Sui in the following month…

“Xiang Yi? Are you okay?” Shi Sui’s alluring voice rang in her ears.

Xiang Yi forced herself to play it cool, “Ahem, what do Senior Zhong and Jiangjiang like to eat?”

In the blink of an eye, Xiang Yi had already thought of a strategy in response!

She would act like him!

1

In a certain world that she transmigrated to, she had played many supporting roles in order to help the protagonist clinch the Best Actress award.

She felt that her acting was quite good.

Hence… she reckoned that Shi Sui wouldn’t discover it.

To her surprise, Shi Sui discovered the difference in her behavior almost in a second.

He was more sensitive toward human emotions than normal people.

He raised his long eyebrow and answered, “Not quite sure.”

He and Zhong Yi had indeed worked together before, but he did not know anything about her food preferences.

Or rather, he simply didn’t care.

Pretending to be composed, Xiang Yi said, “Is that so? I’ll ask them about it later then.”

“Xiang Yi, are you being nervous?”

Almost as soon as Shi Sui said that, Xiang Yi exclaimed defensively, “No!”

“Then you…” Shi Sui looked at her with a smile on his face and glee between his eyebrows. “Why are you walking with your hands and feet moving in sync?”

1

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She insisted, “Maybe you’re wrong.”

However, the camera recorded that scene.

The fans found it really cute.

—— [What is Xiang Yi spacing out for? She looks so cute when she’s walking with her hands and feet moving in the same direction]

—— [Xiang Yi looks so much like a real bunny when she was shocked just now. How cute~]

1

—— [Damn, I’m going to switch from a fan of the Untimely Couple to solely a fan of Xiang Yi. She’s so cute, no man deserves to have her!]

—— [Ahem, me too, I just want to see her being beautiful on her own, with plenty of suitors surrounding her…]

…

Xiang Yi made a fruit salad with some freshly picked fruits, yogurt, and nuts.

After being busy for an entire day, a cold, sweet treat is the best pleasure!

Xiang Yi didn’t add ice to the serving that was meant for Jiangjiang. After taking a mouthful of it, the little girl was so blissful that she started dangling her feet.

“Delicious~”

Zhong Yi said, “What should you say when you’re given food?”

Jiangjiang blinked and said in a tender voice, “Do you have more?”

5

Zhong Yi: ???

The adults in the room were all amused by her words.

Zhong Yi rubbed her forehead helplessly.

At this time, Li Jianyu announced with the microphone in hand, “Good news, good news! The e-magazine, for which Xiang Yi and Shi Sui had gone on a couple shoot, will soon be published online! You can get a copy at just 9.9 yuan, you’ll definitely get a bang for your buck. Please be careful to purchase it directly only from the official website of My Style Magazine! Also, please sum up the advertising fees for me, thank you all sponsors!”

2

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Son, your advertisement is so unnatural.]

—— [Huh? It’s finally going to be available online! I must buy it! I must!]

—— [I bet that the photo of Shi Sui holding Xiang Yi in his arms and contemplating to kiss her is going to be on the cover page!]

—— [Sh*t! Everyone, go on Weibo now! MS is doing something crazy, they’re publishing male and female versions of the e-magazine! The cover pages for both versions are different!]

1

chapters.title: Chapter 363 - Obsessed With Edition A, Immersed In Edition B
chapters.body:
Chapter 363 - Obsessed With Edition A, Immersed In Edition B

…

…

The crowd flocked to Weibo, only to find that two minutes ago, the official Weibo account of My Style magazine had updated their status.

—— [@MyStyle: #XiangYiXShiSuiJuneMagazineCover

“I’ve waited a thousand years just to meet you. The mass is not proportional to the volume. She attracts me with a mass that far exceeds that of the EARTH, and I want to plunge into hell together with her. However, I saw a star at the end of the endless abyss.”

@ShiSui @XiangYi Edition A “Obsessed” is for the ladies, and Edition B “Immersed” is for the gentlemen. Please look forward to the physical copy of the magazine, Shackled to the Morning Star!]

…

At the bottom of the post, there were also three pre-order links, two of which were for the electronic issues of the magazine and the other for the physical copy. The sales would begin at 12 pm sharp.

MS Magazine’s usual practice was to sell one electronic issue and one physical issue. This time, they launched a ladies’ edition and a gentlemen’s edition, which drew flak and angered countless netizens.

—— [Are you that crazy about money??]

—— [Damn it, what kind of an unscrupulous magazine house is this?]

—— [They keep claiming to make things affordable for fans, but do they think we fans are fools? We’re not pushovers who will allow them to rip us off!]

However, someone figured out something.

—— [Are the photos in the three versions the same? If they are the same, it doesn’t seem reasonable for them to sell the same photo thrice, right?]

The question was soon answered by the official account of Weibo.

—— [Dear, the photos featured in all three versions are different! Each set of photos has its focus! *cute* *cute*]

In an instant…

Those who knew immediately understood what it meant!

Apart from the magazine cover, there were also individual interviews with Xiang Yi and Shi Sui with several photos attached.

The male edition probably contained more photos of Shi Sui.

On the other hand, the female edition probably contained more photos of Xiang Yi.

The physical issue probably contained more photos of the both of them.

Thus, the fans could choose which one to buy according to their preferences.

In a sense, it can also be considered a personalization service.

However…

The fans that shipped them together wailed in agony.

—— [Ahhh, what should I do? I want all three editions!]

—— [Only kids have to choose, adults can buy everything!]

—— [Buying is not as good as selling! Damn it! Unscrupulous merchant! I’ll just buy it, okay?!]

—— [Collecting and hoarding is a human instinct, so I’m just following my instincts, not splurging unnecessarily /dog head]

…

Many discussion posts appeared in the famous gossip forum, Melon, and they mainly revolved around speculations about which edition would sell the best.

One of the Shisui Sisters appeared and posted an analysis that looked very professional at first glance.

[Title: Shi Sui’s Edition A Is Speculated to Rake in Top Sales Volume, If Not, I Will Do a Livestream of Myself Eating the Keyboard!]

Main article: I’ve collated some data about Shi Sui from past records. Without a doubt, he is the absolute ceiling of male artists. Previously, the magazine issues that he was featured in had all sold out and hit record-high sales volumes, and not to forget, he has the ability and influence to increase sales for high-end luxury brands too. Even young hunks who usually generate high traffic volume can’t hold a candle to him.

The attached chart and table are as follows.

As for the Vase Fairy… Uh, since her debut, she has only released one single so far and the online sales she has generated are just a joke. The few endorsements that she had secured were not too bad, but the sales results weren’t terrific. Later on, she somehow became the brand ambassador for household appliance brands and endorsed products like dishwashers, electric grill plates, and what have you. Well, she’s somewhat able to drive up sales too.

But she’s a D-lister after all. How can the light of a firefly compete with the white moon?

Here’s my speculation for the sales volume of the three versions:

  1. Shi Sui’s Edition A
  2. The edition with their couple photo as the cover page
  3. Vase Fairy’s Edition B.

By the way, according to My Style Magazine’s usual practice, there will probably be 100,000 copies available in stock for the first batch of link. I predict that Shi Sui’s Edition A will definitely sell out in a second. As for the one with their couple photo on the cover page and Vase Fairy’s Edition B… Hehe~ I strongly suggest that the disgusting fans who ship the Untimely Couple, as well as Vase Fairy’s fans, to quickly sell whatever you have and get some money to buy some copies~

…

The post quickly made it to the hot search list with more than a thousand replies.

At this moment, it was 12 pm.

chapters.title: Chapter 364 - Strongest Support Group In History
chapters.body:
Chapter 364 - Strongest Support Group In History

Chapter 364: Strongest Support Group in History

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

In the entertainment industry, magazine sales are, in a sense, equivalent to the commercial value of a star.

The number of sales within a minute or a few minutes would be tabulated.

Higher sales signified a greater purchasing power of the fans and the celebrity’s massive influence.

Shi Sui’s fans rubbed their hands and got ready. As soon as the electronic issue was available on the website, they clicked on the ‘buy’ button within the first second.

The Shisui Sister who had posted that article managed to buy Edition A, but after doing so, she refreshed the webpage, only to realize that it had sold out.

She clicked on the link to the page for the physical issue and saw that there was low stock left. She then clicked on the link to Edition B, which featured mostly Xiang Yi, and saw that there were still more than 90,000 copies left in stock.

“Psht…” The girl in front of the screen burst into laughter and immediately took a screenshot of it, which she then added to the article that she previously posted.

[Main article:

Shi Sui’s Edition A has already sold out. I looked at my purchase history, and the copies should have sold out in about two minutes or so~ Also, to Vase Fairy’s fans, thank you for bringing us the joke of the year~ Her commercial value is probably about equal to 0. I suspect that her fans are all fake fans that she bought online.]

3

However, the netizens’ replies made her confused.

—— [Hahaha, whatever makes you happy.]

1

—— [Huh? Are you blind?]

1

—— […Here goes another nutcase. Carry her away, there’s no hope left for her.]

She was incredibly confused, until she refreshed the forum and found a post titled “Have a good look at the strongest support group in history!”

2

…

A few minutes ago…

On Weibo, Yan Nai and his father, Yan Zhenhua, shared the Weibo post posted by My Style Magazine.

—— [@YanZhenhua: Hahaha, little girl, has the duck grown up yet? I’m craving for it, I bought a few copies. Treat it as money for the food!]

3

—— [@YanNai: Sister, I will use all my savings to support you! *clenched fist* *clenched fist*]

1

Next, it was the members of SEASEVEN.

1

—— [@JiangChen: Sister is so pretty! Support Edition B!]

—— [@ShenCi: I must buy Sister’s magazine!]

…

Soon, Yin Jiangxue and her husband also shared it.

—— [@YinJiangxue: Wow~ Our cutie looks so beautiful in this set of photos. I’m going to buy them and keep them as a collection!]

1

—— [@ShengGuang: Madam, you’re right.]

…

Afterward…

It was Xiang Yi’s family.

Her uncle, Xiang Feng, announced it in the family group chat before sharing the post.

—— [@DomineeringCEO: Xiang Yi, I’ll buy your magazines!]

In the training room.

Xiang Yu logged on to Weibo amid his busy schedule.

—— [@Logic-Smog: Are there any Photoshop experts? Please crop Shi Sui out from the couple photos and turn them into solo shots of Xiang Yi. We can discuss the price.]

5

Overseas.

Xiang Qi set an alarm and woke up at midnight.

—— [@Hades: My sister is indisputably the cutest in the world!]

1

At the Scientific Research Institute.

Xiang Yi was working on the latest research report, but he suddenly stopped and said in a gentle manner, “I’m sorry, give me a minute. I need to give my sister support.”

2

“What? What support?”

Amid the gazes of confusion from the expert scientists, Xiang Li took out his cellphone calmly and shared the post on Weibo.

—— [@XiangLi: Showing support for my sister. Press on, Sister.]

The law firm.

Xiang Chen sorted out the documents to be used for the court session in the afternoon and then looked at the two young women opposite him. “Miss Qiao, Miss Xu, I have an important thing to do before we have lunch.”

“Guardian” and her best friend were nervous and clueless as they thought that he was about to do something big. In the next second…

He tapped on Weibo and shared the post with a serious and aloof expression on his face. His caption was concise too.

—— [@Bunny’sBigBrother: Buy it.]

1

Guardian and her friend were dumbfounded.

‘Is this the important matter you mentioned???

chapters.title: Chapter 365 - Sold Out In Seconds!
chapters.body:
Chapter 365 - Sold Out In Seconds!

…

Many people took screenshots of those Weibo posts and posted them in the article titled “Have a Good Look at the Strongest Support Group in History!”

The netizens were stunned to see the famous director of the entertainment industry, celebrity with the greatest influence, young hunk, respected veteran actor, god of gaming, famous fashion designer, medical professor, and top lawyer supporting Xiang Yi!

—— [Damn it??? What kind of luxury lineup is this?]

—— [She’s probably like the Mary Sue character in novels that everyone loves *lights up a cigarette* *lights up a cigarette*]

—— [!!! I just saw that the official Weibo account of the Chinese National Music Association, and the Chinese Medicine Association have shared it too!]

…

The fans of other celebrities were green with envy.

Not everyone has such a supportive fan group!

The Shisui Sister, who had just posted that article, gritted her teeth in front of her screen.

She was Shi Sui’s fan but also a hater of Xiang Yi.

She was extremely repulsed by the idea of the Untimely Couple, so she absolutely loathed Xiang Yi.

She couldn’t help but leave snark comments below the post.

—— [So what if she has so many people to support her? They’re all just paying lip service! Why don’t they buy the magazine?! Shi Sui’s edition of the magazine sold out within two minutes. What about hers? Can they sell out in 200 years? :)]

As soon as she posted it, she faced heavy criticism.

—— [The data hasn’t been tabulated yet, but when I tried to buy it a minute ago, I couldn’t buy it at all. There seems to be a glitch in the inventory page, it keeps stating that there are more than 90,000 copies left.]

‘Hah, go ahead and boast. How can the Vase Fairy be so impressive?’

‘Shi Sui’s Edition A sold out in two minutes, how can her Edition B be sold out in a minute? What a joke.’

She scoffed and replied with a sarcastic remark.

—— [Her? Seriously, just her? The copies of her edition of the magazine can sell out within minutes? Pigs can fly then!]

As soon as she replied, she received a notification from Weibo, which alerted her that My Style Magazine had updated their status.

She clicked it and was instantly dumbfounded.

Indeed, someone’s edition had sold out within seconds, but it wasn’t Shi Sui…

—— [@MyStyle: #XiangYiXShiSuiJuneMagazineCover Congratulations @ShiSui, all 100,000 copies of the electronic issue of Edition A were sold out within 2 minutes and 36 seconds!

Congratulations @XiangYi, all 100,000 copies of the electronic issue of Edition B were sold out in 59 seconds! This is a new record for MyStyle Magazine since its establishment!

Lastly, congratulations to both, 100,000 physical copies of the magazine, Shackled to the Morning Star, sold out in 5 minutes and 1 second!]

Everyone was in a huge uproar!

Female artist, 100,000 copies in 59 seconds!?!

‘Oh boy, even if there were supporters who had deliberately helped to drive up sales, it’s still a shocking figure!’

When Xiang Yi’s fans saw that post on Weibo, they felt a great sense of pride.

—— [Xiang Yi is so outstanding! (screaming)]

—— [It’s alright. Let’s keep a low profile, our dearest Xiang Yi isn’t that impressive.]

—— [Awesome! This is awesome! After being hated on for such a long time, she’s finally made such a proud achievement! Xiang Yi is so impressive! Terrific!]

…

Someone even tagged that Shisui Sister and mocked her.

—— [Hahaha, does your face hurt~]

—— [Are you there? Is your keyboard ready? If you don’t have one, I can mail one to you.]

—— [I heard you want to go to heaven, I’ve already prepared my bench to enjoy the gossip. When are you going to start performing?]

She did not reply for a long time, and after a while, the crowd discovered that she had actually deactivated her account!

‘What a sore loser!’

Some rejoiced, while some were worried.

The Untimely Couple became a hot topic again.

—— [Uh… who remembers that the cover page is a couple photo of the both of them?]

—— [Uwu~ I’m a Mommy Fan, I’m going to cry, we’re too incompetent. Are we too inexperienced? We didn’t come in first in sales.]

—— [No! Sisters! It’s been such a long time but Shi Sui still hasn’t won Xiang Yi’s heart yet. He’s the incompetent one!]

—— [? Oh my God, I actually think it makes some sense.]

chapters.title: Chapter 366 - Miss Xiang Yi’S Family
chapters.body:
Chapter 366 - Miss Xiang Yi’S Family

In the forum, everyone gave a vivid interpretation of #WhenI’mRuthlessICanCriticizeEvenTheManOfTheCoupleThatIShip

Hence, a topic quietly reached the bottom of the hot search list…

…

…

When Si Chuanbai saw the words #ShiSuiIsUseless, he looked utterly confused.

In the past, he would be able to predict the topics about Shi Sui that would make it to the hot search list and could make corresponding PR arrangements in advance.

The recent topics on the hot search list were simply getting more and more confusing.

There were claims about Shi Sui being useless and incompetent. What PR arrangements could he make in response to that?

‘If we make some PR arrangements, people will talk. They will say, “Look, Shi Sui and his team have a guilty conscience!”‘

‘But if we don’t, people will say, “Tsk, tsk, I didn’t expect Shi Sui to have become impotent at such a young age!’

The top celebrity manager sighed as he looked at the cellphone.

‘Life is so hard for me.’

…

On the other hand, Xiang Yi’s manager, Ah Nan, was similarly put in a difficult spot.

He had been worried for a long time and was scared that Edition B wouldn’t sell well.

Until…

He saw the Weibo post about the sales results.

“!”

’59 seconds? 100,000 copies??’

‘My eyes aren’t playing tricks on me, are they?’

Before Ah Nan could react, his phone was flooded with messages from major media outlets and companies that were looking to collaborate with Xiang Yi.

In the simplest of words, Xiang Yi had shot to fame and gone viral!

However, the problems that came with it were obvious.

An artist needed more than just a manager but a team. Although Xiang Yi had now become the nominal owner of Tomato Entertainment, she didn’t have a management team. Thus, Ah Nan was overwhelmed with the sudden influx of matters to handle.

‘My life is too hard.’

‘I’m not worthy.’

He even felt like backing out.

‘Why don’t…I resign?’

As soon as that thought surfaced in his mind, his cellphone started ringing.

Seeing the caller ID, he rubbed his eyes hard before pressing the answer button.

“Si…Mr. Si? Are you looking for me?”

Si Chuanbai’s low and deep voice came from the speaker of the phone. “From today onward, my team and I will be in charge of handling Miss Xiang Yi’s work matters. We will be taking over as her manager.”

“Really? That’s great!” Xiang Yi will have the most professional management team then! However, after three seconds of happiness, Ah Nan realized what was going on, and with his head hung low, he asked, “So I’m going to lose my job?”

Si Chuanbai said, “You’re overthinking…”

Ah Nan sobbed and said, “You don’t need to comfort me. I understand, I will now pack my bags and go to the Little Rabbit Farm to rear some pigs! I heard that they use scientific methods to rear pigs there, so I shall capitalize on my knowledge. At the very least, I’ve been to high school before… I should be able to get recruited, right?”

Si Chuanbai pinched the middle of his forehead. ‘This kid is so useless!’

‘Rear piglets? I think you’re intending to eat them!’

“I’m sorry, I didn’t express myself clearly. I mean, my team and I are going to assist you.”

Knowing that he would not face the crisis of losing his job, Ah Nan suddenly felt revived. He suddenly thought of something and asked, “Um… What about Shi Sui then?”

Si Chuanbai said coldly, “I’ll let him fend for himself, I am now Miss Xiang Yi’s family.”

Ah Nan was confused.

…

In the kitchen of the manor.

Shi Sui and Xiang Yi were getting busy.

Li Jianyu first announced Shi Sui’s sales results.

Shi Sui bowed forward towards the camera and said, “Thank you for your support, everyone. You shouldn’t have gone to the expense.”

A pop-up comment appeared:

—— [Bow once!]

When it was Xiang Yi’s turn, Xiang Yi stopped washing the dishes and also expressed her gratitude to the fans.

More and more people joined in.

—— [Second bow!]

When Xiang Yi turned around, she happened to run into Shi Sui, who frowned and lowered his head to look at her…

If only one person had done it, it would be called a silly act; but if a bunch of people had done so together, it would be considered silly fun.

—— [May the newlyweds bow to each other! Ritual completed!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 367 - She’S The Ideal Type Of Women
chapters.body:
Chapter 367 - She’S The Ideal Type Of Women

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

—— [Send the newlyweds to the bridal chamber, turn off the light—]

—— [Wait a minute, is Shi Sui impotent?]

—— [Why don’t we all crowdfund to send him some supplements to nourish his kidney?]

—— [Oh, oh, oh, reading the pop-up comments of this variety show is really a double happiness. I’m going to die laughing at the comments sooner or later!]

…

There was nothing but joy in the comments section, but the few stars of the entertainment industry who were currently popular were displeased.

The fashion labels and sponsors, who had initially offered them endorsement deals, had all turned to Xiang Yi instead!

That was just how realistic the entertainment industry was.

When a celebrity’s career is down, commercial businesses wouldn’t even bother to pay attention to them.

When they are famous, businesses are willing to be their backups.

The few popular actresses would usually vie with each other but today, they stood on the same side against a common enemy and hypocritically praised each other endlessly. Later on, they even tacitly… worked together to throw shade at Xiao Hua.

Soon, there were lots of “unsavory news” about Xiang Yi on the Internet.

—— [Sales legend? She probably bought bots~]

—— [Excluding the fake sales, it’d be good enough if someone here can sell a thousand copies~]

—— [Well, it’s because Xiang Yi has a bunch of rich brothers. Of course they can buy as many copies as they want.]

—— [Commercial value? Sorry, Vase Fairy has none. It’s all fake glory. No fool would believe her, right?]

—— [There might not be a problem with her when there’s only one person scolding her, but since there’s a bunch of people who are scolding her, there must be something very wrong! Otherwise, why would they scold her instead of someone else?]

…

The company that those few actresses were backed by owned several marketing accounts, which undoubtedly came in handy at such a time.

There were all sorts of mockery directed at Xiang Yi, and they were making it seem as if her brothers were the ones who bought all the copies of the magazines to help her break the sales record.

Commercial value is an important criterion for businesses to gauge the value of artists.

Seeing all the negative comments about Xiang Yi online, some brands couldn’t help but withdraw their decisions.

They thought that, perhaps, it might not be a good choice to hire Xiang Yi.

Although she was famous, she seemed to be famous for the wrong reasons too.

After all, no one wants a brand ambassador who draws too much flak.

Besides, her data was way too exaggerated. In the past, only male celebrities would surpass female celebrities in terms of sales volume, and never the other way around!

At the critical moment, an overseas video creator posted something on Weibo that caught the attention of netizens.

Nowadays, many foreign artists, netizens, video creators and so on have created accounts on Weibo, some of which were well managed and had a significant amount of followers.

It just so happens that the content creator who posted that post would share her outfits, skincare tips, and such on a regular basis, which had earned her more than two million followers on Weibo.

—— [@Luna: Hi, I’d like to ask, is there anyone who can buy this for me? My friends like her a lot.]

There was a picture attached to it.

It was a screenshot of Edition B of MyStyle Magazine’s latest issue, which was the special feature of Xiang Yi!

The netizens were dumbfounded.

“Is Xiang Yi so famous that even an overseas influencer knows her?”

Some netizens asked Luna a question in her native language.

Luna was usually very diligent in replying her fans, and today was no exception either.

Reply 1: [Of course! The video of her cooking mysterious Chinese dishes is really popular here!]

Reply 2: [Many people shared photos of the copies of this magazine that they’ve bought on social media platforms here! But I can’t read Chinese well, so I need someone to help me with buying a copy.]

Reply 3: [Everyone loves her, she has a pair of hands that has been kissed by God. When she smiles, she looks like the sweetest dessert in the world! She appeals to both sexes and is the ideal type of both men and women!]

Reply 4: [Oh, someone bought it for me! I’m so happy!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 368 - Famous Overseas
chapters.body:
Chapter 368 - Famous Overseas

Chapter 368: Famous Overseas

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘Ah this… is this real?’

‘Usually, we are the ones looking for people to help us buy overseas skincare products, cosmetics and such, but now, foreigners are looking for people to buy our female artist’s… magazine?’

At first, there were people who felt it was a publicity stunt.

However, some students who were studying abroad posted screenshots of the magazine, which made everyone realize how terrifyingly popular Xiang Yi was overseas!

—— [I’m shocked, so Vase Fairy is really famous, and she has even risen to fame a long time ago?!!]

—— [Ahhhh MyStyle Magazine has released links to another 200,000 copies of each of the three editions! Xiang Yi’s Edition B is already sold out! It was really gone in seconds!!!]

—— [I searched several famous foreign video sites and found that the number of hits on the video of Xiang Yi cooking is second only to the video of our national treasure, the panda, being cute…]

2

…

The famous actresses that ganged up to throw shade at Xiang Yi were confused too.

‘How did this happen?!’

‘All Xiang Yi did was take part in a variety show, and she became famous overseas!?!’

The brands that had backed out of the endorsement deal with Xiang Yi earlier were full of regrets and they proceeded to contact Xiang Yi’s manager again, only to find out that Xiang Yi already had a new agency team led by the ace celebrity manager, Si Chuanbai.

1

The brand sponsors were dumbstruck.

‘Isn’t Si Chuanbai Shi Sui’s personal manager? Why is he managing Xiang Yi now?!’

2

Si Chuanbai was much more aloof than Ah Nan. Hequickly screened the brands and rejected those that were unsuitable.

The persons-in-charge of the brands hated themselves for being a step too late and missing out on such a great business opportunity!

…

A Weibo post that Shi Sui liked was like the most vicious punch in their face.

—— [@DomineeringCEO: UwU what a crappy magazine house! How dare you set a limit of one copy per account! I have money! Let me buy more! Do you hear that!!!]

2

Xiang Feng’s incompetent and furious statement was amusing to a large number of netizens.

After Shi Sui liked it, everyone suddenly got the point.

—— [Huh? There’s a purchase limit of one per user?!]

1

The purchase limit meant that there was no way one person could have bought hundreds or thousands of copies.

The rumors of Xiang Yi’s brothers being the only ones who bought all the copies of the magazine were debunked!

The netizens were in a trance and still in some disbelief.

Xiang Yi, a female artist, had really broken Shi Sui’s sales record and surpassed him on her own!!!

She had only been part of a variety show so far. If she had more outstanding works in the future…

She really didn’t dare to imagine it at all!

…

The discussion about the Untimely Couple on the forum.

—— [Shi Sui, a man who always rushes to protect his wife first.]

—— [The first reaction I had was to think, ‘That’s so sweet!’ The second thing that came to my mind was that Shi Sui seems to be in a one-sided relationship with her…]

1

—— [Uwu, me too, I think my daughter hasn’t grown up yet. I want her to grow up but not really either. I’m so worried.]

1

…

In the manor.

Lunch was served, and Jiangjiang was staring straight at the sumptuous lunch.

“Did Sister make all this? So impressive!” Jiangjiang wasn’t stingy with her praises.

Zhong Yi said, “Jiangjiang, you should call her Auntie.”

Jiangjiang shook her head, “No, it’s Sister! The pretty ones are all called Sisters!!!”

2

Xiang Yi, who had always been extremely tolerant of children, pushed a glass of freshly squeezed strawberry milk to Jiangjing with a calm and gentle gaze.

1

Jiangjiang took a sip and squinted happily. After a few seconds, she sighed like an adult. “Ugh, when will I grow up?”

1

Old Mrs. Xiang asked, “Jiangjiang, what do you want to be when you grow up?”

Jiangjiang exclaimed without hesitating, “I want to marry Sister Xiang Yi!”

1

Everyone at the table laughed.

Only Shi Sui raised his eyebrows.

‘Children are such annoying creatures…. :)’

2

chapters.title: Chapter 369 - Candy That’S Exclusive To Bunny (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 369 - Candy That’S Exclusive To Bunny (1)

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Time for a Mukbang!]

—— [Reporting, takeout has been ordered, the milk tea has been prepared. Get ready to start eating, over.]

—— [Hahaha, Shi Sui looks so lively when he raises his brows. Surely he’s not getting jealous of a kid, is he?!]

…

Zhong Yi was tempted and shocked by the delicious and sumptuous spread on the table. “Did you make all these?”

Xiang Yi didn’t take full credit for it. “Shi Sui and I cooked it together.”

Shi Sui said, “I just gave her some help.”

A touch of surprise appeared in Zhong Yi’s eyes.

As far as she knew, Shi Sui was the type who would rather starve than cook a meal…

‘Now he is actually willing to cook?’

Xiang Yi’s grandmother was full of praise for Xiang Yi. “Our little bunny’s culinary skills are getting better and better~”

Xiang Yin humphed. “It’s so-so.”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother thought, ‘Hah, I would have almost believed your nonsense if you hadn’t eaten that much!’

Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji had their own food for lunch too.

Little Xiji, who had only ever eaten dog food, began barking excitedly when it tasted a feast for pups for the first time. It even buried its head in the bowl while wolfing the food down.

On the other hand, Xiao Naofu ignored its own food and turned into a pretentious feline. It squeezed together with Little Xiji as it tried to eat out of Little Xiji’s bowl.

Little Xiji looked at it in bewilderment. Woof?

Xiao Naofu barked at it fiercely. Woof!

—— [I’m going to eat your food, you bumpkin of a dog!]

Little Xiji hesitated for a few seconds, silently backed away, and pushed the bowl toward Xiao Naofu, seemingly gesturing for it to eat up.

Xiao Naofu initially thought that Little Xiji was just trying to distract it from its food so that Little Xiji could eat its luxurious paella, but to its surprise…

Little Xiji merely laid on the ground obediently with tears in its eyes as it looked at Xiao Naofu obediently.

It seemed to be waiting for Xiao Naofu to leave before digging in.

“…”

Xiao Naofu suddenly felt that the food in the bowl wasn’t as aromatic as before.

‘What are you looking at?!’

Xiao Naofu was rather immature and his mental age was equivalent to human toddlers. It bullied Little Xiji because it felt that Little Xiji had snatched away Xiang Yi’s love and affection. If Little Xiji was an evil tyrant, it would definitely fight Little Xiji hard.

However, Little Xiji wasn’t…

Xiao Naofu felt like its efforts were futile. It stared at Little Xiji for several seconds before reluctantly squirmed in pushing the bowl back to it. At the same time, it also took a shrimp from its bowl and placed it in Little Xiji’s bowl.

Meow~

—— [Hmph, I’m willing to share a shrimp with you, only because I think you’re too weak and scrawny!]

The next second, Little Xiji pressed Xiao Naofu onto the ground and began licking the fur on its head happily!

“Meow meow meow!!!”

Xiao Naofu: “Ahhhh, don’t come here! Damn it!!! Silly woman, come save me! Quick, save me!”

As an influencer, Xiao Naofu had its own photographer and a separate livestream, which was watched by netizens who are lovers of cute pets; the scene was very pleasant too.

—— [Xiao Naofu is really pretentious]

—— [Xiao Naofu is all grown up now, I’m so heartened!]

—— [Little Xiji’s pouncing was so dominant! I love it, I love it~]

—— [Is that a… love scene between a cat and dog? Oh dear, it’s making me all shy and embarrassed]

…

Xiao Naofu had a hard time breaking free from Little Xiji, after which it leaped into Xiang Yi’s arms aggrievedly.

Meow…

—— [UwU, that annoying, tacky dog made my fur wet from all that licking!]

Xiang Yi put down her chopsticks and coaxed it in a warm and tender voice.

Xiang Yin saw that and frowned ferociously.

He barked, “We’re having lunch now, why are you carrying it in your arms!?”

Xiao Naofu was so frightened that it curled up in Xiang Yi’s arms.

A netizen commented:

—— [Umm, I don’t think Old Mr. Xiang hates cats. It’s Xiang Yi he hates.]

chapters.title: Chapter 370 - Candy That’S Exclusive To Bunny (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 370 - Candy That’S Exclusive To Bunny (2)

Chapter 370: Candy That’s Exclusive to Bunny (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

That comment gained the approval of many.

—— [Yes it is, cats are so adorable, are there even people who hate cats?]

1

—— [To be honest, Old Mr. Xiang already has four grandsons, why would he favor his granddaughter? If this were in the ancient times, Xiang Yi’s name won’t even be included in the ancestral records.]

1

—— [Haha, you just found out? I could already tell since a long time ago. Vase Fairy’s grandfather has always been stern and cold to her. He obviously dislikes her.]

…

The moment these comments were posted, Xiang Yi’s fans retorted.

1

—— [Tsk, how would you know?]

—— [Why are you mentioning the ancestral record? What’s wrong with you? Times have changed, the ancient times are long gone!]

—— [It’s just a mere sentence he said, and you guys read so much into it. Some people are just so free. It’s not like it’s written on his face whether he likes her or not.]

…

…

The comments section was full of aggression. Now that the livestream industry is well developed, people tend to vent the pressure that they face in reality on the Internet.

In real life, people are usually more tolerant of the mistakes that others make.

1

However, in the world of the Internet, they would nitpick on the slightest detail and make a big deal out of it.

Xiang Yi placed Xiao Naofu onto the ground after coaxing it a little.

Xiang Yin immediately ordered, “Go wash your hands! Make sure to use antiseptic hand wash and scrub both your palms and the back of your hands!”

There are bacteria on the bodies of pets, and it would be bad if she got infected.

His granddaughter’s health is the most important thing of all!

As soon as everyone heard that, they felt that Xiang Yin was really strict!

“Got it, Grandpa.” Xiang Yi proceeded to wash her hands obediently.

When she returned, she picked up her chopsticks and ate two bites of food, after which Xiang Yin began to pick on her again. “Tie up your hair! It’s covering your eyes!”

Xiang Yi had tied her hair into a bun, but her airy bangs was hanging in front of her forehead. Due to her busy schedule, she hadn’t had the time to go for a haircut so her bangs were a little too long.

“I can’t tie it up.” She gauged the length of her bangs and suddenly thought of an idea. She found a hair clip and clipped her bangs up, revealing her fair and polished forehead.

A trace of satisfaction appeared in Xiang Yin’s eyes.

‘Yes, my granddaughter’s hair looks best when it’s all tied up!’

In the livestream:

—— [Xiang Yi’s grandfather is really fierce. I was so startled by his commands that I shivered in front of the screen]

—— [He definitely hates her. Otherwise, he wouldn’t be so picky with her!]

—— [Uh, this is so relatable. My mom likes it when I pin all my hair up and bare my forehead too…]

While some were criticizing Xiang Yi, they were enjoying the broadcast more than anyone else.

…

After the meal…

Zhong Yi and Jiangjiang had the habit of taking afternoon naps, but Jiangjiang decided to skip her nap today when she heard that Xiang Yin was going to make some malt candy. Instead, she moved a small stool over to sit beside Xiang Yin.

The staff at Little Rabbit Farm delivered some ingredients over. Xiang Yin sat in the pavilion and began cooking the malt candy in a small pot leisurely.

The breeze brushed by and the flowers landed beside the pavilion. The green mountains in the distance could be seen vaguely, and a few ducks crossed the courtyard to go to the pool. The scene was beautiful and poetic.

1

There were much fewer pop-up comments in the livestream as the netizens were all enjoying the serenity of the heartwarming moment.

Xiang Yin moved skillfully. He had obviously done this frequently. He coiled some malt candy around a thin bamboo stick and shaped it into a lollipop, which he then handed to Jiangjiang.

“Take it, kid.”

“Thank you, Grandpa!”

Holding the candy happily, Jiangjiang licked the sweet and warm candy while murmuring incoherently, “It’s delicious~”

The netizens were full of envy when they saw that.

Xiang Yin is so nice~

Some haters mocked:

—— [Even his biological granddaughter doesn’t get treated so nicely. Seems like someone is really detestable~]

1

However, Xiang Yin picked up another bamboo stick, dipped it into the malt candy, and began twirling it. The sphere of malt candy seemed to be getting bigger and bigger…

1

The netizens began to find that something was amiss….

chapters.title: Chapter 371 - Candy That’S Exclusive To Bunny (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 371 - Candy That’S Exclusive To Bunny (3)

Chapter 371: Candy That’s Exclusive to Bunny (3)

1

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The bright and light yellow malt candy was emitting some heat. Gradually, the sphere of candy in Xiang Yin’s hands became several times larger than the one he gave Jiangjiang just now.

Xiang Yin picked it up and looked at it, only to find that there wasn’t enough yet. Thus, he placed the stick of malt candy back into the pot and swirled it a few more times…

—— [This… is for Jiangjiang, right?]

—— [Jiangjiang is so cute, it’s normal for the elderly to like her~]

As soon as the pop-ups just drifted by, Xiang Yin exclaimed with the malt candy that was now ready, “Old woman! Come have some candy!!!”

2

Xiang Yi and her grandmother were having some floral tea in front of the window. When she heard his words, she said, “This old man’s voice is too loud.”

The netizens were shocked!

They were caught off guard by the sudden display of affection!

Old Mrs. Xiang gathered the hair at her temples and walked to Xiang Yin’s side.

After tasting it, she said, “It tastes pretty good, but I’m too old, it’s sticking to my teeth.”

Xiang Yin pretended to be angry and exclaimed, “Nonsense! You are not old at all!”

Jiangjiang chimed in, “Yes! Grandma is not old at all!”

All women in this world like hearing such compliments, and Old Mrs. Xiang was no exception so she grinned.

After eating half of it, she got sick of it and shoved it into Xiang Yin’s hand.

Xiang Yin had been married to her for years and shared a tacit chemistry with her, so he calmly finished the rest.

The pop-up comments of the livestream suddenly changed.

—— [Damn, Xiang Yi’s grandparents are too sweet!]

—— [How lovey-dovey!]

—— [I’m growing lemons online, feeling so sour]

…

…

The viewers felt that Xiang Yi’s grandparents were really sweet, but some people also said that Xiang Yi’s life was really tragic.

At first glance, it is indeed true.

Jiangjiang and Old Mrs. Xiang were given malt candy but Xiang Yi was still drinking some floral tea, all sad and lonely…

1

Flaws tend to be emphasized through comparisons.

The fans were somewhat sorry for her, but the haters were unscrupulous and mocked her sarcastically.

—— [Some people are born to be detestable, can’t help it.]

—— [If I were Xiang Yi’s grandfather, I won’t like her either, she’s too pretentious.]

—— [So far, Vase Fairy has been maintaining a perfect persona in “Two Under One Roof”. It’d be strange if she’s not pretending.]

1

…

When the haters were pointing fingers at Xiang Yi, someone noticed that Xiang Yin was still silently boiling malt sugar, and this time, the malt candy lollipop he was making was even bigger!

Not only was it bigger, he also kept pinching, twirling and using other techniques to shape the candy. Soon, a full and rounded bunny-shaped malt candy appeared in his palm.

2

Xiang Yin looked at it, but he still was not satisfied enough and continued to carve it with bamboo sticks.

It took a while of shaping before he was satisfied.

The camera gave a close-up of the lifelike rabbit-shaped candy, which was cute and delicate.

1

Rabbit…rabbit?

It can’t be such a coincidence…

The next moment, Xiang Yin’s loud voice resounded in midair in the courtyard.

“Good… RabbitBunny!”

1

The netizens were appalled.

—— [I’m watching with earphones, I almost went deaf.]

—— [Grandpa, your voice almost killed me]

—— [Did I hear him correctly? He called her Good Rabbit?]

Everyone watched in disbelief as Xiang Yi walked briskly toward the gazebo.

“Grandpa~” Xiang Yi called out tenderly. “Is this for me?”

Xiang Yin had a stern expression on his face and he handed the malt candy to Xiang Yi, as if he wasn’t the one who just called her “Good Rabbit”.

He said coldly, “Eat this!”

1

Xiang Yi grinned, her dimples showing faintly. “You’re so nice, Grandpa~ You’re the best grandpa in the world~”

“What a sweet talker.” Xiang Yin humphed coldly in disdain, but he couldn’t help but smile. “Is it enough? I have more if there isn’t enough! I’ll make you an extra large one!”

The netizens watching the livestream: Damn it, you call that hate? He obviously pampers her to bits!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 372 - Big Furry Brother (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 372 - Big Furry Brother (1)

Xiang Yi’s voice was warm and tender. She took a seat on the stool beside Jiangjiang and ate the candy obediently. “It’s enough.”

Xiang Yi and Jiangjiang’s movements were in sync when they were eating. They were so adorable that they made countless hearts melt.

Xiang Yin’s smile grew wider.

Xiang Yi’s grandmother teased, “Ahh, didn’t someone say that he hasn’t forgiven Xiang Yi?”

Xiang Yin’s expression changed immediately as he stopped smiling and said coldly, “Hmph! Don’t think I’ve forgiven her! Now, she’s at most… 2% forgiven!”

Old Mrs. Xiang said, “You said 1% the other day, and now it’s 2%? So a meal is worth 1%? Well, doesn’t that mean that Bunny will have to cook 98 meals for you before she can be forgiven? Old man, I bet you’re just trying to freeload!”

The netizens watching the livestream were so amused by Old Mrs. Xiang’s words that they burst into laughter.

—— [Hahaha, Grandma Xiang is so good at criticizing him]

—— [Why does Xiang Yi have to be forgiven? What have she done?]

—— [I suddenly think that Grandpa Xiang is the best at being coquettish. Xiang Yi’s brothers really pale in comparison~]

…

In the apartment.

Qin Wanyan, who had recently gone on a hiatus, was watching “Two Under One Roof”, as if she was obsessed and bewitched.

Whenever Xiang Yi was in the frame, she would spam the comments section with hateful comments that was full of sarcasm, cynicism, and criticism as she picked on Xiang Yi incessantly.

‘What right does Xiang Yi have to keep getting more and more famous?’

‘All I did was “accidentally” post those photos and deleted them right after. Yet, I got suspended and was forced to go on a hiatus, resulting in a loss of fame?!’

Hearing the word ‘forgive’ mentioned by Xiang Yin, she sneered and opened the private message chat window with a certain marketing account…

…

The courts in Nancheng.

The court hearing today was broadcast live on the courts’ livestream website.

Qiao Wan, also known as “Guardian of Xiang Yi Who’s the Best Girl in This World” on Weibo, was seated in the courtroom, and she was so nervous that her palms were sweating.

The judge announced the opening of the trial, and the live broadcast began.

In an instant, many viewers swarmed over to watch the livestream. When they saw that the plaintiff’s defense lawyer was Xiang Chen, the comment section suddenly became lively.

—— [Ahhh, Xiang Yi’s big brother looks so good in formal wear!]

—— [This must be the first time in several years that Attorney Xiang has appeared in court, right?]

—— [This is my first time watching a livestream of a court trial. I’m somehow a little nervous.]

The case details were quickly sorted out. Qiao Wanyan’s good friend, Xiao Xu, had scored the highest among all the interviewees for the written screening test during the job application interview, but the company hired a male candidate, who had scored lower than her, allegedly because the company felt that the position was more suitable for men.

The lawyer hired by the defendant company was also very competent and had used the strategy of making Strawman arguments. He was very influential, downplayed the unfavorable points, and chose not to mention the gender issue.

“…In short, the defendant did not refuse admission because of the plaintiff’s gender, but because of the plaintiff’s lack of overall competency.”

Xiao Xu’s face was pale. The failure of the job application had dealt her a great blow.

Now that she had to be struck again, she was physically and psychologically unwell.

Taking advantage of the fact that she was a little out of sorts and disoriented, the company’s representative attacked even more unrestrainedly, “We believe that Miss Xu has a social disorder and as we all know, a severe social disorder is considered a mental illness. The vacant position we had really wasn’t suitable for her…”

In the livestream, some people felt they had a point.

—— [Exactly, how can they hire a time bomb?]

—— [Scoring the highest in the written interview doesn’t mean anything, she’s probably just academically inclined but incompetent~]

—— [To be honest, that role is really not suitable for girls. At her age, she might get married and have kids in the next couple of years. Who will bear the losses of the company then?]

chapters.title: Chapter 373 - Big Furry Brother (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 373 - Big Furry Brother (2)

…

The group of people was discussing happily, but in reality, Xiang Chen raised his eyebrows slightly.

“Are you done?”

His voice was indifferent, clear, aloof, low, and full of powerful dominance.

The two people at the defendant’s table across from him subconsciously shut up.

By the time they reacted, they realized they had actually somehow complied with Xiang Chen…

Xiang Chen stood up and replied sneeringly without even looking at the document.

“Scoring the highest for the written interview test among all the candidates means incompetency? I’m afraid I have to question the professional ability of your company’s interviewers then.”

“As for the claim about her mental illness, that’s a personal attack. Who says it’s a must for everyone to be extroverted? The presence of introverts is precisely the element that gives rise to diversity. Everyone deserves to be respected, regardless of their personality.”

“If the person who scored the highest for the written interview test was male, would you still hire women who scored lower? The obvious answer is no.”

“Not only are you in violation of the law.” After a pause, he sneered and gibed, “Your morals are ridiculous too.”

…

…

The viewers of the livestream were dumbfounded to hear his words and the pop-up comments appeared only after a long while.

—— [Damn, Xiang Chen is so sharp-tongued]

—— [I can’t think of a better word to describe Attorney Xiang, he’s impressive!]

—— [Well said. He’s justified and polite, that’s simply a textbook defense]

Qiao Wan could no longer process what the judge and the defendant’s lawyer said after that as the only thing she could see was the tall and magnificent figure in front of her…

‘He’s so handsome.’

Xiang Chen’s style of defense in court was the same as his personality: direct, cold, harsh, and sharp. After just a few rounds, he had already steadily gained the upper hand.

Xiao Xu, who was initially hanging her head low, also raised it slightly while subconsciously straightening her back.

‘Yes, I’m not as bad as what they made me out to be!’

Even the gaze in the eyes of Xiao Xu, who had regained her confidence, became firm and determined.

The netizens watching the livestream were influenced and quickly left comments to cheer her on.

…

A case of this level was not difficult for Xiang Chen at all. Soon, he slayed domineeringly.

He adjusted his tie with his slender and bony fingers while waiting aloofly for the judge’s verdict.

In the end, Xiao Xu won the case; and although the compensation she received was not much, she smiled for the first time in days.

“Attorney Xiang, thank you.” Xiao Xu sniffled and said, “And you, Qiao Wan, thank you for helping me so much.”

Qiao Wan waved her hands and said , “No, no, no, I didn’t do anything, it’s all thanks to Attorney Xiang.”

Xiang Chen said indifferently, “You’re welcome.”

When the three of them left the courtroom, local reporters immediately surrounded them.

Apart from the law-related column journalists, the others were after Xiang Chen’s popularity. There were even journalists of mediation and matchmaking columns.

“Attorney Xiang, will you adopt the image of a public interest lawyer in the future?”

“Attorney Xiang, are you interested in participating in our matchmaking program?”

“Are you a feminist? How do you feel about the phrase ‘I’m sorry to be born as a woman’ that’s popular on the Internet?”

Xiang Chen’s face was expressionless, and he didn’t plan to entertain them at all but his eyebrows furrowed when he heard a certain question.

“Whether you’re born as a woman or a man, there is nothing to be sorry for.”

“There is no need to divide this world into male and female rights, simply because too many people do not understand that everyone, regardless of gender, deserve equal rights.”

His aura and temperament were cold. His words moved everyone, until Qiao Wan accidentally blurted, “Ahhhh Big Furry Brother is so dashing!!!”

Xiang Chen’s expression gradually froze.

???

chapters.title: Chapter 374 - Sweet Trap
chapters.body:
Chapter 374 - Sweet Trap

Chapter 374: Sweet Trap

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Fear gradually began to appear in Qiao Wan’s eyes.

!

‘Ahhh why didn’t I think twice before speaking?!’

Some reporters got the joke and burst into laughter. “Smog is Fourth Furry Brother, Hades is Third Furry Brother, Dr. Xiang is Second Furry Brother, and Attorney Xiang is Big Furry Brother, that doesn’t seem to be a problem…”

2

They were just about to laugh, but they saw Xiang Chen’s cold and handsome gaze.

1

He raised his brows and asked, “Is it that funny?”

3

Everyone answered, “No, no, it’s not funny at all!”

1

The reporters dispersed one by one, and after Xiao Xu thanked Xiang Chen again, she got ready to go to the subway station.

Qiao Wanyan grabbed her wrist and tried to leave with her but in the end, Xiao Xu pried her fingers away, one by one…

“Sister, take care and come back alive.”

Qiao Wan: ???

At the steps, only Xiang Chen and Qiao Wan were left.

Xiang Chen sneered, “Big Furry Brother?”

1

Qiao Wan said anxiously, “This…this nickname is not derogatory, it’s only used by people who really like Xiang Yi for you guys, Xiang Yi’s brothers!”

“Hah.” He chuckled coldly and slowly adjusted his cuffs.

Qiao Wan felt a chill down her spine as she felt that Xiang Chen was like a villain in a movie, and she had a strong desire to live. “Attorney Xiang, I’ve got the electronic issue of Xiang Yi’s magazine cover!”

2

Xiang Chen paused.

He was a step too slow to grab a copy of it when the sales started.

2

On the contrary, Qiao Wan, who had years of experience in fangirling, managed to snatch Edition B successfully with her fast fingers.

“Attorney Xiang, look, Xiang Yi looks just like a little princess in this photo! The way Shi Sui is holding her waist is making her waist look so slender. And this one, they’re holding hands, how satisfying… Ah, the Untimely Couple is real!”

2

Qiao Wan made some remarks as she looked through the photos, but she somehow felt a chilliness…

She looked up and discovered that Xiang Chen was staring dead at the hands of Shi Sui, squinting his deep eyes dangerously with a great desire to chop up Shi Sui’s hands.

Qiao Wan swallowed her saliva and tried to explain, “Actually, their poses are not that intimate…”

There were other celebrities who posed in more provocative positions and even kissed each other in couple shoots for magazine covers.

In Qiao Wan’s opinion, Xiang Yi and Shi Sui’s couple shoot was not racy in the slightest and was barely romantic!

However, in Xiang Chen’s eyes, Shi Sui was already equivalent to a dead man. 🙂

2

In order to relieve this suffocating tension, Qiao Wan looked up a video that My Style Magazine had later released. “This is a cut for the teaser. I heard it was from the vampire’s, or Shi Sui’s, point of view.”

2

The last video that My Style Magazine released was in the point-of-view of the little princess, Xiang Yi, but now, it was Shi Sui’s.

The video played and it was in the same, retro gothic style. The young and handsome vampire clad in a luxurious and exquisite vintage suit, happened to meet the pure and innocent princess by chance in the forest.

His nonchalant gaze slowly became extremely aggressive.

He wanted to destroy her.

Next, it was followed by a step-by-step calculation, but to the vampire’s surprise…

He was the first to fall.

Instead of him leading the little princess to become immersed, he fell into her sweet trap…

That aptly fit the theme of “immersed”.

The scene changed and it was cut to the dim and fraying castle. The vampire clasped the back of the little princess’s head and kept her hanging by pulling in for a kiss but not committing to it entirely. To his surprise, she tugged his tie and then touched his Adam’s apple…

1

Then, she moved her fingers down a little bit…

Their gazes met.

The video came to an abrupt halt.

chapters.title: Chapter 375 - Ace
chapters.body:
Chapter 375 - Ace

Qiao Wan suppressed her agitation and finished watching it.

When the video ended, she shivered and sobered up!

‘Oh dear, it’s really sweet that Xiang Yi is teasing him back, but will Attorney Xiang beat his sister up too!?!’

Qiao Wan was on tenterhooks but in the end, she heard the sounds of teeth-gritting coming from above her head.

“Xiang Yi has been led astray just like that!”

Qiao Want was baffled. ‘Huh???’

“Of all things, you just have to be led astray.” Xiang Chen cracked his fingers and clipped with a sneer, “What a dog!”

It was obvious who he was referring to…

Qiao Wan suddenly felt that Shi Sui was in danger of losing his legs…

…

…

There was a huge uproar in the comments section as soon as that post was posted on Weibo.

—— [Oh my God, what a divine edit!]

—— [The little princess is Immersed, and the vampire is intoxicated. Sisters, they fancy each other!]

—— [Damn, damn, damn, the gaze in Xiang Yi’s eyes when she was touching his Adam’s apple in the last scene is so lustful! If this wasn’t a photo shoot, Shi Sui would have devoured her!]

—— [Little Bunny Xiang Yi is so cute, wouldn’t it be great to boil her in water and cook spicy hotpot with her flesh?]

—— [I miss the cold rabbit Xiang Yi makes. UwU~ When will Little Rabbit Farm release a similar version?!]

—— [???? What magic can Xiang Yi do to make you guys turn the topic of discussion into something so lewd and twisted!?]

…

Xiang Yi’s teasing was meant to be used as a trump card.

Now, the trump card worked wonderfully.

The third and fourth batches of the copies of the magazines were still selling like hotcakes, and those who lived near the dispatching warehouse of the physical copies of the magazine soon received their orders.

The cover page of ‘Shackled to the Morning Star’ was the photo of Xiang Yi tugging Shi Sui’s necktie while exchanging glances with him. When their eyes met, there was a collision of provocation and asceticism, the intertwining of intoxication and seduction, a complete interpretation of the story behind the photos.

Apart from some ordinary questions, the both of them also revealed each of their understandings of the story in their respective interviews.

Xiang Yi: “It’s a very romantic story. I think both the little princess and the vampire are lonely without any close friends. That’s probably why they are attracted to each other, right? Although the style of the shoot is a little dark and gothic, I think the vampire is actually very gentle, and he didn’t hurt anyone either.”

Shi Sui: “I think what Xiang Yi said is very true. Instead of immersion, I think redemption would be a better word to describe it. On the surface, the vampire is luring the little princess into a trap, but in fact, she has also laid a trap for him. However, they’re both willing parties, and the little princess is like a star to him.”

…

The fans of the Untimely Couple were absolutely mesmerized and exhilarated!

—— [I don’t care, I don’t care! I’ve started to regard Xiang Yi as Shi Sui’s star!]

—— [Hahaha, I think Xiang Yi’s understanding of the story is like a fairytale, while Shi Sui’s is a love story!!!]

—— [I’m different, I’ll come up with 100,000 words worth of rated content *dog head* *dog head*]

—— [UwU~ Don’t spout nonsense! Xiang Yi is still a child, what if she reads these?!]

…

As of 7pm, the post that My Style Magazine had posted on Weibo had been shared more than 100,000 times and liked a few hundred times.

In a certain sense, the Untimely Couple had really “debuted” and was presented officially to the public eye.

The number of fans who shipped them also spiked immediately. Amid the peace and harmony, a certain marketing account released a video titled “Interview with Xiang Yi’s Ex-Fiancé”.

Countless people were dumbfounded. After they clicked it to watch the video, they realized that the main character of the video was a sleazy-looking man in his thirties.

“Xiang Yi is a big star now? Seriously?”

“Hahahaha, she used to woo me desperately and pester me all the time. She even insisted on eloping with me.”

chapters.title: Chapter 376 - Elope
chapters.body:
Chapter 376 - Elope

“Ah, of course I’m not going to be with her. How can I possibly fall for a woman like her…”

“…”

The man in the video was somewhat suave, but his words were extremely disrespectful to women. He would rattle on about his thoughts on life or boast about his flourishing influencer management company…

In short, he was acting older than his real age, but not in a good way.

The “Spicy Rabbits” (Xiang Yi’s fans) who saw the video were exasperated.

—— [Xiang Yi wanted to elope with you? You must be dreaming!]

—— [This man… Umm, I’m suffering from secondhand embarrassment, and I’m feeling so awkward that I can’t stop picking at my toenails]

—— [It takes a mouth to start rumors but a lot more to debunk them. Even if you’re trying to create publicity, you should have a bottom line.]

…

…

However, the “male lead” of the video probably enjoyed the fame after chasing clout and soon released a second exposé video.

“At that time, we’ve both met each other’s parents, but of course, I don’t like her at all.”

‘But she kept pestering me and insisted that I marry her. However, her family opposed our relationship and, for the sake of seeing me, she even climbed over the walls of her home…”

“Oh, right, and she even angered her grandmother to the point of fainting for my sake and landed her grandfather in the hospital. I can’t help that young girls are just so attracted to me.”

“…”

The man rattled on and on and exposed information about Xiang Yi incessantly. This time, he had clearly learned from experience and had his company logo placed behind him. While speaking,he even displayed the “chat history” of his text message conversations with “Xiang Yi”.

Just as he said, Xiang Yi’s text messages to him were all expressions of her strong desire to “marry him” and confessions of her love to him. She even said that she was willing to be a full-time housewife after giving birth to his kids after they get married.

The stark contrast left the netizens dumbstruck!

Their goddess had become such a simp!

The loyal fans who had been liking Xiang Yi struggled to explain that this must be something that happened when Xiang Yi was suffering from amnesia.

However, many fans who had just started liking her expressed that they couldn’t accept Xiang Yi looking like this.

There were even some famous figures who had millions of fans on Weibo that criticized her.

—— [The value of a woman is definitely not centered around cooking in the kitchen, much less being a baby-making machine! I hate your persona, and I despise your values and outlooks on life!]

—— [I’m really furious. It’s precisely because of women like you that men look down on women! Countless predecessors have put in plenty of effort to remove all the labels and stigma that many women have been subjected to. Yet, you’re ruining all their efforts and making these labels true!]

—— [Filial piety is the first of all virtues. However, Xiang Yi is truly an unfilial daughter! Filial piety is a traditional virtue in our country, and if celebrities can’t lead by example, won’t they be bad examples for fans?! I call for a boycott of Xiang Yi! Boycott “Two Under One Roof”!]

…

Qin Wanyan had spent a ton of money to bribe these accounts and when she saw countless netizens joining them in hating on Xiang Yi, she immediately felt that her money was well spent!

As for the man who exposed Xiang Yi, she first looked for a tabloid and told them that Xiang Yi wasn’t as innocent as the netizens thought and that it wasn’t true that she had little experience in relationships. She even revealed that Xiang Yi had a history of eloping!

The tabloid immediately searched along the clues and found the person who exposed the information. Coincidentally, the informant also wanted to get some clout, so they joined hands to create a huge exposé!
