“Brother Xin, do you have Xiang Yi’s contact number? We can do a video of you calling her, it’ll definitely be even more popular!” the person in charge of the tabloid suggested.

With a diffident gaze, Xin You said, “She has already changed her number.”

“How about her family members? How about her brothers or grandparents!?”

…

chapters.title: Chapter 377 - Dermatophytosis
chapters.body:
Chapter 377 - Dermatophytosis

Xin You said vaguely, “Her brothers are very busy. even if I call them, they might not necessarily bother to answer me.”

In fact, he didn’t even have the contact information of Xiang Chen and the others.

In fact, there was actually nothing between Xin You and “Xiang Yi”. He was at least an experienced man who had seen enough of the world. There was no way she could hide her thoughts from him.

Besides, it wasn’t that he didn’t like “Xiang Yi” but the other way around!

However, Xin You felt that if he made it seem more dramatic, he would be able to garner more attention and gain more publicity. Now, many influencers wanted to be signed to his company!

“What about Xiang Yi’s grandparents? They’re doing a live stream now. If you call them now, it’ll definitely generate higher traffic and popularity!” the person in charge of the tabloid media outlet instigated.

They were not philanthropists and they had taken such a great risk to do this exposé, precisely for the sake of money.

Xin You’s wellbeing was not within their concern.

“Think about your company, if you become the top agency of the industry and produce A-list influencers, that’d be more impressive than celebrity agencies…”

While listening to it, Xin You was tempted.

“I have her grandfather’s number, but I can’t guarantee that he will pick up.”

Overjoyed, the person in charge exclaimed, “Alright, alright! Regardless of whether he picks up or not, we’ll have content to write about!”

If he didn’t pick up, they could write articles with titles like “Xiang Yi’s Grandfather Treats His Granddaughter Like Garbage, He Abandoned Her and Shows No Concern About Her Marriage”, which would attract lots of attention all the same!

Xin You said, “Alright then.”

…

A few minutes later…

In the gazebo of the manor, Xiang Yin’s cell phone started ringing.

“Good luck to you, the love and joy that luck brings…”

The grounded cell phone ringtone made the staff on set burst into laughter uncontrollably.

In particular, Li Jianyu’s demonic laughter made the netizens who were watching the live stream, leave all sorts of remarks about it:

—— [Xiang Yi’s grandfather’s mobile ringtone is so cute!]

—— [Son, others take the lead in singing but you take the lead in laughing!]

—— [Director: My variety show doesn’t amuse you, huh? Hmph, I’ll take the lead in laughing!]

…

Looking at the number on his phone screen, Xiang Yin sneered and hung up! Although he was advanced in years, he had an excellent memory.

Xiang Yin may be a little angst and hot-tempered but he would never be so rude as to hang up on others so Xiang Yi was a little curious. She asked, “Grandpa, what’s wrong?”

Xiang Yin said, “Well, it’s all because of that pest you messed with!”

Xiang Yi was confused.

Xiang Yi’s grandmother frowned and asked, “Is it Xin You?”

“Who else could it be but him!?!”

Upon hearing the unfamiliar name, Xiang Yi nibbled on her rabbit-shaped candy in confusion.

Li Jianyu explained tactfully, “Xiang Yi, it’s a man who calls himself your ex-fiancé. He’s doing a live stream now and he’s trying to call your grandfather…”

He was obviously trying to get some clout.

As a live stream variety program that had a stable viewer number of over several millions, “Two Under One Roof” was highly influential.

The trick that Xin You was pulling was really unscrupulous and disgusting. He was obviously trying to use Xiang Yi’s fame and the show’s influence to increase his own popularity.

As they spoke, Xin You called again.

Xiang Yin was infuriated. “How do I block a mobile number!?”

After a moment of silence, Xiang Yi’s grandmother said, “Hand your phone to me.”

Despite being confused, the henpecked Xiang Yin habitually handed his phone over to her before his brain could process what he was doing.

Xiang Yi’s grandmothers pressed the answer button and spoke composedly with grace, “Mr. Xin, what’s the matter?”

chapters.title: Chapter 378 - Find Out What Nonsense He Wants
chapters.body:
Chapter 378 - Find Out What Nonsense He Wants

Chapter 378: Find Out What Nonsense He Wants

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

On the other end of the line, Xin You totally didn’t expect that someone would pick up the call so he hurriedly fumbled about for a few seconds before pretending to know her well as he answered, “Grandma, this is Xin You. How have yours and Grandpa’s health been lately?”

1

Xiang Yin was enraged. ‘How dare this shameless pest mention this!?!’

‘If not for him, the old lady wouldn’t have fainted in anger!’

However, the netizens thought that this “fiancé” of Xiang Yi’s was quite polite!

Hence, there were even more comments directed at Xiang Yi.

1

Many of them were so sour that it seemed to pervade through the screen.

—— [Seriously speaking, this uncle is decent-looking. He has an accomplished career and he’s very polite too. He’s more than good enough for Vase Fairy.]

1

—— [In my opinion, he’s really good catch who can get any woman he wants. Xiang Yi is just an actress, how can she have the cheek to pick on him?]

—— [Tsk, tsk, he has high standards. I think Xiang Yi is just a sly and scheming woman who looks innocent and harmless only on the surface. If she’s not picky, she wouldn’t be able to get shipped with Shi Sui now.]

…

Xiang Yi’s grandmother asked calmly, “My husband and I are doing well. What about you, Xin You? How is your leg?”

Xin You, who was on the other end of the line choked.

The unsavory past surfaced uncontrollably…

He had indeed gone to the Xiang family’s home before. Although he knew that “Xiang Yi” had an ulterior motive, he developed ill intentions out of lust and tried to get the deed done with him…

1

Unfortunately the door was kicked open the moment he locked it.

2

That day, it happened to be the day of the Xiang family’s gathering and all four of Xiang Yi’s brothers were around…

So Xin You was later hospitalised for three months. 🙂

2

Being struck in his sore spot, Xin You said harshly with an awkward expression, “Grandma, I actually have something to say to Xiang Yi… I wonder if you could give me her contact number?”

1

The person in charge of the tabloid media outlet had taught him to say that. If Old Mrs. Xiang refused, he would just ask her if it was because she was scared that Xiang Yi was still harboring feelings for him.

When the time comes, it would definitely make it to the headlines.

Unexpectedly…

Xiang Yi’s grandmother said leisurely, “If there’s anything you want to say, just say so.”

1

Xin You was stunned.

“I’ll send you the address, so that’s it for now.” Her attitude mellow but she wouldn’t take no for an answer. After saying that, he hung up.

Everyone was dumbfounded.

Xiang Yi’s grandmother was the most clear-headed person. Although she had a kind smile on her face,she was very sharp-tongued. “Since he wants to do a live stream, let’s satisfy him. Instead of making him shut up, let’s hear what nonsense he’s going to get up to.”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

Smog had probably inherited his calmness from his grandmother!

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “Grandma, you make so much sense.”

Old Mrs. Xiang gently stroked her granddaughter’s face and said, “Don’t be scared, we’ll protect you, Bunny.”

2

Xiang Yin was about to show off his cane but he heard Old Mrs. Xiang say, “Old man, go get my whip.”

1

Li Jianyu was startled and he hurriedly persuaded, “Grandma, we’re doing a live stream now. We can’t have any violent or gory scenes…”

Old Mrs. Xiang smiled and said, “There won’t be any.I’m going to teach Xiang Yi to play the spinning top.”

1

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘Something about this seems wrong?’

…

…

Xin You refused to go to the manor at first. After all, he was worried about his legs…

1

However, under the encouragement of the person in charge of the tabloid media outlet, he made up his mind and decided to go.

When he arrived at the manor, he was greeted with a shocking scene.

Xiang Yi’s grandmother, whose hair was white, pulled the whip of the spinning top with a loud, thunderous sound…

2

Xin You’s legs turned into jelly.

chapters.title: Chapter 379 - Little Baby (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 379 - Little Baby (1)

Chapter 379: Little Baby (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

However, Xiang Yi’s grandmother took advantage of the interval and gracefully gave everyone an explanation of the spinning top in layman terms.

“Spinning top is an old traditional game that makes for a good workout for the elderly. The harder the whip is struck, the faster the spinning top will spin…”

1

When she saw Xin You in the corner of her eye, Xiang Yi’s grandmother said smilingly, “There’s also a common folk term for it, called whipping thieves.”

Xin You shivered.

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Spinning top: Why do you want to hit me? aggrieved.jpg]

—— [I suspect that Old Mrs. Xiang is indirectly referring to Xin You. This is probably what it’s like to be elegantly vicious]

1

—— [Is Xin You shaking? No way, seriously? What a wimp]

—— [Hah, darned old woman, you’re just throwing your weight around because you’re old. It’s your granddaughter’s blessing that someone likes her!]

2

—— [If you’re sick, go get your illness cured! Xiang Yi is so lovable, everyone adores her. Who cares for a old sleazeball like you!?]

—— [Shi Sui: Old man? Thank you, I’m offended]

…

In the comment section of the live stream, some people cracked jokes, some made silly remarks, and some scolded them or got into arguments with each other. The number of viewers spiked at a speed that was visible to the naked eye and the comments soon covered the entire screen.

“How’s it going? Have you learned?” Xiang Yi’s grandmother looked at her.

She said with uncertainty, “I’ll give it a try.”

Old Mrs. Xiang then gave her the whip.

Xiang Yi rotated her wrist and stretched it a little before going on to swing it twice to get a feel of it.

1

She didn’t know what kind of material the whip was made of but it cut through the air with a crackling sound.

A tug on the whip made the spinning top move twice faster.

Xin You: …!!

He felt that he would die on the spot if the whip hit his body!

With a pretentious smile, Xin You greeted, “Hello, Grandpa and Grandma Xiang.” He also nodded to the crew of the program tea. “Hello guys,well done.”

He specially put on a silver gray suit and his hair was combed into a slick-back hairdo, which made him look rather suave and decent.

1

Hearing his voice, Xiang Yi turned around to look at him.

Her skin seemed to be glowing. After recuperating for a while, her face was supple and full of collagen and her myopia improved too. Her eyes were clear and she looked absolutely radiant.

The most amazing thing was that her temperament was still calm and gentle as if nothing will affect her regardless of how noisy her background was.

Xin You began to get tempted.

He felt that Xiang Yi had become even more beautiful than before…

1

If she would still pester him endlessly, he wouldn’t mind agreeing to go out with her…

At the very most, he could kick her away again when he gets sick of her.

2

As soon as that thought flashed past his mind, an icy cold gaze suddenly locked onto him.

Meeting the dangerous gaze in Shi Sui’s eyes, Xin You was so frightened that cold sweat seeped out of his forehead and he no longer dared to look at her.

“Mr. Xin,” Xiang Yi said calmly.

Hearing her clear voice, Xin You refused to give up and answered sleazily, “Xiang Yi, it’s been a while since we met, did you miss me?”

Xiang Yi took a step back to widen the distance between herself and him.

“I heard you have something to say to me?”

When he got closer to her, he seemed to have smelled the faint fragrance of her hair. He took a deep whiff of her hair and said, “If you want me to marry you, it’s not impossible, but you have to fulfill the conditions that I propose!”

2

Xiang Yi was confused.

Although she had a lot of doubts in mind, she maintained a courteous social etiquette.

“I’m sorry, I suffered from amnesia previously and it might have caused some misunderstandings…”

“Drop the act!” Xin You said confidently.. “You have to think through this carefully. If you miss this opportunity, you won’t get another one!”

2

chapters.title: Chapter 380 - Little Baby (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 380 - Little Baby (2)

Xiang Yi frowned. She had never had the habit of interrupting others when they were speaking so she chose to patiently let Xin You finish even though she felt that his words made no logical sense at all.

Xin You said, “Didn’t you say you were going to elope with me? I think it’s better for girls to have a little self-respect. If can get your family’s consent, I can consider going out with you.”

Xiang Yin had been putting up with him for a long time and these words from Xin You were the last straw. “Dream on! Don’t think of marrying into the Xiang family!”

Xin You said shamelessly, “I’m here now… Grandpa, didn’t you say that you haven’t forgiven Xiang Yi yet? The root cause of all this is me! I’m here to help you solve the problem with good intentions!”

Xiang Yin’s face was sullen.

How could he possibly really bear a grudge against Xiang Yi!?!

However…he had been keeping those thoughts to himself and didn’t have the cheek to announce it in public!

Xiang Yin had always been arrogant and his sudden silence would easily lead the netizens to misunderstand.

—— [I feel that Xin You also has a point…]

—— [Xin You isn’t that bad, is he? Why do you always think so badly of him?]

—— [He’s clearly a chauvinist. He keeps degrading women to gain control, what a disgusting man!]

—— [Go away, ugly man, stay away from Xiang Yi! I’m infuriated. Why does Xiang Yi have to bear the consequences of the mistakes that were made when she was suffering from amnesia!?! *cries*]

…

…

Xiang Yi was rather composed and she said, “I don’t have any plans to get married, and I don’t have any memories of you, Mr. Xin. I don’t think we will ever cross paths again.”

Xin You looked at Xiang Yi’s cold expression as she seemed to be drawing a line between them. He immediately panicked and exclaimed, “How can you go back on your word!?!”

Seemingly finding his words a little childish, he resorted to his forte again. “But you’re a filthy woman. Who else will want you except me!?!”

Not only did he criticize her verbally, he even glared at Zhong Yi and Jiangjiang.

Zhong Yi’s face turned pale and firmly shielded Jiangjiang behind her.

He knew too well the importance of a girl’s reputation.

He knew that having a child out of wedlock would often be frowned upon but usually, the woman would be the one getting criticized more harshly than men.

Now that he said that, he was deliberately misleading the crowd to think that Xiang Yi was no longer chaste!

Xiang Yin flew into a rage. “Nonsense! You’re spouting nonsense!”

He was so angry that he picked up his cane and wanted to break the leg of the annoying pest, Xin You!

Xin You hurriedly dodged backwards while still continuing to speak quickly, “I’ve said my piece. Xiang Yi, Ill give you the last five minutes to think about it…”

“That’s not necessary,” said Old Mrs. Xiang who looked composed and was dressed elegantly. “Regardless of Xiang Yi or other girls, they all live for themselves not for others.”

“In my opinion, your rumors and insults are just childish and ridiculous.”

“People who don’t know the truth will attack a girl because of her so-called ‘reputation’, but we, as her family, will never hurt her! Don’t you think so, old man?”

Old Mrs. Xiang looked at Xiang Yin with a smile.

Seemingly having been encouraged, he said loudly, “Xiang Yi is our baby! No one is allowed to hurt her!”

The advantage of his loud voice was showing at this moment.

“Bunny is our family’s little baby! No one is allowed to hurt her!”

“What forgiveness? I’ve never blamed her before! Not for one second!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 381 - Family Of Four, Shi Sui Is The Most Dog-Like (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 381 - Family Of Four, Shi Sui Is The Most Dog-Like (1)

Old Mr. Xiang’s voice was full of gusto. It was also clear and full of determination!

Zhong Yi, who was not far away, watched all of this in shock.

She was really envious of Xiang Yi…

When her family learned that she was pregnant with Jiangjiang back then, the first thing they did was to kick her out of the house, for fear that she would ruin the family’s reputation.

However, she was still forced to give her parents and her brother, a considerable amount of money every month, on the grounds that it was her duty to do so.

Meanwhile, Xiang Yi’s family protected her and supported her unconditionally…

Even the arrogant and hot-tempered Xiang Yin was willing to make adorable rabbit-shaped candy for her and swallowed his pride to defend her with determination!

Xin You still tried to repeat the same trick. “Well, then no one wants her anyway…”

“You shut up! So what if no one wants her? It’s not like our family can’t afford to feed her!” Xiang Yin retorted.

Xiang Yi’s heart was filled with emotions and she pinched her palm to get a grip on herself.

It turned out that her grandfather had never held it against her…

Old Mrs. Xiang was much more sharp-tongued. “Is a girl’s worth determined by whether she’s left on the shelves or not? Oh please, we’re in a modern era now and traditional mindsets no longer apply. Even an old woman like me knows the new era of freedom of marriage and love. Surely you’d know this too, right?”

Pretending to be surprised, Old Mrs. Xiang covered her mouth and exclaimed, “Ah, you’re not a fool, are you!?! Or did you parents pass away too young!?”

Xin You’s face suddenly turned red.

The Spicy Rabbits who were watching the live stream were exhilarated.

—— [The arrogant Grandpa and elegant Grandma are both so doting on Xiang Yi!]

—— [Your parents died early = you’re an orphan. Thanks to Grandma’s online classes!]

—— [Grandma Xiang’s combat power is definitely SSR level, Xin You is at most an R, right?]

…

Xin You’s eyes ere shifty as he didn’t expect Xiang Yi’s grandmother to be such a tough nut to crack.

They had clearly been hurt badly by “Xiang Yi” so why did they choose to forgive her!?!

That was beyond what Xin You could fathom.

Since the family card didn’t work, Xin You decided to try pressurizing Xiang Yi.

‘Doesn’t she want to break free from the Xiang family?’

‘How can she succeed without me!?’

When Xin You thought of this, he suddenly mustered up the courage again and looked at Xiang Yi with devotion. “Actually, I don’t dislike you that much. You’re still quite outstanding…”

‘See, only I can recognize Xiang Yi’s attributes!’

He had used the tactic of belittling before praising, numerous times in the past.

Young and ignorant girls like Xiang Yi were the most gullible.

In the next second…

Xiang Yi swung the whip expressionlessly, giving Xin You such a huge fright that he screamed and almost jumped up!

“Get out of the way, you’re blocking me from playing spinning top.”

Xin You: ???

The netizens were appalled.

Only then did the crowd shift their attention to the whip that she was holding.

They shivered in unison.

Amidst the cold and somber atmosphere, a soft laughter tickled their hearts.

“Xiang Yi, will you teach me?”

Shi Sui, who had been acting as a bystander for a long time, drawled.

“Sure.”

Xiang Yi gave Shi Sui some verbal instructions and he took the whip from her. He was a fast learner so he managed to get the knack of it after lashing the whip twice, and the spinning top spun even faster.

The comments of the live stream changed again.

—— [This is so immersive. I think Shi Sui is a villain who has the tendency to commit domestic violence!]

—— [!!!! When others wield the whip, they look like horse hands but why is this man so darned handsome!?!]

chapters.title: Chapter 382 - Family Of Four, Shi Sui Is The Most Dog-Like (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 382 - Family Of Four, Shi Sui Is The Most Dog-Like (2)

Xin You: …!!

He somehow felt that this man was treating the spinning top as him…

In particular, his gaze seemed gentle but full of a strong oppressiveness. His scalp tingled and turned numb as he continued to denigrate Xiang Yi, “You’d better stay away from such a woman, she would casually elope with someone…”

“Is that so?” Shi Sui chuckled and his surrounding scenery seemed to have come to life with his laughter. “Is there such a good thing?”

Xin You: …!!

There was an uproar in the live stream”

—— [Is this an official announcement???]

—— [Thanks for the help, old friend, you can leave now!]

—— [Ahhhhhh, Brother, don’t smile like that, who can stand it!?!]

…

“Attacking and degrading women is not what a gentleman does, and it doesn’t make you look noble or high and mighty,” Shi Sui said unhurriedly. “If you can’t even be respectful, I highly doubt your true purpose for coming here to look for Xiang Yi.”

There are some things that people know, but they just don’t state them explicitly.

However, Shi Sui exposed Xin You’s ugly and filthy mind!

Xin You was immediately embarrassed, “I-I came to look for her because she said she wanted to marry me, and even pestered me…”

“So what? Do you fancy her?”

“Of course not, but after all, she pestered me so much…” Xin You began to repeat what he said just now under Shi Sui’s intimidating and deterring gaze.

Shi Sui nodded slightly and looked like he had understood something. He said, “Mr. Xin, you really contradict yourself. While despising and undermining Xiang Yi, you cling onto her like glue and pester her endlessly. Regardless of her wishes, you insist that you must marry her. I think I know of a word to describe your behavior…”

After a pause, he turned to look at the camera, tilted his head slightly and said, “If I say it out loud, it might get our live stream show canceled.”

He gently placed his long and slender finger on his lips. “Shh…”

A whole lot of viewers in front of their respective screens were greeted with a beautiful sight!

—— [Shocking! Shi Sui knows to act cute too!?!]

—— [Okay, okay, all of you, stop talking! Otherwise, I’ll have to write down your names!]

—— [Hahahhaha, Shi Sui is so mean, most guys choose to solve things through a fight but he’s such an expert at putting others to shame!]

…

Xin You was rendered speechless. He stammered for a long time, unable to speak at all.

At this point the viewers could tell that he had evil intentions. They were not fools after all.

However, there were still people who scolded Xiang Yi for holding herself cheap.

Shi Sui seemed to have guessed the public opinion on the Internet. He leaned lazily on the pillar of the gazebo with his long legs slightly curved. “Grandpa Xiang doesn’t even like me, how can he possibly accept you?”

Everyone was dumbfounded.

‘Come on, you’re a movie star! Can you pay more attention to your image!?!’

‘How can you do yourself dirty like that!?!’

‘You’re worse than the haters!!!’

Xiang Yin, who had always been displeased with Shi Sui felt that this brat…was still acceptable.

He humphed and exclaimed, “He’s just an annoying pest, how can he be compared to you? It’s simply awful to compare you two with each other!”

Xin You was speechless. He genuinely felt attacked.

Old Mrs. Xiang smiled and said, “Mr. Xin, you must not feel inferior, there’s still something that you beat Shi Sui in. Although you are ugly, you have thick skin!”

Xin You: “…”

‘Double attack.’

At this moment, Xiao Naofu, who had been missing-in-action for a long time finally returned with a fat rat in its mouth. It lightly jumped to Xin You’s feet and dropped it on his shoe!

Xin You exclaimed, “Ahhhh, rat! There’s a rat!”

He was so frightened and disoriented that he looked just like an absurd and ridiculous clown.

Everyone else snickered.

Anger arose in Xin You’s heart and he kicked Xiao Naofu viciously.

A creamy yellow figure next to him moved Xiao Naofu away. Xin You’s foot had barely touched its fur but Little Xiji started rolling on the ground and rolled far, far away from Xiao Naofu while humphing aggrievedly. “Woof…”

Xin You widened his eyes in utter astonishment!

‘Scam! This is a scam!! Why are dogs so pretentious these days too?!?!’

chapters.title: Chapter 383 - Family Of Four, Shi Sui Is The Most Dog-Like (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 383 - Family Of Four, Shi Sui Is The Most Dog-Like (3)

In the eyes of netizens, Little Xiji was trying to protect Xiao Naofu, but it ended up getting kicked hard by the latter, which was simply outrageous!

—— [Dog lovers are here to condemn!]

—— [Damn, this ugly man is too vicious!]

—— [It’s just a vulnerable and helpless dog! /pity /pity]

…

Someone said Xiao Naofu was at fault in the first place, but they were immediately scolded.

—— [It’s only right for cats to catch rats!]

—— [Is Xin You too absurd and outrageous that even Xiao Naofu can’t stand it and wanted to teach him a lesson for Xiang Yi?]

—— [I don’t care, I don’t care, Xiao Naofu is the cutest in the world! I won’t allow anyone in the world to dislike it!]

…

Xiang Yi quickly went to check Little Xiji’s injury. Little Xiji went all the way with the act, grunting and rubbing its head against her calf.

Even Xiao Naofu was tricked and scurried over.

Meow~ Meow~

—— [Bumpkin, what’s wrong with you?!]

Little Xiji barked. “Woof UwU ”

Xiao Naofu did not understand dog language and merely thought that Little Xiji was saying that its wound was hurting.

After a few seconds of hesitation, it condescended to lick Little Xiji’s fur while bearing with the discomfort.

“Meow”

—— [It won’t hurt anymore after I lick it!]

This cordial and heartwarming scene was all the more heartbreaking and infuriating!

Xin You could never have imagined that while using public opinion could manipulate the emotions of netizens, it would easily lead to a backlash!!

—— [Tell him to get lost! Tell him to get lost!!]

—— [Let’s all write a letter to Grandma and ask her to whip him! Treat him like a spinning top!]

—— [My heart aches for Little Xiji, Xiao Naofu must blame himself for it]

—— [U1S1 I ship Little Xiji and Xiao Naofu, Xiao Naofu even took the initiative to lick Little Xiji’s fur! It means love and affection in the animal world!!]

…

Xiang Yi looked up with a cold gaze.

Faced with her gaze, Xin You’s heart began to race as he felt that Xiang Yi was like a complete stranger.

From the vain and pompous girl who wore her heart on her sleeve, she turned into an existence he didn’t dare to look straight at and didn’t dare to violate!

“I-I didn’t mean to kick it…” Xin You broke out in cold sweat. “Besides, it’s just a beast. So what if I kicked it, can a beast compare with a human?”

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “You’re right.”

Xin You heaved a sigh of relief. ‘It seems that she still cares about me…’

In the next second, Xiang Yi spoke indifferently.

“You’re considered a human too?”

Xin You: …!!

In the livestream:

Even the staff on set were dumbfounded.

‘Damn it, Xiang Yi knows how to insult others too!?!’

Shi Sui said languidly, “It’d be an insult to beasts if you call him one.”

Xiang Yi snorted with laughter. “He’s not worthy.”

The two of them remarked one after the other, cooperating perfectly, bringing the lethality to the maximum!

Xin You’s face was really sullen, but he didn’t know how to retort.

—— [Am I considered a human too? She has one more insult in her repertoire!]

—— [Shi Sui and Xiang Yi have so much chemistry with each other. They’re like a pair of parents protecting their kid.]

—— [So Xiang Yi also has a temper, so cute! I want her!]

…

“Mr. Xin, goodbye, I won’t see you off.” Xiang Yi’s grandmother pulled her cardigan together elegantly.

Xin You said loudly, “Xiang Yi, I’m leaving. Don’t regret this!”

Xiang Yi rubbed the back of Little Xiji’s neck, got up, and walked toward him.

Xin You was nervous and expectant, his heart thumping wildly.

That stunningly beautiful face got closer and closer to him…

Whoosh———

Xiang Yi grabbed him by his collar and picked him up. As his legs dangled in the air, Xin You seemed horrified.

She raised her brows gently and said, as if she was bestowing a blessing on him, “You can get lost now!”
